authors_text: Yajue Yang,Pinxin Long,Jia Pan,Xinbin Song,Liangjun Zhang
title: Optimization-Based Framework for Excavation Trajectory Generation
title_zh: 基于优化的挖掘轨迹生成框架
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel optimization-based framework for autonomous excavator trajectory generation under various objectives, including minimum joint displacement and minimum time. Traditional methods on excavation trajectory generation usually separate the excavation motion into a sequence of fixed phases, resulting in limited trajectory searching space. Our framework explores the space of all possible excavation trajectories represented with waypoints interpolated by a polynomial spline, thereby enabling optimization over a larger searching space. We formulate a generic task specification for excavation by constraining the instantaneous motion of the bucket and further add a target-oriented constraint, i.e. swept volume that indicates the estimated amount of excavated materials. To formulate time related objectives and constraints, we introduce time intervals between waypoints as variables into the optimization framework. We implement the proposed framework and evaluate its performance on a UR5 robotic arm. The experimental results demonstrate that the generated trajectories are able to excavate sufficient mass of soil for different terrain shapes and have 60% shorter minimal length than traditional excavation methods. We further compare our one-stage time optimal trajectory generation with the two-stage method. The result shows that trajectories generated by our one-stage method cost 18% less time on average.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel optimization-based framework for autonomous excavator trajectory generation under various objectives, including minimum joint displacement and minimum time. Traditional methods on excavation trajectory generation usually separate the excavation motion into a sequence of fixed phases, resulting in limited trajectory searching space. Our framework explores the space of all possible excavation trajectories represented with waypoints interpolated by a polynomial spline, thereby enabling optimization over a larger searching space. We formulate a generic task specification for excavation by constraining the instantaneous motion of the bucket and further add a target-oriented constraint, i.e. swept volume that indicates the estimated amount of excavated materials. To formulate time related objectives and constraints, we introduce time intervals between waypoints as variables into the optimization framework. We implement the proposed framework and evaluate its performance on a UR5 robotic arm. The experimental results demonstrate that the generated trajectories are able to excavate sufficient mass of soil for different terrain shapes and have 60% shorter minimal length than traditional excavation methods. We further compare our one-stage time optimal trajectory generation with the two-stage method. The result shows that trajectories generated by our one-stage method cost 18% less time on average.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于优化的新型框架，用于在各种目标（包括最小关节位移和最短时间）下自动生成挖掘机轨迹。传统的挖掘轨迹生成方法通常将挖掘运动分成一系列固定阶段，导致轨迹搜索空间有限。我们的框架探索了所有可能的挖掘轨迹的空间，这些轨迹由多项式样条插值的路点表示，从而能够在更大的搜索空间上进行优化。我们通过约束铲斗的瞬时运动来制定挖掘的通用任务规范，并进一步添加面向目标的约束，即表示估计挖掘材料量的扫掠体积。为了制定与时间相关的目标和约束，我们将航路点之间的时间间隔作为变量引入优化框架中。我们实现了所提出的框架并评估其在 UR5 机械臂上的性能。实验结果表明，所生成的轨迹能够针对不同地形形状挖掘足够量的土壤，并且最小长度比传统挖掘方法短 60%。我们进一步将一阶段时间最优轨迹生成与两阶段方法进行比较。结果表明，我们的一级方法生成的轨迹平均花费的时间减少了 18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化的自主挖掘机轨迹生成框架，旨在生成满足不同目标（如最小关节位移和最短时间）的挖掘轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统挖掘轨迹生成方法将运动分解为固定阶段，导致轨迹搜索空间受限，难以适应复杂工况和优化多目标需求。
AI.method: 通过多项式样条插值航路点表示所有可能轨迹，将时间间隔作为优化变量，并引入瞬时运动约束和目标体积约束，构建通用任务规范进行优化求解。
AI.result: 实验表明，生成的轨迹在UR5机械臂上可挖掘不同地形的足够土壤质量，轨迹长度比传统方法缩短60%，时间成本平均减少18%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过扩大搜索空间和引入时间变量优化，显著提升了轨迹生成效率与挖掘性能，优于传统分阶段方法。

authors_text: Yu Sun,Qian Bao,Wu Liu,Wenpeng Gao,Yili Fu,Chuang Gan,Tao Mei
title: Synthetic Training for Monocular Human Mesh Recovery
title_zh: 单目人体网格恢复的综合训练
abstract: Recovering 3D human mesh from monocular images is a popular topic in computer vision and has a wide range of applications. This paper aims to estimate 3D mesh of multiple body parts (e.g., body, hands) with large-scale differences from a single RGB image. Existing methods are mostly based on iterative optimization, which is very time-consuming. We propose to train a single-shot model to achieve this goal. The main challenge is lacking training data that have complete 3D annotations of all body parts in 2D images. To solve this problem, we design a multi-branch framework to disentangle the regression of different body properties, enabling us to separate each component's training in a synthetic training manner using unpaired data available. Besides, to strengthen the generalization ability, most existing methods have used in-the-wild 2D pose datasets to supervise the estimated 3D pose via 3D-to-2D projection. However, we observe that the commonly used weak-perspective model performs poorly in dealing with the external foreshortening effect of camera projection. Therefore, we propose a depth-to-scale (D2S) projection to incorporate the depth difference into the projection function to derive per-joint scale variants for more proper supervision. The proposed method outperforms previous methods on the CMU Panoptic Studio dataset according to the evaluation results and achieves comparable results on the Human3.6M body and STB hand benchmarks. More impressively, the performance in close shot images gets significantly improved using the proposed D2S projection for weak supervision, while maintains obvious superiority in computational efficiency.
summary: Recovering 3D human mesh from monocular images is a popular topic in computer vision and has a wide range of applications. This paper aims to estimate 3D mesh of multiple body parts (e.g., body, hands) with large-scale differences from a single RGB image. Existing methods are mostly based on iterative optimization, which is very time-consuming. We propose to train a single-shot model to achieve this goal. The main challenge is lacking training data that have complete 3D annotations of all body parts in 2D images. To solve this problem, we design a multi-branch framework to disentangle the regression of different body properties, enabling us to separate each component's training in a synthetic training manner using unpaired data available. Besides, to strengthen the generalization ability, most existing methods have used in-the-wild 2D pose datasets to supervise the estimated 3D pose via 3D-to-2D projection. However, we observe that the commonly used weak-perspective model performs poorly in dealing with the external foreshortening effect of camera projection. Therefore, we propose a depth-to-scale (D2S) projection to incorporate the depth difference into the projection function to derive per-joint scale variants for more proper supervision. The proposed method outperforms previous methods on the CMU Panoptic Studio dataset according to the evaluation results and achieves comparable results on the Human3.6M body and STB hand benchmarks. More impressively, the performance in close shot images gets significantly improved using the proposed D2S projection for weak supervision, while maintains obvious superiority in computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 从单目图像中恢复 3D 人体网格是计算机视觉领域的一个热门话题，具有广泛的应用。本文旨在估计与单个 RGB 图像存在较大差异的多个身体部位（例如身体、手）的 3D 网格。现有的方法大多基于迭代优化，非常耗时。我们建议训练单次模型来实现这一目标。主要挑战是缺乏对 2D 图像中所有身体部位进行完整 3D 注释的训练数据。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个多分支框架来解开不同身体属性的回归，使我们能够使用可用的不成对数据以综合训练方式分离每个组件的训练。此外，为了增强泛化能力，大多数现有方法都使用野外 2D 位姿数据集来通过 3D 到 2D 投影来监督估计的 3D 位姿。然而，我们观察到常用的弱透视模型在处理相机投影的外部透视效果方面表现不佳。因此，我们提出了一种深度到尺度（D2S）投影，将深度差合并到投影函数中，以导出每个关节的尺度变体，以实现更适当的监督。根据评估结果，所提出的方法在 CMU Panoptic Studio 数据集上优于以前的方法，并在 Human3.6M 身体和 STB 手基准上取得了可比的结果。更令人印象深刻的是，使用所提出的 D2S 投影进行弱监督，近距离图像的性能得到显着提高，同时在计算效率上保持明显的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从单目图像中恢复人体多个部位（如身体、手部）的3D网格，提出单次模型解决现有方法效率低和数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖耗时的迭代优化且缺乏完整3D标注数据，同时弱透视模型无法有效处理相机投影的外部缩短效应。
AI.method: 设计多分支框架分离不同身体属性的回归，利用未配对数据合成训练；提出深度到尺度（D2S）投影，结合深度差异改进投影函数。
AI.result: 在CMU Panoptic Studio数据集上优于现有方法，在Human3.6M和STB基准中表现相当，近距离图像性能显著提升且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过合成训练和D2S投影有效解决了数据不足与投影模型缺陷，为单目人体网格恢复提供了高效且准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Xingjian Du,Zhesong Yu,Bilei Zhu,Xiaoou Chen,Zejun Ma
title: ByteCover: Cover Song Identification via Multi-Loss Training
title_zh: ByteCover：通过多重损失训练进行翻唱歌曲识别
abstract: We present in this paper ByteCover, which is a new feature learning method for cover song identification (CSI). ByteCover is built based on the classical ResNet model, and two major improvements are designed to further enhance the capability of the model for CSI. In the first improvement, we introduce the integration of instance normalization (IN) and batch normalization (BN) to build IBN blocks, which are major components of our ResNet-IBN model. With the help of the IBN blocks, our CSI model can learn features that are invariant to the changes of musical attributes such as key, tempo, timbre and genre, while preserving the version information. In the second improvement, we employ the BNNeck method to allow a multi-loss training and encourage our method to jointly optimize a classification loss and a triplet loss, and by this means, the inter-class discrimination and intra-class compactness of cover songs, can be ensured at the same time. A set of experiments demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of ByteCover on multiple datasets, and in the Da-TACOS dataset, ByteCover outperformed the best competitive system by 20.9\%.
summary: We present in this paper ByteCover, which is a new feature learning method for cover song identification (CSI). ByteCover is built based on the classical ResNet model, and two major improvements are designed to further enhance the capability of the model for CSI. In the first improvement, we introduce the integration of instance normalization (IN) and batch normalization (BN) to build IBN blocks, which are major components of our ResNet-IBN model. With the help of the IBN blocks, our CSI model can learn features that are invariant to the changes of musical attributes such as key, tempo, timbre and genre, while preserving the version information. In the second improvement, we employ the BNNeck method to allow a multi-loss training and encourage our method to jointly optimize a classification loss and a triplet loss, and by this means, the inter-class discrimination and intra-class compactness of cover songs, can be ensured at the same time. A set of experiments demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of ByteCover on multiple datasets, and in the Da-TACOS dataset, ByteCover outperformed the best competitive system by 20.9\%.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中提出了 ByteCover，这是一种用于翻唱歌曲识别（CSI）的新特征学习方法。 ByteCover基于经典ResNet模型构建，并设计了两项重大改进，以进一步增强模型针对CSI的能力。在第一个改进中，我们引入了实例归一化（IN）和批量归一化（BN）的集成来构建IBN块，这是我们的ResNet-IBN模型的主要组成部分。在 IBN 块的帮助下，我们的 CSI 模型可以学习对调、节奏、音色和流派等音乐属性变化不变的特征，同时保留版本信息。在第二个改进中，我们采用BNNeck方法允许多重损失训练，并鼓励我们的方法联合优化分类损失和三元组损失，通过这种方式，可以同时保证翻唱歌曲的类间区分度和类内紧凑性。一组实验证明了 ByteCover 在多个数据集上的有效性和效率，并且在 Da-TACOS 数据集中，ByteCover 的性能比最佳竞争系统高出 20.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的音乐封面歌曲识别方法ByteCover，通过多损失训练提高识别性能。
AI.motivation: 音乐封面歌曲识别（CSI）任务面临音乐属性变化带来的挑战，如调式、速度、音色和风格等，因此需要一种更鲁棒的特征学习方法。

AI.result: 在多个数据集上进行了实验，结果表明ByteCover在Da-TACOS数据集上优于现有最佳系统20.9%。
AI.conclusion: ByteCover通过引入IBN块和多损失训练方法，显著提高了音乐封面歌曲识别的性能，验证了其有效性和高效性。

search_text: ByteCover: Cover Song Identification via Multi-Loss Training ByteCover：通过多重损失训练进行翻唱歌曲识别 We present in this paper ByteCover, which is a new feature learning method for cover song identification (CSI). In the first improvement, we introduce the integration of instance normalization (IN) and batch normalization (BN) to build IBN blocks, which are major components of our ResNet-IBN model. title: Cross-directional Feature Fusion Network for Building Damage Assessment from Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 用于根据卫星图像进行建筑物损坏评估的横向特征融合网络
abstract: Fast and effective responses are required when a natural disaster (e.g., earthquake, hurricane, etc.) strikes. Building damage assessment from satellite imagery is critical before an effective response is conducted. High-resolution satellite images provide rich information with pre- and post-disaster scenes for analysis. However, most existing works simply use pre- and post-disaster images as input without considering their correlations. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-directional fusion strategy to better explore the correlations between pre- and post-disaster images. Moreover, the data augmentation method CutMix is exploited to tackle the challenge of hard classes. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on a large-scale building damage assessment dataset -- xBD.
summary: Fast and effective responses are required when a natural disaster (e.g., earthquake, hurricane, etc.) strikes. Building damage assessment from satellite imagery is critical before an effective response is conducted. High-resolution satellite images provide rich information with pre- and post-disaster scenes for analysis. However, most existing works simply use pre- and post-disaster images as input without considering their correlations. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-directional fusion strategy to better explore the correlations between pre- and post-disaster images. Moreover, the data augmentation method CutMix is exploited to tackle the challenge of hard classes. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on a large-scale building damage assessment dataset -- xBD.
abstract_zh: 当自然灾害（例如地震、飓风等）发生时，需要快速有效的响应。在采取有效应对措施之前，根据卫星图像进行建筑损坏评估至关重要。高分辨率卫星图像提供了丰富的灾前和灾后场景信息以供分析。然而，大多数现有作品只是简单地使用灾前和灾后图像作为输入，而没有考虑它们的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的横向融合策略，以更好地探索灾前和灾后图像之间的相关性。此外，利用数据增强方法 CutMix 来应对硬类的挑战。所提出的方法在大规模建筑损坏评估数据集 xBD 上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交叉方向特征融合网络，用于通过卫星图像进行建筑物损害评估。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建筑物损害评估中未充分考虑灾前与灾后图像间的关联性，导致评估效果受限。
AI.method: 设计交叉方向特征融合策略以捕捉图像间关联，并结合CutMix数据增强方法优化困难类别识别。
AI.result: 在xBD数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征融合与数据增强的结合，显著提升了建筑物损害评估的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xiaowei Jia,Beiyu Lin,Jacob Zwart,Jeffrey Sadler,Alison Appling,Samantha Oliver,Jordan Read
title: Graph-based Reinforcement Learning for Active Learning in Real Time: An Application in Modeling River Networks
title_zh: 基于图的强化学习实时主动学习：在河网建模中的应用
abstract: Effective training of advanced ML models requires large amounts of labeled data, which is often scarce in scientific problems given the substantial human labor and material cost to collect labeled data. This poses a challenge on determining when and where we should deploy measuring instruments (e.g., in-situ sensors) to collect labeled data efficiently. This problem differs from traditional pool-based active learning settings in that the labeling decisions have to be made immediately after we observe the input data that come in a time series. In this paper, we develop a real-time active learning method that uses the spatial and temporal contextual information to select representative query samples in a reinforcement learning framework. To reduce the need for large training data, we further propose to transfer the policy learned from simulation data which is generated by existing physics-based models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by predicting streamflow and water temperature in the Delaware River Basin given a limited budget for collecting labeled data. We further study the spatial and temporal distribution of selected samples to verify the ability of this method in selecting informative samples over space and time.
summary: Effective training of advanced ML models requires large amounts of labeled data, which is often scarce in scientific problems given the substantial human labor and material cost to collect labeled data. This poses a challenge on determining when and where we should deploy measuring instruments (e.g., in-situ sensors) to collect labeled data efficiently. This problem differs from traditional pool-based active learning settings in that the labeling decisions have to be made immediately after we observe the input data that come in a time series. In this paper, we develop a real-time active learning method that uses the spatial and temporal contextual information to select representative query samples in a reinforcement learning framework. To reduce the need for large training data, we further propose to transfer the policy learned from simulation data which is generated by existing physics-based models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by predicting streamflow and water temperature in the Delaware River Basin given a limited budget for collecting labeled data. We further study the spatial and temporal distribution of selected samples to verify the ability of this method in selecting informative samples over space and time.
abstract_zh: 高级机器学习模型的有效训练需要大量标记数据，但考虑到收集标记数据需要大量的人力和材料成本，这些数据在科学问题中通常是稀缺的。这对确定何时何地部署测量仪器（例如现场传感器）以有效收集标记数据提出了挑战。这个问题与传统的基于池的主动学习设置不同，因为我们必须在观察时间序列中的输入数据后立即做出标记决策。在本文中，我们开发了一种实时主动学习方法，该方法使用空间和时间上下文信息在强化学习框架中选择代表性查询样本。为了减少对大量训练数据的需求，我们进一步建议转移从现有基于物理的模型生成的模拟数据中学到的策略。在收集标记数据的预算有限的情况下，我们通过预测特拉华河流域的水流和水温来证明所提出方法的有效性。我们进一步研究所选样本的空间和时间分布，以验证该方法在空间和时间上选择信息样本的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图的强化学习方法，用于实时主动学习，通过空间和时间上下文信息选择代表性样本，并在有限的标注数据预算下应用于河流网络建模。
AI.motivation: 科学问题中高质量标注数据稀缺且收集成本高，传统主动学习难以满足实时决策需求，需开发能在时间序列数据中即时选择标注样本的方法。
AI.method: 构建强化学习框架，结合空间-时间上下文信息选择样本；通过物理模型生成的模拟数据迁移学习策略，减少对大规模训练数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在特拉华河流域案例中验证了方法有效性，成功预测径流和水温，并通过样本时空分布分析证明其选择信息样本的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强化学习与迁移学习结合，在有限标注预算下实现了河流网络建模的高效样本选择，验证了时空上下文信息对主动学习的关键作用。

This poses a challenge on determining when and where we should deploy measuring instruments (e.g., in-situ sensors) to collect labeled data efficiently. This problem differs from traditional pool-based active learning settings in that the labeling decisions have to be made immediately after we observe the input data that come in a time series. In this paper, we develop a real-time active learning method that uses the spatial and temporal contextual information to select representative query samples in a reinforcement learning framework. To reduce the need for large training data, we further propose to transfer the policy learned from simulation data which is generated by existing physics-based models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by predicting streamflow and water temperature in the Delaware River Basin given a limited budget for collecting labeled data. We further study the spatial and temporal distribution of selected samples to verify the ability of this method in selecting informative samples over space and time. 高级机器学习模型的有效训练需要大量标记数据，但考虑到收集标记数据需要大量的人力和材料成本，这些数据在科学问题中通常是稀缺的。这对确定何时何地部署测量仪器（例如现场传感器）以有效收集标记数据提出了挑战。这个问题与传统的基于池的主动学习设置不同，因为我们必须在观察时间序列中的输入数据后立即做出标记决策。在本文中，我们开发了一种实时主动学习方法，该方法使用空间和时间上下文信息在强化学习框架中选择代表性查询样本。为了减少对大量训练数据的需求，我们进一步建议转移从现有基于物理的模型生成的模拟数据中学到的策略。在收集标记数据的预算有限的情况下，我们通过预测特拉华河流域的水流和水温来证明所提出方法的有效性。我们进一步研究所选样本的空间和时间分布，以验证该方法在空间和时间上选择信息样本的能力。 本文提出一种基于图的强化学习方法，用于实时主动学习，通过空间和时间上下文信息选择代表性样本，并在有限的标注数据预算下应用于河流网络建模。 Xiaowei Jia,Beiyu Lin,Jacob Zwart,Jeffrey Sadler,Alison Appling,Samantha Oliver,Jordan Read cs.LG,cs.AI

title: One-class Learning Towards Synthetic Voice Spoofing Detection
title_zh: 合成语音欺骗检测的一类学习
abstract: Human voices can be used to authenticate the identity of the speaker, but the automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems are vulnerable to voice spoofing attacks, such as impersonation, replay, text-to-speech, and voice conversion. Recently, researchers developed anti-spoofing techniques to improve the reliability of ASV systems against spoofing attacks. However, most methods encounter difficulties in detecting unknown attacks in practical use, which often have different statistical distributions from known attacks. Especially, the fast development of synthetic voice spoofing algorithms is generating increasingly powerful attacks, putting the ASV systems at risk of unseen attacks. In this work, we propose an anti-spoofing system to detect unknown synthetic voice spoofing attacks (i.e., text-to-speech or voice conversion) using one-class learning. The key idea is to compact the bona fide speech representation and inject an angular margin to separate the spoofing attacks in the embedding space. Without resorting to any data augmentation methods, our proposed system achieves an equal error rate (EER) of 2.19% on the evaluation set of ASVspoof 2019 Challenge logical access scenario, outperforming all existing single systems (i.e., those without model ensemble).
summary: Human voices can be used to authenticate the identity of the speaker, but the automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems are vulnerable to voice spoofing attacks, such as impersonation, replay, text-to-speech, and voice conversion. Recently, researchers developed anti-spoofing techniques to improve the reliability of ASV systems against spoofing attacks. However, most methods encounter difficulties in detecting unknown attacks in practical use, which often have different statistical distributions from known attacks. Especially, the fast development of synthetic voice spoofing algorithms is generating increasingly powerful attacks, putting the ASV systems at risk of unseen attacks. In this work, we propose an anti-spoofing system to detect unknown synthetic voice spoofing attacks (i.e., text-to-speech or voice conversion) using one-class learning. The key idea is to compact the bona fide speech representation and inject an angular margin to separate the spoofing attacks in the embedding space. Without resorting to any data augmentation methods, our proposed system achieves an equal error rate (EER) of 2.19% on the evaluation set of ASVspoof 2019 Challenge logical access scenario, outperforming all existing single systems (i.e., those without model ensemble).
abstract_zh: 人声可用于验证说话人的身份，但自动说话人验证（ASV）系统容易受到语音欺骗攻击，例如模仿、重放、文本到语音和语音转换。最近，研究人员开发了反欺骗技术，以提高 ASV 系统抵御欺骗攻击的可靠性。然而，大多数方法在实际使用中检测未知攻击时遇到困难，未知攻击通常具有与已知攻击不同的统计分布。特别是，合成语音欺骗算法的快速发展正在产生越来越强大的攻击，使 ASV 系统面临看不见的攻击风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种反欺骗系统，使用一类学习来检测未知的合成语音欺骗攻击（即文本到语音或语音转换）。关键思想是压缩真实的语音表示并注入角度余量以分离嵌入空间中的欺骗攻击。在不诉诸任何数据增强方法的情况下，我们提出的系统在 ASVspoof 2019 Challenge 逻辑访问场景的评估集上实现了 2.19% 的等错误率 (EER)，优于所有现有的单一系统（即没有模型集成的系统）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于一类学习的合成语音欺骗检测方法，用于提升自动说话人验证系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有反欺骗技术难以检测统计分布不同的未知攻击，而合成语音算法的快速发展加剧了这一问题。
AI.method: 通过压缩真实语音表示并注入角度间隔，在嵌入空间中分离欺骗攻击，无需数据增强。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2019逻辑访问场景测试集上实现2.19%的等错误率，优于所有现有单一系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效检测未知合成语音攻击，为提升ASV系统安全性提供了新思路。

title: Toward Better Generalization Bounds with Locally Elastic Stability
title_zh: 具有局部弹性稳定性的更好的泛化界限
abstract: Algorithmic stability is a key characteristic to ensure the generalization ability of a learning algorithm. Among different notions of stability, \emph{uniform stability} is arguably the most popular one, which yields exponential generalization bounds. However, uniform stability only considers the worst-case loss change (or so-called sensitivity) by removing a single data point, which is distribution-independent and therefore undesirable. There are many cases that the worst-case sensitivity of the loss is much larger than the average sensitivity taken over the single data point that is removed, especially in some advanced models such as random feature models or neural networks. Many previous works try to mitigate the distribution independent issue by proposing weaker notions of stability, however, they either only yield polynomial bounds or the bounds derived do not vanish as sample size goes to infinity. Given that, we propose \emph{locally elastic stability} as a weaker and distribution-dependent stability notion, which still yields exponential generalization bounds. We further demonstrate that locally elastic stability implies tighter generalization bounds than those derived based on uniform stability in many situations by revisiting the examples of bounded support vector machines, regularized least square regressions, and stochastic gradient descent.
summary: Algorithmic stability is a key characteristic to ensure the generalization ability of a learning algorithm. Among different notions of stability, \emph{uniform stability} is arguably the most popular one, which yields exponential generalization bounds. However, uniform stability only considers the worst-case loss change (or so-called sensitivity) by removing a single data point, which is distribution-independent and therefore undesirable. There are many cases that the worst-case sensitivity of the loss is much larger than the average sensitivity taken over the single data point that is removed, especially in some advanced models such as random feature models or neural networks. Many previous works try to mitigate the distribution independent issue by proposing weaker notions of stability, however, they either only yield polynomial bounds or the bounds derived do not vanish as sample size goes to infinity. Given that, we propose \emph{locally elastic stability} as a weaker and distribution-dependent stability notion, which still yields exponential generalization bounds. We further demonstrate that locally elastic stability implies tighter generalization bounds than those derived based on uniform stability in many situations by revisiting the examples of bounded support vector machines, regularized least square regressions, and stochastic gradient descent.
abstract_zh: 算法稳定性是保证学习算法泛化能力的关键特性。在不同的稳定性概念中，\emph{均匀稳定性}可以说是最流行的一种，它产生指数泛化界限。然而，均匀稳定性仅通过删​​除单个数据点来考虑最坏情况的损失变化（或所谓的敏感性），这是与分布无关的，因此是不可取的。在许多情况下，损失的最坏情况敏感性远大于删除的单个数据点的平均敏感性，特别是在一些高级模型中，例如随机特征模型或神经网络。许多先前的工作试图通过提出较弱的稳定性概念来缓解分布独立问题，然而，它们要么只产生多项式界限，要么当样本量趋于无穷大时，导出的界限不会消失。鉴于此，我们提出 \emph{局部弹性稳定性} 作为较弱且依赖于分布的稳定性概念，它仍然产生指数泛化界限。通过重新审视有界支持向量机、正则化最小二乘回归和随机梯度下降的示例，我们进一步证明，在许多情况下，局部弹性稳定性意味着比基于均匀稳定性导出的泛化界限更严格。

AI.tldr: 提出局部弹性稳定性概念，以改进机器学习算法的泛化界。
AI.motivation: 均匀稳定性因分布无关性导致泛化界松散，而现有弱稳定性概念无法兼顾指数级界与分布相关性。
AI.method: 定义局部弹性稳定性作为分布依赖的弱稳定性概念，结合数据分布特性分析算法扰动影响。
AI.result: 在支持向量机、正则化回归和SGD等模型中，局部弹性稳定性推导出比均匀稳定性更紧的泛化界。
AI.conclusion: 局部弹性稳定性有效平衡了分布依赖性与指数级泛化界，为模型分析提供新视角。

title: Interpretation of NLP models through input marginalization
title_zh: 通过输入边缘化解释 NLP 模型
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, to be published in the 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2020)
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, to be published in the 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2020)
abstract: To demystify the "black box" property of deep neural networks for natural language processing (NLP), several methods have been proposed to interpret their predictions by measuring the change in prediction probability after erasing each token of an input. Since existing methods replace each token with a predefined value (i.e., zero), the resulting sentence lies out of the training data distribution, yielding misleading interpretations. In this study, we raise the out-of-distribution problem induced by the existing interpretation methods and present a remedy; we propose to marginalize each token out. We interpret various NLP models trained for sentiment analysis and natural language inference using the proposed method.
summary: To demystify the "black box" property of deep neural networks for natural language processing (NLP), several methods have been proposed to interpret their predictions by measuring the change in prediction probability after erasing each token of an input. Since existing methods replace each token with a predefined value (i.e., zero), the resulting sentence lies out of the training data distribution, yielding misleading interpretations. In this study, we raise the out-of-distribution problem induced by the existing interpretation methods and present a remedy; we propose to marginalize each token out. We interpret various NLP models trained for sentiment analysis and natural language inference using the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 为了揭开自然语言处理（NLP）深度神经网络“黑匣子”特性的神秘面纱，人们提出了几种方法来通过测量擦除输入的每个标记后预测概率的变化来解释其预测。由于现有方法用预定义值（即零）替换每个标记，因此生成的句子不符合训练数据分布，从而产生误导性的解释。在本研究中，我们提出了现有解释方法引起的分布外问题并提出了补救措施；我们建议将每个代币边缘化。我们使用所提出的方法解释了经过训练用于情感分析和自然语言推理的各种 NLP 模型。

AI.tldr: 提出通过输入边际化方法解决现有NLP模型解释中的分布外问题，提升解释准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过替换标记为预定义值（如零）导致句子超出训练数据分布，产生误导性解释，需改进解释方法。
AI.method: 对每个输入标记进行边际化处理，而非替换为预定义值，以保持数据分布一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能更准确解释模型预测，减少分布外偏差。
AI.conclusion: 边际化方法有效缓解分布外问题，为NLP模型解释提供更可靠途径。

search_text: Interpretation of NLP models through input marginalization 通过输入边缘化解释 NLP 模型 To demystify the "black box" property of deep neural networks for natural language processing (NLP), several methods have been proposed to interpret their predictions by measuring the change in prediction probability after erasing each token of an input. Since existing methods replace each token with a predefined value (i.e., zero), the resulting sentence lies out of the training data distribution, yielding misleading interpretations. In this study, we raise the out-of-distribution problem induced by the existing interpretation methods and present a remedy; we propose to marginalize each token out. We interpret various NLP models trained for sentiment analysis and natural language inference using the proposed method. 为了揭开自然语言处理（NLP）深度神经网络“黑匣子”特性的神秘面纱，人们提出了几种方法来通过测量擦除输入的每个标记后预测概率的变化来解释其预测。由于现有方法用预定义值（即零）替换每个标记，因此生成的句子不符合训练数据分布，从而产生误导性的解释。在本研究中，我们提出了现有解释方法引起的分布外问题并提出了补救措施；我们建议将每个代币边缘化。我们使用所提出的方法解释了经过训练用于情感分析和自然语言推理的各种 NLP 模型。 提出通过输入边际化方法解决现有NLP模型解释中的分布外问题，提升解释准确性。 Siwon Kim,Jihun Yi,Eunji Kim,Sungroh Yoon cs.CL,cs.AI

title: A Neuro-Symbolic Humanlike Arm Controller for Sophia the Robot
title_zh: 机器人索菲亚的神经符号类人手臂控制器
abstract: We outline the design and construction of novel robotic arms using machine perception, convolutional neural networks, and symbolic AI for logical control and affordance indexing. We describe our robotic arms built with a humanlike mechanical configuration and aesthetic, with 28 degrees of freedom, touch sensors, and series elastic actuators. The arms were modelled in Roodle and Gazebo with URDF models, as well as Unity, and implement motion control solutions for solving live games of Baccarat (the casino card game), rock paper scissors, handshaking, and drawing. This includes live interactions with people, incorporating both social control of the hands and facial gestures, and physical inverse kinematics (IK) for grasping and manipulation tasks. The resulting framework is an integral part of the Sophia 2020 alpha platform, which is being used with ongoing research in the authors work with team AHAM, an ANA Avatar Xprize effort towards human-AI hybrid telepresence. These results are available to test on the broadly released Hanson Robotics Sophia 2020 robot platform, for users to try and extend.
summary: We outline the design and construction of novel robotic arms using machine perception, convolutional neural networks, and symbolic AI for logical control and affordance indexing. We describe our robotic arms built with a humanlike mechanical configuration and aesthetic, with 28 degrees of freedom, touch sensors, and series elastic actuators. The arms were modelled in Roodle and Gazebo with URDF models, as well as Unity, and implement motion control solutions for solving live games of Baccarat (the casino card game), rock paper scissors, handshaking, and drawing. This includes live interactions with people, incorporating both social control of the hands and facial gestures, and physical inverse kinematics (IK) for grasping and manipulation tasks. The resulting framework is an integral part of the Sophia 2020 alpha platform, which is being used with ongoing research in the authors work with team AHAM, an ANA Avatar Xprize effort towards human-AI hybrid telepresence. These results are available to test on the broadly released Hanson Robotics Sophia 2020 robot platform, for users to try and extend.
abstract_zh: 我们概述了使用机器感知、卷积神经网络和符号人工智能进行逻辑控制和可供性索引的新型机械臂的设计和构造。我们描述了我们的机械臂，其具有类似于人类的机械配置和美学，具有 28 个自由度、触摸传感器和串联弹性执行器。手臂在 Roodle 和 Gazebo 中使用 URDF 模型以及 Unity 进行建模，并实施运动控制解决方案来解决百家乐（赌场纸牌游戏）、剪刀石头布、握手和绘图等现场游戏。这包括与人的实时互动，结合手部和面部手势的社会控制，以及用于抓取和操作任务的物理逆运动学 (IK)。由此产生的框架是 Sophia 2020 alpha 平台的一个组成部分，该平台正在作者与 AHAM 团队合作的正在进行的研究中使用，AHAM 是 ANA Avatar Xprize 致力于实现人类与人工智能混合远程呈现的项目。这些结果可在广泛发布的 Hanson Robotics Sophia 2020 机器人平台上进行测试，供用户尝试和扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并构建了具有类人机械结构和美学的新型机械臂，结合神经网络与符号AI技术，实现Sophia机器人的人机交互与物理操作任务。
AI.motivation: 开发具备类人操作能力与社交互动功能的机械臂，以提升机器人在复杂场景下的适应性与人机协作效率。
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）、符号逻辑控制及逆运动学算法，结合28自由度机械结构、触觉传感器与多软件仿真平台（如Gazebo、Unity）实现动态控制。
AI.result: 成功实现Sophia 2020机械臂在博弈游戏、手势交互、物体抓取等任务中的实时操作，并集成至AHAM团队的混合现实远程呈现系统中。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为类人机器人提供了神经符号系统与物理交互的统一解决方案，推动了人机混合智能在远程协作领域的应用发展。

title: Predict and Use Latent Patterns for Short-Text Conversation
title_zh: 预测并使用短文本对话的潜在模式
abstract: Many neural network models nowadays have achieved promising performances in Chit-chat settings. The majority of them rely on an encoder for understanding the post and a decoder for generating the response. Without given assigned semantics, the models lack the fine-grained control over responses as the semantic mapping between posts and responses is hidden on the fly within the end-to-end manners. Some previous works utilize sampled latent words as a controllable semantic form to drive the generated response around the work, but few works attempt to use more complex semantic patterns to guide the generation. In this paper, we propose to use more detailed semantic forms, including latent responses and part-of-speech sequences sampled from the corresponding distributions, as the controllable semantics to guide the generation. Our results show that the richer semantics are not only able to provide informative and diverse responses, but also increase the overall performance of response quality, including fluency and coherence.
summary: Many neural network models nowadays have achieved promising performances in Chit-chat settings. The majority of them rely on an encoder for understanding the post and a decoder for generating the response. Without given assigned semantics, the models lack the fine-grained control over responses as the semantic mapping between posts and responses is hidden on the fly within the end-to-end manners. Some previous works utilize sampled latent words as a controllable semantic form to drive the generated response around the work, but few works attempt to use more complex semantic patterns to guide the generation. In this paper, we propose to use more detailed semantic forms, including latent responses and part-of-speech sequences sampled from the corresponding distributions, as the controllable semantics to guide the generation. Our results show that the richer semantics are not only able to provide informative and diverse responses, but also increase the overall performance of response quality, including fluency and coherence.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多神经网络模型在聊天环境中都取得了令人鼓舞的性能。其中大多数依靠编码器来理解帖子，并依靠解码器来生成响应。如果没有给定指定的语义，模型就缺乏对响应的细粒度控制，因为帖子和响应之间的语义映射在端到端方式中动态隐藏。之前的一些作品利用采样的潜在词作为可控的语义形式来驱动围绕作品生成的响应，但很少有作品尝试使用更复杂的语义模式来指导生成。在本文中，我们建议使用更详细的语义形式，包括从相应分布中采样的潜在响应和词性序列，作为指导生成的可控语义。我们的结果表明，更丰富的语义不仅能够提供信息丰富且多样化的响应，而且还可以提高响应质量的整体表现，包括流畅性和连贯性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用潜在语义模式（如潜在响应和词性序列）来增强短文本对话生成的可控性和响应质量。
AI.motivation: 现有对话模型依赖隐式语义映射，缺乏对生成响应的细粒度控制，且仅使用简单潜在词难以满足复杂语义引导需求。
AI.method: 从分布中采样潜在响应和词性序列作为可控语义，结合编码器-解码器框架指导对话生成过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，引入复杂语义模式显著提升了响应的多样性、流畅度和连贯性等质量指标。
AI.conclusion: 复杂潜在语义模式能有效增强对话生成的可控性与质量，为未来研究提供新方向。

title: Decentralized Attribution of Generative Models
title_zh: 生成模型的去中心化归因
abstract: Growing applications of generative models have led to new threats such as malicious personation and digital copyright infringement. One solution to these threats is model attribution, i.e., the identification of user-end models where the contents under question are generated from. Existing studies showed empirical feasibility of attribution through a centralized classifier trained on all user-end models. However, this approach is not scalable in reality as the number of models ever grows. Neither does it provide an attributability guarantee. To this end, this paper studies decentralized attribution, which relies on binary classifiers associated with each user-end model. Each binary classifier is parameterized by a user-specific key and distinguishes its associated model distribution from the authentic data distribution. We develop sufficient conditions of the keys that guarantee an attributability lower bound. Our method is validated on MNIST, CelebA, and FFHQ datasets. We also examine the trade-off between generation quality and robustness of attribution against adversarial post-processes.
summary: Growing applications of generative models have led to new threats such as malicious personation and digital copyright infringement. One solution to these threats is model attribution, i.e., the identification of user-end models where the contents under question are generated from. Existing studies showed empirical feasibility of attribution through a centralized classifier trained on all user-end models. However, this approach is not scalable in reality as the number of models ever grows. Neither does it provide an attributability guarantee. To this end, this paper studies decentralized attribution, which relies on binary classifiers associated with each user-end model. Each binary classifier is parameterized by a user-specific key and distinguishes its associated model distribution from the authentic data distribution. We develop sufficient conditions of the keys that guarantee an attributability lower bound. Our method is validated on MNIST, CelebA, and FFHQ datasets. We also examine the trade-off between generation quality and robustness of attribution against adversarial post-processes.
abstract_zh: 生成模型的不断增长的应用导致了恶意冒充和数字版权侵权等新的威胁。针对这些威胁的一种解决方案是模型归因，即识别生成问题内容的用户端模型。现有研究表明，通过在所有用户端模型上训练的集中式分类器进行归因的经验可行性。然而，随着模型数量的不断增长，这种方法实际上无法扩展。它也不提供归因保证。为此，本文研究了去中心化归因，它依赖于与每个用户端模型关联的二元分类器。每个二元分类器都由用户特定的密钥参数化，并将其关联的模型分布与真实的数据分布区分开来。我们开发了保证归因下限的密钥的充分条件。我们的方法在 MNIST、CelebA 和 FFHQ 数据集上得到验证。我们还研究了生成质量和对抗性后处理归因的稳健性之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究生成模型的去中心化归属问题，提出通过每个用户端模型的二分类器实现可扩展的归属验证方法。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式分类器面临模型数量增长时的可扩展性问题，且无法提供归属性保证，需解决恶意冒充和数字版权侵权等威胁。
AI.method: 为每个用户端模型设计带用户特定密钥的二分类器，区分其生成分布与真实数据分布，并建立保证归属下限的密钥充分条件。
AI.result: 方法在MNIST、CelebA和FFHQ数据集上验证有效，分析了生成质量与对抗后处理鲁棒性的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去中心化归属框架在保证可扩展性的同时提供了理论保证，为生成模型安全应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Decentralized Attribution of Generative Models 生成模型的去中心化归因 Growing applications of generative models have led to new threats such as malicious personation and digital copyright infringement. One solution to these threats is model attribution, i.e., the identification of user-end models where the contents under question are generated from. Existing studies showed empirical feasibility of attribution through a centralized classifier trained on all user-end models. However, this approach is not scalable in reality as the number of models ever grows. Neither does it provide an attributability guarantee. To this end, this paper studies decentralized attribution, which relies on binary classifiers associated with each user-end model. Each binary classifier is parameterized by a user-specific key and distinguishes its associated model distribution from the authentic data distribution. We develop sufficient conditions of the keys that guarantee an attributability lower bound. Our method is validated on MNIST, CelebA, and FFHQ datasets. We also examine the trade-off between generation quality and robustness of attribution against adversarial post-processes. 生成模型的不断增长的应用导致了恶意冒充和数字版权侵权等新的威胁。针对这些威胁的一种解决方案是模型归因，即识别生成问题内容的用户端模型。现有研究表明，通过在所有用户端模型上训练的集中式分类器进行归因的经验可行性。然而，随着模型数量的不断增长，这种方法实际上无法扩展。它也不提供归因保证。为此，本文研究了去中心化归因，它依赖于与每个用户端模型关联的二元分类器。每个二元分类器都由用户特定的密钥参数化，并将其关联的模型分布与真实的数据分布区分开来。我们开发了保证归因下限的密钥的充分条件。我们的方法在 MNIST、CelebA 和 FFHQ 数据集上得到验证。我们还研究了生成质量和对抗性后处理归因的稳健性之间的权衡。 本文研究生成模型的去中心化归属问题，提出通过每个用户端模型的二分类器实现可扩展的归属验证方法。 Changhoon Kim,Yi Ren,Yezhou Yang cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Impact of Spherical Coordinates Transformation Pre-processing in Deep Convolution Neural Networks for Brain Tumor Segmentation and Survival Prediction
title_zh: 深度卷积神经网络中球坐标变换预处理对脑肿瘤分割和生存预测的影响
abstract: Pre-processing and Data Augmentation play an important role in Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN). Whereby several methods aim for standardization and augmentation of the dataset, we here propose a novel method aimed to feed DCNN with spherical space transformed input data that could better facilitate feature learning compared to standard Cartesian space images and volumes. In this work, the spherical coordinates transformation has been applied as a preprocessing method that, used in conjunction with normal MRI volumes, improves the accuracy of brain tumor segmentation and patient overall survival (OS) prediction on Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) Challenge 2020 dataset. The LesionEncoder framework has been then applied to automatically extract features from DCNN models, achieving 0.586 accuracy of OS prediction on the validation data set, which is one of the best results according to BraTS 2020 leaderboard.
summary: Pre-processing and Data Augmentation play an important role in Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN). Whereby several methods aim for standardization and augmentation of the dataset, we here propose a novel method aimed to feed DCNN with spherical space transformed input data that could better facilitate feature learning compared to standard Cartesian space images and volumes. In this work, the spherical coordinates transformation has been applied as a preprocessing method that, used in conjunction with normal MRI volumes, improves the accuracy of brain tumor segmentation and patient overall survival (OS) prediction on Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) Challenge 2020 dataset. The LesionEncoder framework has been then applied to automatically extract features from DCNN models, achieving 0.586 accuracy of OS prediction on the validation data set, which is one of the best results according to BraTS 2020 leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 预处理和数据增强在深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）中发挥着重要作用。有几种方法旨在标准化和增强数据集，我们在这里提出了一种新方法，旨在向 DCNN 提供球面空间变换的输入数据，与标准笛卡尔空间图像​​和体积相比，该方法可以更好地促进特征学习。在这项工作中，球坐标变换被用作预处理方法，与正常 MRI 体积结合使用，提高了脑肿瘤分割 (BraTS) Challenge 2020 数据集上脑肿瘤分割和患者总生存 (OS) 预测的准确性。然后应用 LesionEncoder 框架从 DCNN 模型中自动提取特征，在验证数据集上实现 0.586 的 OS 预测精度，这是 BraTS 2020 排行榜的最佳结果之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将球面坐标变换作为预处理方法，用于改进深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在脑肿瘤分割和生存预测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的笛卡尔坐标系图像可能无法有效捕捉脑肿瘤的三维空间特征，而球面坐标变换可能更符合医学影像的曲面特性，从而提升特征学习效果。
AI.method: 在标准MRI体积数据预处理中引入球面坐标变换，结合病变编码器（LesionEncoder）框架提取DCNN特征，用于脑肿瘤分割和总体生存期（OS）预测。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2020数据集上，该方法实现了验证集OS预测0.586的准确率，达到该挑战赛的领先水平。
AI.conclusion: 球面坐标变换预处理有效提升了DCNN在脑肿瘤分析中的性能，为医学影像处理提供了新思路，并验证了与病变编码器框架结合的可行性。

authors_text: Cat P. Le,Mohammadreza Soltani,Robert Ravier,Vahid Tarokh
title: Task-Aware Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 任务感知神经架构搜索
abstract: The design of handcrafted neural networks requires a lot of time and resources. Recent techniques in Neural Architecture Search (NAS) have proven to be competitive or better than traditional handcrafted design, although they require domain knowledge and have generally used limited search spaces. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for neural architecture search, utilizing a dictionary of models of base tasks and the similarity between the target task and the atoms of the dictionary; hence, generating an adaptive search space based on the base models of the dictionary. By introducing a gradient-based search algorithm, we can evaluate and discover the best architecture in the search space without fully training the networks. The experimental results show the efficacy of our proposed task-aware approach.
summary: The design of handcrafted neural networks requires a lot of time and resources. Recent techniques in Neural Architecture Search (NAS) have proven to be competitive or better than traditional handcrafted design, although they require domain knowledge and have generally used limited search spaces. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for neural architecture search, utilizing a dictionary of models of base tasks and the similarity between the target task and the atoms of the dictionary; hence, generating an adaptive search space based on the base models of the dictionary. By introducing a gradient-based search algorithm, we can evaluate and discover the best architecture in the search space without fully training the networks. The experimental results show the efficacy of our proposed task-aware approach.
abstract_zh: 手工神经网络的设计需要大量的时间和资源。神经架构搜索 (NAS) 的最新技术已被证明具有竞争力或优于传统的手工设计，尽管它们需要领域知识并且通常使用有限的搜索空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经架构搜索框架，利用基本任务模型的字典以及目标任务与字典原子之间的相似性；因此，基于字典的基本模型生成自适应搜索空间。通过引入基于梯度的搜索算法，我们可以评估和发现搜索空间中的最佳架构，而无需充分训练网络。实验结果表明了我们提出的任务感知方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务感知的神经架构搜索框架，利用基础模型字典和任务相似性生成自适应搜索空间，提升NAS效率。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS依赖领域知识且搜索空间有限，难以兼顾效率与性能，需探索更智能的搜索策略。
AI.method: 构建基础任务模型字典，通过目标任务与字典原子的相似性生成自适应搜索空间，并采用梯度搜索算法快速评估网络架构。
AI.result: 实验验证了任务感知方法在多个基准数据集上的有效性，优于传统NAS方法且减少训练开销。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知NAS框架通过动态适配搜索空间，为高效网络设计提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用潜力。

In this paper, we propose a novel framework for neural architecture search, utilizing a dictionary of models of base tasks and the similarity between the target task and the atoms of the dictionary; hence, generating an adaptive search space based on the base models of the dictionary. By introducing a gradient-based search algorithm, we can evaluate and discover the best architecture in the search space without fully training the networks. The experimental results show the efficacy of our proposed task-aware approach. 手工神经网络的设计需要大量的时间和资源。神经架构搜索 (NAS) 的最新技术已被证明具有竞争力或优于传统的手工设计，尽管它们需要领域知识并且通常使用有限的搜索空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经架构搜索框架，利用基本任务模型的字典以及目标任务与字典原子之间的相似性；因此，基于字典的基本模型生成自适应搜索空间。通过引入基于梯度的搜索算法，我们可以评估和发现搜索空间中的最佳架构，而无需充分训练网络。实验结果表明了我们提出的任务感知方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于任务感知的神经架构搜索框架，利用基础模型字典和任务相似性生成自适应搜索空间，提升NAS效率。 Cat P. Le,Mohammadreza Soltani,Robert Ravier,Vahid Tarokh cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tony Z. Zhao,Anusha Nagabandi,Kate Rakelly,Chelsea Finn,Sergey Levine
title: MELD: Meta-Reinforcement Learning from Images via Latent State Models
title_zh: MELD：通过潜在状态模型从图像中进行元强化学习
comment: Accepted to CoRL 2020. Supplementary material at https://sites.google.com/view/meld-lsm/home . 16 pages, 19 figures. V2: add funding acknowledgements, reduce file size
comments: Accepted to CoRL 2020. Supplementary material at https://sites.google.com/view/meld-lsm/home . 16 pages, 19 figures. V2: add funding acknowledgements, reduce file size
abstract: Meta-reinforcement learning algorithms can enable autonomous agents, such as robots, to quickly acquire new behaviors by leveraging prior experience in a set of related training tasks. However, the onerous data requirements of meta-training compounded with the challenge of learning from sensory inputs such as images have made meta-RL challenging to apply to real robotic systems. Latent state models, which learn compact state representations from a sequence of observations, can accelerate representation learning from visual inputs. In this paper, we leverage the perspective of meta-learning as task inference to show that latent state models can \emph{also} perform meta-learning given an appropriately defined observation space. Building on this insight, we develop meta-RL with latent dynamics (MELD), an algorithm for meta-RL from images that performs inference in a latent state model to quickly acquire new skills given observations and rewards. MELD outperforms prior meta-RL methods on several simulated image-based robotic control problems, and enables a real WidowX robotic arm to insert an Ethernet cable into new locations given a sparse task completion signal after only $8$ hours of real world meta-training. To our knowledge, MELD is the first meta-RL algorithm trained in a real-world robotic control setting from images.
summary: Meta-reinforcement learning algorithms can enable autonomous agents, such as robots, to quickly acquire new behaviors by leveraging prior experience in a set of related training tasks. However, the onerous data requirements of meta-training compounded with the challenge of learning from sensory inputs such as images have made meta-RL challenging to apply to real robotic systems. Latent state models, which learn compact state representations from a sequence of observations, can accelerate representation learning from visual inputs. In this paper, we leverage the perspective of meta-learning as task inference to show that latent state models can \emph{also} perform meta-learning given an appropriately defined observation space. Building on this insight, we develop meta-RL with latent dynamics (MELD), an algorithm for meta-RL from images that performs inference in a latent state model to quickly acquire new skills given observations and rewards. MELD outperforms prior meta-RL methods on several simulated image-based robotic control problems, and enables a real WidowX robotic arm to insert an Ethernet cable into new locations given a sparse task completion signal after only $8$ hours of real world meta-training. To our knowledge, MELD is the first meta-RL algorithm trained in a real-world robotic control setting from images.
abstract_zh: 元强化学习算法可以使机器人等自主代理通过利用一组相关训练任务中的先前经验来快速获取新行为。然而，元训练的繁重数据要求，加上从图像等感官输入中学习的挑战，使得元强化学习难以应用于真正的机器人系统。潜在状态模型从一系列观察中学习紧凑的状态表示，可以加速从视觉输入中进行表示学习。在本文中，我们利用元学习作为任务推理的视角来表明，在适当定义的观察空间下，潜在状态模型也可以执行元学习。基于这一见解，我们开发了具有潜在动力学的元强化学习 (MELD)，这是一种根据图像进行元强化学习的算法，可在潜在状态模型中进行推理，从而在给定观察和奖励的情况下快速获取新技能。 MELD 在几个基于图像的模拟机器人控制问题上优于先前的元强化学习方法，并且允许真正的 WidowX 机械臂在仅经过 8 美元小时的现实世界元训练后，在给出稀疏任务完成信号的情况下将以太网电缆插入新位置。据我们所知，MELD 是第一个在真实机器人控制设置中通过图像进行训练的元强化学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MELD算法，通过潜在状态模型实现基于图像的元强化学习，使机器人能快速学习新技能。
AI.motivation: 传统元强化学习在真实机器人系统中因数据需求高且难以处理图像输入而受限，需开发更高效的视觉学习方法。
AI.method: 结合元学习与潜在动态模型，利用潜在状态模型从图像中推断状态表示，并基于奖励信号快速适应新任务。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机械臂任务中优于现有方法，8小时训练后机械臂可完成以太网线插入新位置的稀疏奖励任务。
AI.conclusion: MELD通过潜在状态模型有效解决了视觉元强化学习的挑战，为真实机器人系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Pengcheng Guo,Florian Boyer,Xuankai Chang,Tomoki Hayashi,Yosuke Higuchi,Hirofumi Inaguma,Naoyuki Kamo,Chenda Li,Daniel Garcia-Romero,Jiatong Shi,Jing Shi,Shinji Watanabe,Kun Wei,Wangyou Zhang,Yuekai Zhang
title: Recent Developments on ESPnet Toolkit Boosted by Conformer
title_zh: Conformer 推动 ESPnet 工具包的最新发展
abstract: In this study, we present recent developments on ESPnet: End-to-End Speech Processing toolkit, which mainly involves a recently proposed architecture called Conformer, Convolution-augmented Transformer. This paper shows the results for a wide range of end-to-end speech processing applications, such as automatic speech recognition (ASR), speech translations (ST), speech separation (SS) and text-to-speech (TTS). Our experiments reveal various training tips and significant performance benefits obtained with the Conformer on different tasks. These results are competitive or even outperform the current state-of-art Transformer models. We are preparing to release all-in-one recipes using open source and publicly available corpora for all the above tasks with pre-trained models. Our aim for this work is to contribute to our research community by reducing the burden of preparing state-of-the-art research environments usually requiring high resources.
summary: In this study, we present recent developments on ESPnet: End-to-End Speech Processing toolkit, which mainly involves a recently proposed architecture called Conformer, Convolution-augmented Transformer. This paper shows the results for a wide range of end-to-end speech processing applications, such as automatic speech recognition (ASR), speech translations (ST), speech separation (SS) and text-to-speech (TTS). Our experiments reveal various training tips and significant performance benefits obtained with the Conformer on different tasks. These results are competitive or even outperform the current state-of-art Transformer models. Our aim for this work is to contribute to our research community by reducing the burden of preparing state-of-the-art research environments usually requiring high resources.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们介绍了 ESPnet 的最新进展：端到端语音处理工具包，其中主要涉及最近提出的一种称为 Conformer、卷积增强 Transformer 的架构。本文展示了各种端到端语音处理应用的结果，例如自动语音识别 (ASR)、语音翻译 (ST)、语音分离 (SS) 和文本转语音 (TTS)。我们的实验揭示了各种训练技巧以及使用 Conformer 在不同任务中获得的显着性能优势。这些结果具有竞争力，甚至优于当前最先进的 Transformer 模型。我们正准备使用开源和公开的语料库发布一体化配方，用于通过预训练模型完成上述所有任务。我们这项工作的目标是通过减轻准备通常需要大量资源的最先进研究环境的负担，为我们的研究界做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 介绍ESPnet工具包结合Conformer架构在端到端语音处理中的最新进展，并展示其在多个任务中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 通过开源和预训练模型降低资源需求，促进端到端语音处理研究。
AI.method: 基于Conformer架构，应用于多种端到端语音处理任务，并通过实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验显示Conformer在多个任务中性能优越，优于或匹敌现有Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过开源工具和预训练模型，降低研究资源需求，促进端到端语音处理技术的发展。

authors_text: Gang Wang,Qunxi Dong,Jianfeng Wu,Yi Su,Kewei Chen,Qingtang Su,Xiaofeng Zhang,Jinguang Hao,Tao Yao,Li Liu,Caiming Zhang,Richard J Caselli,Eric M Reiman,Yalin Wang
title: Developing Univariate Neurodegeneration Biomarkers with Low-Rank and Sparse Subspace Decomposition
title_zh: 利用低秩和稀疏子空间分解开发单变量神经退行性生物标志物
abstract: Cognitive decline due to Alzheimer's disease (AD) is closely associated with brain structure alterations captured by structural magnetic resonance imaging (sMRI). It supports the validity to develop sMRI-based univariate neurodegeneration biomarkers (UNB). However, existing UNB work either fails to model large group variances or does not capture AD dementia (ADD) induced changes. We propose a novel low-rank and sparse subspace decomposition method capable of stably quantifying the morphological changes induced by ADD. Specifically, we propose a numerically efficient rank minimization mechanism to extract group common structure and impose regularization constraints to encode the original 3D morphometry connectivity. Further, we generate regions-of-interest (ROI) with group difference study between common subspaces of $Aβ+$ AD and $Aβ-$ cognitively unimpaired (CU) groups. A univariate morphometry index (UMI) is constructed from these ROIs by summarizing individual morphological characteristics weighted by normalized difference between $Aβ+$ AD and $Aβ-$ CU groups. We use hippocampal surface radial distance feature to compute the UMIs and validate our work in the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) cohort. With hippocampal UMIs, the estimated minimum sample sizes needed to detect a 25$\%$ reduction in the mean annual change with 80$\%$ power and two-tailed $P=0.05$ are 116, 279 and 387 for the longitudinal $Aβ+$ AD, $Aβ+$ mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and $Aβ+$ CU groups, respectively. Additionally, for MCI patients, UMIs well correlate with hazard ratio of conversion to AD ($4.3$, $95\%$ CI=$2.3-8.2$) within 18 months. Our experimental results outperform traditional hippocampal volume measures and suggest the application of UMI as a potential UNB.

Additionally, for MCI patients, UMIs well correlate with hazard ratio of conversion to AD ($4.3$, $95\%$ CI=$2.3-8.2$) within 18 months. Our experimental results outperform traditional hippocampal volume measures and suggest the application of UMI as a potential UNB.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 导致的认知能力下降与结构磁共振成像 (sMRI) 捕获的大脑结构改变密切相关。它支持开发基于 sMRI 的单变量神经退行性生物标志物 (UNB) 的有效性。然而，现有的 UNB 工作要么无法对大群体差异进行建模，要么无法捕获 AD 痴呆 (ADD) 引起的变化。我们提出了一种新颖的低秩稀疏子空间分解方法，能够稳定量化 ADD 引起的形态变化。具体来说，我们提出了一种数值有效的秩最小化机制来提取组公共结构并施加正则化约束来编码原始 3D 形态测量连接。此外，我们通过 $Aβ+$ AD 和 $Aβ-$ 认知未受损 (CU) 组的公共子空间之间的组差异研究生成感兴趣区域 (ROI)。通过总结由 $Aβ+$ AD 和 $Aβ-$ CU 组之间的归一化差异加权的个体形态特征，根据这些 ROI 构建单变量形态测量指数 (UMI)。我们使用海马表面径向距离特征来计算 UMI 并验证我们在阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议 (ADNI) 队列中的工作。对于海马 UMI，对于纵向 $Aβ+$ AD、$Aβ+$ 轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 和 $Aβ+$ CU 组，以 80$\%$ 功效和双尾 $P=0.05$ 检测平均年变化减少 25$\%$ 所需的估计最小样本量分别为 116、279 和 387。此外，对于 MCI 患者，UMI 与 18 个月内转化为 AD 的风险比密切相关（$4.3$，$95\%$ CI=$2.3-8.2$）。我们的实验结果优于传统的海马体积测量，并表明 UMI 作为潜在的 UNB 的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低秩和稀疏子空间分解的单变量神经退行性病变生物标志物（UNB）开发方法，用于量化阿尔茨海默病（AD）引起的脑结构变化。
AI.motivation: 现有单变量神经退行性病变生物标志物方法无法有效建模群体差异或捕捉AD痴呆（ADD）引起的形态学变化，需开发更稳健的量化方法。
AI.method: 通过低秩矩阵分解提取群体共性结构，结合稀疏性约束建模3D形态连接性；利用β淀粉样蛋白阳性（Aβ+）AD与阴性（Aβ-）认知正常组的共同子空间差异生成感兴趣区域（ROI），构建加权形态学指数（UMI）。
AI.result: 在ADNI队列中，UMI较传统海马体积指标表现更优，可检测到25%年均变化的最小样本量分别为116（Aβ+ AD）、279（Aβ+ MCI）和387（Aβ+ CU），且MCI患者UMI与18个月内转化为AD的风险比显著相关（HR=4.3, 95%CI=2.3-8.2）。
AI.conclusion: UMI作为潜在单变量神经退行性病变生物标志物，可有效量化ADD引起的形态学变化并预测疾病进展。

search_text: Developing Univariate Neurodegeneration Biomarkers with Low-Rank and Sparse Subspace Decomposition 利用低秩和稀疏子空间分解开发单变量神经退行性生物标志物 Cognitive decline due to Alzheimer's disease (AD) is closely associated with brain structure alterations captured by structural magnetic resonance imaging (sMRI). It supports the validity to develop sMRI-based univariate neurodegeneration biomarkers (UNB). However, existing UNB work either fails to model large group variances or does not capture AD dementia (ADD) induced changes. We propose a novel low-rank and sparse subspace decomposition method capable of stably quantifying the morphological changes induced by ADD. Specifically, we propose a numerically efficient rank minimization mechanism to extract group common structure and impose regularization constraints to encode the original 3D morphometry connectivity. Further, we generate regions-of-interest (ROI) with group difference study between common subspaces of $Aβ+$ AD and $Aβ-$ cognitively unimpaired (CU) groups. A univariate morphometry index (UMI) is constructed from these ROIs by summarizing individual morphological characteristics weighted by normalized difference between $Aβ+$ AD and $Aβ-$ CU groups. We use hippocampal surface radial distance feature to compute the UMIs and validate our work in the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) cohort. With hippocampal UMIs, the estimated minimum sample sizes needed to detect a 25$\%$ reduction in the mean annual change with 80$\%$ power and two-tailed $P=0.05$ are 116, 279 and 387 for the longitudinal $Aβ+$ AD, $Aβ+$ mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and $Aβ+$ CU groups, respectively. Additionally, for MCI patients, UMIs well correlate with hazard ratio of conversion to AD ($4.3$, $95\%$ CI=$2.3-8.2$) within 18 months. Our experimental results outperform traditional hippocampal volume measures and suggest the application of UMI as a potential UNB. 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 导致的认知能力下降与结构磁共振成像 (sMRI) 捕获的大脑结构改变密切相关。它支持开发基于 sMRI 的单变量神经退行性生物标志物 (UNB) 的有效性。然而，现有的 UNB 工作要么无法对大群体差异进行建模，要么无法捕获 AD 痴呆 (ADD) 引起的变化。我们提出了一种新颖的低秩稀疏子空间分解方法，能够稳定量化 ADD 引起的形态变化。具体来说，我们提出了一种数值有效的秩最小化机制来提取组公共结构并施加正则化约束来编码原始 3D 形态测量连接。此外，我们通过 $Aβ+$ AD 和 $Aβ-$ 认知未受损 (CU) 组的公共子空间之间的组差异研究生成感兴趣区域 (ROI)。通过总结由 $Aβ+$ AD 和 $Aβ-$ CU 组之间的归一化差异加权的个体形态特征，根据这些 ROI 构建单变量形态测量指数 (UMI)。我们使用海马表面径向距离特征来计算 UMI 并验证我们在阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议 (ADNI) 队列中的工作。对于海马 UMI，对于纵向 $Aβ+$ AD、$Aβ+$ 轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 和 $Aβ+$ CU 组，以 80$\%$ 功效和双尾 $P=0.05$ 检测平均年变化减少 25$\%$ 所需的估计最小样本量分别为 116、279 和 387。此外，对于 MCI 患者，UMI 与 18 个月内转化为 AD 的风险比密切相关（$4.3$，$95\%$ CI=$2.3-8.2$）。我们的实验结果优于传统的海马体积测量，并表明 UMI 作为潜在的 UNB 的应用。 本文提出一种基于低秩和稀疏子空间分解的单变量神经退行性病变生物标志物（UNB）开发方法，用于量化阿尔茨海默病（AD）引起的脑结构变化。 Gang Wang,Qunxi Dong,Jianfeng Wu,Yi Su,Kewei Chen,Qingtang Su,Xiaofeng Zhang,Jinguang Hao,Tao Yao,Li Liu,Caiming Zhang,Richard J Caselli,Eric M Reiman,Yalin Wang cs.CV

title: An Adversarial Domain Separation Framework for Septic Shock Early Prediction Across EHR Systems
title_zh: 用于跨 EHR 系统感染性休克早期预测的对抗性域分离框架
comment: to be published in 2020 IEEE International Conference on Big Data
comments: to be published in 2020 IEEE International Conference on Big Data
abstract: Modeling patient disease progression using Electronic Health Records (EHRs) is critical to assist clinical decision making. While most of prior work has mainly focused on developing effective disease progression models using EHRs collected from an individual medical system, relatively little work has investigated building robust yet generalizable diagnosis models across different systems. In this work, we propose a general domain adaptation (DA) framework that tackles two categories of discrepancies in EHRs collected from different medical systems: one is caused by heterogeneous patient populations (covariate shift) and the other is caused by variations in data collection procedures (systematic bias). Prior research in DA has mainly focused on addressing covariate shift but not systematic bias. In this work, we propose an adversarial domain separation framework that addresses both categories of discrepancies by maintaining one globally-shared invariant latent representation across all systems} through an adversarial learning process, while also allocating a domain-specific model for each system to extract local latent representations that cannot and should not be unified across systems. Moreover, our proposed framework is based on variational recurrent neural network (VRNN) because of its ability to capture complex temporal dependencies and handling missing values in time-series data. We evaluate our framework for early diagnosis of an extremely challenging condition, septic shock, using two real-world EHRs from distinct medical systems in the U.S. The results show that by separating globally-shared from domain-specific representations, our framework significantly improves septic shock early prediction performance in both EHRs and outperforms the current state-of-the-art DA models.
summary: Modeling patient disease progression using Electronic Health Records (EHRs) is critical to assist clinical decision making. While most of prior work has mainly focused on developing effective disease progression models using EHRs collected from an individual medical system, relatively little work has investigated building robust yet generalizable diagnosis models across different systems. In this work, we propose a general domain adaptation (DA) framework that tackles two categories of discrepancies in EHRs collected from different medical systems: one is caused by heterogeneous patient populations (covariate shift) and the other is caused by variations in data collection procedures (systematic bias). Prior research in DA has mainly focused on addressing covariate shift but not systematic bias. In this work, we propose an adversarial domain separation framework that addresses both categories of discrepancies by maintaining one globally-shared invariant latent representation across all systems} through an adversarial learning process, while also allocating a domain-specific model for each system to extract local latent representations that cannot and should not be unified across systems. Moreover, our proposed framework is based on variational recurrent neural network (VRNN) because of its ability to capture complex temporal dependencies and handling missing values in time-series data. We evaluate our framework for early diagnosis of an extremely challenging condition, septic shock, using two real-world EHRs from distinct medical systems in the U.S. The results show that by separating globally-shared from domain-specific representations, our framework significantly improves septic shock early prediction performance in both EHRs and outperforms the current state-of-the-art DA models.
abstract_zh: 使用电子健康记录 (EHR) 模拟患者疾病进展对于协助临床决策至关重要。虽然大多数先前的工作主要集中于使用从单个医疗系统收集的 EHR 开发有效的疾病进展模型，但相对较少的工作研究跨不同系统建立稳健且可推广的诊断模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用的领域适应（DA）框架，该框架解决了从不同医疗系统收集的 EHR 中的两类差异：一类是由异质患者群体（协变量偏移）引起的，另一类是由数据收集程序的差异引起的（系统偏差）。 DA 的先前研究主要集中于解决协变量偏移，而不是系统偏差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对抗性域分离框架，通过对抗性学习过程在所有系统中维护一个全局共享的不变潜在表示，同时还为每个系统分配一个特定于域的模型来提取不能也不应该跨系统统一的本地潜在表示，从而解决这两类差异。此外，我们提出的框架基于变分递归神经网络（VRNN），因为它能够捕获复杂的时间依赖性并处理时间序列数据中的缺失值。我们使用来自美国不同医疗系统的两个真实 EHR 来评估我们用于早期诊断极其具有挑战性的疾病感染性休克的框架。结果表明，通过将全球共享的表示与特定领域的表示分离，我们的框架显着提高了 EHR 中感染性休克的早期预测性能，并且优于当前最先进的 DA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对抗性领域分离框架，用于跨电子健康记录（EHR）系统进行败血症休克的早期预测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型主要针对单一医疗系统的EHR数据，缺乏跨系统的鲁棒性和泛化能力，而领域自适应（DA）研究多集中于协变量偏移，未解决系统性偏差问题。
AI.method: 基于变分循环神经网络（VRNN）设计对抗性领域分离框架，通过对抗学习维持跨系统的全局共享不变潜在表示，同时为每个系统分配领域特定模型以提取局部潜在表示。
AI.result: 在两个美国真实世界EHR数据集上验证，该框架显著提升败血症休克早期预测性能，优于当前最先进的DA模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离全局共享与领域特定表示，该框架有效解决了跨EHR系统的协变量偏移和系统性偏差问题，为临床决策提供了更可靠的跨系统预测方法。

In this work, we propose an adversarial domain separation framework that addresses both categories of discrepancies by maintaining one globally-shared invariant latent representation across all systems} through an adversarial learning process, while also allocating a domain-specific model for each system to extract local latent representations that cannot and should not be unified across systems. Moreover, our proposed framework is based on variational recurrent neural network (VRNN) because of its ability to capture complex temporal dependencies and handling missing values in time-series data. We evaluate our framework for early diagnosis of an extremely challenging condition, septic shock, using two real-world EHRs from distinct medical systems in the U.S. The results show that by separating globally-shared from domain-specific representations, our framework significantly improves septic shock early prediction performance in both EHRs and outperforms the current state-of-the-art DA models. 使用电子健康记录 (EHR) 模拟患者疾病进展对于协助临床决策至关重要。虽然大多数先前的工作主要集中于使用从单个医疗系统收集的 EHR 开发有效的疾病进展模型，但相对较少的工作研究跨不同系统建立稳健且可推广的诊断模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用的领域适应（DA）框架，该框架解决了从不同医疗系统收集的 EHR 中的两类差异：一类是由异质患者群体（协变量偏移）引起的，另一类是由数据收集程序的差异引起的（系统偏差）。 DA 的先前研究主要集中于解决协变量偏移，而不是系统偏差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对抗性域分离框架，通过对抗性学习过程在所有系统中维护一个全局共享的不变潜在表示，同时还为每个系统分配一个特定于域的模型来提取不能也不应该跨系统统一的本地潜在表示，从而解决这两类差异。此外，我们提出的框架基于变分递归神经网络（VRNN），因为它能够捕获复杂的时间依赖性并处理时间序列数据中的缺失值。我们使用来自美国不同医疗系统的两个真实 EHR 来评估我们用于早期诊断极其具有挑战性的疾病感染性休克的框架。结果表明，通过将全球共享的表示与特定领域的表示分离，我们的框架显着提高了 EHR 中感染性休克的早期预测性能，并且优于当前最先进的 DA 模型。 本文提出了一种对抗性领域分离框架，用于跨电子健康记录（EHR）系统进行败血症休克的早期预测。 Farzaneh Khoshnevisan,Min Chi cs.LG,cs.NE

title: KFC: A Scalable Approximation Algorithm for $k$-center Fair Clustering
title_zh: KFC：一种可扩展的$k$中心公平聚类近似算法
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of fair clustering on the $k-$center objective. In fair clustering, the input is $N$ points, each belonging to at least one of $l$ protected groups, e.g. male, female, Asian, Hispanic. The objective is to cluster the $N$ points into $k$ clusters to minimize a classical clustering objective function. However, there is an additional constraint that each cluster needs to be fair, under some notion of fairness. This ensures that no group is either "over-represented" or "under-represented" in any cluster. Our work builds on the work of Chierichetti et al. (NIPS 2017), Bera et al. (NeurIPS 2019), Ahmadian et al. (KDD 2019), and Bercea et al. (APPROX 2019). We obtain a randomized $3-$approximation algorithm for the $k-$center objective function, beating the previous state of the art ($4-$approximation). We test our algorithm on real datasets, and show that our algorithm is effective in finding good clusters without over-representation or under-representation, surpassing the current state of the art in runtime speed, clustering cost, while achieving similar fairness violations.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of fair clustering on the $k-$center objective. In fair clustering, the input is $N$ points, each belonging to at least one of $l$ protected groups, e.g. male, female, Asian, Hispanic. The objective is to cluster the $N$ points into $k$ clusters to minimize a classical clustering objective function. However, there is an additional constraint that each cluster needs to be fair, under some notion of fairness. This ensures that no group is either "over-represented" or "under-represented" in any cluster. Our work builds on the work of Chierichetti et al. (NIPS 2017), Bera et al. (NeurIPS 2019), Ahmadian et al. (KDD 2019), and Bercea et al. (APPROX 2019). We obtain a randomized $3-$approximation algorithm for the $k-$center objective function, beating the previous state of the art ($4-$approximation). We test our algorithm on real datasets, and show that our algorithm is effective in finding good clusters without over-representation or under-representation, surpassing the current state of the art in runtime speed, clustering cost, while achieving similar fairness violations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了$k-$center目标上的公平聚类问题。在公平聚类中，输入是 $N$ 个点，每个点至少属于 $l$ 个受保护组中的一个，例如男性、女性、亚洲人、西班牙人。目标是将 $N$ 个点聚类为 $k$ 个簇，以最小化经典聚类目标函数。然而，还有一个额外的约束，即每个集群都需要在某种公平概念下公平。这确保了任何集群中没有任何群体“代表性过高”或“代表性不足”。我们的工作建立在 Chierichetti 等人的工作基础上。 （NIPS 2017），Bera 等人。 （NeurIPS 2019），Ahmadian 等人。 （KDD 2019）和 Bercea 等人。 （大约 2019 年）。我们获得了 $k-$center 目标函数的随机 $3-$ 近似算法，击败了之前的最先进技术（$4-$ 近似）。我们在真实数据集上测试我们的算法，并表明我们的算法可以有效地找到良好的聚类，而不会出现过度表示或表示不足的情况，在运行速度、聚类成本方面超越了当前最先进的技术，同时实现了类似的公平性违规。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的近似算法KFC，用于解决带公平性约束的k中心聚类问题，确保各聚类中不同群体比例合理。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法可能产生群体过度或不足代表现象，现有公平聚类算法在近似比或效率上存在不足，需改进以兼顾公平性与计算效率。
AI.method: 基于随机化技术改进经典k中心聚类算法，在满足公平性约束前提下，设计3近似算法并优化实现以提高运行效率。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证算法有效性，相比现有方法在运行时间、聚类成本上表现更优，同时保持相似的公平性约束满足度。
AI.conclusion: KFC算法在理论近似比和实际性能上均优于现有方案，为大规模公平聚类问题提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: Interior Point Solving for LP-based prediction+optimisation
title_zh: 基于 LP 的预测+优化的内点求解
abstract: Solving optimization problems is the key to decision making in many real-life analytics applications. However, the coefficients of the optimization problems are often uncertain and dependent on external factors, such as future demand or energy or stock prices. Machine learning (ML) models, especially neural networks, are increasingly being used to estimate these coefficients in a data-driven way. Hence, end-to-end predict-and-optimize approaches, which consider how effective the predicted values are to solve the optimization problem, have received increasing attention. In case of integer linear programming problems, a popular approach to overcome their non-differentiabilty is to add a quadratic penalty term to the continuous relaxation, such that results from differentiating over quadratic programs can be used. Instead we investigate the use of the more principled logarithmic barrier term, as widely used in interior point solvers for linear programming. Specifically, instead of differentiating the KKT conditions, we consider the homogeneous self-dual formulation of the LP and we show the relation between the interior point step direction and corresponding gradients needed for learning. Finally our empirical experiments demonstrate our approach performs as good as if not better than the state-of-the-art QPTL (Quadratic Programming task loss) formulation of Wilder et al. and SPO approach of Elmachtoub and Grigas.
summary: Solving optimization problems is the key to decision making in many real-life analytics applications. However, the coefficients of the optimization problems are often uncertain and dependent on external factors, such as future demand or energy or stock prices. Machine learning (ML) models, especially neural networks, are increasingly being used to estimate these coefficients in a data-driven way. Hence, end-to-end predict-and-optimize approaches, which consider how effective the predicted values are to solve the optimization problem, have received increasing attention. In case of integer linear programming problems, a popular approach to overcome their non-differentiabilty is to add a quadratic penalty term to the continuous relaxation, such that results from differentiating over quadratic programs can be used. Instead we investigate the use of the more principled logarithmic barrier term, as widely used in interior point solvers for linear programming. Specifically, instead of differentiating the KKT conditions, we consider the homogeneous self-dual formulation of the LP and we show the relation between the interior point step direction and corresponding gradients needed for learning. Finally our empirical experiments demonstrate our approach performs as good as if not better than the state-of-the-art QPTL (Quadratic Programming task loss) formulation of Wilder et al. and SPO approach of Elmachtoub and Grigas.
abstract_zh: 解决优化问题是许多现实分析应用中决策的关键。然而，优化问题的系数通常是不确定的，并且取决于外部因素，例如未来需求或能源或股票价格。机器学习 (ML) 模型，尤其是神经网络，越来越多地用于以数据驱动的方式估计这些系数。因此，考虑预测值解决优化问题的有效性的端到端预测和优化方法受到了越来越多的关注。在整数线性规划问题的情况下，克服其不可微性的一种流行方法是在连续松弛中添加二次罚项，以便可以使用二次规划的微分结果。相反，我们研究了更原则性的对数势垒项的使用，该项广泛用于线性规划的内点求解器。具体来说，我们不考虑 KKT 条件的微分，而是考虑 LP 的齐次自对偶公式，并展示内点步长方向与学习所需的相应梯度之间的关系。最后，我们的实证实验表明，我们的方法与 Wilder 等人的最先进的 QPTL（二次规划任务损失）公式一样好，甚至更好。 Elmachtoub 和 Grigas 的 SPO 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性规划（LP）的预测与优化端到端方法，通过引入对数障碍项替代传统二次惩罚项，解决整数线性规划中的非可微性问题。
AI.motivation: 优化问题的系数常受外部因素影响，传统方法通过二次惩罚项处理非可微性，但缺乏理论依据。需更系统的方法提升预测与优化的协同效果。
AI.method: 采用线性规划的齐次自对偶形式，将内点法的步长方向与学习所需的梯度关联，利用对数障碍项替代二次惩罚项进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在性能上与当前最先进的QPTL和SPO方法相当或更优，验证了对数障碍项的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于对数障碍项的内点法为预测与优化问题提供了更理论化的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: Exploiting the Nonlinear Stiffness of TMP Origami Folding to Enhance Robotic Jumping Performance
title_zh: 利用 TMP 折纸折叠的非线性刚度来增强机器人的跳跃性能
abstract: Via numerical simulation and experimental assessment, this study examines the use of origami folding to develop robotic jumping mechanisms with tailored nonlinear stiffness to improve dynamic performance. Specifically, we use Tachi-Miura Polyhedron (TMP) bellow origami -- which exhibits a nonlinear "strain-softening" force-displacement curve -- as a jumping robotic skeleton with embedded energy storage. TMP's nonlinear stiffness allows it to store more energy than a linear spring and offers improved jumping height and airtime. Moreover, the nonlinearity can be tailored by directly changing the underlying TMP crease geometry. A critical challenge is to minimize the TMP's hysteresis and energy loss during its compression stage right before jumping. So we used the plastically annealed lamina emergent origami (PALEO) concept to modify the TMP creases. PALEO increases the folding limit before plastic deformation occurs, thus improving the overall strain energy retention. Jumping experiments confirmed that a nonlinear TMP mechanism achieved roughly 9% improvement in air time and a 13% improvement in jumping height compared to a "control" TMP sample with a relatively linear stiffness. This study's results validate the advantages of using origami in robotic jumping mechanisms and demonstrate the benefits of utilizing nonlinear spring elements for improving jumping performance. Therefore, they could foster a new family of energetically efficient jumping mechanisms with optimized performance in the future.
summary: Via numerical simulation and experimental assessment, this study examines the use of origami folding to develop robotic jumping mechanisms with tailored nonlinear stiffness to improve dynamic performance. Specifically, we use Tachi-Miura Polyhedron (TMP) bellow origami -- which exhibits a nonlinear "strain-softening" force-displacement curve -- as a jumping robotic skeleton with embedded energy storage. TMP's nonlinear stiffness allows it to store more energy than a linear spring and offers improved jumping height and airtime. Moreover, the nonlinearity can be tailored by directly changing the underlying TMP crease geometry. A critical challenge is to minimize the TMP's hysteresis and energy loss during its compression stage right before jumping. So we used the plastically annealed lamina emergent origami (PALEO) concept to modify the TMP creases. PALEO increases the folding limit before plastic deformation occurs, thus improving the overall strain energy retention. Jumping experiments confirmed that a nonlinear TMP mechanism achieved roughly 9% improvement in air time and a 13% improvement in jumping height compared to a "control" TMP sample with a relatively linear stiffness. This study's results validate the advantages of using origami in robotic jumping mechanisms and demonstrate the benefits of utilizing nonlinear spring elements for improving jumping performance. Therefore, they could foster a new family of energetically efficient jumping mechanisms with optimized performance in the future.
abstract_zh: 通过数值模拟和实验评估，本研究探讨了使用折纸折叠来开发具有定制非线性刚度的机器人跳跃机构，以提高动态性能。具体来说，我们使用 Tachi-Miura 多面体 (TMP) 波纹管折纸——它表现出非线性“应变软化”力-位移曲线——作为具有嵌入式能量存储的跳跃机器人骨架。 TMP 的非线性刚度使其能够比线性弹簧存储更多的能量，并提高跳跃高度和停留时间。此外，可以通过直接改变底层 TMP 折痕几何形状来定制非线性。一个关键的挑战是在跳跃前的压缩阶段最大限度地减少 TMP 的滞后和能量损失。因此，我们使用塑性退火薄片紧急折纸 (PALEO) 概念来修改 TMP 折痕。 PALEO 增加了塑性变形发生前的折叠极限，从而提高了整体应变能保留率。跳跃实验证实，与具有相对线性刚度的“对照”TMP 样品相比，非线性 TMP 机构的腾空时间提高了约 9%，跳跃高度提高了 13%。这项研究的结果验证了在机器人跳跃机构中使用折纸的优势，并证明了利用非线性弹簧元件提高跳跃性能的好处。因此，他们可以在未来培育出一个新的、具有优化性能的高效跳跃机构系列。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过利用TMP折纸结构的非线性刚度，开发了一种增强机器人跳跃性能的机制。
AI.motivation: 传统线性弹簧在能量存储和动态性能上存在局限，需通过非线性刚度设计提升机器人跳跃高度和滞空时间。
AI.method: 采用Tachi-Miura多面体（TMP）折纸结构作为跳跃机器人骨架，结合PALEO技术优化折痕几何以减少能量损耗，并通过数值模拟与实验验证性能。
AI.result: 非线性TMP机制相比线性对照组实现了约9%的滞空时间提升和13%的跳跃高度提升。
AI.conclusion: 折纸结构的非线性刚度特性可有效提升跳跃机械能效，为未来高效跳跃机器人设计提供新方向。

title: Neural Unsigned Distance Fields for Implicit Function Learning
title_zh: 用于隐式函数学习的神经无符号距离场
abstract: In this work we target a learnable output representation that allows continuous, high resolution outputs of arbitrary shape. Recent works represent 3D surfaces implicitly with a Neural Network, thereby breaking previous barriers in resolution, and ability to represent diverse topologies. However, neural implicit representations are limited to closed surfaces, which divide the space into inside and outside. Many real world objects such as walls of a scene scanned by a sensor, clothing, or a car with inner structures are not closed. This constitutes a significant barrier, in terms of data pre-processing (objects need to be artificially closed creating artifacts), and the ability to output open surfaces. In this work, we propose Neural Distance Fields (NDF), a neural network based model which predicts the unsigned distance field for arbitrary 3D shapes given sparse point clouds. NDF represent surfaces at high resolutions as prior implicit models, but do not require closed surface data, and significantly broaden the class of representable shapes in the output. NDF allow to extract the surface as very dense point clouds and as meshes. We also show that NDF allow for surface normal calculation and can be rendered using a slight modification of sphere tracing. We find NDF can be used for multi-target regression (multiple outputs for one input) with techniques that have been exclusively used for rendering in graphics. Experiments on ShapeNet show that NDF, while simple, is the state-of-the art, and allows to reconstruct shapes with inner structures, such as the chairs inside a bus. Notably, we show that NDF are not restricted to 3D shapes, and can approximate more general open surfaces such as curves, manifolds, and functions. Code is available for research at https://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/ndf/.

abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是一种可学习的输出表示，它允许任意形状的连续、高分辨率输出。最近的工作使用神经网络隐式地表示 3D 表面，从而打破了以前在分辨率和表示不同拓扑的能力方面的障碍。然而，神经隐式表示仅限于封闭表面，将空间分为内部和外部。许多现实世界的物体，例如传感器扫描的场景墙壁、衣服或具有内部结构的汽车都不是封闭的。就数据预处理（需要人为关闭对象以创建工件）和输出开放表面的能力而言，这构成了重大障碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了神经距离场（NDF），这是一种基于神经网络的模型，它可以在给定稀疏点云的情况下预测任意 3D 形状的无符号距离场。 NDF 将高分辨率表面表示为先前的隐式模型，但不需要闭合表面数据，并且显着拓宽了输出中可表示形状的类别。 NDF 允许将表面提取为非常密集的点云和网格。我们还表明，NDF 允许进行表面法线计算，并且可以使用球体跟踪的轻微修改进行渲染。我们发现 NDF 可用于多目标回归（一个输入多个输出），其技术专门用于图形渲染。 ShapeNet 上的实验表明，NDF 虽然简单，但却是最先进的，并且允许使用内部结构重建形状，例如公共汽车内的椅子。值得注意的是，我们表明 NDF 不限于 3D 形状，并且可以近似更一般的开放表面，例如曲线、流形和函数。代码可用于研究 https://virtual humans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/ndf/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的Neural Distance Fields (NDF)模型，用于从稀疏点云中学习任意形状的无符号距离场，解决了传统隐式表示方法对封闭表面的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经隐式表示方法仅能处理封闭表面，难以直接建模现实世界中存在开放结构的物体（如扫描场景的墙壁、衣物或带内部结构的汽车），导致数据预处理复杂且输出受限。
AI.method: 通过神经网络预测任意3D形状的无符号距离场，无需封闭表面数据。支持从稀疏点云生成高分辨率表面点云和网格，并利用改进的球面追踪技术进行渲染，同时可扩展至曲线、流形等更一般的开放表面。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集上达到SOTA性能，成功重建含内部结构的复杂形状（如公交车内的椅子）。实验表明NDF可泛化到非3D场景，如曲线和函数表面。
AI.conclusion: NDF通过无符号距离场表示突破了封闭表面限制，提供了一种简单有效的开放表面建模方法，为隐式函数学习开辟了更广泛的应用场景。
