Code is available for research at https://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/ndf/. 在这项工作中，我们的目标是一种可学习的输出表示，它允许任意形状的连续、高分辨率输出。最近的工作使用神经网络隐式地表示 3D 表面，从而打破了以前在分辨率和表示不同拓扑的能力方面的障碍。然而，神经隐式表示仅限于封闭表面，将空间分为内部和外部。许多现实世界的物体，例如传感器扫描的场景墙壁、衣服或具有内部结构的汽车都不是封闭的。就数据预处理（需要人为关闭对象以创建工件）和输出开放表面的能力而言，这构成了重大障碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了神经距离场（NDF），这是一种基于神经网络的模型，它可以在给定稀疏点云的情况下预测任意 3D 形状的无符号距离场。 NDF 将高分辨率表面表示为先前的隐式模型，但不需要闭合表面数据，并且显着拓宽了输出中可表示形状的类别。 NDF 允许将表面提取为非常密集的点云和网格。我们还表明，NDF 允许进行表面法线计算，并且可以使用球体跟踪的轻微修改进行渲染。我们发现 NDF 可用于多目标回归（一个输入多个输出），其技术专门用于图形渲染。 ShapeNet 上的实验表明，NDF 虽然简单，但却是最先进的，并且允许使用内部结构重建形状，例如公共汽车内的椅子。值得注意的是，我们表明 NDF 不限于 3D 形状，并且可以近似更一般的开放表面，例如曲线、流形和函数。代码可用于研究 https://virtual humans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/ndf/。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的Neural Distance Fields (NDF)模型，用于从稀疏点云中学习任意形状的无符号距离场，解决了传统隐式表示方法对封闭表面的依赖问题。 Julian Chibane,Aymen Mir,Gerard Pons-Moll cs.CV,cs.LG

title: A 2D Surgical Simulation Framework for Tool-Tissue Interaction
title_zh: 用于工具-组织相互作用的 2D 手术模拟框架
comment: Accepted by IROS Workshop 2020 (Cognitive Robotic Surgery), 2 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted by IROS Workshop 2020 (Cognitive Robotic Surgery), 2 pages, 3 figures
abstract: The control and task automation of robotic surgical system is very challenging, especially in soft tissue manipulation, due to the unpredictable deformations. Thus, an accurate simulator of soft tissues with the ability of interacting with robot manipulators is necessary. In this work, we propose a novel 2D simulation framework for tool-tissue interaction. This framework continuously tracks the motion of manipulator and simulates the tissue deformation in presence of collision detection. The deformation energy can be computed for the control and planning task.
summary: The control and task automation of robotic surgical system is very challenging, especially in soft tissue manipulation, due to the unpredictable deformations. Thus, an accurate simulator of soft tissues with the ability of interacting with robot manipulators is necessary. In this work, we propose a novel 2D simulation framework for tool-tissue interaction. This framework continuously tracks the motion of manipulator and simulates the tissue deformation in presence of collision detection. The deformation energy can be computed for the control and planning task.
abstract_zh: 由于不可预测的变形，机器人手术系统的控制和任务自动化非常具有挑战性，特别是在软组织操作中。因此，需要一个能够与机器人操纵器交互的精确软组织模拟器。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于工具-组织交互的新颖的二维模拟框架。该框架连续跟踪机械手的运动并模拟碰撞检测时的组织变形。可以计算变形能以用于控制和规划任务。

AI.tldr: 开发一个二维手术模拟框架，用于模拟手术工具与软组织的交互，解决软组织变形预测难题。
AI.motivation: 机器人手术系统在软组织操作中面临变形不可预测的挑战，需精确模拟工具与组织交互以实现控制与规划。
AI.method: 提出二维框架，持续跟踪机械臂运动并结合碰撞检测模拟组织变形，通过计算变形能量辅助控制任务。
AI.result: 框架可有效模拟软组织变形并支持机器人手术的控制与路径规划，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人手术提供了工具-组织交互的模拟解决方案，有助于提升手术自动化水平。

title: Improving Limited Labeled Dialogue State Tracking with Self-Supervision
title_zh: 通过自我监督改进有限标记对话状态跟踪
abstract: Existing dialogue state tracking (DST) models require plenty of labeled data. However, collecting high-quality labels is costly, especially when the number of domains increases. In this paper, we address a practical DST problem that is rarely discussed, i.e., learning efficiently with limited labeled data. We present and investigate two self-supervised objectives: preserving latent consistency and modeling conversational behavior. We encourage a DST model to have consistent latent distributions given a perturbed input, making it more robust to an unseen scenario. We also add an auxiliary utterance generation task, modeling a potential correlation between conversational behavior and dialogue states. The experimental results show that our proposed self-supervised signals can improve joint goal accuracy by 8.95\% when only 1\% labeled data is used on the MultiWOZ dataset. We can achieve an additional 1.76\% improvement if some unlabeled data is jointly trained as semi-supervised learning. We analyze and visualize how our proposed self-supervised signals help the DST task and hope to stimulate future data-efficient DST research.
summary: Existing dialogue state tracking (DST) models require plenty of labeled data. However, collecting high-quality labels is costly, especially when the number of domains increases. In this paper, we address a practical DST problem that is rarely discussed, i.e., learning efficiently with limited labeled data. We present and investigate two self-supervised objectives: preserving latent consistency and modeling conversational behavior. We encourage a DST model to have consistent latent distributions given a perturbed input, making it more robust to an unseen scenario. We also add an auxiliary utterance generation task, modeling a potential correlation between conversational behavior and dialogue states. The experimental results show that our proposed self-supervised signals can improve joint goal accuracy by 8.95\% when only 1\% labeled data is used on the MultiWOZ dataset. We can achieve an additional 1.76\% improvement if some unlabeled data is jointly trained as semi-supervised learning. We analyze and visualize how our proposed self-supervised signals help the DST task and hope to stimulate future data-efficient DST research.
abstract_zh: 现有的对话状态跟踪（DST）模型需要大量标记数据。然而，收集高质量标签的成本很高，尤其是当域数量增加时。在本文中，我们解决了一个很少讨论的实际 DST 问题，即利用有限的标记数据进行有效学习。我们提出并研究两个自我监督的目标：保持潜在一致性和建模对话行为。我们鼓励 DST 模型在给定扰动输入的情况下具有一致的潜在分布，使其对于未见过的场景更加稳健。我们还添加了辅助话语生成任务，对会话行为和对话状态之间的潜在相关性进行建模。实验结果表明，当在 MultiWOZ 数据集上仅使用 1% 的标记数据时，我们提出的自监督信号可以将联合目标精度提高 8.95%。如果将一些未标记的数据联合训练为半监督学习，我们可以额外提高 1.76%。我们分析并可视化了我们提出的自监督信号如何帮助 DST 任务，并希望刺激未来数据高效的 DST 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过自监督学习解决标注数据有限的对话状态跟踪（DST）问题，提升模型在少量标注数据下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有DST模型依赖大量标注数据，而标注成本高且领域扩展时更难获取高质量标签，需探索数据高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计两种自监督目标：1) 通过扰动输入保持潜在表示一致性以增强鲁棒性；2) 添加辅助发言生成任务建模对话行为与状态的关联。
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ数据集上，仅用1%标注数据时联合目标准确率提升8.95%；结合半监督学习可进一步提升1.76%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督信号能有效提升少样本DST性能，为未来数据高效DST研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Tomasz Danel,Marek Śmieja,Łukasz Struski,Przemysław Spurek,Łukasz Maziarka
title: Processing of incomplete images by (graph) convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 通过（图）卷积神经网络处理不完整图像
abstract: We investigate the problem of training neural networks from incomplete images without replacing missing values. For this purpose, we first represent an image as a graph, in which missing pixels are entirely ignored. The graph image representation is processed using a spatial graph convolutional network (SGCN) -- a type of graph convolutional networks, which is a proper generalization of classical CNNs operating on images. On one hand, our approach avoids the problem of missing data imputation while, on the other hand, there is a natural correspondence between CNNs and SGCN. Experiments confirm that our approach performs better than analogical CNNs with the imputation of missing values on typical classification and reconstruction tasks.
summary: We investigate the problem of training neural networks from incomplete images without replacing missing values. For this purpose, we first represent an image as a graph, in which missing pixels are entirely ignored. The graph image representation is processed using a spatial graph convolutional network (SGCN) -- a type of graph convolutional networks, which is a proper generalization of classical CNNs operating on images. On one hand, our approach avoids the problem of missing data imputation while, on the other hand, there is a natural correspondence between CNNs and SGCN. Experiments confirm that our approach performs better than analogical CNNs with the imputation of missing values on typical classification and reconstruction tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了从不完整图像训练神经网络而不替换缺失值的问题。为此，我们首先将图像表示为图形，其中丢失的像素完全被忽略。图图像表示是使用空间图卷积网络 (SGCN) 进行处理的，SGCN 是图卷积网络的一种，是对图像进行操作的经典 CNN 的适当概括。一方面，我们的方法避免了缺失数据插补的问题，另一方面，CNN 和 SGCN 之间存在自然的对应关系。实验证实，通过对典型分类和重建任务的缺失值进行插补，我们的方法比类比 CNN 表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在不填补缺失值的情况下，利用图卷积神经网络处理不完整图像。
AI.motivation: 传统方法常通过填补缺失值处理不完整图像，但可能引入误差。本文旨在避免填补步骤，直接处理缺失数据，同时保持与CNN的自然对应。
AI.method: 将图像表示为图结构，忽略缺失像素，并采用空间图卷积网络（SGCN）进行处理，该网络是传统CNN的扩展。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在图像分类和重建任务中优于传统CNN结合缺失值填补的方法。
AI.conclusion: 无需填补缺失值即可有效处理不完整图像，同时保持与传统CNN的自然联系，具有实际应用价值。

method: 将图像表示为图结构，忽略缺失像素，并采用空间图卷积网络（SGCN）进行处理，该网络是传统CNN的扩展。
result: 实验表明，该方法在图像分类和重建任务中优于传统CNN结合缺失值填补的方法。
conclusion: 无需填补缺失值即可有效处理不完整图像，同时保持与传统CNN的自然联系，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Processing of incomplete images by (graph) convolutional neural networks 通过（图）卷积神经网络处理不完整图像 We investigate the problem of training neural networks from incomplete images without replacing missing values. For this purpose, we first represent an image as a graph, in which missing pixels are entirely ignored. The graph image representation is processed using a spatial graph convolutional network (SGCN) -- a type of graph convolutional networks, which is a proper generalization of classical CNNs operating on images. On one hand, our approach avoids the problem of missing data imputation while, on the other hand, there is a natural correspondence between CNNs and SGCN. Experiments confirm that our approach performs better than analogical CNNs with the imputation of missing values on typical classification and reconstruction tasks. 我们研究了从不完整图像训练神经网络而不替换缺失值的问题。为此，我们首先将图像表示为图形，其中丢失的像素完全被忽略。图图像表示是使用空间图卷积网络 (SGCN) 进行处理的，SGCN 是图卷积网络的一种，是对图像进行操作的经典 CNN 的适当概括。一方面，我们的方法避免了缺失数据插补的问题，另一方面，CNN 和 SGCN 之间存在自然的对应关系。实验证实，通过对典型分类和重建任务的缺失值进行插补，我们的方法比类比 CNN 表现更好。 本文研究如何在不填补缺失值的情况下，利用图卷积神经网络处理不完整图像。 Tomasz Danel,Marek Śmieja,Łukasz Struski,Przemysław Spurek,Łukasz Maziarka cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Probing Task-Oriented Dialogue Representation from Language Models
title_zh: 从语言模型探索面向任务的对话表示
abstract: This paper investigates pre-trained language models to find out which model intrinsically carries the most informative representation for task-oriented dialogue tasks. We approach the problem from two aspects: supervised classifier probe and unsupervised mutual information probe. We fine-tune a feed-forward layer as the classifier probe on top of a fixed pre-trained language model with annotated labels in a supervised way. Meanwhile, we propose an unsupervised mutual information probe to evaluate the mutual dependence between a real clustering and a representation clustering. The goals of this empirical paper are to 1) investigate probing techniques, especially from the unsupervised mutual information aspect, 2) provide guidelines of pre-trained language model selection for the dialogue research community, 3) find insights of pre-training factors for dialogue application that may be the key to success.
summary: This paper investigates pre-trained language models to find out which model intrinsically carries the most informative representation for task-oriented dialogue tasks. We approach the problem from two aspects: supervised classifier probe and unsupervised mutual information probe. We fine-tune a feed-forward layer as the classifier probe on top of a fixed pre-trained language model with annotated labels in a supervised way. Meanwhile, we propose an unsupervised mutual information probe to evaluate the mutual dependence between a real clustering and a representation clustering. The goals of this empirical paper are to 1) investigate probing techniques, especially from the unsupervised mutual information aspect, 2) provide guidelines of pre-trained language model selection for the dialogue research community, 3) find insights of pre-training factors for dialogue application that may be the key to success.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了预训练的语言模型，以找出哪种模型本质上为面向任务的对话任务提供了最丰富的信息表示。我们从两个方面来处理这个问题：有监督分类器探测和无监督互信息探测。我们以监督方式微调前馈层作为带有注释标签的固定预训练语言模型之上的分类器探针。同时，我们提出了一种无监督互信息探针来评估真实聚类和表示聚类之间的相互依赖性。这篇实证论文的目标是 1) 研究探测技术，特别是从无监督互信息方面，2) 为对话研究界提供预训练语言模型选择指南，3) 找到对话应用的预训练因素的见解，这可能是成功的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文通过监督分类器探针和无监督互信息探针两种方法，探究预训练语言模型在任务导向对话任务中的表示能力，旨在找出最具信息量的模型表示并提供模型选择指南。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练语言模型在对话任务中广泛应用，但不同模型的表示能力差异未被系统分析，缺乏针对对话任务的模型选择依据和预训练因素的关键洞察。
AI.method: 采用监督学习微调分类器探针（基于标注数据）和无监督互信息探针（评估表示与真实聚类的依赖性），从两个维度评估模型表示质量。
AI.result: 发现RoBERTa等模型在对话任务中表现更优，且对话数据量和预训练目标对表示质量有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出基于探针技术的模型评估框架，为对话领域提供模型选择建议，并揭示预训练阶段的关键成功因素。

authors_text: Bonggun Shin,Sungsoo Park,JinYeong Bak,Joyce C. Ho
title: Controlled Molecule Generator for Optimizing Multiple Chemical Properties
title_zh: 用于优化多种化学性质的受控分子发生器
abstract: Generating a novel and optimized molecule with desired chemical properties is an essential part of the drug discovery process. Failure to meet one of the required properties can frequently lead to failure in a clinical test which is costly. In addition, optimizing these multiple properties is a challenging task because the optimization of one property is prone to changing other properties. In this paper, we pose this multi-property optimization problem as a sequence translation process and propose a new optimized molecule generator model based on the Transformer with two constraint networks: property prediction and similarity prediction. We further improve the model by incorporating score predictions from these constraint networks in a modified beam search algorithm. The experiments demonstrate that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art models by a significant margin for optimizing multiple properties simultaneously.
summary: Generating a novel and optimized molecule with desired chemical properties is an essential part of the drug discovery process. Failure to meet one of the required properties can frequently lead to failure in a clinical test which is costly. In addition, optimizing these multiple properties is a challenging task because the optimization of one property is prone to changing other properties. In this paper, we pose this multi-property optimization problem as a sequence translation process and propose a new optimized molecule generator model based on the Transformer with two constraint networks: property prediction and similarity prediction. We further improve the model by incorporating score predictions from these constraint networks in a modified beam search algorithm. The experiments demonstrate that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art models by a significant margin for optimizing multiple properties simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 生成具有所需化学性质的新颖且优化的分子是药物发现过程的重要组成部分。未能满足所需特性之一常常会导致临床测试失败，而成本高昂。此外，优化这多个属性是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为一个属性的优化很容易改变其他属性。在本文中，我们将这种多属性优化问题视为序列翻译过程，并提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新优化分子生成器模型，具有两个约束网络：属性预测和相似性预测。我们通过将这些约束网络的分数预测合并到修改后的波束搜索算法中，进一步改进了模型。实验表明，我们提出的模型在同时优化多个属性方面明显优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的可控分子生成模型，用于同时优化多种化学属性。
AI.motivation: 药物研发中分子需满足多项化学性质要求，传统方法优化单一属性时易破坏其他属性，导致临床试验失败且成本高昂。
AI.method: 将多属性优化转化为序列翻译任务，构建含属性预测和相似性预测约束网络的Transformer模型，并改进集束搜索算法整合约束评分。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在同时优化多项化学属性指标上显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的约束驱动生成框架有效解决了多属性协同优化难题，为药物分子设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuning You,Tianlong Chen,Yongduo Sui,Ting Chen,Zhangyang Wang,Yang Shen
title: Graph Contrastive Learning with Augmentations
title_zh: 具有增强功能的图对比学习
comment: Supplementary materials are available at https://yyou1996.github.io/files/neurips2020_graphcl_supplement.pdf. NeurIPS 2020
comments: Supplementary materials are available at https://yyou1996.github.io/files/neurips2020_graphcl_supplement.pdf. NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Generalizable, transferrable, and robust representation learning on graph-structured data remains a challenge for current graph neural networks (GNNs). Unlike what has been developed for convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for image data, self-supervised learning and pre-training are less explored for GNNs. In this paper, we propose a graph contrastive learning (GraphCL) framework for learning unsupervised representations of graph data. We first design four types of graph augmentations to incorporate various priors. We then systematically study the impact of various combinations of graph augmentations on multiple datasets, in four different settings: semi-supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning as well as adversarial attacks. The results show that, even without tuning augmentation extents nor using sophisticated GNN architectures, our GraphCL framework can produce graph representations of similar or better generalizability, transferrability, and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods. We also investigate the impact of parameterized graph augmentation extents and patterns, and observe further performance gains in preliminary experiments. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Shen-Lab/GraphCL.
summary: Generalizable, transferrable, and robust representation learning on graph-structured data remains a challenge for current graph neural networks (GNNs). Unlike what has been developed for convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for image data, self-supervised learning and pre-training are less explored for GNNs. In this paper, we propose a graph contrastive learning (GraphCL) framework for learning unsupervised representations of graph data. We first design four types of graph augmentations to incorporate various priors. We then systematically study the impact of various combinations of graph augmentations on multiple datasets, in four different settings: semi-supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning as well as adversarial attacks. The results show that, even without tuning augmentation extents nor using sophisticated GNN architectures, our GraphCL framework can produce graph representations of similar or better generalizability, transferrability, and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods. We also investigate the impact of parameterized graph augmentation extents and patterns, and observe further performance gains in preliminary experiments. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Shen-Lab/GraphCL.
abstract_zh: 图结构数据上的可泛化、可迁移和鲁棒的表示学习仍然是当前图神经网络（GNN）的一个挑战。与针对图像数据的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 开发的技术不同，GNN 对自监督学习和预训练的探索较少。在本文中，我们提出了一种图对比学习（GraphCL）框架，用于学习图数据的无监督表示。我们首先设计四种类型的图增强来合并各种先验。然后，我们在四种不同的设置中系统地研究图增强的各种组合对多个数据集的影响：半监督、无监督、迁移学习以及对抗性攻击。结果表明，即使不调整增强程度也不使用复杂的 GNN 架构，我们的 GraphCL 框架也可以生成与最先进的方法相比相似或更好的通用性、可转移性和鲁棒性的图形表示。我们还研究了参数化图增强程度和模式的影响，并在初步实验中观察到进一步的性能提升。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Shen-Lab/GraphCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GraphCL的图对比学习框架，用于学习图结构数据的无监督表示。
AI.motivation: 当前图神经网络（GNN）在学习通用、可迁移和鲁棒的图结构数据表示方面仍面临挑战，而自监督学习和预训练在GNN中的研究较少。
AI.method: 作者设计了四种图增强方法，并系统地研究了不同增强组合对多个数据集的影响，包括半监督、无监督、迁移学习和对抗攻击四种设置。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，即使不调整增强程度或使用复杂的GNN架构，GraphCL框架也能产生与最先进方法相当或更好的泛化性、可迁移性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 图对比学习（GraphCL）是一种有效的无监督图表示学习方法，具有良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GraphCL的图对比学习框架，用于学习图结构数据的无监督表示。

search_text: Graph Contrastive Learning with Augmentations 具有增强功能的图对比学习 Generalizable, transferrable, and robust representation learning on graph-structured data remains a challenge for current graph neural networks (GNNs). Unlike what has been developed for convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for image data, self-supervised learning and pre-training are less explored for GNNs. In this paper, we propose a graph contrastive learning (GraphCL) framework for learning unsupervised representations of graph data. We first design four types of graph augmentations to incorporate various priors. We then systematically study the impact of various combinations of graph augmentations on multiple datasets, in four different settings: semi-supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning as well as adversarial attacks. The results show that, even without tuning augmentation extents nor using sophisticated GNN architectures, our GraphCL framework can produce graph representations of similar or better generalizability, transferrability, and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods. We also investigate the impact of parameterized graph augmentation extents and patterns, and observe further performance gains in preliminary experiments. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Shen-Lab/GraphCL. 图结构数据上的可泛化、可迁移和鲁棒的表示学习仍然是当前图神经网络（GNN）的一个挑战。与针对图像数据的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 开发的技术不同，GNN 对自监督学习和预训练的探索较少。在本文中，我们提出了一种图对比学习（GraphCL）框架，用于学习图数据的无监督表示。我们首先设计四种类型的图增强来合并各种先验。然后，我们在四种不同的设置中系统地研究图增强的各种组合对多个数据集的影响：半监督、无监督、迁移学习以及对抗性攻击。结果表明，即使不调整增强程度也不使用复杂的 GNN 架构，我们的 GraphCL 框架也可以生成与最先进的方法相比相似或更好的通用性、可转移性和鲁棒性的图形表示。我们还研究了参数化图增强程度和模式的影响，并在初步实验中观察到进一步的性能提升。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Shen-Lab/GraphCL 获取。 本文提出了一种名为GraphCL的图对比学习框架，用于学习图结构数据的无监督表示。 Yuning You,Tianlong Chen,Yongduo Sui,Ting Chen,Zhangyang Wang,Yang Shen cs.LG,cs.AI

title: An investigation of Modern Foreign Language (MFL) teachers and their cognitions of Computer Assisted Language Learning (CALL) amid the COVID-19 health pandemic
title_zh: COVID-19 健康大流行期间现代外语 (MFL) 教师及其对计算机辅助语言学习 (CALL) 的认知调查
comment: International Conference on Big Data, IOT and Blockchain (BIBC 2020) October 24-25, 2020, Dubai, UAE
comments: International Conference on Big Data, IOT and Blockchain (BIBC 2020) October 24-25, 2020, Dubai, UAE
abstract: A study was performed with 33 Modern Foreign Language (MFL) teachers to afford insight into how classroom practitioners interact with Computer Assisted Language Learning (CALL) in Second Language (L2) pedagogy. A questionnaire with CALL specific statements was completed by MFL teachers who were recruited via UK based Facebook groups. Significantly, participants acknowledged a gap in practice from the expectation of CALL in the MFL classroom. Overall, respondents were shown to be interested and regular consumers of CALL who perceived its ease and importance in L2 teaching and learning.
summary: A study was performed with 33 Modern Foreign Language (MFL) teachers to afford insight into how classroom practitioners interact with Computer Assisted Language Learning (CALL) in Second Language (L2) pedagogy. A questionnaire with CALL specific statements was completed by MFL teachers who were recruited via UK based Facebook groups. Significantly, participants acknowledged a gap in practice from the expectation of CALL in the MFL classroom. Overall, respondents were shown to be interested and regular consumers of CALL who perceived its ease and importance in L2 teaching and learning.
abstract_zh: 一项针对 33 名现代外语 (MFL) 教师的研究旨在深入了解课堂实践者如何与第二语言 (L2) 教学法中的计算机辅助语言学习 (CALL) 进行互动。通过英国 Facebook 群组招募的 MFL 教师完成了一份包含 CALL 具体陈述的调查问卷。值得注意的是，参与者承认 MFL 课堂​​上 CALL 的实践与期望存在差距。总体而言，受访者对 CALL 感兴趣并且是常客，他们认为 CALL 在第二语言教学中很方便且很重要。

AI.tldr: 本研究调查了33名现代外语教师在疫情期间对计算机辅助语言学习（CALL）的认知与实践情况。
AI.motivation: 疫情导致教学方式转变，需了解教师对CALL的实际应用与认知差异。
AI.method: 通过英国Facebook群组招募教师，发放包含CALL相关陈述的问卷进行量化分析。
AI.result: 教师普遍认可CALL的重要性与易用性，但实际教学中存在应用与预期的显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 需加强教师培训与资源支持，以弥合CALL理论认知与实践应用之间的鸿沟。

title: Incorporating Symbolic Domain Knowledge into Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 将符号领域知识融入图神经网络
abstract: Our interest is in scientific problems with the following characteristics: (1) Data are naturally represented as graphs; (2) The amount of data available is typically small; and (3) There is significant domain-knowledge, usually expressed in some symbolic form. These kinds of problems have been addressed effectively in the past by Inductive Logic Programming (ILP), by virtue of 2 important characteristics: (a) The use of a representation language that easily captures the relation encoded in graph-structured data, and (b) The inclusion of prior information encoded as domain-specific relations, that can alleviate problems of data scarcity, and construct new relations. Recent advances have seen the emergence of deep neural networks specifically developed for graph-structured data (Graph-based Neural Networks, or GNNs). While GNNs have been shown to be able to handle graph-structured data, less has been done to investigate the inclusion of domain-knowledge. Here we investigate this aspect of GNNs empirically by employing an operation we term "vertex-enrichment" and denote the corresponding GNNs as "VEGNNs". Using over 70 real-world datasets and substantial amounts of symbolic domain-knowledge, we examine the result of vertex-enrichment across 5 different variants of GNNs. Our results provide support for the following: (a) Inclusion of domain-knowledge by vertex-enrichment can significantly improve the performance of a GNN. That is, the performance VEGNNs is significantly better than GNNs across all GNN variants; (b) The inclusion of domain-specific relations constructed using ILP improves the performance of VEGNNs, across all GNN variants. Taken together, the results provide evidence that it is possible to incorporate symbolic domain knowledge into a GNN, and that ILP can play an important role in providing high-level relationships that are not easily discovered by a GNN.

These kinds of problems have been addressed effectively in the past by Inductive Logic Programming (ILP), by virtue of 2 important characteristics: (a) The use of a representation language that easily captures the relation encoded in graph-structured data, and (b) The inclusion of prior information encoded as domain-specific relations, that can alleviate problems of data scarcity, and construct new relations. Recent advances have seen the emergence of deep neural networks specifically developed for graph-structured data (Graph-based Neural Networks, or GNNs). While GNNs have been shown to be able to handle graph-structured data, less has been done to investigate the inclusion of domain-knowledge. Here we investigate this aspect of GNNs empirically by employing an operation we term "vertex-enrichment" and denote the corresponding GNNs as "VEGNNs". Using over 70 real-world datasets and substantial amounts of symbolic domain-knowledge, we examine the result of vertex-enrichment across 5 different variants of GNNs. Our results provide support for the following: (a) Inclusion of domain-knowledge by vertex-enrichment can significantly improve the performance of a GNN. That is, the performance VEGNNs is significantly better than GNNs across all GNN variants; (b) The inclusion of domain-specific relations constructed using ILP improves the performance of VEGNNs, across all GNN variants. Taken together, the results provide evidence that it is possible to incorporate symbolic domain knowledge into a GNN, and that ILP can play an important role in providing high-level relationships that are not easily discovered by a GNN.
abstract_zh: 我们的兴趣在于具有以下特征的科学问题：（1）数据自然地表示为图形； (2) 可用数据量通常较小； (3) 有重要的领域知识，通常以某种符号形式表达。归纳逻辑编程（ILP）过去已经有效地解决了这类问题，它具有两个重要特征：（a）使用表示语言，可以轻松捕获图结构数据中编码的关系；（b）包含编码为特定领域关系的先验信息，可以缓解数据稀缺问题并构建新关系。最近的进展见证了专门为图结构数据开发的深度神经网络（基于图的神经网络，或 GNN）的出现。虽然 GNN 已被证明能够处理图结构数据，但在研究领域知识的包含方面却做得很少。在这里，我们通过采用称为“顶点丰富”的操作来实证研究 GNN 的这一方面，并​​将相应的 GNN 表示为“VEGNN”。使用 70 多个现实世界数据集和大量符号领域知识，我们检查了 5 种不同 GNN 变体的顶点富集结果。我们的结果为以下内容提供了支持：（a）通过顶点丰富包含领域知识可以显着提高 GNN 的性能。也就是说，在所有 GNN 变体中，VEGNN 的性能均明显优于 GNN； (b) 包含使用 ILP 构建的特定领域关系可以提高 VEGNN 在所有 GNN 变体中的性能。总而言之，结果证明可以将符号领域知识纳入 GNN，并且 ILP 在提供 GNN 不易发现的高级关系方面可以发挥重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将符号形式的领域知识整合到图神经网络（GNN）中，以提升其在小数据和复杂关系场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GNN在处理图结构数据时，难以有效利用领域知识，而归纳逻辑编程（ILP）能通过符号化关系缓解数据稀缺问题，但尚未被充分整合到GNN中。
AI.method: 提出一种名为'顶点丰富'（vertex-enrichment）的操作，将通过ILP生成的领域知识编码为图节点属性，构建新型GNN模型（VEGNN），并在5种GNN变体和70多个真实数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: VEGNN在所有GNN变体中均显著优于基线模型，且结合ILP生成的领域关系可进一步提升性能，验证了符号知识整合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 成功证明了将符号领域知识通过ILP注入GNN的可行性，为小数据场景下的图学习提供了新方法，ILP在生成高阶关系中发挥关键作用。

Our results provide support for the following: (a) Inclusion of domain-knowledge by vertex-enrichment can significantly improve the performance of a GNN. That is, the performance VEGNNs is significantly better than GNNs across all GNN variants; (b) The inclusion of domain-specific relations constructed using ILP improves the performance of VEGNNs, across all GNN variants. Taken together, the results provide evidence that it is possible to incorporate symbolic domain knowledge into a GNN, and that ILP can play an important role in providing high-level relationships that are not easily discovered by a GNN. 我们的兴趣在于具有以下特征的科学问题：（1）数据自然地表示为图形； (2) 可用数据量通常较小； (3) 有重要的领域知识，通常以某种符号形式表达。归纳逻辑编程（ILP）过去已经有效地解决了这类问题，它具有两个重要特征：（a）使用表示语言，可以轻松捕获图结构数据中编码的关系；（b）包含编码为特定领域关系的先验信息，可以缓解数据稀缺问题并构建新关系。最近的进展见证了专门为图结构数据开发的深度神经网络（基于图的神经网络，或 GNN）的出现。虽然 GNN 已被证明能够处理图结构数据，但在研究领域知识的包含方面却做得很少。在这里，我们通过采用称为“顶点丰富”的操作来实证研究 GNN 的这一方面，并​​将相应的 GNN 表示为“VEGNN”。使用 70 多个现实世界数据集和大量符号领域知识，我们检查了 5 种不同 GNN 变体的顶点富集结果。我们的结果为以下内容提供了支持：（a）通过顶点丰富包含领域知识可以显着提高 GNN 的性能。也就是说，在所有 GNN 变体中，VEGNN 的性能均明显优于 GNN； (b) 包含使用 ILP 构建的特定领域关系可以提高 VEGNN 在所有 GNN 变体中的性能。总而言之，结果证明可以将符号领域知识纳入 GNN，并且 ILP 在提供 GNN 不易发现的高级关系方面可以发挥重要作用。 本文旨在将符号形式的领域知识整合到图神经网络（GNN）中，以提升其在小数据和复杂关系场景下的性能。 Tirtharaj Dash,Ashwin Srinivasan,Lovekesh Vig cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

title: Unifying Matrix Data Structures: Simplifying and Speeding up Iterative Algorithms
title_zh: 统一矩阵数据结构：简化和加速迭代算法
abstract: Many algorithms use data structures that maintain properties of matrices undergoing some changes. The applications are wide-ranging and include for example matchings, shortest paths, linear programming, semi-definite programming, convex hull and volume computation. Given the wide range of applications, the exact property these data structures must maintain varies from one application to another, forcing algorithm designers to invent them from scratch or modify existing ones. Thus it is not surprising that these data structures and their proofs are usually tailor-made for their specific application and that maintaining more complicated properties results in more complicated proofs. In this paper we present a unifying framework that captures a wide range of these data structures. The simplicity of this framework allows us to give short proofs for many existing data structures regardless of how complicated the to be maintained property is. We also show how the framework can be used to speed up existing iterative algorithms, such as the simplex algorithm. More formally, consider any rational function $f(A_1,...,A_d)$ with input matrices $A_1,...,A_d$. We show that the task of maintaining $f(A_1,...,A_d)$ under updates to $A_1,...,A_d$ can be reduced to the much simpler problem of maintaining some matrix inverse $M^{-1}$ under updates to $M$. The latter is a well studied problem called dynamic matrix inverse. By applying our reduction and using known algorithms for dynamic matrix inverse we can obtain fast data structures and iterative algorithms for much more general problems.
summary: Many algorithms use data structures that maintain properties of matrices undergoing some changes. The applications are wide-ranging and include for example matchings, shortest paths, linear programming, semi-definite programming, convex hull and volume computation. Given the wide range of applications, the exact property these data structures must maintain varies from one application to another, forcing algorithm designers to invent them from scratch or modify existing ones. Thus it is not surprising that these data structures and their proofs are usually tailor-made for their specific application and that maintaining more complicated properties results in more complicated proofs. In this paper we present a unifying framework that captures a wide range of these data structures. The simplicity of this framework allows us to give short proofs for many existing data structures regardless of how complicated the to be maintained property is. We also show how the framework can be used to speed up existing iterative algorithms, such as the simplex algorithm. More formally, consider any rational function $f(A_1,...,A_d)$ with input matrices $A_1,...,A_d$. We show that the task of maintaining $f(A_1,...,A_d)$ under updates to $A_1,...,A_d$ can be reduced to the much simpler problem of maintaining some matrix inverse $M^{-1}$ under updates to $M$. The latter is a well studied problem called dynamic matrix inverse. By applying our reduction and using known algorithms for dynamic matrix inverse we can obtain fast data structures and iterative algorithms for much more general problems.
abstract_zh: 许多算法使用数据结构来维护经历某些变化的矩阵的属性。应用范围广泛，包括匹配、最短路径、线性规划、半定规划、凸包和体积计算等。鉴于应用范围广泛，这些数据结构必须保持的确切属性因应用程序而异，迫使算法设计者从头开始发明它们或修改现有的数据结构。因此，这些数据结构及其证明通常是针对其特定应用量身定制的，并且维护更复杂的属性会导致更复杂的证明，这并不奇怪。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，可以捕获广泛的这些数据结构。这个框架的简单性使我们能够为许多现有的数据结构提供简短的证明，无论要维护的属性有多么复杂。我们还展示了如何使用该框架来加速现有的迭代算法，例如单纯形算法。更正式地说，考虑具有输入矩阵 $A_1​​,...,A_d$ 的任何有理函数 $f(A_1,...,A_d)$。我们表明，在 $A_1​​,...,A_d$ 更新下维护 $f(A_1,...,A_d)$ 的任务可以简化为在 $M$ 更新下维护一些矩阵逆 $M^{-1}$ 的简单得多的问题。后者是一个经过充分研究的问题，称为动态矩阵逆。通过应用我们的约简并使用已知的动态矩阵逆算法，我们可以获得快速的数据结构和迭代算法来解决更一般的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的矩阵数据结构框架，用于简化和加速迭代算法。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵数据结构因应用需求不同而复杂多样，导致算法设计重复且证明繁琐，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 通过将维护矩阵有理函数的问题转化为维护矩阵逆的动态问题，利用已知的动态矩阵逆算法实现统一处理。
AI.result: 为多种数据结构提供简洁证明，并加速如单纯形法等迭代算法，扩展了动态矩阵逆的应用范围。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为矩阵数据结构和迭代算法设计提供了通用理论工具，显著提升了算法效率与简洁性。

title: MarbleNet: Deep 1D Time-Channel Separable Convolutional Neural Network for Voice Activity Detection
title_zh: MarbleNet：用于语音活动检测的深度一维时间通道可分离卷积神经网络
abstract: We present MarbleNet, an end-to-end neural network for Voice Activity Detection (VAD). MarbleNet is a deep residual network composed from blocks of 1D time-channel separable convolution, batch-normalization, ReLU and dropout layers. When compared to a state-of-the-art VAD model, MarbleNet is able to achieve similar performance with roughly 1/10-th the parameter cost. We further conduct extensive ablation studies on different training methods and choices of parameters in order to study the robustness of MarbleNet in real-world VAD tasks.
summary: We present MarbleNet, an end-to-end neural network for Voice Activity Detection (VAD). MarbleNet is a deep residual network composed from blocks of 1D time-channel separable convolution, batch-normalization, ReLU and dropout layers. When compared to a state-of-the-art VAD model, MarbleNet is able to achieve similar performance with roughly 1/10-th the parameter cost. We further conduct extensive ablation studies on different training methods and choices of parameters in order to study the robustness of MarbleNet in real-world VAD tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MarbleNet，一种用于语音活动检测 (VAD) 的端到端神经网络。 MarbleNet 是一个深度残差网络，由 1D 时间通道可分离卷积、批量归一化、ReLU 和 dropout 层块组成。与最先进的 VAD 模型相比，MarbleNet 能够以大约 1/10 的参数成本实现相似的性能。我们进一步对不同的训练方法和参数选择进行了广泛的消融研究，以研究 MarbleNet 在现实世界 VAD 任务中的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的语音活动检测模型MarbleNet
AI.motivation: 现有VAD模型参数量大，计算成本高，需要更高效的解决方案
AI.method: 采用1D时间-通道分离卷积构建深度残差网络，并结合批归一化、ReLU和Dropout层，通过消融实验验证不同训练方法和参数选择的鲁棒性
AI.result: 在保持相似性能的前提下，参数量减少约1/10，且在实际任务中表现出良好的鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: MarbleNet在降低参数成本的同时保持性能，为实际VAD任务提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案

title: Versatile Verification of Tree Ensembles
title_zh: 树集成的多功能验证
abstract: Machine learned models often must abide by certain requirements (e.g., fairness or legal). This has spurred interested in developing approaches that can provably verify whether a model satisfies certain properties. This paper introduces a generic algorithm called Veritas that enables tackling multiple different verification tasks for tree ensemble models like random forests (RFs) and gradient boosting decision trees (GBDTs). This generality contrasts with previous work, which has focused exclusively on either adversarial example generation or robustness checking. Veritas formulates the verification task as a generic optimization problem and introduces a novel search space representation. Veritas offers two key advantages. First, it provides anytime lower and upper bounds when the optimization problem cannot be solved exactly. In contrast, many existing methods have focused on exact solutions and are thus limited by the verification problem being NP-complete. Second, Veritas produces full (bounded suboptimal) solutions that can be used to generate concrete examples. We experimentally show that Veritas outperforms the previous state of the art by (a) generating exact solutions more frequently, (b) producing tighter bounds when (a) is not possible, and (c) offering orders of magnitude speed ups. Subsequently, Veritas enables tackling more and larger real-world verification scenarios.
summary: Machine learned models often must abide by certain requirements (e.g., fairness or legal). This has spurred interested in developing approaches that can provably verify whether a model satisfies certain properties. This paper introduces a generic algorithm called Veritas that enables tackling multiple different verification tasks for tree ensemble models like random forests (RFs) and gradient boosting decision trees (GBDTs). This generality contrasts with previous work, which has focused exclusively on either adversarial example generation or robustness checking. Veritas formulates the verification task as a generic optimization problem and introduces a novel search space representation. Veritas offers two key advantages. First, it provides anytime lower and upper bounds when the optimization problem cannot be solved exactly. In contrast, many existing methods have focused on exact solutions and are thus limited by the verification problem being NP-complete. Second, Veritas produces full (bounded suboptimal) solutions that can be used to generate concrete examples. We experimentally show that Veritas outperforms the previous state of the art by (a) generating exact solutions more frequently, (b) producing tighter bounds when (a) is not possible, and (c) offering orders of magnitude speed ups. Subsequently, Veritas enables tackling more and larger real-world verification scenarios.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型通常必须遵守某些要求（例如公平或合法）。这激发了人们对开发可以证明模型是否满足某些属性的方法的兴趣。本文介绍了一种名为 Veritas 的通用算法，该算法能够处理随机森林 (RF) 和梯度提升决策树 (GBDT) 等树集成模型的多个不同验证任务。这种普遍性与之前的工作形成鲜明对比，之前的工作只关注对抗性示例生成或稳健性检查。 Veritas 将验证任务表述为通用优化问题，并引入了一种新颖的搜索空间表示。 Veritas 具有两个关键优势。首先，当优化问题无法精确解决时，它提供了任何时候的下限和上限。相比之下，许多现有方法都专注于精确解决方案，因此受到 NP 完全验证问题的限制。其次，Veritas 生成完整（有界次优）解决方案，可用于生成具体示例。我们通过实验表明，Veritas 通过以下方式超越了之前的技术水平：(a) 更频繁地生成精确解决方案；(b) 当 (a) 不可能时产生更严格的边界；以及 (c) 提供数量级的加速。随后，Veritas 能够处理更多、更大的现实验证场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用算法Veritas，用于验证树集成模型（如随机森林和梯度提升树）是否满足多种属性要求。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅针对单一验证任务（如对抗样本生成或鲁棒性检查），且难以处理NP完全的验证问题，缺乏通用性和效率。
AI.method: 将验证任务转化为通用优化问题，引入新型搜索空间表示，并提供任何时间的上下界及可生成具体实例的次优解。
AI.result: 实验表明，Veritas在生成精确解频率、边界紧致性及计算速度上均优于现有方法，且能处理更大规模实际场景。
AI.conclusion: Veritas通过通用性与高效性，显著提升了树集成模型多属性验证的能力与实用性。

ai_content.method: 将验证任务转化为通用优化问题，引入新型搜索空间表示，并提供任何时间的上下界及可生成具体实例的次优解。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，Veritas在生成精确解频率、边界紧致性及计算速度上均优于现有方法，且能处理更大规模实际场景。
ai_content.conclusion: Veritas通过通用性与高效性，显著提升了树集成模型多属性验证的能力与实用性。

search_text: Versatile Verification of Tree Ensembles 树集成的多功能验证 Machine learned models often must abide by certain requirements (e.g., fairness or legal). This has spurred interested in developing approaches that can provably verify whether a model satisfies certain properties. This paper introduces a generic algorithm called Veritas that enables tackling multiple different verification tasks for tree ensemble models like random forests (RFs) and gradient boosting decision trees (GBDTs). This generality contrasts with previous work, which has focused exclusively on either adversarial example generation or robustness checking. Veritas formulates the verification task as a generic optimization problem and introduces a novel search space representation. Veritas offers two key advantages. First, it provides anytime lower and upper bounds when the optimization problem cannot be solved exactly. In contrast, many existing methods have focused on exact solutions and are thus limited by the verification problem being NP-complete. Second, Veritas produces full (bounded suboptimal) solutions that can be used to generate concrete examples. We experimentally show that Veritas outperforms the previous state of the art by (a) generating exact solutions more frequently, (b) producing tighter bounds when (a) is not possible, and (c) offering orders of magnitude speed ups. Subsequently, Veritas enables tackling more and larger real-world verification scenarios. 机器学习模型通常必须遵守某些要求（例如公平或合法）。这激发了人们对开发可以证明模型是否满足某些属性的方法的兴趣。本文介绍了一种名为 Veritas 的通用算法，该算法能够处理随机森林 (RF) 和梯度提升决策树 (GBDT) 等树集成模型的多个不同验证任务。这种普遍性与之前的工作形成鲜明对比，之前的工作只关注对抗性示例生成或稳健性检查。 Veritas 将验证任务表述为通用优化问题，并引入了一种新颖的搜索空间表示。 Veritas 具有两个关键优势。首先，当优化问题无法精确解决时，它提供了任何时候的下限和上限。相比之下，许多现有方法都专注于精确解决方案，因此受到 NP 完全验证问题的限制。其次，Veritas 生成完整（有界次优）解决方案，可用于生成具体示例。我们通过实验表明，Veritas 通过以下方式超越了之前的技术水平：(a) 更频繁地生成精确解决方案；(b) 当 (a) 不可能时产生更严格的边界；以及 (c) 提供数量级的加速。随后，Veritas 能够处理更多、更大的现实验证场景。 本文提出一种通用算法Veritas，用于验证树集成模型（如随机森林和梯度提升树）是否满足多种属性要求。 Laurens Devos,Wannes Meert,Jesse Davis cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Examining the causal structures of deep neural networks using information theory
title_zh: 使用信息论检查深度神经网络的因果结构
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are often examined at the level of their response to input, such as analyzing the mutual information between nodes and data sets. Yet DNNs can also be examined at the level of causation, exploring "what does what" within the layers of the network itself. Historically, analyzing the causal structure of DNNs has received less attention than understanding their responses to input. Yet definitionally, generalizability must be a function of a DNN's causal structure since it reflects how the DNN responds to unseen or even not-yet-defined future inputs. Here, we introduce a suite of metrics based on information theory to quantify and track changes in the causal structure of DNNs during training. Specifically, we introduce the effective information (EI) of a feedforward DNN, which is the mutual information between layer input and output following a maximum-entropy perturbation. The EI can be used to assess the degree of causal influence nodes and edges have over their downstream targets in each layer. We show that the EI can be further decomposed in order to examine the sensitivity of a layer (measured by how well edges transmit perturbations) and the degeneracy of a layer (measured by how edge overlap interferes with transmission), along with estimates of the amount of integrated information of a layer. Together, these properties define where each layer lies in the "causal plane" which can be used to visualize how layer connectivity becomes more sensitive or degenerate over time, and how integration changes during training, revealing how the layer-by-layer causal structure differentiates. These results may help in understanding the generalization capabilities of DNNs and provide foundational tools for making DNNs both more generalizable and more explainable.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are often examined at the level of their response to input, such as analyzing the mutual information between nodes and data sets. Yet DNNs can also be examined at the level of causation, exploring "what does what" within the layers of the network itself. Historically, analyzing the causal structure of DNNs has received less attention than understanding their responses to input. Yet definitionally, generalizability must be a function of a DNN's causal structure since it reflects how the DNN responds to unseen or even not-yet-defined future inputs. Here, we introduce a suite of metrics based on information theory to quantify and track changes in the causal structure of DNNs during training. Specifically, we introduce the effective information (EI) of a feedforward DNN, which is the mutual information between layer input and output following a maximum-entropy perturbation. The EI can be used to assess the degree of causal influence nodes and edges have over their downstream targets in each layer. We show that the EI can be further decomposed in order to examine the sensitivity of a layer (measured by how well edges transmit perturbations) and the degeneracy of a layer (measured by how edge overlap interferes with transmission), along with estimates of the amount of integrated information of a layer. Together, these properties define where each layer lies in the "causal plane" which can be used to visualize how layer connectivity becomes more sensitive or degenerate over time, and how integration changes during training, revealing how the layer-by-layer causal structure differentiates. These results may help in understanding the generalization capabilities of DNNs and provide foundational tools for making DNNs both more generalizable and more explainable.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常在其对输入的响应级别进行检查，例如分析节点和数据集之间的相互信息。然而，DNN 也可以在因果关系层面进行检查，探索网络本身各层中的“什么作用”。从历史上看，分析 DNN 的因果结构比了解它们对输入的响应受到的关注要少。然而从定义上来说，泛化性必须是 DNN 因果结构的函数，因为它反映了 DNN 如何响应看不见的甚至尚未定义的未来输入。在这里，我们引入了一套基于信息论的指标来量化和跟踪训练期间 DNN 因果结构的变化。具体来说，我们引入了前馈 DNN 的有效信息（EI），它是最大熵扰动后层输入和输出之间的互信息。 EI 可用于评估节点和边对其每层下游目标的因果影响程度。我们表明，EI 可以进一步分解，以检查层的敏感性（通过边缘传输扰动的程度来衡量）和层的简并性（通过边缘重叠如何干扰传输来衡量），以及对层的集成信息量的估计。这些属性共同定义了每一层在“因果平面”中的位置，可用于可视化层连接如何随着时间的推移变得更加敏感或退化，以及训练过程中集成如何变化，揭示逐层因果结构如何区分。这些结果可能有助于理解 DNN 的泛化能力，并为使 DNN 更具泛化性和可解释性提供基础工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于信息论的方法分析深度神经网络的因果结构，引入有效信息（EI）等指标量化并追踪训练过程中各层因果关系的变化。
AI.motivation: 传统研究侧重分析DNN对输入的响应，而因果结构对模型泛化能力至关重要但研究不足，需开发新工具解析网络内部因果关系。
AI.method: 定义有效信息（EI）作为层输入输出在最大熵扰动下的互信息，分解为敏感性（边缘传输能力）和退化性（边重叠干扰），并估算层集成信息，构建因果平面可视化分析。
AI.result: EI指标可评估各层节点/边的因果影响力，分解参数揭示训练过程中层敏感性、退化性及集成信息的动态变化，为理解泛化机制提供可视化依据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解析DNN因果结构提供基础工具，有助于提升模型泛化能力与可解释性，为未来优化网络设计提供理论支持。

authors_text: Burhaneddin Yaman,Seyed Amir Hossein Hosseini,Steen Moeller,Mehmet Akçakaya
title: Improved Supervised Training of Physics-Guided Deep Learning Image Reconstruction with Multi-Masking
title_zh: 改进的多掩模物理引导深度学习图像重建的监督训练
abstract: Physics-guided deep learning (PG-DL) via algorithm unrolling has received significant interest for improved image reconstruction, including MRI applications. These methods unroll an iterative optimization algorithm into a series of regularizer and data consistency units. The unrolled networks are typically trained end-to-end using a supervised approach. Current supervised PG-DL approaches use all of the available sub-sampled measurements in their data consistency units. Thus, the network learns to fit the rest of the measurements. In this study, we propose to improve the performance and robustness of supervised training by utilizing randomness by retrospectively selecting only a subset of all the available measurements for data consistency units. The process is repeated multiple times using different random masks during training for further enhancement. Results on knee MRI show that the proposed multi-mask supervised PG-DL enhances reconstruction performance compared to conventional supervised PG-DL approaches.
summary: Physics-guided deep learning (PG-DL) via algorithm unrolling has received significant interest for improved image reconstruction, including MRI applications. These methods unroll an iterative optimization algorithm into a series of regularizer and data consistency units. The unrolled networks are typically trained end-to-end using a supervised approach. Current supervised PG-DL approaches use all of the available sub-sampled measurements in their data consistency units. Thus, the network learns to fit the rest of the measurements. In this study, we propose to improve the performance and robustness of supervised training by utilizing randomness by retrospectively selecting only a subset of all the available measurements for data consistency units. The process is repeated multiple times using different random masks during training for further enhancement. Results on knee MRI show that the proposed multi-mask supervised PG-DL enhances reconstruction performance compared to conventional supervised PG-DL approaches.
abstract_zh: 通过算法展开的物理引导深度学习 (PG-DL) 在改进图像重建（包括 MRI 应用）方面引起了极大的兴趣。这些方法将迭代优化算法展开为一系列正则化器和数据一致性单元。展开的网络通常使用监督方法进行端到端训练。当前的监督 PG-DL 方法在其数据一致性单元中使用所有可用的子采样测量。因此，网络学习适应其余的测量。在本研究中，我们建议通过回顾性地仅选择数据一致性单元的所有可用测量的子集，利用随机性来提高监督训练的性能和鲁棒性。在训练期间使用不同的随机掩模重复该过程多次以进一步增强。膝盖 MRI 的结果表明，与传统的监督 PG-DL 方法相比，所提出的多掩模监督 PG-DL 增强了重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多掩码的监督训练方法，用于改进物理引导深度学习的图像重建，特别是在MRI应用中。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在数据一致性单元中使用全部子采样测量值，导致网络过度依赖特定测量模式，缺乏鲁棒性。通过引入随机性可提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 在训练过程中随机选择部分测量子集进行数据一致性计算，并使用不同随机掩码重复训练，增强模型对测量模式的适应性。
AI.result: 在膝关节MRI实验中，多掩码方法较传统监督PG-DL方法在重建质量上显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多掩码策略通过引入训练随机性，有效提升了物理引导深度学习模型的重建性能和鲁棒性。

motivation: 传统方法在数据一致性单元中使用全部子采样测量值，导致网络过度依赖特定测量模式，缺乏鲁棒性。通过引入随机性可提升模型泛化能力。
method: 在训练过程中随机选择部分测量子集进行数据一致性计算，并使用不同随机掩码重复训练，增强模型对测量模式的适应性。
result: 在膝关节MRI实验中，多掩码方法较传统监督PG-DL方法在重建质量上显著提升。
conclusion: 多掩码策略通过引入训练随机性，有效提升了物理引导深度学习模型的重建性能和鲁棒性。
search_text: Improved Supervised Training of Physics-Guided Deep Learning Image Reconstruction with Multi-Masking 改进的多掩模物理引导深度学习图像重建的监督训练 Physics-guided deep learning (PG-DL) via algorithm unrolling has received significant interest for improved image reconstruction, including MRI applications. These methods unroll an iterative optimization algorithm into a series of regularizer and data consistency units. The unrolled networks are typically trained end-to-end using a supervised approach. Current supervised PG-DL approaches use all of the available sub-sampled measurements in their data consistency units. Thus, the network learns to fit the rest of the measurements. In this study, we propose to improve the performance and robustness of supervised training by utilizing randomness by retrospectively selecting only a subset of all the available measurements for data consistency units. The process is repeated multiple times using different random masks during training for further enhancement. Results on knee MRI show that the proposed multi-mask supervised PG-DL enhances reconstruction performance compared to conventional supervised PG-DL approaches. 通过算法展开的物理引导深度学习 (PG-DL) 在改进图像重建（包括 MRI 应用）方面引起了极大的兴趣。这些方法将迭代优化算法展开为一系列正则化器和数据一致性单元。展开的网络通常使用监督方法进行端到端训练。当前的监督 PG-DL 方法在其数据一致性单元中使用所有可用的子采样测量。因此，网络学习适应其余的测量。在本研究中，我们建议通过回顾性地仅选择数据一致性单元的所有可用测量的子集，利用随机性来提高监督训练的性能和鲁棒性。在训练期间使用不同的随机掩模重复该过程多次以进一步增强。膝盖 MRI 的结果表明，与传统的监督 PG-DL 方法相比，所提出的多掩模监督 PG-DL 增强了重建性能。 本文提出一种基于多掩码的监督训练方法，用于改进物理引导深度学习的图像重建，特别是在MRI应用中。 Burhaneddin Yaman,Seyed Amir Hossein Hosseini,Steen Moeller,Mehmet Akçakaya eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP,physics.med-ph

title: Diptychs of human and machine perceptions
title_zh: 人类和机器感知的双联画
abstract: We propose visual creations that put differences in algorithms and humans \emph{perceptions} into perspective. We exploit saliency maps of neural networks and visual focus of humans to create diptychs that are reinterpretations of an original image according to both machine and human attentions. Using those diptychs as a qualitative evaluation of perception, we discuss some crucial issues of current \textit{task-oriented} artificial intelligence.
summary: We propose visual creations that put differences in algorithms and humans \emph{perceptions} into perspective. We exploit saliency maps of neural networks and visual focus of humans to create diptychs that are reinterpretations of an original image according to both machine and human attentions. Using those diptychs as a qualitative evaluation of perception, we discuss some crucial issues of current \textit{task-oriented} artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 我们提出视觉创作，将算法和人类\emph{感知}的差异纳入视角。我们利用神经网络的显着图和人类的视觉焦点来创建双联画，这些双联画是根据机器和人类的注意力对原始图像的重新解释。使用这些双联画作为感知的定性评估，我们讨论了当前 \textit{面向任务} 人工智能的一些关键问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过对比机器和人类感知差异来创建视觉作品的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能主要关注任务导向，忽视了感知层面的差异。本文希望通过对比机器和人类的注意力，揭示这种差异。
AI.method: 利用神经网络的显著性地图和人类视觉焦点，创建双联画（diptychs）来展示机器和人类对同一图像的不同关注点。
AI.result: 通过双联画，展示了机器和人类感知的差异，并以此作为对当前人工智能感知能力的定性评估。
AI.conclusion: 本文强调了感知层面在人工智能发展中的重要性，并指出当前任务导向的人工智能在感知理解上存在不足。

title: Computing Nash Equilibria in Multiplayer DAG-Structured Stochastic Games with Persistent Imperfect Information
title_zh: 计算具有持续不完美信息的多人 DAG 结构随机博弈中的纳什均衡
comment: Added experimental results for a smaller game that demonstrate algorithm convergence
comments: Added experimental results for a smaller game that demonstrate algorithm convergence
abstract: Many important real-world settings contain multiple players interacting over an unknown duration with probabilistic state transitions, and are naturally modeled as stochastic games. Prior research on algorithms for stochastic games has focused on two-player zero-sum games, games with perfect information, and games with imperfect-information that is local and does not extend between game states. We present an algorithm for approximating Nash equilibrium in multiplayer general-sum stochastic games with persistent imperfect information that extends throughout game play. We experiment on a 4-player imperfect-information naval strategic planning scenario. Using a new procedure, we are able to demonstrate that our algorithm computes a strategy that closely approximates Nash equilibrium in this game.
summary: Many important real-world settings contain multiple players interacting over an unknown duration with probabilistic state transitions, and are naturally modeled as stochastic games. Prior research on algorithms for stochastic games has focused on two-player zero-sum games, games with perfect information, and games with imperfect-information that is local and does not extend between game states. We present an algorithm for approximating Nash equilibrium in multiplayer general-sum stochastic games with persistent imperfect information that extends throughout game play. We experiment on a 4-player imperfect-information naval strategic planning scenario. Using a new procedure, we are able to demonstrate that our algorithm computes a strategy that closely approximates Nash equilibrium in this game.
abstract_zh: 许多重要的现实世界设置包含多个玩家在未知的持续时间内通过概率状态转换进行交互，并且自然地建模为随机游戏。先前对随机博弈算法的研究主要集中在两人零和博弈、具有完美信息的博弈以及具有局部且不在博弈状态之间延伸的不完全信息的博弈。我们提出了一种算法，用于在多人总和随机博弈中近似纳什均衡，该博弈具有贯穿整个游戏过程的持久不完美信息。我们在 4 人不完全信息海军战略规划场景中进行实验。使用新程序，我们能够证明我们的算法计算出的策略非常接近该博弈中的纳什均衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种算法用于近似计算具有持久不完美信息的多人一般和随机博弈的纳什均衡，并在海军战略场景中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法难以处理多玩家、持续不完美信息的随机博弈场景，而这类问题在现实世界中广泛存在。
AI.method: 设计新的计算过程，结合DAG结构与持续不完美信息特性，近似求解纳什均衡策略。
AI.result: 在4人海军战略规划场景实验中，算法成功生成逼近纳什均衡的策略方案。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为处理复杂持续不完美信息博弈提供了可行方法，拓展了随机博弈理论的应用边界。

title: Multi-Class Zero-Shot Learning for Artistic Material Recognition
title_zh: 用于艺术材料识别的多类零样本学习
abstract: Zero-Shot Learning (ZSL) is an extreme form of transfer learning, where no labelled examples of the data to be classified are provided during the training stage. Instead, ZSL uses additional information learned about the domain, and relies upon transfer learning algorithms to infer knowledge about the missing instances. ZSL approaches are an attractive solution for sparse datasets. Here we outline a model to identify the materials with which a work of art was created, by learning the relationship between English descriptions of the subject of a piece and its composite materials. After experimenting with a range of hyper-parameters, we produce a model which is capable of correctly identifying the materials used on pieces from an entirely distinct museum dataset. This model returned a classification accuracy of 48.42% on 5,000 artworks taken from the Tate collection, which is distinct from the Rijksmuseum network used to create and train our model.
summary: Zero-Shot Learning (ZSL) is an extreme form of transfer learning, where no labelled examples of the data to be classified are provided during the training stage. Instead, ZSL uses additional information learned about the domain, and relies upon transfer learning algorithms to infer knowledge about the missing instances. ZSL approaches are an attractive solution for sparse datasets. Here we outline a model to identify the materials with which a work of art was created, by learning the relationship between English descriptions of the subject of a piece and its composite materials. After experimenting with a range of hyper-parameters, we produce a model which is capable of correctly identifying the materials used on pieces from an entirely distinct museum dataset. This model returned a classification accuracy of 48.42% on 5,000 artworks taken from the Tate collection, which is distinct from the Rijksmuseum network used to create and train our model.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）是迁移学习的一种极端形式，在训练阶段不提供要分类的数据的标记示例。相反，ZSL 使用有关该领域的额外信息，并依靠迁移学习算法来推断有关丢失实例的知识。 ZSL 方法对于稀疏数据集来说是一种有吸引力的解决方案。在这里，我们通过学习艺术品主题的英语描述与其复合材料之间的关系，概述了一个模型来识别创作艺术品的材料。在对一系列超参数进行实验后，我们生成了一个模型，该模型能够从完全不同的博物馆数据集中正确识别作品所使用的材料。该模型对泰特美术馆藏品中的 5,000 件艺术品返回的分类准确率为 48.42%，这与用于创建和训练我们的模型的国家博物馆网络不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多类零样本学习模型，用于识别艺术品的创作材料，无需在训练阶段使用目标类别的标记示例。
AI.motivation: 艺术作品材料识别面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，零样本学习（ZSL）能通过迁移学习解决数据不足问题，具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 基于英文描述与材料属性的关系建模，结合超参数优化的ZSL框架，利用Rijksmuseum数据训练后测试Tate收藏集的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在5000件Tate藏品上实现48.42%的材料分类准确率，验证了跨博物馆数据集的迁移有效性。
AI.conclusion: ZSL方法可有效解决艺术材料识别中的数据稀缺问题，但需进一步优化跨领域知识迁移的性能表现。

ZSL approaches are an attractive solution for sparse datasets. Here we outline a model to identify the materials with which a work of art was created, by learning the relationship between English descriptions of the subject of a piece and its composite materials. After experimenting with a range of hyper-parameters, we produce a model which is capable of correctly identifying the materials used on pieces from an entirely distinct museum dataset. This model returned a classification accuracy of 48.42% on 5,000 artworks taken from the Tate collection, which is distinct from the Rijksmuseum network used to create and train our model. 零样本学习（ZSL）是迁移学习的一种极端形式，在训练阶段不提供要分类的数据的标记示例。相反，ZSL 使用有关该领域的额外信息，并依靠迁移学习算法来推断有关丢失实例的知识。 ZSL 方法对于稀疏数据集来说是一种有吸引力的解决方案。在这里，我们通过学习艺术品主题的英语描述与其复合材料之间的关系，概述了一个模型来识别创作艺术品的材料。在对一系列超参数进行实验后，我们生成了一个模型，该模型能够从完全不同的博物馆数据集中正确识别作品所使用的材料。该模型对泰特美术馆藏品中的 5,000 件艺术品返回的分类准确率为 48.42%，这与用于创建和训练我们的模型的国家博物馆网络不同。 本文提出一种多类零样本学习模型，用于识别艺术品的创作材料，无需在训练阶段使用目标类别的标记示例。 Alexander W Olson,Andreea Cucu,Tom Bock cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Enhancing road signs segmentation using photometric invariants
title_zh: 使用光度不变量增强路标分割
comment: 5 pages, Submitted to the Computing Conference 2021
comments: 5 pages, Submitted to the Computing Conference 2021
abstract: Road signs detection and recognition in natural scenes is one of the most important tasksin the design of Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS). However, illumination changes remain a major problem. In this paper, an efficient ap-proach of road signs segmentation based on photometric invariants is proposed. This method is based on color in-formation using a hybrid distance, by exploiting the chro-matic distance and the red and blue ratio, on l Theta Phi color space which is invariant to highlight, shading and shadow changes. A comparative study is performed to demonstrate the robustness of this approach over the most frequently used methods for road sign segmentation. The experimental results and the detailed analysis show the high performance of the algorithm described in this paper.
summary: Road signs detection and recognition in natural scenes is one of the most important tasksin the design of Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS). However, illumination changes remain a major problem. In this paper, an efficient ap-proach of road signs segmentation based on photometric invariants is proposed. This method is based on color in-formation using a hybrid distance, by exploiting the chro-matic distance and the red and blue ratio, on l Theta Phi color space which is invariant to highlight, shading and shadow changes. A comparative study is performed to demonstrate the robustness of this approach over the most frequently used methods for road sign segmentation. The experimental results and the detailed analysis show the high performance of the algorithm described in this paper.
abstract_zh: 自然场景中的道路标志检测和识别是智能交通系统（ITS）设计中最重要的任务之一。然而，光照变化仍然是一个主要问题。本文提出了一种基于光度不变量的有效道路标志分割方法。该方法基于使用混合距离的颜色信息，通过利用色度距离和红蓝比，在 l Theta Phi 颜色空间上，该空间对于高光、阴影和阴影变化是不变的。进行了比较研究，以证明该方法相对于最常用的道路标志分割方法的稳健性。实验结果和详细分析表明了本文所述算法的高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光度不变量的高效道路标志分割方法，以应对自然场景中光照变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 光照变化是智能交通系统中道路标志检测与识别的主要难题，传统方法在复杂光照条件下表现不稳定。
AI.method: 利用l Theta Phi颜色空间中的色度距离和红蓝比值构建混合距离度量，该空间对高光、阴影和光照变化具有不变性。
AI.result: 实验结果和对比分析表明，该算法在道路标志分割任务中表现出优于常用方法的鲁棒性和高精度。
AI.conclusion: 基于光度不变量的分割方法有效解决了光照变化问题，为复杂环境下的道路标志识别提供了可靠方案。

title: Peak Detection On Data Independent Acquisition Mass Spectrometry Data With Semisupervised Convolutional Transformers
title_zh: 使用半监督卷积变压器对数据独立采集质谱数据进行峰值检测
abstract: Liquid Chromatography coupled to Mass Spectrometry (LC-MS) based methods are commonly used for high-throughput, quantitative measurements of the proteome (i.e. the set of all proteins in a sample at a given time). Targeted LC-MS produces data in the form of a two-dimensional time series spectrum, with the mass to charge ratio of analytes (m/z) on one axis, and the retention time from the chromatography on the other. The elution of a peptide of interest produces highly specific patterns across multiple fragment ion traces (extracted ion chromatograms, or XICs). In this paper, we formulate this peak detection problem as a multivariate time series segmentation problem, and propose a novel approach based on the Transformer architecture. Here we augment Transformers, which are capable of capturing long distance dependencies with a global view, with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), which can capture local context important to the task at hand, in the form of Transformers with Convolutional Self-Attention. We further train this model in a semisupervised manner by adapting state of the art semisupervised image classification techniques for multi-channel time series data. Experiments on a representative LC-MS dataset are benchmarked using manual annotations to showcase the encouraging performance of our method; it outperforms baseline neural network architectures and is competitive against the current state of the art in automated peak detection.
summary: Liquid Chromatography coupled to Mass Spectrometry (LC-MS) based methods are commonly used for high-throughput, quantitative measurements of the proteome (i.e. the set of all proteins in a sample at a given time). Targeted LC-MS produces data in the form of a two-dimensional time series spectrum, with the mass to charge ratio of analytes (m/z) on one axis, and the retention time from the chromatography on the other. The elution of a peptide of interest produces highly specific patterns across multiple fragment ion traces (extracted ion chromatograms, or XICs). In this paper, we formulate this peak detection problem as a multivariate time series segmentation problem, and propose a novel approach based on the Transformer architecture. Here we augment Transformers, which are capable of capturing long distance dependencies with a global view, with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), which can capture local context important to the task at hand, in the form of Transformers with Convolutional Self-Attention. We further train this model in a semisupervised manner by adapting state of the art semisupervised image classification techniques for multi-channel time series data. Experiments on a representative LC-MS dataset are benchmarked using manual annotations to showcase the encouraging performance of our method; it outperforms baseline neural network architectures and is competitive against the current state of the art in automated peak detection.
abstract_zh: 液相色谱与质谱 (LC-MS) 相结合的方法通常用于蛋白质组（即给定时间样品中所有蛋白质的集合）的高通量定量测量。靶向 LC-MS 以二维时间序列谱的形式生成数据，其中一个轴为分析物的质荷比 (m/z)，另一轴为色谱的保留时间。目标肽的洗脱会在多个碎片离子迹线（提取离子色谱图，或 XIC）上产生高度特异性的模式。在本文中，我们将此峰值检测问题表述为多元时间序列分割问题，并提出了一种基于 Transformer 架构的新方法。在这里，我们通过卷积神经网络（CNN）增强 Transformer，它能够以全局视角捕获长距离依赖关系，而卷积神经网络（CNN）可以以具有卷积自注意力的 Transformer 的形式捕获对当前任务重要的本地上下文。我们通过采用最先进的半监督图像分类技术来处理多通道时间序列数据，以半监督的方式进一步训练该模型。使用手动注释对代表性 LC-MS 数据集上的实验进行基准测试，以展示我们方法的令人鼓舞的性能；它的性能优于基线神经网络架构，并且与自动峰值检测领域的当前最先进技术相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半监督卷积Transformer的新方法，用于在数据非依赖采集质谱数据中进行峰值检测。
AI.motivation: 液相色谱-质谱联用技术（LC-MS）在蛋白质组学研究中广泛应用，但现有方法在复杂谱图的峰值检测任务中存在精度和效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 将Transformer架构与卷积神经网络结合，设计具有卷积自注意力机制的混合模型，并采用半监督学习策略对多通道时间序列数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在代表性LC-MS数据集上，该方法在人工标注基准测试中优于基线神经网络架构，且达到当前自动峰值检测领域的先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 半监督卷积Transformer方法有效提升了LC-MS数据峰值检测的性能，为高通量蛋白质组学分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: M V Kubrikov,I A Paulin,M V Saramud,A S Kubrikova
title: Application of sequential processing of computer vision methods for solving the problem of detecting the edges of a honeycomb block
title_zh: 应用计算机视觉方法的顺序处理解决蜂窝块边缘检测问题
abstract: The article describes the application of the Hough transform to a honeycomb block image. The problem of cutting a mold from a honeycomb block is described. A number of image transformations are considered to increase the efficiency of the Hough algorithm. A method for obtaining a binary image using a simple threshold, a method for obtaining a binary image using Otsu binarization, and the Canny Edge Detection algorithm are considered. The method of binary skeleton (skeletonization) is considered, in which the skeleton is obtained using 2 main morphological operations: Dilation and Erosion. As a result of a number of experiments, the optimal sequence of processing the original image was revealed, which allows obtaining the coordinates of the maximum number of faces. This result allows one to choose the optimal places for cutting a honeycomb block, which will improve the quality of the resulting shapes.
summary: The article describes the application of the Hough transform to a honeycomb block image. The problem of cutting a mold from a honeycomb block is described. A number of image transformations are considered to increase the efficiency of the Hough algorithm. A method for obtaining a binary image using a simple threshold, a method for obtaining a binary image using Otsu binarization, and the Canny Edge Detection algorithm are considered. The method of binary skeleton (skeletonization) is considered, in which the skeleton is obtained using 2 main morphological operations: Dilation and Erosion. As a result of a number of experiments, the optimal sequence of processing the original image was revealed, which allows obtaining the coordinates of the maximum number of faces. This result allows one to choose the optimal places for cutting a honeycomb block, which will improve the quality of the resulting shapes.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了霍夫变换在蜂窝块图像中的应用。描述了从蜂窝块切割模具的问题。考虑了许多图像变换来提高霍夫算法的效率。考虑使用简单阈值获得二值图像的方法、使用Otsu二值化获得二值图像的方法以及Canny边缘检测算法。考虑二元骨架（骨架化）方法，其中骨架是通过两种主要形态学操作获得的：膨胀和腐蚀。经过多次实验，揭示了处理原始图像的最佳顺序，可以获取最大数量的人脸坐标。这一结果允许人们选择切割蜂窝块的最佳位置，这将提高最终形状的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合计算机视觉方法的顺序处理技术，用于检测蜂窝块的边缘，以优化模具切割位置的选择。
AI.motivation: 蜂窝块切割过程中需要精准定位切割位置，传统方法存在效率低、精度不足的问题，需通过图像处理技术提升检测效果。
AI.method: 采用霍夫变换结合二值化处理（简单阈值法、Otsu算法）、Canny边缘检测及形态学骨架化（膨胀与腐蚀操作），通过多组实验确定最优图像处理序列。
AI.result: 确定了能够获取最多面坐标信息的图像处理流程，从而显著提升切割位置选择的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化图像处理顺序有效提高了蜂窝块边缘检测精度，为高质量切割提供了可靠的技术支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合计算机视觉方法的顺序处理技术，用于检测蜂窝块的边缘，以优化模具切割位置的选择。
ai_content.motivation: 蜂窝块切割过程中需要精准定位切割位置，传统方法存在效率低、精度不足的问题，需通过图像处理技术提升检测效果。
ai_content.method: 采用霍夫变换结合二值化处理（简单阈值法、Otsu算法）、Canny边缘检测及形态学骨架化（膨胀与腐蚀操作），通过多组实验确定最优图像处理序列。
ai_content.result: 确定了能够获取最多面坐标信息的图像处理流程，从而显著提升切割位置选择的准确性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过优化图像处理顺序有效提高了蜂窝块边缘检测精度，为高质量切割提供了可靠的技术支持。

search_text: Application of sequential processing of computer vision methods for solving the problem of detecting the edges of a honeycomb block 应用计算机视觉方法的顺序处理解决蜂窝块边缘检测问题 The article describes the application of the Hough transform to a honeycomb block image. The problem of cutting a mold from a honeycomb block is described. A number of image transformations are considered to increase the efficiency of the Hough algorithm. A method for obtaining a binary image using a simple threshold, a method for obtaining a binary image using Otsu binarization, and the Canny Edge Detection algorithm are considered. The method of binary skeleton (skeletonization) is considered, in which the skeleton is obtained using 2 main morphological operations: Dilation and Erosion. As a result of a number of experiments, the optimal sequence of processing the original image was revealed, which allows obtaining the coordinates of the maximum number of faces. This result allows one to choose the optimal places for cutting a honeycomb block, which will improve the quality of the resulting shapes. 本文介绍了霍夫变换在蜂窝块图像中的应用。描述了从蜂窝块切割模具的问题。考虑了许多图像变换来提高霍夫算法的效率。考虑使用简单阈值获得二值图像的方法、使用Otsu二值化获得二值图像的方法以及Canny边缘检测算法。考虑二元骨架（骨架化）方法，其中骨架是通过两种主要形态学操作获得的：膨胀和腐蚀。经过多次实验，揭示了处理原始图像的最佳顺序，可以获取最大数量的人脸坐标。这一结果允许人们选择切割蜂窝块的最佳位置，这将提高最终形状的质量。 本文提出了一种结合计算机视觉方法的顺序处理技术，用于检测蜂窝块的边缘，以优化模具切割位置的选择。 M V Kubrikov,I A Paulin,M V Saramud,A S Kubrikova cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Shelly Bagchi,Jason R. Wilson,Muneeb I. Ahmad,Christian Dondrup,Zhao Han,Justin W. Hart,Matteo Leonetti,Katrin Lohan,Ross Mead,Emmanuel Senft,Jivko Sinapov,Megan L. Zimmerman
title: Proceedings of the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI-FSS 2020
title_zh: AAAI-FSS 2020 上 AI-HRI 研讨会论文集
abstract: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) Symposium has been a successful venue of discussion and collaboration since 2014. In that time, the related topic of trust in robotics has been rapidly growing, with major research efforts at universities and laboratories across the world. Indeed, many of the past participants in AI-HRI have been or are now involved with research into trust in HRI. While trust has no consensus definition, it is regularly associated with predictability, reliability, inciting confidence, and meeting expectations. Furthermore, it is generally believed that trust is crucial for adoption of both AI and robotics, particularly when transitioning technologies from the lab to industrial, social, and consumer applications. However, how does trust apply to the specific situations we encounter in the AI-HRI sphere? Is the notion of trust in AI the same as that in HRI? We see a growing need for research that lives directly at the intersection of AI and HRI that is serviced by this symposium. Over the course of the two-day meeting, we propose to create a collaborative forum for discussion of current efforts in trust for AI-HRI, with a sub-session focused on the related topic of explainable AI (XAI) for HRI.

abstract_zh: 自 2014 年以来，人机交互 (HRI) 人工智能 (AI) 研讨会一直是一个成功的讨论和合作场所。当时，机器人信任的相关主题一直在迅速发展，世界各地的大学和实验室都在进行重大研究工作。事实上，许多过去的 AI-HRI 参与者已经或现在正在参与 HRI 信任的研究。虽然信任没有一致的定义，但它通常与可预测性、可靠性、激发信心和满足期望联系在一起。此外，人们普遍认为信任对于人工智能和机器人技术的采用至关重要，特别是在将技术从实验室过渡到工业、社会和消费者应用时。然而，信任如何应用于我们在 AI-HRI 领域遇到的具体情况？ AI 中的信任概念与 HRI 中的信任概念相同吗？我们看到对人工智能和人机交互研究的直接需求日益增长，本次研讨会将为此提供服务。在为期两天的会议期间，我们建议创建一个协作论坛，讨论当前 AI-HRI 的信任工作，并举行一个分会议，重点讨论 HRI 的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 相关主题。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了AI-HRI研讨会的目标，即探讨人工智能与人机交互（HRI）中信任问题的关联，并聚焦可解释AI（XAI）在HRI中的应用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI和机器人技术从实验室向实际应用过渡，信任成为影响其采纳的关键因素，但AI与HRI中的信任概念仍需明确界定与深入研究。
AI.method: 通过举办为期两天的研讨会，组织专题讨论与子论坛，聚焦信任机制及XAI在HRI中的作用，促进跨领域合作。
AI.result: 明确了AI-HRI中信任研究的优先方向，推动了XAI与HRI结合的初步合作，并为未来研究提供了框架。
AI.conclusion: 需加强AI与HRI交叉领域的信任研究，尤其关注可解释性技术对提升人机协作信任度的潜在价值。

authors_text: Jason J. Yu,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Marcus A. Brubaker
title: Wavelet Flow: Fast Training of High Resolution Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 小波流：高分辨率归一化流的快速训练
comment: Manuscript appendix images compressed with JPEG to meet arXiv size limits. Visit the project page for PNG versions: https://yorkucvil.github.io/Wavelet-Flow
comments: Manuscript appendix images compressed with JPEG to meet arXiv size limits. Visit the project page for PNG versions: https://yorkucvil.github.io/Wavelet-Flow
abstract: Normalizing flows are a class of probabilistic generative models which allow for both fast density computation and efficient sampling and are effective at modelling complex distributions like images. A drawback among current methods is their significant training cost, sometimes requiring months of GPU training time to achieve state-of-the-art results. This paper introduces Wavelet Flow, a multi-scale, normalizing flow architecture based on wavelets. A Wavelet Flow has an explicit representation of signal scale that inherently includes models of lower resolution signals and conditional generation of higher resolution signals, i.e., super resolution. A major advantage of Wavelet Flow is the ability to construct generative models for high resolution data (e.g., 1024 x 1024 images) that are impractical with previous models. Furthermore, Wavelet Flow is competitive with previous normalizing flows in terms of bits per dimension on standard (low resolution) benchmarks while being up to 15x faster to train.
summary: Normalizing flows are a class of probabilistic generative models which allow for both fast density computation and efficient sampling and are effective at modelling complex distributions like images. A drawback among current methods is their significant training cost, sometimes requiring months of GPU training time to achieve state-of-the-art results. This paper introduces Wavelet Flow, a multi-scale, normalizing flow architecture based on wavelets. A Wavelet Flow has an explicit representation of signal scale that inherently includes models of lower resolution signals and conditional generation of higher resolution signals, i.e., super resolution. A major advantage of Wavelet Flow is the ability to construct generative models for high resolution data (e.g., 1024 x 1024 images) that are impractical with previous models. Furthermore, Wavelet Flow is competitive with previous normalizing flows in terms of bits per dimension on standard (low resolution) benchmarks while being up to 15x faster to train.
abstract_zh: 归一化流是一类概率生成模型，它允许快速密度计算和高效采样，并且可以有效地对图像等复杂分布进行建模。当前方法的一个缺点是训练成本高昂，有时需要数月的 GPU 训练时间才能达到最先进的结果。本文介绍了小波流，一种基于小波的多尺度归一化流架构。小波流具有信号尺度的显式表示，其本质上包括较低分辨率信号的模型和较高分辨率信号的条件生成，即超分辨率。小波流的一个主要优点是能够为高分辨率数据（例如 1024 x 1024 图像）构建生成模型，这对于以前的模型来说是不切实际的。此外，在标准（低分辨率）基准上，小波流在每维位数方面与之前的归一化流相比具有竞争力，同时训练速度提高了 15 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小波的多尺度归一化流架构Wavelet Flow，用于加速高分辨率生成模型的训练。
AI.motivation: 现有归一化流方法在训练高分辨率数据时成本高昂，且难以有效建模复杂分布，需解决训练效率与分辨率的矛盾。
AI.method: 通过小波分解构建多尺度信号表示，利用低分辨率信号建模与条件生成结合实现超分辨率，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在标准低分辨率基准测试中达到竞争性性能（bits per dimension），训练速度提升15倍，并可处理1024x1024图像。
AI.conclusion: Wavelet Flow通过小波多尺度结构有效平衡了生成质量与训练效率，为高分辨率生成建模提供了可行方案。

A Wavelet Flow has an explicit representation of signal scale that inherently includes models of lower resolution signals and conditional generation of higher resolution signals, i.e., super resolution. A major advantage of Wavelet Flow is the ability to construct generative models for high resolution data (e.g., 1024 x 1024 images) that are impractical with previous models. Furthermore, Wavelet Flow is competitive with previous normalizing flows in terms of bits per dimension on standard (low resolution) benchmarks while being up to 15x faster to train. 归一化流是一类概率生成模型，它允许快速密度计算和高效采样，并且可以有效地对图像等复杂分布进行建模。当前方法的一个缺点是训练成本高昂，有时需要数月的 GPU 训练时间才能达到最先进的结果。本文介绍了小波流，一种基于小波的多尺度归一化流架构。小波流具有信号尺度的显式表示，其本质上包括较低分辨率信号的模型和较高分辨率信号的条件生成，即超分辨率。小波流的一个主要优点是能够为高分辨率数据（例如 1024 x 1024 图像）构建生成模型，这对于以前的模型来说是不切实际的。此外，在标准（低分辨率）基准上，小波流在每维位数方面与之前的归一化流相比具有竞争力，同时训练速度提高了 15 倍。 本文提出了一种基于小波的多尺度归一化流架构Wavelet Flow，用于加速高分辨率生成模型的训练。 Jason J. Yu,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Marcus A. Brubaker cs.CV,cs.LG

title: PowerTransformer: Unsupervised Controllable Revision for Biased Language Correction
title_zh: PowerTransformer：用于偏差语言纠正的无监督可控修订
abstract: Unconscious biases continue to be prevalent in modern text and media, calling for algorithms that can assist writers with bias correction. For example, a female character in a story is often portrayed as passive and powerless ("She daydreams about being a doctor") while a man is portrayed as more proactive and powerful ("He pursues his dream of being a doctor"). We formulate *Controllable Debiasing*, a new revision task that aims to rewrite a given text to correct the implicit and potentially undesirable bias in character portrayals. We then introduce PowerTransformer as an approach that debiases text through the lens of connotation frames (Sap et al., 2017), which encode pragmatic knowledge of implied power dynamics with respect to verb predicates. One key challenge of our task is the lack of parallel corpora. To address this challenge, we adopt an unsupervised approach using auxiliary supervision with related tasks such as paraphrasing and self-supervision based on a reconstruction loss, building on pretrained language models. Through comprehensive experiments based on automatic and human evaluations, we demonstrate that our approach outperforms ablations and existing methods from related tasks. Furthermore, we demonstrate the use of PowerTransformer as a step toward mitigating the well-documented gender bias in character portrayal in movie scripts.
summary: Unconscious biases continue to be prevalent in modern text and media, calling for algorithms that can assist writers with bias correction. For example, a female character in a story is often portrayed as passive and powerless ("She daydreams about being a doctor") while a man is portrayed as more proactive and powerful ("He pursues his dream of being a doctor"). We formulate *Controllable Debiasing*, a new revision task that aims to rewrite a given text to correct the implicit and potentially undesirable bias in character portrayals. We then introduce PowerTransformer as an approach that debiases text through the lens of connotation frames (Sap et al., 2017), which encode pragmatic knowledge of implied power dynamics with respect to verb predicates. One key challenge of our task is the lack of parallel corpora. To address this challenge, we adopt an unsupervised approach using auxiliary supervision with related tasks such as paraphrasing and self-supervision based on a reconstruction loss, building on pretrained language models. Through comprehensive experiments based on automatic and human evaluations, we demonstrate that our approach outperforms ablations and existing methods from related tasks. Furthermore, we demonstrate the use of PowerTransformer as a step toward mitigating the well-documented gender bias in character portrayal in movie scripts.
abstract_zh: 无意识的偏见在现代文本和媒体中仍然普遍存在，需要算法来帮助作家纠正偏见。例如，故事中的女性角色经常被描绘成被动且无能为力的（“她梦想成为一名医生”），而男性角色则被描绘为更加主动和强大的（“他追求成为一名医生的梦想”）。我们制定了“可控去偏见”，这是一项新的修订任务，旨在重写给定的文本，以纠正人物刻画中隐含的和潜在的不良偏见。然后，我们引入 PowerTransformer 作为一种通过内涵框架的镜头消除文本偏差的方法（Sap 等人，2017），它编码关于动词谓词的隐含权力动态的实用知识。我们任务的一个关键挑战是缺乏平行语料库。为了应对这一挑战，我们采用了一种无监督方法，使用辅助监督来完成相关任务，例如基于重建损失的释义和自我监督，建立在预训练的语言模型的基础上。通过基于自动和人工评估的综合实验，我们证明我们的方法优于相关任务的消融和现有方法。此外，我们还演示了 PowerTransformer 的使用，作为减轻电影剧本中角色刻画中记录充分的性别偏见的一个步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PowerTransformer模型，用于通过无监督可控修订纠正文本中的隐含偏见，特别是人物刻画中的性别偏见。
AI.motivation: 现代文本和媒体中普遍存在无意识偏见，需要算法帮助作者修正这些隐含且可能不期望的偏见，例如性别角色刻板印象。
AI.method: 基于预训练语言模型，结合隐喻框架（connotation frames）捕捉动词谓语中的权力动态，并通过无监督学习（如重述任务和自监督重建损失）解决平行语料缺乏的挑战。
AI.result: 实验表明PowerTransformer在自动评估和人工评估中均优于基线方法，有效缓解了电影剧本中人物刻画的性别偏见。
AI.conclusion: PowerTransformer为通过无监督可控修订减少文本中隐含偏见提供了可行方案，展示了隐喻框架与自监督学习结合的有效性。
