title: A Path-Dependent Variational Framework for Incremental Information Gathering
title_zh: 用于增量信息收集的路径依赖变分框架
abstract: Information gathered along a path is inherently submodular; the incremental amount of information gained along a path decreases due to redundant observations. In addition to submodularity, the incremental amount of information gained is a function of not only the current state but also the entire history as well. This paper presents the construction of the first-order necessary optimality conditions for memory (history-dependent) Lagrangians. Path-dependent problems frequently appear in robotics and artificial intelligence, where the state such as a map is partially observable, and information can only be obtained along a trajectory by local sensing. Robotic exploration and environmental monitoring has numerous real-world applications and can be formulated using the proposed approach.
summary: Information gathered along a path is inherently submodular; the incremental amount of information gained along a path decreases due to redundant observations. In addition to submodularity, the incremental amount of information gained is a function of not only the current state but also the entire history as well. This paper presents the construction of the first-order necessary optimality conditions for memory (history-dependent) Lagrangians. Path-dependent problems frequently appear in robotics and artificial intelligence, where the state such as a map is partially observable, and information can only be obtained along a trajectory by local sensing. Robotic exploration and environmental monitoring has numerous real-world applications and can be formulated using the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 沿着路径收集的信息本质上是子模块的；由于冗余观察，沿着路径获得的增量信息量会减少。除了子模块性之外，获得的信息增量不仅是当前状态的函数，也是整个历史的函数。本文提出了记忆（历史相关）拉格朗日量的一阶必要最优条件的构造。路径依赖问题经常出现在机器人和人工智能中，其中地图等状态是部分可观测的，并且只能通过局部感知沿轨迹获取信息。机器人勘探和环境监测在现实世界中有许多应用，可以使用所提出的方法来制定。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个路径依赖的变分框架，用于解决增量信息收集中的历史依赖优化问题，应用于机器人探索与环境监测等领域。
AI.motivation: 信息沿路径获取具有子模性且依赖历史状态，传统方法难以处理路径依赖的冗余观测问题，需建立新的优化理论框架以应对机器人等领域的部分可观测环境。
AI.method: 提出记忆型拉格朗日乘数的一阶必要最优条件，通过变分法处理路径依赖的增量信息优化问题，考虑状态历史对信息增益的影响。
AI.result: 建立了路径依赖问题的优化理论框架，并验证其在机器人探索和环境监测等实际场景中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为处理历史依赖的增量信息收集问题提供了理论基础，在机器人与人工智能领域具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Haruhiro Fujita,Masatoshi Itagaki,Yew Kwang Hooi,Kenta Ichikawa,Kazutaka Kawano,Ryo Yamamoto
title: Detector Algorithms of Bounding Box and Segmentation Mask of a Mask R-CNN Model
title_zh: Mask R-CNN 模型的边界框和分割掩模的检测器算法
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.11464
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.11464
abstract: Detection performances on bounding box and segmentation mask outputs of Mask R-CNN models are evaluated. There are significant differences in detection performances of bounding boxes and segmentation masks, where the former is constantly superior to the latter. Harmonic values of precisions and recalls of linear cracks, joints, fillings, and shadows are significantly lower in segmentation masks than bounding boxes. Other classes showed similar harmonic values. Discussions are made on different performances of detection metrics of bounding boxes and segmentation masks focusing on detection algorithms of both detectors.
summary: Detection performances on bounding box and segmentation mask outputs of Mask R-CNN models are evaluated. There are significant differences in detection performances of bounding boxes and segmentation masks, where the former is constantly superior to the latter. Harmonic values of precisions and recalls of linear cracks, joints, fillings, and shadows are significantly lower in segmentation masks than bounding boxes. Other classes showed similar harmonic values. Discussions are made on different performances of detection metrics of bounding boxes and segmentation masks focusing on detection algorithms of both detectors.
abstract_zh: 评估 Mask R-CNN 模型的边界框和分割掩模输出的检测性能。边界框和分割掩模的检测性能存在显着差异，前者始终优于后者。分割掩模中线性裂纹、接缝、填充物和阴影的精度和召回率的谐波值明显低于边界框。其他类别显示出类似的谐波值。讨论了边界框和分割掩模的检测指标的不同性能，重点关注两种检测器的检测算法。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了Mask R-CNN模型中边界框和分割掩码的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 由于边界框和分割掩码在检测性能上存在显著差异，因此需要对这两种检测算法进行比较分析。
AI.method: 通过评估边界框和分割掩码的精确率和召回率的调和值，比较它们的检测性能。
AI.result: 边界框的检测性能始终优于分割掩码，特别是在线性裂缝、接头、填充和阴影等类别中，分割掩码的调和值明显较低。
AI.conclusion: 边界框和分割掩码在检测算法上的表现存在显著差异，应根据具体任务选择合适的检测方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文评估了Mask R-CNN模型中边界框和分割掩码的检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 由于边界框和分割掩码在检测性能上存在显著差异，因此需要对这两种检测算法进行比较分析。
ai_content.method: 通过评估边界框和分割掩码的精确率和召回率的调和值，比较它们的检测性能。
ai_content.result: 边界框的检测性能始终优于分割掩码，特别是在线性裂缝、接头、填充和阴影等类别中，分割掩码的调和值明显较低。
ai_content.conclusion: 边界框和分割掩码在检测算法上的表现存在显著差异，应根据具体任务选择合适的检测方法。

search_text: Detector Algorithms of Bounding Box and Segmentation Mask of a Mask R-CNN Model Mask R-CNN 模型的边界框和分割掩模的检测器算法 Detection performances on bounding box and segmentation mask outputs of Mask R-CNN models are evaluated. There are significant differences in detection performances of bounding boxes and segmentation masks, where the former is constantly superior to the latter. Harmonic values of precisions and recalls of linear cracks, joints, fillings, and shadows are significantly lower in segmentation masks than bounding boxes. Other classes showed similar harmonic values. Discussions are made on different performances of detection metrics of bounding boxes and segmentation masks focusing on detection algorithms of both detectors. 评估 Mask R-CNN 模型的边界框和分割掩模输出的检测性能。边界框和分割掩模的检测性能存在显着差异，前者始终优于后者。分割掩模中线性裂纹、接缝、填充物和阴影的精度和召回率的谐波值明显低于边界框。其他类别显示出类似的谐波值。讨论了边界框和分割掩模的检测指标的不同性能，重点关注两种检测器的检测算法。 本文评估了Mask R-CNN模型中边界框和分割掩码的检测性能。 Haruhiro Fujita,Masatoshi Itagaki,Yew Kwang Hooi,Kenta Ichikawa,Kazutaka Kawano,Ryo Yamamoto cs.CV

title: XR-Ed Framework: Designing Instruction-driven andLearner-centered Extended Reality Systems for Education
title_zh: XR-Ed 框架：设计指导驱动和以学习者为中心的教育扩展现实系统
abstract: Recently, the HCI community has seen an increased interest in applying Virtual Reality (VR), AugmentedReality (AR) and Mixed Reality (MR) into educational settings. Despite many literature reviews, there stilllacks a clear framework that reveals the different design dimensions in educational Extended Reality (XR)systems. Addressing this gap, we synthesize a broad range of educational XR to propose the XR-Ed framework,which reveals design space in six dimensions (Physical Accessibility, Scenario, Social Interactivity, Agency,Virtuality Degree, Assessment). Within each dimension, we contextualize the framework using existing designcases. Based on the XR-Ed Design framework, we incorporated instructional design approaches to proposeXR-Ins, an instruction-oriented, step-by-step guideline in educational XR instruction design. Jointly, they aimto support practitioners by revealing implicit design choices, offering design inspirations as well as guide themto design instructional activities for XR technologies in a more instruction-oriented and learner-centered way.
summary: Recently, the HCI community has seen an increased interest in applying Virtual Reality (VR), AugmentedReality (AR) and Mixed Reality (MR) into educational settings. Despite many literature reviews, there stilllacks a clear framework that reveals the different design dimensions in educational Extended Reality (XR)systems. Addressing this gap, we synthesize a broad range of educational XR to propose the XR-Ed framework,which reveals design space in six dimensions (Physical Accessibility, Scenario, Social Interactivity, Agency,Virtuality Degree, Assessment). Within each dimension, we contextualize the framework using existing designcases. Based on the XR-Ed Design framework, we incorporated instructional design approaches to proposeXR-Ins, an instruction-oriented, step-by-step guideline in educational XR instruction design. Jointly, they aimto support practitioners by revealing implicit design choices, offering design inspirations as well as guide themto design instructional activities for XR technologies in a more instruction-oriented and learner-centered way.
abstract_zh: 最近，HCI 社区对将虚拟现实 (VR)、增强现实 (AR) 和混合现实 (MR) 应用到教育环境中的兴趣日益浓厚。尽管有很多文献综述，但仍然缺乏一个清晰的框架来揭示教育扩展现实（XR）系统中的不同设计维度。为了解决这一差距，我们综合了广泛的教育XR，提出了XR-Ed框架，该框架揭示了六个维度（物理可达性、场景、社交互动性、代理、虚拟度、评估）的设计空间。在每个维度中，我们使用现有的设计案例将框架置于上下文中。基于XR-Ed设计框架，我们结合教学设计方法提出了XR-Ins，这是一种以教学为导向的、循序渐进的教育XR教学设计指南。他们共同致力于通过揭示隐含的设计选择、提供设计灵感以及指导他们以更加以指导为导向和以学习者为中心的方式设计 XR 技术的教学活动来支持从业者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XR-Ed框架和XR-Ins指南，旨在为教育领域的扩展现实（XR）系统设计提供结构化指导。
AI.motivation: 现有教育XR系统缺乏明确的设计框架，导致设计维度不清晰且实践指导不足。
AI.method: 通过综合分析现有教育XR设计案例，提炼出六个设计维度（物理可及性、场景、社会互动性、代理性、虚拟程度、评估），并结合教学设计理论构建XR-Ins指南。
AI.result: 提出XR-Ed六维设计框架及XR-Ins教学导向设计指南，为教育XR开发提供系统化参考。
AI.conclusion: 该框架与指南可帮助实践者更明确地进行教学导向和以学习者为中心的XR教育系统设计。

title: Achieving a quantum smart workforce
title_zh: 实现量子智能劳动力
abstract: Interest in building dedicated Quantum Information Science and Engineering (QISE) education programs has greatly expanded in recent years. These programs are inherently convergent, complex, often resource intensive and likely require collaboration with a broad variety of stakeholders. In order to address this combination of challenges, we have captured ideas from many members in the community. This manuscript not only addresses policy makers and funding agencies (both public and private and from the regional to the international level) but also contains needs identified by industry leaders and discusses the difficulties inherent in creating an inclusive QISE curriculum. We report on the status of eighteen post-secondary education programs in QISE and provide guidance for building new programs. Lastly, we encourage the development of a comprehensive strategic plan for quantum education and workforce development as a means to make the most of the ongoing substantial investments being made in QISE.
summary: Interest in building dedicated Quantum Information Science and Engineering (QISE) education programs has greatly expanded in recent years. These programs are inherently convergent, complex, often resource intensive and likely require collaboration with a broad variety of stakeholders. In order to address this combination of challenges, we have captured ideas from many members in the community. This manuscript not only addresses policy makers and funding agencies (both public and private and from the regional to the international level) but also contains needs identified by industry leaders and discusses the difficulties inherent in creating an inclusive QISE curriculum. We report on the status of eighteen post-secondary education programs in QISE and provide guidance for building new programs. Lastly, we encourage the development of a comprehensive strategic plan for quantum education and workforce development as a means to make the most of the ongoing substantial investments being made in QISE.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对建立专门的量子信息科学与工程（QISE）教育项目的兴趣大大增加。这些项目本质上是趋同的、复杂的，通常是资源密集型的，并且可能需要与广泛的利益相关者进行合作。为了应对这些挑战，我们收集了社区许多成员的想法。本手稿不仅针对政策制定者和资助机构（公共和私人以及从地区到国际层面），还包含行业领导者确定的需求，并讨论了创建包容性 QISE 课程所固有的困难。我们报告 QISE 中 18 个专上教育项目的状况，并为建立新项目提供指导。最后，我们鼓励为量子教育和劳动力发展制定全面的战略计划，作为充分利用 QISE 正在进行的大量投资的手段。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何构建量子信息科学与工程（QISE）教育计划，以培养量子领域的人才队伍并应对教育和行业需求。
AI.motivation: QISE教育项目具有跨学科、复杂且资源密集的特点，需多方合作，但现有课程开发面临包容性与资源分配等挑战，亟需战略规划。
AI.method: 通过调研社区成员意见，分析18个高等教育机构的QISE项目现状，并提出课程设计框架与战略规划建议。
AI.result: 报告了18个QISE项目的当前状态，识别了课程开发难点，并提出了针对政策制定者、行业和教育机构的实施指导。
AI.conclusion: 应制定全面的量子教育战略计划，以最大化当前对QISE的投资效益，推动人才与产业协同发展。

authors_text: Xiaoyi Dong,Dongdong Chen,Jianmin Bao,Chuan Qin,Lu Yuan,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu,Dong Chen
title: GreedyFool: Distortion-Aware Sparse Adversarial Attack
title_zh: GreedyFool：失真感知稀疏对抗攻击
comment: To appear in NeurIPS 2020, code: https://github.com/LightDXY/GreedyFool
comments: To appear in NeurIPS 2020, code: https://github.com/LightDXY/GreedyFool
abstract: Modern deep neural networks(DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial samples. Sparse adversarial samples are a special branch of adversarial samples that can fool the target model by only perturbing a few pixels. The existence of the sparse adversarial attack points out that DNNs are much more vulnerable than people believed, which is also a new aspect for analyzing DNNs. However, current sparse adversarial attack methods still have some shortcomings on both sparsity and invisibility. In this paper, we propose a novel two-stage distortion-aware greedy-based method dubbed as "GreedyFool". Specifically, it first selects the most effective candidate positions to modify by considering both the gradient(for adversary) and the distortion map(for invisibility), then drops some less important points in the reduce stage. Experiments demonstrate that compared with the start-of-the-art method, we only need to modify $3\times$ fewer pixels under the same sparse perturbation setting. For target attack, the success rate of our method is 9.96\% higher than the start-of-the-art method under the same pixel budget. Code can be found at https://github.com/LightDXY/GreedyFool.
summary: Modern deep neural networks(DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial samples. Sparse adversarial samples are a special branch of adversarial samples that can fool the target model by only perturbing a few pixels. The existence of the sparse adversarial attack points out that DNNs are much more vulnerable than people believed, which is also a new aspect for analyzing DNNs. However, current sparse adversarial attack methods still have some shortcomings on both sparsity and invisibility. In this paper, we propose a novel two-stage distortion-aware greedy-based method dubbed as "GreedyFool". Specifically, it first selects the most effective candidate positions to modify by considering both the gradient(for adversary) and the distortion map(for invisibility), then drops some less important points in the reduce stage. Experiments demonstrate that compared with the start-of-the-art method, we only need to modify $3\times$ fewer pixels under the same sparse perturbation setting. For target attack, the success rate of our method is 9.96\% higher than the start-of-the-art method under the same pixel budget. Code can be found at https://github.com/LightDXY/GreedyFool.
abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性样本的影响。稀疏对抗样本是对抗样本的一个特殊分支，它可以通过仅扰动几个像素来欺骗目标模型。稀疏对抗攻击的存在表明DNN比人们想象的要脆弱得多，这也是分析DNN的一个新方面。然而，当前的稀疏对抗攻击方法在稀疏性和不可见性方面仍然存在一些缺陷。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段失真感知贪婪方法，称为“GreedyFool”。具体来说，它首先通过考虑梯度（对于对手）和失真图（对于不可见性）来选择最有效的候选位置进行修改，然后在减少阶段丢弃一些不太重要的点。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，在相同的稀疏扰动设置下，我们只需要修改 $3\time$ 的像素。对于目标攻击，在相同像素预算下，我们的方法的成功率比最先进的方法高出 9.96%。代码可以在 https://github.com/LightDXY/GreedyFool 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GreedyFool的新型稀疏对抗攻击方法，通过考虑梯度和失真图来提高攻击效率和隐蔽性。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏对抗攻击方法在稀疏性和不可见性方面存在不足，需改进以更高效地生成对抗样本。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先通过梯度和失真图选择关键像素位置，再在减少阶段去除次要像素以优化稀疏性。
AI.result: 在相同稀疏扰动设置下，所需修改像素减少3倍；目标攻击成功率比现有方法高9.96%。
AI.conclusion: GreedyFool在稀疏性和攻击效果上优于现有方法，为对抗样本研究提供新思路。

title: Contextual Latent-Movements Off-Policy Optimization for Robotic Manipulation Skills
title_zh: 机器人操作技能的上下文潜在运动离策略优化
abstract: Parameterized movement primitives have been extensively used for imitation learning of robotic tasks. However, the high-dimensionality of the parameter space hinders the improvement of such primitives in the reinforcement learning (RL) setting, especially for learning with physical robots. In this paper we propose a novel view on handling the demonstrated trajectories for acquiring low-dimensional, non-linear latent dynamics, using mixtures of probabilistic principal component analyzers (MPPCA) on the movements' parameter space. Moreover, we introduce a new contextual off-policy RL algorithm, named LAtent-Movements Policy Optimization (LAMPO). LAMPO can provide gradient estimates from previous experience using self-normalized importance sampling, hence, making full use of samples collected in previous learning iterations. These advantages combined provide a complete framework for sample-efficient off-policy optimization of movement primitives for robot learning of high-dimensional manipulation skills. Our experimental results conducted both in simulation and on a real robot show that LAMPO provides sample-efficient policies against common approaches in literature.
summary: Parameterized movement primitives have been extensively used for imitation learning of robotic tasks. However, the high-dimensionality of the parameter space hinders the improvement of such primitives in the reinforcement learning (RL) setting, especially for learning with physical robots. In this paper we propose a novel view on handling the demonstrated trajectories for acquiring low-dimensional, non-linear latent dynamics, using mixtures of probabilistic principal component analyzers (MPPCA) on the movements' parameter space. Moreover, we introduce a new contextual off-policy RL algorithm, named LAtent-Movements Policy Optimization (LAMPO). LAMPO can provide gradient estimates from previous experience using self-normalized importance sampling, hence, making full use of samples collected in previous learning iterations. These advantages combined provide a complete framework for sample-efficient off-policy optimization of movement primitives for robot learning of high-dimensional manipulation skills. Our experimental results conducted both in simulation and on a real robot show that LAMPO provides sample-efficient policies against common approaches in literature.
abstract_zh: 参数化运动基元已广泛用于机器人任务的模仿学习。然而，参数空间的高维性阻碍了强化学习（RL）设置中此类原语的改进，特别是对于物理机器人的学习。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的观点，通过在运动参数空间上使用概率主成分分析器（MPPCA）的混合来处理所演示的轨迹，以获取低维、非线性潜在动力学。此外，我们引入了一种新的上下文离策略 RL 算法，名为 LAtent-Movements Policy Optimization (LAMPO)。 LAMPO 可以使用自归一化重要性采样根据先前的经验提供梯度估计，从而充分利用先前学习迭代中收集的样本。这些优势相结合，为机器人学习高维操作技能的运动原语的样本高效离策略优化提供了一个完整的框架。我们在模拟和真实机器人上进行的实验结果表明，LAMPO 针对文献中的常见方法提供了样本有效的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在运动的离线策略优化框架LAMPO，用于提高机器人高维操作技能学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统参数化运动原语在强化学习中面临高维参数空间导致的效率低下问题，尤其在物理机器人应用中难以有效改进。
AI.method: 采用混合概率主成分分析（MPPCA）提取运动参数的低维潜在动态，并设计基于自归一化重要性采样的上下文离线RL算法LAMPO，充分利用历史数据梯度信息。
AI.result: 仿真与真实机器人实验表明，LAMPO相较现有方法在样本效率上具有显著优势，能有效学习高维操作技能。
AI.conclusion: LAMPO框架通过潜在动态建模与离线策略优化，为机器人复杂操作技能学习提供了高效可行的新方案。

authors_text: Quang H. Le,Kamal Youcef-Toumi,Dzmitry Tsetserukou,Ali Jahanian
title: Instance Semantic Segmentation Benefits from Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 实例语义分割受益于生成对抗网络
abstract: In design of instance segmentation networks that reconstruct masks, segmentation is often taken as its literal definition -- assigning each pixel a label. This has led to thinking the problem as a template matching one with the goal of minimizing the loss between the reconstructed and the ground truth pixels. Rethinking reconstruction networks as a generator, we define the problem of predicting masks as a GANs game framework: A segmentation network generates the masks, and a discriminator network decides on the quality of the masks. To demonstrate this game, we show effective modifications on the general segmentation framework in Mask R-CNN. We find that playing the game in feature space is more effective than the pixel space leading to stable training between the discriminator and the generator, predicting object coordinates should be replaced by predicting contextual regions for objects, and overall the adversarial loss helps the performance and removes the need for any custom settings per different data domain. We test our framework in various domains and report on cellphone recycling, autonomous driving, large-scale object detection, and medical glands. We observe in general GANs yield masks that account for crispier boundaries, clutter, small objects, and details, being in domain of regular shapes or heterogeneous and coalescing shapes. Our code for reproducing the results is available publicly.
summary: In design of instance segmentation networks that reconstruct masks, segmentation is often taken as its literal definition -- assigning each pixel a label. This has led to thinking the problem as a template matching one with the goal of minimizing the loss between the reconstructed and the ground truth pixels. Rethinking reconstruction networks as a generator, we define the problem of predicting masks as a GANs game framework: A segmentation network generates the masks, and a discriminator network decides on the quality of the masks. To demonstrate this game, we show effective modifications on the general segmentation framework in Mask R-CNN. We find that playing the game in feature space is more effective than the pixel space leading to stable training between the discriminator and the generator, predicting object coordinates should be replaced by predicting contextual regions for objects, and overall the adversarial loss helps the performance and removes the need for any custom settings per different data domain. We test our framework in various domains and report on cellphone recycling, autonomous driving, large-scale object detection, and medical glands. We observe in general GANs yield masks that account for crispier boundaries, clutter, small objects, and details, being in domain of regular shapes or heterogeneous and coalescing shapes. Our code for reproducing the results is available publicly.
abstract_zh: 在重建掩模的实例分割网络的设计中，分割通常被视为其字面定义——为每个像素分配一个标签。这导致我们将该问题视为一种模板匹配问题，其目标是最小化重建像素与地面真实像素之间的损失。重新思考重构网络作为生成器，我们将预测掩模的问题定义为 GAN 游戏框架：分割网络生成掩模，鉴别器网络决定掩模的质量。为了演示这个游戏，我们展示了对 Mask R-CNN 中通用分割框架的有效修改。我们发现在特征空间中玩游戏比在像素空间中更有效，从而可以在判别器和生成器之间进行稳定的训练，预测对象坐标应该用预测对象的上下文区域来代替，总体而言，对抗性损失有助于提高性能，并且无需针对不同数据域进行任何自定义设置。我们在各个领域测试我们的框架，并报告手机回收、自动驾驶、大规模物体检测和医疗腺体。我们观察到，一般来说，GAN 产生的掩模可以解释更清晰的边界、杂波、小物体和细节，属于规则形状或异构和合并形状的领域。我们用于重现结果的代码是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将生成对抗网络（GANs）应用于实例语义分割，通过生成器与判别器的博弈优化掩码预测。
AI.motivation: 传统分割网络将分割视为像素级标签分配问题，难以处理复杂结构和细节，而GAN框架能通过对抗训练提升生成质量。
AI.method: 将Mask R-CNN框架中的分割网络视为生成器，引入判别器评估掩码质量，在特征空间而非像素空间进行对抗训练，并用上下文区域预测替代坐标预测。
AI.result: 在手机回收、自动驾驶、医学腺体等多领域验证中，GAN生成的掩码具有更清晰边界、更优小物体和细节处理能力，且无需领域定制参数。
AI.conclusion: 对抗损失能有效提升分割性能，特征空间博弈训练使模型更鲁棒，通用性强，适用于多种形状和复杂场景的实例分割任务。

tldr: 本文提出将生成对抗网络（GANs）应用于实例语义分割，通过生成器与判别器的博弈优化掩码预测。

method: 将Mask R-CNN框架中的分割网络视为生成器，引入判别器评估掩码质量，在特征空间而非像素空间进行对抗训练，并用上下文区域预测替代坐标预测。
result: 在手机回收、自动驾驶、医学腺体等多领域验证中，GAN生成的掩码具有更清晰边界、更优小物体和细节处理能力，且无需领域定制参数。
conclusion: 对抗损失能有效提升分割性能，特征空间博弈训练使模型更鲁棒，通用性强，适用于多种形状和复杂场景的实例分割任务。
search_text: Instance Semantic Segmentation Benefits from Generative Adversarial Networks 实例语义分割受益于生成对抗网络 In design of instance segmentation networks that reconstruct masks, segmentation is often taken as its literal definition -- assigning each pixel a label. This has led to thinking the problem as a template matching one with the goal of minimizing the loss between the reconstructed and the ground truth pixels. Rethinking reconstruction networks as a generator, we define the problem of predicting masks as a GANs game framework: A segmentation network generates the masks, and a discriminator network decides on the quality of the masks. To demonstrate this game, we show effective modifications on the general segmentation framework in Mask R-CNN. We find that playing the game in feature space is more effective than the pixel space leading to stable training between the discriminator and the generator, predicting object coordinates should be replaced by predicting contextual regions for objects, and overall the adversarial loss helps the performance and removes the need for any custom settings per different data domain. We test our framework in various domains and report on cellphone recycling, autonomous driving, large-scale object detection, and medical glands. We observe in general GANs yield masks that account for crispier boundaries, clutter, small objects, and details, being in domain of regular shapes or heterogeneous and coalescing shapes. Our code for reproducing the results is available publicly. 在重建掩模的实例分割网络的设计中，分割通常被视为其字面定义——为每个像素分配一个标签。这导致我们将该问题视为一种模板匹配问题，其目标是最小化重建像素与地面真实像素之间的损失。重新思考重构网络作为生成器，我们将预测掩模的问题定义为 GAN 游戏框架：分割网络生成掩模，鉴别器网络决定掩模的质量。为了演示这个游戏，我们展示了对 Mask R-CNN 中通用分割框架的有效修改。我们发现在特征空间中玩游戏比在像素空间中更有效，从而可以在判别器和生成器之间进行稳定的训练，预测对象坐标应该用预测对象的上下文区域来代替，总体而言，对抗性损失有助于提高性能，并且无需针对不同数据域进行任何自定义设置。我们在各个领域测试我们的框架，并报告手机回收、自动驾驶、大规模物体检测和医疗腺体。我们观察到，一般来说，GAN 产生的掩模可以解释更清晰的边界、杂波、小物体和细节，属于规则形状或异构和合并形状的领域。我们用于重现结果的代码是公开可用的。 本文提出将生成对抗网络（GANs）应用于实例语义分割，通过生成器与判别器的博弈优化掩码预测。 Quang H. Le,Kamal Youcef-Toumi,Dzmitry Tsetserukou,Ali Jahanian cs.CV

authors_text: Jesus Ruiz-Santaquiteria,Alberto Velasco-Mata,Noelia Vallez,Gloria Bueno,Juan A. Álvarez-García,Oscar Deniz
title: Handgun detection using combined human pose and weapon appearance
title_zh: 使用人体姿势和武器外观相结合的手枪检测
abstract: Closed-circuit television (CCTV) systems are essential nowadays to prevent security threats or dangerous situations, in which early detection is crucial. Novel deep learning-based methods have allowed to develop automatic weapon detectors with promising results. However, these approaches are mainly based on visual weapon appearance only. For handguns, body pose may be a useful cue, especially in cases where the gun is barely visible. In this work, a novel method is proposed to combine, in a single architecture, both weapon appearance and human pose information. First, pose keypoints are estimated to extract hand regions and generate binary pose images, which are the model inputs. Then, each input is processed in different subnetworks and combined to produce the handgun bounding box. Results obtained show that the combined model improves the handgun detection state of the art, achieving from 4.23 to 18.9 AP points more than the best previous approach.
summary: Closed-circuit television (CCTV) systems are essential nowadays to prevent security threats or dangerous situations, in which early detection is crucial. Novel deep learning-based methods have allowed to develop automatic weapon detectors with promising results. However, these approaches are mainly based on visual weapon appearance only. For handguns, body pose may be a useful cue, especially in cases where the gun is barely visible. In this work, a novel method is proposed to combine, in a single architecture, both weapon appearance and human pose information. First, pose keypoints are estimated to extract hand regions and generate binary pose images, which are the model inputs. Then, each input is processed in different subnetworks and combined to produce the handgun bounding box. Results obtained show that the combined model improves the handgun detection state of the art, achieving from 4.23 to 18.9 AP points more than the best previous approach.
abstract_zh: 如今，闭路电视 (CCTV) 系统对于防止安全威胁或危险情况至关重要，而早期发现至关重要。基于深度学习的新颖方法使得自动武器探测器的开发取得了可喜的成果。然而，这些方法主要仅基于视觉武器外观。对于手枪来说，身体姿势可能是一个有用的提示，特别是在枪几乎看不见的情况下。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的方法，将武器外观和人体姿势信息结合在单个架构中。首先，估计姿势关键点以提取手部区域并生成二值姿势图像，这是模型输入。然后，每个输入在不同的子网络中进行处理并组合以生成手枪边界框。获得的结果表明，组合模型改进了现有技术的手枪检测水平，比之前的最佳方法高出 4.23 到 18.9 个 AP 点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人体姿态信息与武器外观特征的新型手枪检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉检测方法在手枪遮挡或隐蔽时检测效果下降，而人体姿态信息可提供关键行为线索，需融合多模态信息提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过姿态关键点估计定位手部区域生成二值姿态图，与武器外观特征分别输入子网络，经特征融合后输出手枪边界框。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上实现4.23-18.9 AP值提升，显著优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合人体姿态与武器外观的多模态方法可有效提升手枪检测性能，为安全监控提供更可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Zhuangzhuang Dai,Muhamad Risqi U. Saputra,Chris Xiaoxuan Lu,Niki Trigoni,Andrew Markham
title: Demo Abstract: Indoor Positioning System in Visually-Degraded Environments with Millimetre-Wave Radar and Inertial Sensors
title_zh: 演示摘要：视觉退化环境中采用毫米波雷达和惯性传感器的室内定位系统
comment: Appear as demo abstract at the ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems (SenSys 2020)
comments: Appear as demo abstract at the ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems (SenSys 2020)
abstract: Positional estimation is of great importance in the public safety sector. Emergency responders such as fire fighters, medical rescue teams, and the police will all benefit from a resilient positioning system to deliver safe and effective emergency services. Unfortunately, satellite navigation (e.g., GPS) offers limited coverage in indoor environments. It is also not possible to rely on infrastructure based solutions. To this end, wearable sensor-aided navigation techniques, such as those based on camera and Inertial Measurement Units (IMU), have recently emerged recently as an accurate, infrastructure-free solution. Together with an increase in the computational capabilities of mobile devices, motion estimation can be performed in real-time. In this demonstration, we present a real-time indoor positioning system which fuses millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar and IMU data via deep sensor fusion. We employ mmWave radar rather than an RGB camera as it provides better robustness to visual degradation (e.g., smoke, darkness, etc.) while at the same time requiring lower computational resources to enable runtime computation. We implemented the sensor system on a handheld device and a mobile computer running at 10 FPS to track a user inside an apartment. Good accuracy and resilience were exhibited even in poorly illuminated scenes.
summary: Positional estimation is of great importance in the public safety sector. Emergency responders such as fire fighters, medical rescue teams, and the police will all benefit from a resilient positioning system to deliver safe and effective emergency services. Unfortunately, satellite navigation (e.g., GPS) offers limited coverage in indoor environments. It is also not possible to rely on infrastructure based solutions. To this end, wearable sensor-aided navigation techniques, such as those based on camera and Inertial Measurement Units (IMU), have recently emerged recently as an accurate, infrastructure-free solution. Together with an increase in the computational capabilities of mobile devices, motion estimation can be performed in real-time. In this demonstration, we present a real-time indoor positioning system which fuses millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar and IMU data via deep sensor fusion. We employ mmWave radar rather than an RGB camera as it provides better robustness to visual degradation (e.g., smoke, darkness, etc.) while at the same time requiring lower computational resources to enable runtime computation. We implemented the sensor system on a handheld device and a mobile computer running at 10 FPS to track a user inside an apartment. Good accuracy and resilience were exhibited even in poorly illuminated scenes.
abstract_zh: 位置估计在公共安全领域非常重要。消防员、医疗救援队和警察等应急人员都将受益于弹性定位系统，以提供安全有效的应急服务。不幸的是，卫星导航（例如 GPS）在室内环境中的覆盖范围有限。也不可能依赖基于基础设施的解决方案。为此，可穿戴传感器辅助导航技术，例如基于摄像头和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的技术，最近作为一种精确、无需基础设施的解决方案而出现。随着移动设备计算能力的增强，运动估计可以实时执行。在此演示中，我们展示了一种实时室内定位系统，该系统通过深度传感器融合融合毫米波 (mmWave) 雷达和 IMU 数据。我们采用毫米波雷达而不是 RGB 摄像头，因为它对视觉退化（例如烟雾、黑暗等）具有更好的鲁棒性，同时需要较低的计算资源来实现运行时计算。我们在手持设备和以 10 FPS 运行的移动计算机上实现了传感器系统，以跟踪公寓内的用户。即使在照明不佳的场景中也能表现出良好的准确性和弹性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于毫米波雷达和惯性测量单元（IMU）的实时室内定位系统，用于视觉退化环境下的位置估计。
AI.motivation: 卫星导航（如GPS）在室内环境覆盖有限，且依赖基础设施的解决方案不可行。传统基于摄像头和IMU的方案在烟雾、黑暗等视觉退化场景下表现不佳，需开发无需基础设施且鲁棒的定位系统以支持应急响应。
AI.method: 通过深度传感器融合技术，结合毫米波雷达（替代RGB摄像头）与IMU数据，利用手持设备和移动计算机实现实时定位，系统运行帧率为10 FPS。
AI.result: 在低照度场景（如烟雾、黑暗）中，系统展示了良好的定位精度和鲁棒性，成功在公寓环境中实现用户追踪。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为视觉退化环境提供了高效的室内定位方案，相比传统摄像头方案更具鲁棒性，适用于应急救援等场景。

Good accuracy and resilience were exhibited even in poorly illuminated scenes. 位置估计在公共安全领域非常重要。消防员、医疗救援队和警察等应急人员都将受益于弹性定位系统，以提供安全有效的应急服务。不幸的是，卫星导航（例如 GPS）在室内环境中的覆盖范围有限。也不可能依赖基于基础设施的解决方案。为此，可穿戴传感器辅助导航技术，例如基于摄像头和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的技术，最近作为一种精确、无需基础设施的解决方案而出现。随着移动设备计算能力的增强，运动估计可以实时执行。在此演示中，我们展示了一种实时室内定位系统，该系统通过深度传感器融合融合毫米波 (mmWave) 雷达和 IMU 数据。我们采用毫米波雷达而不是 RGB 摄像头，因为它对视觉退化（例如烟雾、黑暗等）具有更好的鲁棒性，同时需要较低的计算资源来实现运行时计算。我们在手持设备和以 10 FPS 运行的移动计算机上实现了传感器系统，以跟踪公寓内的用户。即使在照明不佳的场景中也能表现出良好的准确性和弹性。 本文提出了一种基于毫米波雷达和惯性测量单元（IMU）的实时室内定位系统，用于视觉退化环境下的位置估计。 Zhuangzhuang Dai,Muhamad Risqi U. Saputra,Chris Xiaoxuan Lu,Niki Trigoni,Andrew Markham cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Andrés Ortiz,Francisco J. Martinez-Murcia,Marco A. Formoso,Juan Luis Luque,Auxiliadora Sánchez
title: Dyslexia detection from EEG signals using SSA component correlation and Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用 SSA 分量相关性和卷积神经网络从 EEG 信号中检测诵读困难
abstract: Objective dyslexia diagnosis is not a straighforward task since it is traditionally performed by means of the intepretation of different behavioural tests. Moreover, these tests are only applicable to readers. This way, early diagnosis requires the use of specific tasks not only related to reading. Thus, the use of Electroencephalography (EEG) constitutes an alternative for an objective and early diagnosis that can be used with pre-readers. In this way, the extraction of relevant features in EEG signals results crucial for classification. However, the identification of the most relevant features is not straighforward, and predefined statistics in the time or frequency domain are not always discriminant enough. On the other hand, classical processing of EEG signals based on extracting EEG bands frequency descriptors, usually make some assumptions on the raw signals that could cause indormation loosing. In this work we propose an alternative for analysis in the frequency domain based on Singluar Spectrum Analysis (SSA) to split the raw signal into components representing different oscillatory modes. Moreover, correlation matrices obtained for each component among EEG channels are classfied using a Convolutional Neural network.
summary: Objective dyslexia diagnosis is not a straighforward task since it is traditionally performed by means of the intepretation of different behavioural tests. Moreover, these tests are only applicable to readers. This way, early diagnosis requires the use of specific tasks not only related to reading. Thus, the use of Electroencephalography (EEG) constitutes an alternative for an objective and early diagnosis that can be used with pre-readers. In this way, the extraction of relevant features in EEG signals results crucial for classification. However, the identification of the most relevant features is not straighforward, and predefined statistics in the time or frequency domain are not always discriminant enough. On the other hand, classical processing of EEG signals based on extracting EEG bands frequency descriptors, usually make some assumptions on the raw signals that could cause indormation loosing. In this work we propose an alternative for analysis in the frequency domain based on Singluar Spectrum Analysis (SSA) to split the raw signal into components representing different oscillatory modes. Moreover, correlation matrices obtained for each component among EEG channels are classfied using a Convolutional Neural network.
abstract_zh: 客观的阅读障碍诊断并不是一项简单的任务，因为它传统上是通过解释不同的行为测试来进行的。而且，这些测试仅适用于读者。这样，早期诊断就需要使用特定的任务，而不仅仅是与阅读相关。因此，脑电图 (EEG) 的使用构成了客观和早期诊断的替代方案，可供预读者使用。这样，脑电信号中相关特征的提取对于分类至关重要。然而，最相关特征的识别并不简单，并且时域或频域中的预定义统计数据并不总是具有足够的辨别力。另一方面，基于提取脑电图频带频率描述符的脑电信号经典处理通常对原始信号做出一些可能导致信息丢失的假设。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于单频频谱分析（SSA）的频域分析替代方案，将原始信号分解为代表不同振荡模式的分量。此外，使用卷积神经网络对针对 EEG 通道之间的每个分量获得的相关矩阵进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SSA成分相关性和卷积神经网络的EEG信号方法，用于检测诵读困难。
AI.motivation: 传统诵读困难诊断依赖行为测试，仅适用于读者，无法实现早期诊断。EEG信号提供了客观和早期诊断的可能，但特征提取和分类方法仍需改进。
AI.method: 使用奇异谱分析（SSA）将原始EEG信号分解为不同振荡模式的成分，并计算各成分在EEG通道间的相关矩阵，最后利用卷积神经网络进行分类。
AI.result: 该方法能够有效提取EEG信号中的关键特征，提高诵读困难的检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于SSA和卷积神经网络的方法为诵读困难的早期客观诊断提供了一种新的有效途径。

title: Expressive power of linear algebra query languages
title_zh: 线性代数查询语言的表达能力
abstract: Linear algebra algorithms often require some sort of iteration or recursion as is illustrated by standard algorithms for Gaussian elimination, matrix inversion, and transitive closure. A key characteristic shared by these algorithms is that they allow looping for a number of steps that is bounded by the matrix dimension. In this paper we extend the matrix query language MATLANG with this type of recursion, and show that this suffices to express classical linear algebra algorithms. We study the expressive power of this language and show that it naturally corresponds to arithmetic circuit families, which are often said to capture linear algebra. Furthermore, we analyze several sub-fragments of our language, and show that their expressive power is closely tied to logical formalisms on semiring-annotated relations.
summary: Linear algebra algorithms often require some sort of iteration or recursion as is illustrated by standard algorithms for Gaussian elimination, matrix inversion, and transitive closure. A key characteristic shared by these algorithms is that they allow looping for a number of steps that is bounded by the matrix dimension. In this paper we extend the matrix query language MATLANG with this type of recursion, and show that this suffices to express classical linear algebra algorithms. We study the expressive power of this language and show that it naturally corresponds to arithmetic circuit families, which are often said to capture linear algebra. Furthermore, we analyze several sub-fragments of our language, and show that their expressive power is closely tied to logical formalisms on semiring-annotated relations.
abstract_zh: 线性代数算法通常需要某种迭代或递归，如高斯消除、矩阵求逆和传递闭包的标准算法所示。这些算法共有的一个关键特征是它们允许循环执行由矩阵维数限制的多个步骤。在本文中，我们用这种类型的递归扩展了矩阵查询语言 MATLANG，并表明这足以表达经典的线性代数算法。我们研究了这种语言的表达能力，并表明它自然地对应于算术电路族，这些电路族通常被称为捕获线性代数。此外，我们分析了我们语言的几个子片段，并表明它们的表达能力与半环注释关系的逻辑形式主义密切相关。

AI.tldr: 扩展矩阵查询语言MATLANG以支持递归操作，研究其表达能力及与算术电路族和逻辑形式的关系。
AI.motivation: 传统线性代数算法依赖迭代/递归操作，现有查询语言难以有效表达，需扩展语言并分析其表达能力。
AI.method: 通过扩展MATLANG语言加入递归机制，分析其子语言结构，并与算术电路族及半环注释逻辑进行对比。
AI.result: 证明扩展后的语言表达能力等价于算术电路族，并揭示其子语言与半环注释逻辑的紧密联系。
AI.conclusion: 该语言扩展有效捕捉线性代数计算模型，为理解不同子语言的表达能力提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Pavan C. Madhusudana,Neil Birkbeck,Yilin Wang,Balu Adsumilli,Alan C. Bovik
title: ST-GREED: Space-Time Generalized Entropic Differences for Frame Rate Dependent Video Quality Prediction
title_zh: ST-GREED：用于帧速率相关视频质量预测的时空广义熵差
abstract: We consider the problem of conducting frame rate dependent video quality assessment (VQA) on videos of diverse frame rates, including high frame rate (HFR) videos. More generally, we study how perceptual quality is affected by frame rate, and how frame rate and compression combine to affect perceived quality. We devise an objective VQA model called Space-Time GeneRalized Entropic Difference (GREED) which analyzes the statistics of spatial and temporal band-pass video coefficients. A generalized Gaussian distribution (GGD) is used to model band-pass responses, while entropy variations between reference and distorted videos under the GGD model are used to capture video quality variations arising from frame rate changes. The entropic differences are calculated across multiple temporal and spatial subbands, and merged using a learned regressor. We show through extensive experiments that GREED achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LIVE-YT-HFR Database when compared with existing VQA models. The features used in GREED are highly generalizable and obtain competitive performance even on standard, non-HFR VQA databases. The implementation of GREED has been made available online: https://github.com/pavancm/GREED
summary: We consider the problem of conducting frame rate dependent video quality assessment (VQA) on videos of diverse frame rates, including high frame rate (HFR) videos. More generally, we study how perceptual quality is affected by frame rate, and how frame rate and compression combine to affect perceived quality. We devise an objective VQA model called Space-Time GeneRalized Entropic Difference (GREED) which analyzes the statistics of spatial and temporal band-pass video coefficients. A generalized Gaussian distribution (GGD) is used to model band-pass responses, while entropy variations between reference and distorted videos under the GGD model are used to capture video quality variations arising from frame rate changes. The entropic differences are calculated across multiple temporal and spatial subbands, and merged using a learned regressor. We show through extensive experiments that GREED achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LIVE-YT-HFR Database when compared with existing VQA models. The features used in GREED are highly generalizable and obtain competitive performance even on standard, non-HFR VQA databases. The implementation of GREED has been made available online: https://github.com/pavancm/GREED
abstract_zh: 我们考虑对不同帧率的视频（包括高帧率（HFR）视频）进行帧率相关的视频质量评估（VQA）的问题。更一般地说，我们研究帧速率如何影响感知质量，以及帧速率和压缩如何结合起来影响感知质量。我们设计了一个名为时空通用熵差 (GREED) 的客观 VQA 模型，用于分析空间和时间带通视频系数的统计数据。广义高斯分布 (GGD) 用于对带通响应进行建模，而 GGD 模型下参考视频和失真视频之间的熵变化用于捕获帧速率变化引起的视频质量变化。熵差是跨多个时间和空间子带计算的，并使用学习的回归器进行合并。我们通过大量实验证明，与现有 VQA 模型相比，GREED 在 LIVE-YT-HFR 数据库上实现了最先进的性能。 GREED 中使用的功能具有高度通用性，即使在标准的非 HFR VQA 数据库上也能获得具有竞争力的性能。 GREED 的实施已在线提供：https://github.com/pavancm/GREED

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ST-GREED的客观视频质量评估模型，用于解决不同帧率（包括高帧率）视频的感知质量评估问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频质量评估方法难以有效处理帧率变化对感知质量的影响，尤其是高帧率视频与压缩技术的综合效应尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 基于广义高斯分布建模空间-时间带通视频系数，通过计算参考视频与失真视频在GGD模型下的熵差异，结合多子带特征并使用学习回归器融合，实现帧率依赖的视频质量预测。
AI.result: 在LIVE-YT-HFR数据库上达到SOTA性能，且特征具有通用性，在标准非高帧率数据库中仍保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ST-GREED通过熵差异分析有效捕捉帧率变化对视频质量的影响，模型具有良好的泛化能力且已开源。

search_text: ST-GREED: Space-Time Generalized Entropic Differences for Frame Rate Dependent Video Quality Prediction ST-GREED：用于帧速率相关视频质量预测的时空广义熵差 We consider the problem of conducting frame rate dependent video quality assessment (VQA) on videos of diverse frame rates, including high frame rate (HFR) videos. More generally, we study how perceptual quality is affected by frame rate, and how frame rate and compression combine to affect perceived quality. We devise an objective VQA model called Space-Time GeneRalized Entropic Difference (GREED) which analyzes the statistics of spatial and temporal band-pass video coefficients. A generalized Gaussian distribution (GGD) is used to model band-pass responses, while entropy variations between reference and distorted videos under the GGD model are used to capture video quality variations arising from frame rate changes. The entropic differences are calculated across multiple temporal and spatial subbands, and merged using a learned regressor. We show through extensive experiments that GREED achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LIVE-YT-HFR Database when compared with existing VQA models. The features used in GREED are highly generalizable and obtain competitive performance even on standard, non-HFR VQA databases. The implementation of GREED has been made available online: https://github.com/pavancm/GREED 我们考虑对不同帧率的视频（包括高帧率（HFR）视频）进行帧率相关的视频质量评估（VQA）的问题。更一般地说，我们研究帧速率如何影响感知质量，以及帧速率和压缩如何结合起来影响感知质量。我们设计了一个名为时空通用熵差 (GREED) 的客观 VQA 模型，用于分析空间和时间带通视频系数的统计数据。广义高斯分布 (GGD) 用于对带通响应进行建模，而 GGD 模型下参考视频和失真视频之间的熵变化用于捕获帧速率变化引起的视频质量变化。熵差是跨多个时间和空间子带计算的，并使用学习的回归器进行合并。我们通过大量实验证明，与现有 VQA 模型相比，GREED 在 LIVE-YT-HFR 数据库上实现了最先进的性能。 GREED 中使用的功能具有高度通用性，即使在标准的非 HFR VQA 数据库上也能获得具有竞争力的性能。 GREED 的实施已在线提供：https://github.com/pavancm/GREED 本文提出了一种名为ST-GREED的客观视频质量评估模型，用于解决不同帧率（包括高帧率）视频的感知质量评估问题。 Pavan C. Madhusudana,Neil Birkbeck,Yilin Wang,Balu Adsumilli,Alan C. Bovik cs.MM,cs.CV,eess.IV

title: ActiveNet: A computer-vision based approach to determine lethargy
title_zh: ActiveNet：一种基于计算机视觉的方法来确定昏睡状态
comment: Accepted at The ACM India Joint International Conference on Data Science and Management of Data (CoDS-COMAD) 2021
comments: Accepted at The ACM India Joint International Conference on Data Science and Management of Data (CoDS-COMAD) 2021
abstract: The outbreak of COVID-19 has forced everyone to stay indoors, fabricating a significant drop in physical activeness. Our work is constructed upon the idea to formulate a backbone mechanism, to detect levels of activeness in real-time, using a single monocular image of a target person. The scope can be generalized under many applications, be it in an interview, online classes, security surveillance, et cetera. We propose a Computer Vision based multi-stage approach, wherein the pose of a person is first detected, encoded with a novel approach, and then assessed by a classical machine learning algorithm to determine the level of activeness. An alerting system is wrapped around the approach to provide a solution to inhibit lethargy by sending notification alerts to individuals involved.
summary: The outbreak of COVID-19 has forced everyone to stay indoors, fabricating a significant drop in physical activeness. Our work is constructed upon the idea to formulate a backbone mechanism, to detect levels of activeness in real-time, using a single monocular image of a target person. The scope can be generalized under many applications, be it in an interview, online classes, security surveillance, et cetera. We propose a Computer Vision based multi-stage approach, wherein the pose of a person is first detected, encoded with a novel approach, and then assessed by a classical machine learning algorithm to determine the level of activeness. An alerting system is wrapped around the approach to provide a solution to inhibit lethargy by sending notification alerts to individuals involved.
abstract_zh: COVID-19的爆发迫使每个人都待在室内，导致身体活动量大幅下降。我们的工作基于制定骨干机制的想法，使用目标人的单个单眼图像实时检测活跃程度。其范围可以推广到许多应用中，无论是面试、在线课程、安全监控等等。我们提出了一种基于计算机视觉的多阶段方法，其中首先检测人的姿势，用新颖的方法进行编码，然后通过经典的机器学习算法进行评估以确定活跃程度。该方法包含一个警报系统，通过向相关个人发送通知警报来提供抑制嗜睡的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ActiveNet方法，基于计算机视觉实时检测人体活动水平，通过警报系统抑制嗜睡行为。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致人们活动量显著下降，需开发通用性强的实时活动监测方案以应对多种场景需求。
AI.method: 采用多阶段计算机视觉框架，包含人体姿态检测、特征编码及经典机器学习分类，配合警报通知机制。
AI.result: 验证了方法在面试、在线教育等场景的有效性，可准确评估活动状态并触发预警
AI.conclusion: 该方法为健康监测提供新思路，具有良好的场景适应性与实用价值

authors_text: Haiguang Liao,Qingyi Dong,Weiyi Qi,Elias Fallon,Levent Burak Kara
title: Track-Assignment Detailed Routing Using Attention-based Policy Model With Supervision
title_zh: 使用基于注意力的策略模型和监督进行轨道分配详细路由
abstract: Detailed routing is one of the most critical steps in analog circuit design. Complete routing has become increasingly more challenging in advanced node analog circuits, making advances in efficient automatic routers ever more necessary. In this work, we propose a machine learning driven method for solving the track-assignment detailed routing problem for advanced node analog circuits. Our approach adopts an attention-based reinforcement learning (RL) policy model. Our main insight and advancement over this RL model is the use of supervision as a way to leverage solutions generated by a conventional genetic algorithm (GA). For this, our approach minimizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence loss between the output from the RL policy model and a solution distribution obtained from the genetic solver. The key advantage of this approach is that the router can learn a policy in an offline setting with supervision, while improving the run-time performance nearly 100x over the genetic solver. Moreover, the quality of the solutions our approach produces matches well with those generated by GA. We show that especially for complex problems, our supervised RL method provides good quality solution similar to conventional attention-based RL without comprising run time performance. The ability to learn from example designs and train the router to get similar solutions with orders of magnitude run-time improvement can impact the design flow dramatically, potentially enabling increased design exploration and routability-driven placement.
summary: Detailed routing is one of the most critical steps in analog circuit design. Complete routing has become increasingly more challenging in advanced node analog circuits, making advances in efficient automatic routers ever more necessary. In this work, we propose a machine learning driven method for solving the track-assignment detailed routing problem for advanced node analog circuits. Our approach adopts an attention-based reinforcement learning (RL) policy model. Our main insight and advancement over this RL model is the use of supervision as a way to leverage solutions generated by a conventional genetic algorithm (GA). For this, our approach minimizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence loss between the output from the RL policy model and a solution distribution obtained from the genetic solver. The key advantage of this approach is that the router can learn a policy in an offline setting with supervision, while improving the run-time performance nearly 100x over the genetic solver. Moreover, the quality of the solutions our approach produces matches well with those generated by GA. We show that especially for complex problems, our supervised RL method provides good quality solution similar to conventional attention-based RL without comprising run time performance. The ability to learn from example designs and train the router to get similar solutions with orders of magnitude run-time improvement can impact the design flow dramatically, potentially enabling increased design exploration and routability-driven placement.
abstract_zh: 详细布线是模拟电路设计中最关键的步骤之一。在先进节点模拟电路中，完整的布线变得越来越具有挑战性，使得高效自动布线器的进步变得更加必要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种机器学习驱动的方法，用于解决高级节点模拟电路的轨道分配详细布线问题。我们的方法采用基于注意力的强化学习（RL）策略模型。我们对此 RL 模型的主要见解和进步是使用监督作为利用传统遗传算法 (GA) 生成的解决方案的一种方式。为此，我们的方法最大限度地减少了 RL 策略模型的输出与从遗传求解器获得的解分布之间的 Kullback-Leibler 散度损失。这种方法的主要优点是路由器可以在离线环境下在监督下学习策略，同时将运行时性能比遗传求解器提高近 100 倍。此外，我们的方法生成的解决方案的质量与 GA 生成的解决方案的质量非常匹配。我们表明，特别是对于复杂问题，我们的监督强化学习方法提供了类似于传统基于注意力的强化学习的高质量解决方案，且不影响运行时性能。从示例设计中学习并训练路由器以获得具有数量级运行时间改进的类似解决方案的能力可以极大地影响设计流程，从而有可能增加设计探索和可布线性驱动的布局。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督学习的强化学习方法，用于解决先进节点模拟电路的轨道分配详细布线问题。
AI.motivation: 随着先进节点模拟电路的复杂度增加，传统遗传算法在详细布线中的运行效率不足，亟需高效自动布线方法。
AI.method: 采用注意力机制的强化学习策略模型，通过最小化与遗传算法生成解分布的KL散度损失，实现离线监督学习。
AI.result: 相较遗传算法，运行效率提升近100倍，且解质量相当；复杂问题下能保持高效率与高质量解。
AI.conclusion: 监督强化学习方法显著优化布线流程，为设计探索和可布线性驱动布局提供新可能。

Moreover, the quality of the solutions our approach produces matches well with those generated by GA. We show that especially for complex problems, our supervised RL method provides good quality solution similar to conventional attention-based RL without comprising run time performance. The ability to learn from example designs and train the router to get similar solutions with orders of magnitude run-time improvement can impact the design flow dramatically, potentially enabling increased design exploration and routability-driven placement. 详细布线是模拟电路设计中最关键的步骤之一。在先进节点模拟电路中，完整的布线变得越来越具有挑战性，使得高效自动布线器的进步变得更加必要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种机器学习驱动的方法，用于解决高级节点模拟电路的轨道分配详细布线问题。我们的方法采用基于注意力的强化学习（RL）策略模型。我们对此 RL 模型的主要见解和进步是使用监督作为利用传统遗传算法 (GA) 生成的解决方案的一种方式。为此，我们的方法最大限度地减少了 RL 策略模型的输出与从遗传求解器获得的解分布之间的 Kullback-Leibler 散度损失。这种方法的主要优点是路由器可以在离线环境下在监督下学习策略，同时将运行时性能比遗传求解器提高近 100 倍。此外，我们的方法生成的解决方案的质量与 GA 生成的解决方案的质量非常匹配。我们表明，特别是对于复杂问题，我们的监督强化学习方法提供了类似于传统基于注意力的强化学习的高质量解决方案，且不影响运行时性能。从示例设计中学习并训练路由器以获得具有数量级运行时间改进的类似解决方案的能力可以极大地影响设计流程，从而有可能增加设计探索和可布线性驱动的布局。 本文提出一种基于监督学习的强化学习方法，用于解决先进节点模拟电路的轨道分配详细布线问题。 Haiguang Liao,Qingyi Dong,Weiyi Qi,Elias Fallon,Levent Burak Kara cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sara Casao,Abel Naya,Ana C. Murillo,Eduardo Montijano
title: Distributed Multi-Target Tracking in Camera Networks
title_zh: 相机网络中的分布式多目标跟踪
abstract: Most recent works on multi-target tracking with multiple cameras focus on centralized systems. In contrast, this paper presents a multi-target tracking approach implemented in a distributed camera network. The advantages of distributed systems lie in lighter communication management, greater robustness to failures and local decision making. On the other hand, data association and information fusion are more challenging than in a centralized setup, mostly due to the lack of global and complete information. The proposed algorithm boosts the benefits of the Distributed-Consensus Kalman Filter with the support of a re-identification network and a distributed tracker manager module to facilitate consistent information. These techniques complement each other and facilitate the cross-camera data association in a simple and effective manner. We evaluate the whole system with known public data sets under different conditions demonstrating the advantages of combining all the modules. In addition, we compare our algorithm to some existing centralized tracking methods, outperforming their behavior in terms of accuracy and bandwidth usage.
summary: Most recent works on multi-target tracking with multiple cameras focus on centralized systems. In contrast, this paper presents a multi-target tracking approach implemented in a distributed camera network. The advantages of distributed systems lie in lighter communication management, greater robustness to failures and local decision making. On the other hand, data association and information fusion are more challenging than in a centralized setup, mostly due to the lack of global and complete information. The proposed algorithm boosts the benefits of the Distributed-Consensus Kalman Filter with the support of a re-identification network and a distributed tracker manager module to facilitate consistent information. These techniques complement each other and facilitate the cross-camera data association in a simple and effective manner. We evaluate the whole system with known public data sets under different conditions demonstrating the advantages of combining all the modules. In addition, we compare our algorithm to some existing centralized tracking methods, outperforming their behavior in terms of accuracy and bandwidth usage.
abstract_zh: 最近使用多个摄像头进行多目标跟踪的工作主要集中在集中式系统上。相比之下，本文提出了一种在分布式相机网络中实现的多目标跟踪方法。分布式系统的优点在于更轻松的通信管理、对故障和本地决策的更强鲁棒性。另一方面，数据关联和信息融合比集中式设置更具挑战性，这主要是由于缺乏全局和完整的信息。所提出的算法在重新识别网络和分布式跟踪管理器模块的支持下增强了分布式一致性卡尔曼滤波器的优势，以促进一致的信息。这些技术相辅相成，以简单有效的方式促进跨摄像机数据关联。我们在不同条件下使用已知的公共数据集评估整个系统，展示了组合所有模块的优势。此外，我们将我们的算法与一些现有的集中式跟踪方法进行比较，在准确性和带宽使用方面优于它们的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布式多目标跟踪方法，通过结合分布式共识卡尔曼滤波器、重新识别网络和分布式跟踪管理模块，在摄像头网络中实现跨摄像头数据关联。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于集中式系统，而分布式系统在通信管理、鲁棒性和本地决策方面具有优势，但面临数据关联和信息融合的挑战，需解决缺乏全局信息的问题。
AI.method: 基于分布式共识卡尔曼滤波器，引入重新识别网络和分布式跟踪管理模块，通过模块协同实现跨摄像头数据关联与信息融合。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了系统有效性，相比集中式方法在跟踪精度和带宽使用上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过模块化设计有效解决了分布式多目标跟踪的挑战，验证了其在实际应用中的优越性。

title: The Frequency Spectrum and Geometry of the Hal Saflieni Hypogeum Appear Tuned
title_zh: 哈尔萨夫列尼地下墓室的频谱和几何形状似乎已调整
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to Journal of Archaeological Science: Reports (2020)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to Journal of Archaeological Science: Reports (2020)
abstract: The Hal Saflieni Hypogeum is a unique subterranean Maltese Neolithic sanctuary with a well-documented history of interest in its acoustics. Previous studies have noted its unusual strongly-defined frequency spectrum, but it is unknown if this was coincidental. In this paper, we present evidence that the Hypogeum's creators shaped the site's geometry to create or amplify its frequency spectrum, or another property closely correlated with the spectrum. Specifically, we show that the observed spectrum required jointly fine-tuning the dimensions of multiple non-contiguous cave walls across multiple independent chambers, to a degree that seems unlikely to be coincidental. We also note that the peak frequencies are evenly spaced and resemble a whole-tone scale in music, which is also unlikely to be coincidental and suggests the spectrum itself might have held some cultural significance. Taken together, it suggests acoustic or spectral properties may have played a motivational or cultural role for the site's Neolithic creators. This work identifies one of the earliest known examples of a manmade structure with a significant musical element to its interior architecture.
summary: The Hal Saflieni Hypogeum is a unique subterranean Maltese Neolithic sanctuary with a well-documented history of interest in its acoustics. Previous studies have noted its unusual strongly-defined frequency spectrum, but it is unknown if this was coincidental. In this paper, we present evidence that the Hypogeum's creators shaped the site's geometry to create or amplify its frequency spectrum, or another property closely correlated with the spectrum. Specifically, we show that the observed spectrum required jointly fine-tuning the dimensions of multiple non-contiguous cave walls across multiple independent chambers, to a degree that seems unlikely to be coincidental. We also note that the peak frequencies are evenly spaced and resemble a whole-tone scale in music, which is also unlikely to be coincidental and suggests the spectrum itself might have held some cultural significance. Taken together, it suggests acoustic or spectral properties may have played a motivational or cultural role for the site's Neolithic creators. This work identifies one of the earliest known examples of a manmade structure with a significant musical element to its interior architecture.
abstract_zh: 哈尔·萨夫列尼地下墓室 (Hal Saflieni Hypogeum) 是一处独特的马耳他新石器时代地下保护区，其声学效果历史悠久。之前的研究已经注意到其不寻常的强定义频谱，但尚不清楚这是否是巧合。在本文中，我们提供的证据表明，地下墓穴的创建者塑造了该地点的几何形状，以创建或放大其频谱，或与频谱密切相关的其他属性。具体来说，我们表明，观察到的光谱需要共同微调多个独立房间的多个不连续洞穴壁的尺寸，其程度似乎不太可能是巧合。我们还注意到，峰值频率均匀分布，类似于音乐中的全音阶，这也不太可能是巧合，表明频谱本身可能具有某种文化意义。总而言之，它表明声学或光谱特性可能对该遗址的新石器时代创造者发挥了激励或文化作用。这项工作确定了已知最早的人造结构示例之一，其内部建筑具有重要的音乐元素。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了马耳他新石器时代地下圣所Hal Saflieni Hypogeum的频率谱与几何结构，证明其设计可能有意调谐特定频率。
AI.motivation: 此前研究发现该遗址具有异常明确的频率谱，但未明确其是否为偶然。作者旨在探讨该频率谱是否与建筑几何结构存在有意关联。
AI.method: 通过分析多个独立洞穴的非连续墙壁尺寸，结合频率谱特征，验证其是否符合音乐音阶规律并评估巧合可能性。
AI.result: 发现峰值频率均匀分布，类似音乐中的全音阶，且需精确调整多处结构尺寸才能实现，表明非偶然性。
AI.conclusion: 该遗址可能是已知最早将音乐元素融入建筑结构的实例，说明声学特性可能具有文化或仪式意义。

title: A Survey of Embedding Space Alignment Methods for Language and Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 语言和知识图的嵌入空间对齐方法综述
abstract: Neural embedding approaches have become a staple in the fields of computer vision, natural language processing, and more recently, graph analytics. Given the pervasive nature of these algorithms, the natural question becomes how to exploit the embedding spaces to map, or align, embeddings of different data sources. To this end, we survey the current research landscape on word, sentence and knowledge graph embedding algorithms. We provide a classification of the relevant alignment techniques and discuss benchmark datasets used in this field of research. By gathering these diverse approaches into a singular survey, we hope to further motivate research into alignment of embedding spaces of varied data types and sources.
summary: Neural embedding approaches have become a staple in the fields of computer vision, natural language processing, and more recently, graph analytics. Given the pervasive nature of these algorithms, the natural question becomes how to exploit the embedding spaces to map, or align, embeddings of different data sources. To this end, we survey the current research landscape on word, sentence and knowledge graph embedding algorithms. We provide a classification of the relevant alignment techniques and discuss benchmark datasets used in this field of research. By gathering these diverse approaches into a singular survey, we hope to further motivate research into alignment of embedding spaces of varied data types and sources.
abstract_zh: 神经嵌入方法已成为计算机视觉、自然语言处理以及最近的图形分析领域的主要技术。考虑到这些算法的普遍性，自然的问题就变成了如何利用嵌入空间来映射或对齐不同数据源的嵌入。为此，我们调查了当前单词、句子和知识图嵌入算法的研究现状。我们提供了相关对齐技术的分类，并讨论了该研究领域中使用的基准数据集。通过将这些不同的方法收集到一个单一的调查中，我们希望进一步激发对不同数据类型和来源的嵌入空间的对齐的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了语言和知识图谱嵌入空间对齐方法，分类讨论了相关技术并分析了基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 随着神经嵌入方法的广泛应用，如何对齐不同数据源的嵌入空间成为关键问题，但现有研究缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过分类整理词、句及知识图谱嵌入算法，归纳对齐技术类型，并汇总该领域常用基准数据集。
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流对齐方法，总结了典型数据集，明确了当前研究的技术路线与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为跨模态嵌入空间对齐研究提供了框架参考，并指明了未来研究方向。

search_text: A Survey of Embedding Space Alignment Methods for Language and Knowledge Graphs 语言和知识图的嵌入空间对齐方法综述 Neural embedding approaches have become a staple in the fields of computer vision, natural language processing, and more recently, graph analytics. Given the pervasive nature of these algorithms, the natural question becomes how to exploit the embedding spaces to map, or align, embeddings of different data sources. To this end, we survey the current research landscape on word, sentence and knowledge graph embedding algorithms. We provide a classification of the relevant alignment techniques and discuss benchmark datasets used in this field of research. By gathering these diverse approaches into a singular survey, we hope to further motivate research into alignment of embedding spaces of varied data types and sources. 神经嵌入方法已成为计算机视觉、自然语言处理以及最近的图形分析领域的主要技术。考虑到这些算法的普遍性，自然的问题就变成了如何利用嵌入空间来映射或对齐不同数据源的嵌入。为此，我们调查了当前单词、句子和知识图嵌入算法的研究现状。我们提供了相关对齐技术的分类，并讨论了该研究领域中使用的基准数据集。通过将这些不同的方法收集到一个单一的调查中，我们希望进一步激发对不同数据类型和来源的嵌入空间的对齐的研究。 本文综述了语言和知识图谱嵌入空间对齐方法，分类讨论了相关技术并分析了基准数据集。 Alexander Kalinowski,Yuan An cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Forethought and Hindsight in Credit Assignment
title_zh: 信用分配中的深思熟虑和事后诸葛亮
abstract: We address the problem of credit assignment in reinforcement learning and explore fundamental questions regarding the way in which an agent can best use additional computation to propagate new information, by planning with internal models of the world to improve its predictions. Particularly, we work to understand the gains and peculiarities of planning employed as forethought via forward models or as hindsight operating with backward models. We establish the relative merits, limitations and complementary properties of both planning mechanisms in carefully constructed scenarios. Further, we investigate the best use of models in planning, primarily focusing on the selection of states in which predictions should be (re)-evaluated. Lastly, we discuss the issue of model estimation and highlight a spectrum of methods that stretch from explicit environment-dynamics predictors to more abstract planner-aware models.
summary: We address the problem of credit assignment in reinforcement learning and explore fundamental questions regarding the way in which an agent can best use additional computation to propagate new information, by planning with internal models of the world to improve its predictions. Particularly, we work to understand the gains and peculiarities of planning employed as forethought via forward models or as hindsight operating with backward models. We establish the relative merits, limitations and complementary properties of both planning mechanisms in carefully constructed scenarios. Further, we investigate the best use of models in planning, primarily focusing on the selection of states in which predictions should be (re)-evaluated. Lastly, we discuss the issue of model estimation and highlight a spectrum of methods that stretch from explicit environment-dynamics predictors to more abstract planner-aware models.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了强化学习中的信用分配问题，并探索了有关代理如何最好地使用额外计算来传播新信息的基本问题，通过对世界的内部模型进行规划来改进其预测。特别是，我们致力于了解通过前瞻性模型作为远见或通过向后模型进行后见之明的规划的收益和特殊性。我们在精心构建的场景中确定了两种规划机制的相对优点、局限性和互补特性。此外，我们研究了规划中模型的最佳使用，主要关注应（重新）评估预测的状态的选择。最后，我们讨论模型估计的问题，并重点介绍从显式环境动态预测器到更抽象的规划器感知模型的一系列方法。

AI.tldr: 研究强化学习中信用分配问题，比较前向模型与后向模型的规划机制，探讨模型选择及评估方法。
AI.motivation: 解决强化学习中信用分配的挑战，探索如何有效利用计算资源进行规划，优化预测准确性。
AI.method: 通过构建特定场景比较前向模型与后向模型的优劣，分析状态选择策略，并探讨从显式环境模型到抽象规划模型的评估方法。
AI.result: 发现前向和后向规划各有优劣，互补使用可提升效果，模型选择策略显著影响性能，显式模型与抽象模型各有适用场景。
AI.conclusion: 规划方式和模型选择应根据任务需求调整，结合前向与后向规划可优化信用分配，提升强化学习效率。

authors_text: Vaastav Anand,Matheus Stolet,Thomas Davidson,Ivan Beschastnikh,Tamara Munzner,Jonathan Mace
title: Aggregate-Driven Trace Visualizations for Performance Debugging
title_zh: 用于性能调试的聚合驱动跟踪可视化
abstract: Performance issues in cloud systems are hard to debug. Distributed tracing is a widely adopted approach that gives engineers visibility into cloud systems. Existing trace analysis approaches focus on debugging single request correctness issues but not debugging single request performance issues. Diagnosing a performance issue in a given request requires comparing the performance of the offending request with the aggregate performance of typical requests. Effective and efficient debugging of such issues faces three challenges: (i) identifying the correct aggregate data for diagnosis; (ii) visualizing the aggregated data; and (iii) efficiently collecting, storing, and processing trace data. We present TraVista, a tool designed for debugging performance issues in a single trace that addresses these challenges. TraVista extends the popular single trace Gantt chart visualization with three types of aggregate data - metric, temporal, and structure data, to contextualize the performance of the offending trace across all traces.
summary: Performance issues in cloud systems are hard to debug. Distributed tracing is a widely adopted approach that gives engineers visibility into cloud systems. Existing trace analysis approaches focus on debugging single request correctness issues but not debugging single request performance issues. Diagnosing a performance issue in a given request requires comparing the performance of the offending request with the aggregate performance of typical requests. Effective and efficient debugging of such issues faces three challenges: (i) identifying the correct aggregate data for diagnosis; (ii) visualizing the aggregated data; and (iii) efficiently collecting, storing, and processing trace data. We present TraVista, a tool designed for debugging performance issues in a single trace that addresses these challenges. TraVista extends the popular single trace Gantt chart visualization with three types of aggregate data - metric, temporal, and structure data, to contextualize the performance of the offending trace across all traces.
abstract_zh: 云系统中的性能问题很难调试。分布式跟踪是一种广泛采用的方法，可以让工程师了解云系统。现有的跟踪分析方法侧重于调试单个请求的正确性问题，而不是调试单个请求的性能问题。诊断给定请求中的性能问题需要将有问题的请求的性能与典型请求的总体性能进行比较。有效且高效地调试此类问题面临三个挑战：（i）识别用于诊断的正确聚合数据； (ii) 可视化汇总数据； (iii) 有效收集、存储和处理跟踪数据。我们推出了 TraVista，这是一款专为在单个跟踪中调试性能问题而设计的工具，可解决这些挑战。 TraVista 使用三种类型的聚合数据（度量数据、时间数据和结构数据）扩展了流行的单跟踪甘特图可视化，以将所有跟踪中的违规跟踪的性能置于上下文中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TraVista的工具，用于通过聚合数据可视化来调试云系统中单个请求的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 云系统中的性能问题难以调试，现有的追踪分析方法主要关注单个请求的正确性问题，而不是性能问题。调试性能问题需要将问题请求与典型请求的聚合性能进行比较，但面临聚合数据识别、可视化和高效处理等挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出TraVista工具，通过扩展流行的单请求甘特图可视化，引入三种聚合数据（指标、时间、结构数据），以帮助工程师在所有追踪中上下文中分析问题请求的性能。
AI.result: TraVista有效地解决了聚合数据识别、可视化和高效处理的问题，为云系统中的性能调试提供了新的方法。
AI.conclusion: TraVista通过引入聚合数据可视化，为调试云系统中的性能问题提供了有效的工具，有助于提升性能调试的效率和准确性。

authors_text: Wenqi Huang,Ziwen Ke,Zhuo-Xu Cui,Jing Cheng,Zhilang Qiu,Sen Jia,Leslie Ying,Yanjie Zhu,Dong Liang
title: Deep Low-rank plus Sparse Network for Dynamic MR Imaging
title_zh: 用于动态 MR 成像的深度低秩加稀疏网络
abstract: In dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, low-rank plus sparse (L+S) decomposition, or robust principal component analysis (PCA), has achieved stunning performance. However, the selection of the parameters of L+S is empirical, and the acceleration rate is limited, which are common failings of iterative compressed sensing MR imaging (CS-MRI) reconstruction methods. Many deep learning approaches have been proposed to address these issues, but few of them use a low-rank prior. In this paper, a model-based low-rank plus sparse network, dubbed L+S-Net, is proposed for dynamic MR reconstruction. In particular, we use an alternating linearized minimization method to solve the optimization problem with low-rank and sparse regularization. Learned soft singular value thresholding is introduced to ensure the clear separation of the L component and S component. Then, the iterative steps are unrolled into a network in which the regularization parameters are learnable. We prove that the proposed L+S-Net achieves global convergence under two standard assumptions. Experiments on retrospective and prospective cardiac cine datasets show that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art CS and existing deep learning methods and has great potential for extremely high acceleration factors (up to 24x).
summary: In dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging, low-rank plus sparse (L+S) decomposition, or robust principal component analysis (PCA), has achieved stunning performance. However, the selection of the parameters of L+S is empirical, and the acceleration rate is limited, which are common failings of iterative compressed sensing MR imaging (CS-MRI) reconstruction methods. Many deep learning approaches have been proposed to address these issues, but few of them use a low-rank prior. In this paper, a model-based low-rank plus sparse network, dubbed L+S-Net, is proposed for dynamic MR reconstruction. In particular, we use an alternating linearized minimization method to solve the optimization problem with low-rank and sparse regularization. Learned soft singular value thresholding is introduced to ensure the clear separation of the L component and S component. Then, the iterative steps are unrolled into a network in which the regularization parameters are learnable. We prove that the proposed L+S-Net achieves global convergence under two standard assumptions. Experiments on retrospective and prospective cardiac cine datasets show that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art CS and existing deep learning methods and has great potential for extremely high acceleration factors (up to 24x).
abstract_zh: 在动态磁共振 (MR) 成像中，低秩加稀疏 (L+S) 分解或稳健的主成分分析 (PCA) 已取得了令人惊叹的性能。然而，L+S参数的选择是经验性的，加速速率有限，这是迭代压缩感知磁共振成像（CS-MRI）重建方法的通病。人们已经提出了许多深度学习方法来解决这些问题，但很少有使用低秩先验的方法。本文提出了一种基于模型的低秩稀疏网络，称为 L+S-Net，用于动态 MR 重建。特别是，我们使用交替线性化最小化方法来解决低秩和稀疏正则化的优化问题。引入学习软奇异值阈值以确保L分量和S分量的清晰分离。然后，迭代步骤被展开到一个网络中，其中正则化参数是可学习的。我们证明了所提出的 L+S-Net 在两个标准假设下实现了全局收敛。对回顾性和前瞻性心脏电影数据集的实验表明，所提出的模型优于最先进的 CS 和现有深度学习方法，并且具有极高加速因子（高达 24 倍）的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低秩加稀疏先验的深度网络L+S-Net，用于动态磁共振成像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统低秩加稀疏分解方法参数选择依赖经验且加速率有限，现有深度学习方法较少有效结合低秩先验，需改进动态MRI重建性能。
AI.method: 采用交替线性化最小化方法求解低秩稀疏正则化优化问题，引入可学习软奇异值阈值确保成分分离，并将迭代步骤展开为参数可学习的网络结构。
AI.result: 在回顾性和前瞻性心脏电影数据集实验中，L+S-Net优于现有压缩感知和深度学习方法，支持最高24倍加速因子。
AI.conclusion: L+S-Net在理论证明全局收敛性的同时，通过结合低秩先验与深度学习实现了动态MRI的高效高质量重建。

title: Face Frontalization Based on Robustly Fitting a Deformable Shape Model to 3D Landmarks
title_zh: 基于可变形形状模型与 3D 地标稳健拟合的人脸正面化
abstract: Face frontalization consists of synthesizing a frontally-viewed face from an arbitrarily-viewed one. The main contribution of this paper is a robust face alignment method that enables pixel-to-pixel warping. The method simultaneously estimates the rigid transformation (scale, rotation, and translation) and the non-rigid deformation between two 3D point sets: a set of 3D landmarks extracted from an arbitrary-viewed face, and a set of 3D landmarks parameterized by a frontally-viewed deformable face model. An important merit of the proposed method is its ability to deal both with noise (small perturbations) and with outliers (large errors). We propose to model inliers and outliers with the generalized Student's t-probability distribution function, a heavy-tailed distribution that is immune to non-Gaussian errors in the data. We describe in detail the associated expectation-maximization (EM) algorithm that alternates between the estimation of (i) the rigid parameters, (ii) the deformation parameters, and (iii) the Student-t distribution parameters. We also propose to use the zero-mean normalized cross-correlation, between a frontalized face and the corresponding ground-truth frontally-viewed face, to evaluate the performance of frontalization. To this end, we use a dataset that contains pairs of profile-viewed and frontally-viewed faces. This evaluation, based on direct image-to-image comparison, stands in contrast with indirect evaluation, based on analyzing the effect of frontalization on face recognition.
summary: Face frontalization consists of synthesizing a frontally-viewed face from an arbitrarily-viewed one. The main contribution of this paper is a robust face alignment method that enables pixel-to-pixel warping. The method simultaneously estimates the rigid transformation (scale, rotation, and translation) and the non-rigid deformation between two 3D point sets: a set of 3D landmarks extracted from an arbitrary-viewed face, and a set of 3D landmarks parameterized by a frontally-viewed deformable face model. An important merit of the proposed method is its ability to deal both with noise (small perturbations) and with outliers (large errors). We propose to model inliers and outliers with the generalized Student's t-probability distribution function, a heavy-tailed distribution that is immune to non-Gaussian errors in the data. We describe in detail the associated expectation-maximization (EM) algorithm that alternates between the estimation of (i) the rigid parameters, (ii) the deformation parameters, and (iii) the Student-t distribution parameters. We also propose to use the zero-mean normalized cross-correlation, between a frontalized face and the corresponding ground-truth frontally-viewed face, to evaluate the performance of frontalization. To this end, we use a dataset that contains pairs of profile-viewed and frontally-viewed faces. This evaluation, based on direct image-to-image comparison, stands in contrast with indirect evaluation, based on analyzing the effect of frontalization on face recognition.
abstract_zh: 脸部正面化包括从任意观看的脸部合成正面观看的脸部。本文的主要贡献是一种鲁棒的人脸对齐方法，可以实现像素到像素的扭曲。该方法同时估计两个 3D 点集之间的刚性变换（缩放、旋转和平移）和非刚性变形：一组从任意视图的脸部提取的 3D 地标，以及一组由正面查看的可变形脸部模型参数化的 3D 地标。该方法的一个重要优点是它能够处理噪声（小扰动）和异常值（大误差）。我们建议使用广义学生 t 概率分布函数对异常值和异常值进行建模，这是一种不受数据中非高斯误差影响的重尾分布。我们详细描述了相关的期望最大化 (EM) 算法，该算法在 (i) 刚性参数、(ii) 变形参数和 (iii) Student-t 分布参数的估计之间交替。我们还建议使用正面化人脸和相应的真实正面观察人脸之间的零均值归一化互相关来评估正面化的性能。为此，我们使用包含侧面视图和正面视图对的数据集。这种基于直接图像与图像比较的评估与基于分析正面化对人脸识别的影响的间接评估形成鲜明对比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒拟合可变形形状模型的三维面部正面化方法，通过像素级映射实现任意视角人脸到正面视角的合成。
AI.motivation: 传统面部正面化方法在处理噪声和异常值时鲁棒性不足，且缺乏直接的图像质量评估指标，亟需改进。
AI.method: 结合广义Student-t分布建模噪声和异常值，通过EM算法交替估计刚性变换参数、非刚性变形参数及分布参数，并采用零均值归一化互相关度量正面化效果。
AI.result: 在包含侧面视图与正面视图人脸配对的数据集上验证，该方法在直接图像对比评估中优于现有间接评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的鲁棒拟合方法有效提升了面部正面化的准确性，为直接图像质量评估提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tuomas P. Oikarinen,Daniel C. Hannah,Sohrob Kazerounian
title: GraphMDN: Leveraging graph structure and deep learning to solve inverse problems
title_zh: GraphMDN：利用图结构和深度学习解决逆问题
abstract: The recent introduction of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and their growing popularity in the past few years has enabled the application of deep learning algorithms to non-Euclidean, graph-structured data. GNNs have achieved state-of-the-art results across an impressive array of graph-based machine learning problems. Nevertheless, despite their rapid pace of development, much of the work on GNNs has focused on graph classification and embedding techniques, largely ignoring regression tasks over graph data. In this paper, we develop a Graph Mixture Density Network (GraphMDN), which combines graph neural networks with mixture density network (MDN) outputs. By combining these techniques, GraphMDNs have the advantage of naturally being able to incorporate graph structured information into a neural architecture, as well as the ability to model multi-modal regression targets. As such, GraphMDNs are designed to excel on regression tasks wherein the data are graph structured, and target statistics are better represented by mixtures of densities rather than singular values (so-called ``inverse problems"). To demonstrate this, we extend an existing GNN architecture known as Semantic GCN (SemGCN) to a GraphMDN structure, and show results from the Human3.6M pose estimation task. The extended model consistently outperforms both GCN and MDN architectures on their own, with a comparable number of parameters.
summary: The recent introduction of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and their growing popularity in the past few years has enabled the application of deep learning algorithms to non-Euclidean, graph-structured data. GNNs have achieved state-of-the-art results across an impressive array of graph-based machine learning problems. Nevertheless, despite their rapid pace of development, much of the work on GNNs has focused on graph classification and embedding techniques, largely ignoring regression tasks over graph data. In this paper, we develop a Graph Mixture Density Network (GraphMDN), which combines graph neural networks with mixture density network (MDN) outputs. By combining these techniques, GraphMDNs have the advantage of naturally being able to incorporate graph structured information into a neural architecture, as well as the ability to model multi-modal regression targets. As such, GraphMDNs are designed to excel on regression tasks wherein the data are graph structured, and target statistics are better represented by mixtures of densities rather than singular values (so-called ``inverse problems"). To demonstrate this, we extend an existing GNN architecture known as Semantic GCN (SemGCN) to a GraphMDN structure, and show results from the Human3.6M pose estimation task. The extended model consistently outperforms both GCN and MDN architectures on their own, with a comparable number of parameters.
abstract_zh: 最近图神经网络 (GNN) 的推出及其在过去几年中的日益普及使得深度学习算法能够应用于非欧几里德图结构数据。 GNN 在一系列令人印象深刻的基于图的机器学习问题上取得了最先进的结果。然而，尽管 GNN 的发展速度很快，但 GNN 的大部分工作都集中在图分类和嵌入技术上，很大程度上忽略了图数据的回归任务。在本文中，我们开发了图混合密度网络（GraphMDN），它将图神经网络与混合密度网络（MDN）输出相结合。通过结合这些技术，GraphMDN 的优势在于能够自然地将图结构化信息合并到神经架构中，以及对多模态回归目标进行建模的能力。因此，GraphMDN 被设计为在回归任务上表现出色，其中数据是图形结构的，并且目标统计数据更好地由密度混合而不是奇异值表示（所谓的“逆问题”）。为了证明这一点，我们将称为语义 GCN (SemGCN) 的现有 GNN 架构扩展到 GraphMDN 结构，并显示 Human3.6M 姿态估计任务的结果。扩展模型在其性能方面始终优于 GCN 和 MDN 架构自己的，具有相当数量的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图神经网络（GNN）和混合密度网络（MDN）的GraphMDN模型，用于解决图结构数据的多模态回归问题，特别是在逆问题中的应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络（GNN）在分类和嵌入任务中表现出色，但现有研究对图数据上的回归任务关注不足，尤其在需要多模态分布建模的逆问题中缺乏有效方法。
AI.method: 通过将语义图卷积网络（SemGCN）扩展为GraphMDN结构，将GNN与MDN结合，利用图结构信息并建模多模态回归目标。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M姿态估计任务中，GraphMDN在参数量相近的情况下，性能优于独立的GCN和MDN模型。
AI.conclusion: GraphMDN有效结合了图结构建模与多模态回归能力，为解决图数据逆问题提供了新方法。
