search_text: GraphMDN: Leveraging graph structure and deep learning to solve inverse problems GraphMDN：利用图结构和深度学习解决逆问题 The recent introduction of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and their growing popularity in the past few years has enabled the application of deep learning algorithms to non-Euclidean, graph-structured data. GNNs have achieved state-of-the-art results across an impressive array of graph-based machine learning problems. Nevertheless, despite their rapid pace of development, much of the work on GNNs has focused on graph classification and embedding techniques, largely ignoring regression tasks over graph data. In this paper, we develop a Graph Mixture Density Network (GraphMDN), which combines graph neural networks with mixture density network (MDN) outputs. By combining these techniques, GraphMDNs have the advantage of naturally being able to incorporate graph structured information into a neural architecture, as well as the ability to model multi-modal regression targets. As such, GraphMDNs are designed to excel on regression tasks wherein the data are graph structured, and target statistics are better represented by mixtures of densities rather than singular values (so-called ``inverse problems"). To demonstrate this, we extend an existing GNN architecture known as Semantic GCN (SemGCN) to a GraphMDN structure, and show results from the Human3.6M pose estimation task. The extended model consistently outperforms both GCN and MDN architectures on their own, with a comparable number of parameters. 最近图神经网络 (GNN) 的推出及其在过去几年中的日益普及使得深度学习算法能够应用于非欧几里德图结构数据。 GNN 在一系列令人印象深刻的基于图的机器学习问题上取得了最先进的结果。然而，尽管 GNN 的发展速度很快，但 GNN 的大部分工作都集中在图分类和嵌入技术上，很大程度上忽略了图数据的回归任务。在本文中，我们开发了图混合密度网络（GraphMDN），它将图神经网络与混合密度网络（MDN）输出相结合。通过结合这些技术，GraphMDN 的优势在于能够自然地将图结构化信息合并到神经架构中，以及对多模态回归目标进行建模的能力。因此，GraphMDN 被设计为在回归任务上表现出色，其中数据是图形结构的，并且目标统计数据更好地由密度混合而不是奇异值表示（所谓的“逆问题”）。为了证明这一点，我们将称为语义 GCN (SemGCN) 的现有 GNN 架构扩展到 GraphMDN 结构，并显示 Human3.6M 姿态估计任务的结果。扩展模型在其性能方面始终优于 GCN 和 MDN 架构自己的，具有相当数量的参数。 本文提出了一种结合图神经网络（GNN）和混合密度网络（MDN）的GraphMDN模型，用于解决图结构数据的多模态回归问题，特别是在逆问题中的应用。 Tuomas P. Oikarinen,Daniel C. Hannah,Sohrob Kazerounian cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tianqi Xiao,Omer Nguena Timo,Florent Avellaneda,Yasir Malik,Stefan Bruda
title: An Approach to Evaluating Learning Algorithms for Decision Trees
title_zh: 评估决策树学习算法的方法
abstract: Learning algorithms produce software models for realising critical classification tasks. Decision trees models are simpler than other models such as neural network and they are used in various critical domains such as the medical and the aeronautics. Low or unknown learning ability algorithms does not permit us to trust the produced software models, which lead to costly test activities for validating the models and to the waste of learning time in case the models are likely to be faulty due to the learning inability. Methods for evaluating the decision trees learning ability, as well as that for the other models, are needed especially since the testing of the learned models is still a hot topic. We propose a novel oracle-centered approach to evaluate (the learning ability of) learning algorithms for decision trees. It consists of generating data from reference trees playing the role of oracles, producing learned trees with existing learning algorithms, and determining the degree of correctness (DOE) of the learned trees by comparing them with the oracles. The average DOE is used to estimate the quality of the learning algorithm. the We assess five decision tree learning algorithms based on the proposed approach.
summary: Learning algorithms produce software models for realising critical classification tasks. Decision trees models are simpler than other models such as neural network and they are used in various critical domains such as the medical and the aeronautics. Low or unknown learning ability algorithms does not permit us to trust the produced software models, which lead to costly test activities for validating the models and to the waste of learning time in case the models are likely to be faulty due to the learning inability. Methods for evaluating the decision trees learning ability, as well as that for the other models, are needed especially since the testing of the learned models is still a hot topic. We propose a novel oracle-centered approach to evaluate (the learning ability of) learning algorithms for decision trees. It consists of generating data from reference trees playing the role of oracles, producing learned trees with existing learning algorithms, and determining the degree of correctness (DOE) of the learned trees by comparing them with the oracles. The average DOE is used to estimate the quality of the learning algorithm. the We assess five decision tree learning algorithms based on the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 学习算法产生用于实现关键分类任务的软件模型。决策树模型比神经网络等其他模型更简单，并且用于医疗和航空等各种关键领域。学习能力低或未知的算法不允许我们信任生成的软件模型，这会导致验证模型的成本高昂的测试活动，并且会浪费学习时间，以防模型由于学习能力而可能出错。特别是因为学习模型的测试仍然是一个热门话题，所以需要评估决策树以及其他模型的学习能力的方法。我们提出了一种新的以预言机为中心的方法来评估决策树的学习算法（的学习能力）。它包括从扮演预言机角色的参考树生成数据，使用现有学习算法生成学习树，并通过将学习树与预言机进行比较来确定学习树的正确度（DOE）。平均 DOE 用于估计学习算法的质量。我们根据所提出的方法评估了五种决策树学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于参考树（Oracle）的决策树学习算法评估方法，通过生成参考数据、训练学习树并比较正确性来评估算法质量。
AI.motivation: 决策树模型在医疗和航空等关键领域广泛应用，但现有学习算法的可靠性不足可能导致模型验证成本高且学习时间浪费，亟需有效评估方法。
AI.method: 以参考树作为Oracle生成测试数据，使用现有算法生成学习树，通过比较学习树与参考树的正确性程度（DOE）评估算法质量，并计算平均DOE作为算法优劣指标。
AI.result: 基于该方法对五种决策树学习算法进行了评估，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Oracle中心化评估方法能有效衡量决策树学习算法的质量，为算法选择提供依据。

title: SCFusion: Real-time Incremental Scene Reconstruction with Semantic Completion
title_zh: SCFusion：具有语义补全功能的实时增量场景重建
abstract: Real-time scene reconstruction from depth data inevitably suffers from occlusion, thus leading to incomplete 3D models. Partial reconstructions, in turn, limit the performance of algorithms that leverage them for applications in the context of, e.g., augmented reality, robotic navigation, and 3D mapping. Most methods address this issue by predicting the missing geometry as an offline optimization, thus being incompatible with real-time applications. We propose a framework that ameliorates this issue by performing scene reconstruction and semantic scene completion jointly in an incremental and real-time manner, based on an input sequence of depth maps. Our framework relies on a novel neural architecture designed to process occupancy maps and leverages voxel states to accurately and efficiently fuse semantic completion with the 3D global model. We evaluate the proposed approach quantitatively and qualitatively, demonstrating that our method can obtain accurate 3D semantic scene completion in real-time.
summary: Real-time scene reconstruction from depth data inevitably suffers from occlusion, thus leading to incomplete 3D models. Partial reconstructions, in turn, limit the performance of algorithms that leverage them for applications in the context of, e.g., augmented reality, robotic navigation, and 3D mapping. Most methods address this issue by predicting the missing geometry as an offline optimization, thus being incompatible with real-time applications. We propose a framework that ameliorates this issue by performing scene reconstruction and semantic scene completion jointly in an incremental and real-time manner, based on an input sequence of depth maps. Our framework relies on a novel neural architecture designed to process occupancy maps and leverages voxel states to accurately and efficiently fuse semantic completion with the 3D global model. We evaluate the proposed approach quantitatively and qualitatively, demonstrating that our method can obtain accurate 3D semantic scene completion in real-time.
abstract_zh: 根据深度数据进行实时场景重建不可避免地会受到遮挡，从而导致 3D 模型不完整。部分重建反过来又限制了将其用于增强现实、机器人导航和 3D 绘图等应用的算法的性能。大多数方法通过离线优化来预测缺失的几何体来解决这个问题，因此与实时应用程序不兼容。我们提出了一个框架，通过基于深度图的输入序列以增量和实时的方式联合执行场景重建和语义场景完成来改善这个问题。我们的框架依赖于一种新颖的神经架构，旨在处理占用图，并利用体素状态准确有效地将语义完成与 3D 全局模型融合。我们定量和定性地评估了所提出的方法，证明我们的方法可以实时获得准确的 3D 语义场景完成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCFusion框架，通过实时增量方式结合场景重建与语义补全，解决深度数据场景重建中的遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过离线优化预测缺失几何，无法满足实时应用需求，导致三维模型不完整，影响AR、机器人导航等应用效果。
AI.method: 设计新型神经网络架构处理占用图，利用体素状态高效融合语义补全与全局三维模型，实现实时增量重建。
AI.result: 定量与定性评估表明，该方法能在实时条件下生成准确的三维语义场景补全结果。
AI.conclusion: SCFusion框架通过联合优化场景重建与语义补全，在实时性与精度间取得平衡，为动态场景理解提供新思路。

motivation: 现有方法通过离线优化预测缺失几何，无法满足实时应用需求，导致三维模型不完整，影响AR、机器人导航等应用效果。
method: 设计新型神经网络架构处理占用图，利用体素状态高效融合语义补全与全局三维模型，实现实时增量重建。
result: 定量与定性评估表明，该方法能在实时条件下生成准确的三维语义场景补全结果。
conclusion: SCFusion框架通过联合优化场景重建与语义补全，在实时性与精度间取得平衡，为动态场景理解提供新思路。
search_text: SCFusion: Real-time Incremental Scene Reconstruction with Semantic Completion SCFusion：具有语义补全功能的实时增量场景重建 Real-time scene reconstruction from depth data inevitably suffers from occlusion, thus leading to incomplete 3D models. Partial reconstructions, in turn, limit the performance of algorithms that leverage them for applications in the context of, e.g., augmented reality, robotic navigation, and 3D mapping. Most methods address this issue by predicting the missing geometry as an offline optimization, thus being incompatible with real-time applications. We propose a framework that ameliorates this issue by performing scene reconstruction and semantic scene completion jointly in an incremental and real-time manner, based on an input sequence of depth maps. Our framework relies on a novel neural architecture designed to process occupancy maps and leverages voxel states to accurately and efficiently fuse semantic completion with the 3D global model. We evaluate the proposed approach quantitatively and qualitatively, demonstrating that our method can obtain accurate 3D semantic scene completion in real-time. 根据深度数据进行实时场景重建不可避免地会受到遮挡，从而导致 3D 模型不完整。部分重建反过来又限制了将其用于增强现实、机器人导航和 3D 绘图等应用的算法的性能。大多数方法通过离线优化来预测缺失的几何体来解决这个问题，因此与实时应用程序不兼容。我们提出了一个框架，通过基于深度图的输入序列以增量和实时的方式联合执行场景重建和语义场景完成来改善这个问题。我们的框架依赖于一种新颖的神经架构，旨在处理占用图，并利用体素状态准确有效地将语义完成与 3D 全局模型融合。我们定量和定性地评估了所提出的方法，证明我们的方法可以实时获得准确的 3D 语义场景完成。 本文提出SCFusion框架，通过实时增量方式结合场景重建与语义补全，解决深度数据场景重建中的遮挡问题。 Shun-Cheng Wu,Keisuke Tateno,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.NE,cs.RO

title: Dutch Humor Detection by Generating Negative Examples
title_zh: 通过生成负例进行荷兰式幽默检测
comment: Accepted at the Proceedings of the 32st Benelux Conference on Artificial Intelligence (BNAIC 2020) and the 29th Belgian Dutch Conference on Machine Learning (Benelearn 2020)
comments: Accepted at the Proceedings of the 32st Benelux Conference on Artificial Intelligence (BNAIC 2020) and the 29th Belgian Dutch Conference on Machine Learning (Benelearn 2020)
abstract: Detecting if a text is humorous is a hard task to do computationally, as it usually requires linguistic and common sense insights. In machine learning, humor detection is usually modeled as a binary classification task, trained to predict if the given text is a joke or another type of text. Rather than using completely different non-humorous texts, we propose using text generation algorithms for imitating the original joke dataset to increase the difficulty for the learning algorithm. We constructed several different joke and non-joke datasets to test the humor detection abilities of different language technologies. In particular, we compare the humor detection capabilities of classic neural network approaches with the state-of-the-art Dutch language model RobBERT. In doing so, we create and compare the first Dutch humor detection systems. We found that while other language models perform well when the non-jokes came from completely different domains, RobBERT was the only one that was able to distinguish jokes from generated negative examples. This performance illustrates the usefulness of using text generation to create negative datasets for humor recognition, and also shows that transformer models are a large step forward in humor detection.
summary: Detecting if a text is humorous is a hard task to do computationally, as it usually requires linguistic and common sense insights. In machine learning, humor detection is usually modeled as a binary classification task, trained to predict if the given text is a joke or another type of text. Rather than using completely different non-humorous texts, we propose using text generation algorithms for imitating the original joke dataset to increase the difficulty for the learning algorithm. We constructed several different joke and non-joke datasets to test the humor detection abilities of different language technologies. In particular, we compare the humor detection capabilities of classic neural network approaches with the state-of-the-art Dutch language model RobBERT. In doing so, we create and compare the first Dutch humor detection systems. We found that while other language models perform well when the non-jokes came from completely different domains, RobBERT was the only one that was able to distinguish jokes from generated negative examples. This performance illustrates the usefulness of using text generation to create negative datasets for humor recognition, and also shows that transformer models are a large step forward in humor detection.
abstract_zh: 检测文本是否幽默是一项艰巨的计算任务，因为它通常需要语言和常识的洞察力。在机器学习中，幽默检测通常被建模为二元分类任务，经过训练来预测给定文本是笑话还是其他类型的文本。我们建议使用文本生成算法来模仿原始笑话数据集，而不是使用完全不同的非幽默文本，以增加学习算法的难度。我们构建了几个不同的笑话和非笑话数据集来测试不同语言技术的幽默检测能力。特别是，我们将经典神经网络方法的幽默检测能力与最先进的荷兰语模型 RobBERT 进行了比较。在此过程中，我们创建并比较了第一个荷兰幽默检测系统。我们发现，虽然其他语言模型在非笑话来自完全不同的领域时表现良好，但 RobBERT 是唯一能够区分笑话和生成的反例的语言模型。这一性能说明了使用文本生成来创建幽默识别的负面数据集的有用性，并且还表明 Transformer 模型在幽默检测方面向前迈出了一大步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过生成负面例子提升荷兰语幽默检测的难度，并比较不同模型的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统幽默检测依赖不同领域的非幽默文本作为负样本，但生成与笑话结构相似的负样本能更有效测试模型能力。
AI.method: 使用文本生成算法模仿笑话数据集生成负样本，构建多数据集比较经典神经网络与RobBERT模型的检测性能。
AI.result: RobBERT模型能有效区分笑话与生成负样本，而其他模型在跨领域非笑话数据上表现较好但无法应对生成负样本。
AI.conclusion: 生成负样本有助于提升幽默检测难度，Transformer模型在该任务上显著优于传统方法。

authors_text: Giacomo Ferroni,Nicolas Turpault,Juan Azcarreta,Francesco Tuveri,Romain Serizel,Çagdaş Bilen,Sacha Krstulović
title: Improving Sound Event Detection Metrics: Insights from DCASE 2020
title_zh: 改进声音事件检测指标：DCASE 2020 的见解
abstract: The ranking of sound event detection (SED) systems may be biased by assumptions inherent to evaluation criteria and to the choice of an operating point. This paper compares conventional event-based and segment-based criteria against the Polyphonic Sound Detection Score (PSDS)'s intersection-based criterion, over a selection of systems from DCASE 2020 Challenge Task 4. It shows that, by relying on collars , the conventional event-based criterion introduces different strictness levels depending on the length of the sound events, and that the segment-based criterion may lack precision and be application dependent. Alternatively, PSDS's intersection-based criterion overcomes the dependency of the evaluation on sound event duration and provides robustness to labelling subjectivity, by allowing valid detections of interrupted events. Furthermore, PSDS enhances the comparison of SED systems by measuring sound event modelling performance independently from the systems' operating points.
summary: The ranking of sound event detection (SED) systems may be biased by assumptions inherent to evaluation criteria and to the choice of an operating point. This paper compares conventional event-based and segment-based criteria against the Polyphonic Sound Detection Score (PSDS)'s intersection-based criterion, over a selection of systems from DCASE 2020 Challenge Task 4. It shows that, by relying on collars , the conventional event-based criterion introduces different strictness levels depending on the length of the sound events, and that the segment-based criterion may lack precision and be application dependent. Alternatively, PSDS's intersection-based criterion overcomes the dependency of the evaluation on sound event duration and provides robustness to labelling subjectivity, by allowing valid detections of interrupted events. Furthermore, PSDS enhances the comparison of SED systems by measuring sound event modelling performance independently from the systems' operating points.
abstract_zh: 声音事件检测 (SED) 系统的排名可能会因评估标准和工作点选择固有的假设而产生偏差。本文通过 DCASE 2020 挑战任务 4 中选择的系统，将传统的基于事件和基于片段的标准与和弦声音检测评分 (PSDS) 的基于交叉的标准进行比较。结果表明，通过依赖项圈，传统的基于事件的标准根据声音事件的长度引入了不同的严格级别，而基于片段的标准可能缺乏精度并且依赖于应用程序。或者，PSDS 基于交叉的标准克服了评估对声音事件持续时间的依赖性，并通过允许有效检测中断事件来为标记主观性提供鲁棒性。此外，PSDS 通过独立于系统操作点测量声音事件建模性能，增强了 SED 系统的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了传统声音事件检测评估标准与PSDS交集标准，分析其在DCASE 2020任务中的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 传统评估标准可能因事件长度依赖性和标注主观性导致系统排名偏差，需改进评估方法。
AI.method: 通过对比DCASE 2020挑战赛中多个系统的事件基于、分段基于和PSDS交集标准的评估结果进行分析。
AI.result: PSDS标准消除了事件持续时间影响，提升了对中断事件的鲁棒性，并独立于系统操作点进行性能比较。
AI.conclusion: PSDS作为更公平、稳健的评估指标，可有效改进声音事件检测系统的性能对比分析。

title: Automatically Identifying Words That Can Serve as Labels for Few-Shot Text Classification
title_zh: 自动识别可用作少样本文本分类标签的单词
abstract: A recent approach for few-shot text classification is to convert textual inputs to cloze questions that contain some form of task description, process them with a pretrained language model and map the predicted words to labels. Manually defining this mapping between words and labels requires both domain expertise and an understanding of the language model's abilities. To mitigate this issue, we devise an approach that automatically finds such a mapping given small amounts of training data. For a number of tasks, the mapping found by our approach performs almost as well as hand-crafted label-to-word mappings.
summary: A recent approach for few-shot text classification is to convert textual inputs to cloze questions that contain some form of task description, process them with a pretrained language model and map the predicted words to labels. Manually defining this mapping between words and labels requires both domain expertise and an understanding of the language model's abilities. To mitigate this issue, we devise an approach that automatically finds such a mapping given small amounts of training data. For a number of tasks, the mapping found by our approach performs almost as well as hand-crafted label-to-word mappings.
abstract_zh: 最近的少样本文本分类方法是将文本输入转换为包含某种形式的任务描述的完形填空问题，使用预训练的语言模型对其进行处理，并将预测的单词映射到标签。手动定义单词和标签之间的映射需要领域专业知识和对语言模型功能的理解。为了缓解这个问题，我们设计了一种方法，可以在给定少量训练数据的情况下自动找到这样的映射。对于许多任务，我们的方法找到的映射的性能几乎与手工制作的标签到单词的映射一样好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动识别可用于少样本文本分类的标签词语的方法，无需手动定义标签与词语的映射关系。
AI.motivation: 手动定义标签到词语的映射需要领域专业知识和对语言模型能力的深入理解，而自动方法可以降低这一门槛。
AI.method: 通过预训练语言模型处理生成的填空问题，利用少量训练数据自动学习标签与词语的映射关系。
AI.result: 在多个任务中，自动映射方法的表现几乎与手工制作的标签-词语映射相当。
AI.conclusion: 自动识别标签词语的方法有效减少了人工干预，提升了少样本文本分类的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自动识别可用于少样本文本分类的标签词语的方法，无需手动定义标签与词语的映射关系。
ai_content.motivation: 手动定义标签到词语的映射需要领域专业知识和对语言模型能力的深入理解，而自动方法可以降低这一门槛。
ai_content.method: 通过预训练语言模型处理生成的填空问题，利用少量训练数据自动学习标签与词语的映射关系。
ai_content.result: 在多个任务中，自动映射方法的表现几乎与手工制作的标签-词语映射相当。
ai_content.conclusion: 自动识别标签词语的方法有效减少了人工干预，提升了少样本文本分类的可行性。

search_text: Automatically Identifying Words That Can Serve as Labels for Few-Shot Text Classification 自动识别可用作少样本文本分类标签的单词 A recent approach for few-shot text classification is to convert textual inputs to cloze questions that contain some form of task description, process them with a pretrained language model and map the predicted words to labels. Manually defining this mapping between words and labels requires both domain expertise and an understanding of the language model's abilities. To mitigate this issue, we devise an approach that automatically finds such a mapping given small amounts of training data. For a number of tasks, the mapping found by our approach performs almost as well as hand-crafted label-to-word mappings. 最近的少样本文本分类方法是将文本输入转换为包含某种形式的任务描述的完形填空问题，使用预训练的语言模型对其进行处理，并将预测的单词映射到标签。手动定义单词和标签之间的映射需要领域专业知识和对语言模型功能的理解。为了缓解这个问题，我们设计了一种方法，可以在给定少量训练数据的情况下自动找到这样的映射。对于许多任务，我们的方法找到的映射的性能几乎与手工制作的标签到单词的映射一样好。 本文提出一种自动识别可用于少样本文本分类的标签词语的方法，无需手动定义标签与词语的映射关系。 Timo Schick,Helmut Schmid,Hinrich Schütze cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Fewer is More: A Deep Graph Metric Learning Perspective Using Fewer Proxies
title_zh: 少即是多：使用更少代理的深度图度量学习视角
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2020 as a spotlight paper. Code can be found at https://github.com/YuehuaZhu/ProxyGML
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2020 as a spotlight paper. Code can be found at https://github.com/YuehuaZhu/ProxyGML
abstract: Deep metric learning plays a key role in various machine learning tasks. Most of the previous works have been confined to sampling from a mini-batch, which cannot precisely characterize the global geometry of the embedding space. Although researchers have developed proxy- and classification-based methods to tackle the sampling issue, those methods inevitably incur a redundant computational cost. In this paper, we propose a novel Proxy-based deep Graph Metric Learning (ProxyGML) approach from the perspective of graph classification, which uses fewer proxies yet achieves better comprehensive performance. Specifically, multiple global proxies are leveraged to collectively approximate the original data points for each class. To efficiently capture local neighbor relationships, a small number of such proxies are adaptively selected to construct similarity subgraphs between these proxies and each data point. Further, we design a novel reverse label propagation algorithm, by which the neighbor relationships are adjusted according to ground-truth labels, so that a discriminative metric space can be learned during the process of subgraph classification. Extensive experiments carried out on widely-used CUB-200-2011, Cars196, and Stanford Online Products datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed ProxyGML over the state-of-the-art methods in terms of both effectiveness and efficiency. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/YuehuaZhu/ProxyGML.

Further, we design a novel reverse label propagation algorithm, by which the neighbor relationships are adjusted according to ground-truth labels, so that a discriminative metric space can be learned during the process of subgraph classification. Extensive experiments carried out on widely-used CUB-200-2011, Cars196, and Stanford Online Products datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed ProxyGML over the state-of-the-art methods in terms of both effectiveness and efficiency. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/YuehuaZhu/ProxyGML.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习在各种机器学习任务中发挥着关键作用。之前的大多数工作仅限于从小批量中采样，无法精确表征嵌入空间的全局几何形状。尽管研究人员开发了基于代理和分类的方法来解决采样问题，但这些方法不可避免地会产生多余的计算成本。在本文中，我们从图分类的角度提出了一种新颖的基于代理的深度图度量学习（ProxyGML）方法，该方法使用更少的代理，但取得了更好的综合性能。具体来说，利用多个全局代理来共同近似每个类别的原始数据点。为了有效地捕获局部邻居关系，自适应地选择少量此类代理来构建这些代理与每个数据点之间的相似性子图。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的反向标签传播算法，通过该算法根据真实标签调整邻居关系，以便在子图分类过程中可以学习判别性度量空间。在广泛使用的 CUB-200-2011、Cars196 和斯坦福在线产品数据集上进行的大量实验证明了所提出的 ProxyGML 在有效性和效率方面优于最先进的方法。源代码可在 https://github.com/YuehuaZhu/ProxyGML 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于更少代理的深度图度量学习方法ProxyGML，通过图分类视角提升嵌入空间学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统度量学习方法依赖小批量采样难以刻画全局几何结构，且代理方法存在冗余计算成本，需在减少代理数量的同时保持性能。
AI.method: 利用多个全局代理近似类数据点，自适应选择少量代理构建相似子图，并设计反向标签传播算法调整邻居关系以学习判别性度量空间。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、Cars196和Stanford Online Products数据集上，ProxyGML在效果和效率上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ProxyGML通过图分类视角和代理优化，在减少计算成本的同时提升了度量学习性能，为该领域提供新思路。

title: Development of the complex system for the remote monitoring of the human heart rate
title_zh: 开发用于远程监测人体心率的复杂系统
abstract: An implementation of the remote pulse monitoring system which allows observing of the patient's pulse in a real-time mode via browser is offered in this work. The result of the work is the development of the complex system, which contains the hardware components for the pulse measurement and the software component for the data processing and visualization in a web-interface. The web-interface provides the heart rate visualization in real-time mode and informs the appropriate person in case of deviation from pulse limits. The monitoring system can detect two disease types: tachycardia and bradycardia. A pulse sensor detects the heartbeat moment and functions like a plethysmograph. The microcontroller ATmega8 is used to read data from the sensor, to analyze information, and pass it to the next hardware block. Arduino Uno and Ethernet module ENC28J60 are used to transform the information about the heartbeat event to the web interface. Ethernet module ENC28J60 is connected to Arduino Uno using the SPI interface. The pair of Bluetooth modules HC-05 is used to connect ATmega8 and Arduino Uno with each other. The module HC-05 is connected to both microcontrollers using the UART interface. The WebSocket protocol is used to implement the real-time data demonstration in the web-interface. The web-interface is adapted to mobile devices therefore it can be viewed from smartphones and tablets. The complex can be used both by the qualified specialist for the remote monitoring of the patient's state and as a personal prophylactic

abstract_zh: 这项工作提供了远程脉搏监测系统的实现，该系统允许通过浏览器以实时模式观察患者的脉搏。这项工作的结果是开发了复杂的系统，其中包含用于脉冲测量的硬件组件以及用于网络界面中的数据处理和可视化的软件组件。网络界面以实时模式提供心率可视化，并在偏离脉搏限制的情况下通知相应人员。该监测系统可以检测两种疾病类型：心动过速和心动过缓。脉搏传感器检测心跳时刻，其功能类似于体积描记器。微控制器 ATmega8 用于从传感器读取数据、分析信息并将其传递到下一个硬件块。 Arduino Uno和以太网模块ENC28J60用于将心跳事件的信息转换到Web界面。以太网模块ENC28J60使用SPI接口连接到Arduino Uno。一对蓝牙模块 HC-05 用于连接 ATmega8 和 Arduino Uno。模块 HC-05 使用 UART 接口连接到两个微控制器。 WebSocket协议用于实现Web界面上的实时数据显示。网络界面适用于移动设备，因此可以从智能手机和平板电脑上查看。该综合体既可以由合格的专家用于远程监控患者的状态，也可以作为个人预防措施

AI.tldr: 开发一个包含硬件和软件的复杂系统，用于通过浏览器实时远程监测人体心率。
AI.motivation: 满足远程医疗需求，实现对患者心率的实时监测与异常预警，辅助诊断心动过速和心动过缓等疾病。
AI.method: 采用ATmega8微控制器采集脉搏数据，通过HC-05蓝牙模块与Arduino Uno通信，利用ENC28J60以太网模块和WebSocket协议实现数据实时传输至网页界面，并适配移动设备。
AI.result: 成功构建可实时显示心率数据的网页界面，具备异常心率预警功能，支持智能手机和平板设备访问。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可为专业医疗人员提供远程监测工具，同时适用于个人健康预防，具有实际应用价值。

The complex can be used both by the qualified specialist for the remote monitoring of the patient's state and as a personal prophylactic 这项工作提供了远程脉搏监测系统的实现，该系统允许通过浏览器以实时模式观察患者的脉搏。这项工作的结果是开发了复杂的系统，其中包含用于脉冲测量的硬件组件以及用于网络界面中的数据处理和可视化的软件组件。网络界面以实时模式提供心率可视化，并在偏离脉搏限制的情况下通知相应人员。该监测系统可以检测两种疾病类型：心动过速和心动过缓。脉搏传感器检测心跳时刻，其功能类似于体积描记器。微控制器 ATmega8 用于从传感器读取数据、分析信息并将其传递到下一个硬件块。 Arduino Uno和以太网模块ENC28J60用于将心跳事件的信息转换到Web界面。以太网模块ENC28J60使用SPI接口连接到Arduino Uno。一对蓝牙模块 HC-05 用于连接 ATmega8 和 Arduino Uno。模块 HC-05 使用 UART 接口连接到两个微控制器。 WebSocket协议用于实现Web界面上的实时数据显示。网络界面适用于移动设备，因此可以从智能手机和平板电脑上查看。该综合体既可以由合格的专家用于远程监控患者的状态，也可以作为个人预防措施 开发一个包含硬件和软件的复杂系统，用于通过浏览器实时远程监测人体心率。 Artem Kramov,Olexandr Bauzha physics.med-ph,cs.RO

title: Classification of Important Segments in Educational Videos using Multimodal Features
title_zh: 使用多模态特征对教育视频中的重要片段进行分类
comment: Proceedings of the CIKM 2020 Workshops, October 19 to 20, Galway, Ireland
comments: Proceedings of the CIKM 2020 Workshops, October 19 to 20, Galway, Ireland
abstract: Videos are a commonly-used type of content in learning during Web search. Many e-learning platforms provide quality content, but sometimes educational videos are long and cover many topics. Humans are good in extracting important sections from videos, but it remains a significant challenge for computers. In this paper, we address the problem of assigning importance scores to video segments, that is how much information they contain with respect to the overall topic of an educational video. We present an annotation tool and a new dataset of annotated educational videos collected from popular online learning platforms. Moreover, we propose a multimodal neural architecture that utilizes state-of-the-art audio, visual and textual features. Our experiments investigate the impact of visual and temporal information, as well as the combination of multimodal features on importance prediction.
summary: Videos are a commonly-used type of content in learning during Web search. Many e-learning platforms provide quality content, but sometimes educational videos are long and cover many topics. Humans are good in extracting important sections from videos, but it remains a significant challenge for computers. In this paper, we address the problem of assigning importance scores to video segments, that is how much information they contain with respect to the overall topic of an educational video. We present an annotation tool and a new dataset of annotated educational videos collected from popular online learning platforms. Moreover, we propose a multimodal neural architecture that utilizes state-of-the-art audio, visual and textual features. Our experiments investigate the impact of visual and temporal information, as well as the combination of multimodal features on importance prediction.
abstract_zh: 视频是网络搜索学习中常用的内容类型。许多电子学习平台提供优质内容，但有时教育视频很长并且涵盖许多主题。人类擅长从视频中提取重要部分，但这对计算机来说仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们解决了为视频片段分配重要性分数的问题，即它们包含关于教育视频整体主题的信息量。我们提出了一个注释工具和一个从流行的在线学习平台收集的带注释的教育视频的新数据集。此外，我们提出了一种利用最先进的音频、视觉和文本特征的多模式神经架构。我们的实验研究了视觉和时间信息的影响，以及多模态特征的组合对重要性预测的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过多模态特征对教育视频中的重要片段进行分类，以确定各片段相对于整体主题的信息量。
AI.motivation: 教育视频常因时长过长和内容分散导致关键信息提取困难，而计算机自动识别重要片段仍面临挑战，需开发有效方法提升学习效率。
AI.method: 提出标注工具与数据集，设计融合音频、视觉和文本特征的多模态神经网络架构，并分析视觉信息、时间信息及多模态组合对重要性预测的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，多模态特征融合显著提升重要性预测性能，验证了视觉与时间信息的有效性，以及多模态组合的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法能有效分类教育视频重要片段，所提出的工具与数据集为后续研究提供支持，未来可进一步优化模型与扩展应用场景。

title: Interpreting convolutional networks trained on textual data
title_zh: 解释在文本数据上训练的卷积网络
abstract: There have been many advances in the artificial intelligence field due to the emergence of deep learning. In almost all sub-fields, artificial neural networks have reached or exceeded human-level performance. However, most of the models are not interpretable. As a result, it is hard to trust their decisions, especially in life and death scenarios. In recent years, there has been a movement toward creating explainable artificial intelligence, but most work to date has concentrated on image processing models, as it is easier for humans to perceive visual patterns. There has been little work in other fields like natural language processing. In this paper, we train a convolutional model on textual data and analyze the global logic of the model by studying its filter values. In the end, we find the most important words in our corpus to our models logic and remove the rest (95%). New models trained on just the 5% most important words can achieve the same performance as the original model while reducing training time by more than half. Approaches such as this will help us to understand NLP models, explain their decisions according to their word choices, and improve them by finding blind spots and biases.
summary: There have been many advances in the artificial intelligence field due to the emergence of deep learning. In almost all sub-fields, artificial neural networks have reached or exceeded human-level performance. However, most of the models are not interpretable. As a result, it is hard to trust their decisions, especially in life and death scenarios. In recent years, there has been a movement toward creating explainable artificial intelligence, but most work to date has concentrated on image processing models, as it is easier for humans to perceive visual patterns. There has been little work in other fields like natural language processing. In this paper, we train a convolutional model on textual data and analyze the global logic of the model by studying its filter values. In the end, we find the most important words in our corpus to our models logic and remove the rest (95%). New models trained on just the 5% most important words can achieve the same performance as the original model while reducing training time by more than half. Approaches such as this will help us to understand NLP models, explain their decisions according to their word choices, and improve them by finding blind spots and biases.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习的出现，人工智能领域取得了许多进展。在几乎所有子领域，人工神经网络都达到或超过了人类水平的表现。然而，大多数模型是不可解释的。因此，很难相信他们的决定，尤其是在生死攸关的情况下。近年来，出现了创建可解释人工智能的运动，但迄今为止大多数工作都集中在图像处理模型上，因为人类更容易感知视觉模式。在自然语言处理等其他领域几乎没有什么工作。在本文中，我们在文本数据上训练卷积模型，并通过研究其过滤器值来分析模型的全局逻辑。最后，我们找到语料库中对模型逻辑最重要的单词，并删除其余的单词（95%）。仅使用 5% 最重要单词进行训练的新模型就可以实现与原始模型相同的性能，同时将训练时间缩短一半以上。诸如此类的方法将帮助我们理解 NLP 模型，根据他们的单词选择解释他们的决定，并通过发现盲点和偏见来改进它们。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析卷积神经网络在文本数据上的过滤器值，识别关键词汇并简化模型以提高可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在关键场景中缺乏可解释性，而现有可解释性研究多集中于图像处理，自然语言处理领域研究不足。
AI.method: 训练文本卷积模型，通过分析过滤器值确定关键词汇，保留5%最相关词汇重新训练模型。
AI.result: 基于5%关键词汇的模型保持原有性能，同时训练时间减少一半以上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有助于理解NLP模型决策逻辑，发现偏差并优化模型，推动可解释AI发展。

authors_text: Linlin Hou,Ji Zhang,Ou Wu,Ting Yu,Zhen Wang,Zhao Li,Jianliang Gao,Yingchun Ye,Rujing Yao
title: Method and Dataset Entity Mining in Scientific Literature: A CNN + Bi-LSTM Model with Self-attention
title_zh: 科学文献中的方法和数据集实体挖掘：具有自注意力的CNN + Bi-LSTM模型
abstract: Literature analysis facilitates researchers to acquire a good understanding of the development of science and technology. The traditional literature analysis focuses largely on the literature metadata such as topics, authors, abstracts, keywords, references, etc., and little attention was paid to the main content of papers. In many scientific domains such as science, computing, engineering, etc., the methods and datasets involved in the scientific papers published in those domains carry important information and are quite useful for domain analysis as well as algorithm and dataset recommendation. In this paper, we propose a novel entity recognition model, called MDER, which is able to effectively extract the method and dataset entities from the main textual content of scientific papers. The model utilizes rule embedding and adopts a parallel structure of CNN and Bi-LSTM with the self-attention mechanism. We evaluate the proposed model on datasets which are constructed from the published papers of four research areas in computer science, i.e., NLP, CV, Data Mining and AI. The experimental results demonstrate that our model performs well in all the four areas and it features a good learning capacity for cross-area learning and recognition. We also conduct experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of different building modules within our model which indicate that the importance of different building modules in collectively contributing to the good entity recognition performance as a whole. The data augmentation experiments on our model demonstrated that data augmentation positively contributes to model training, making our model much more robust in dealing with the scenarios where only small number of training samples are available. We finally apply our model on PAKDD papers published from 2009-2019 to mine insightful results from scientific papers published in a longer time span.

The model utilizes rule embedding and adopts a parallel structure of CNN and Bi-LSTM with the self-attention mechanism. We evaluate the proposed model on datasets which are constructed from the published papers of four research areas in computer science, i.e., NLP, CV, Data Mining and AI. The experimental results demonstrate that our model performs well in all the four areas and it features a good learning capacity for cross-area learning and recognition. We also conduct experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of different building modules within our model which indicate that the importance of different building modules in collectively contributing to the good entity recognition performance as a whole. The data augmentation experiments on our model demonstrated that data augmentation positively contributes to model training, making our model much more robust in dealing with the scenarios where only small number of training samples are available. We finally apply our model on PAKDD papers published from 2009-2019 to mine insightful results from scientific papers published in a longer time span.
abstract_zh: 文献分析有助于研究者更好地了解科学技术的发展。传统的文献分析主要关注主题、作者、摘要、关键词、参考文献等文献元数据，而很少关注论文的主要内容。在科学、计算、工程等许多科学领域中，这些领域发表的科学论文所涉及的方法和数据集携带着重要的信息，对于领域分析以及算法和数据集推荐非常有用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的实体识别模型，称为MDER，它能够有效地从科学论文的主要文本内容中提取方法和数据集实体。该模型利用规则嵌入，采用CNN和Bi-LSTM的并行结构，并具有自注意力机制。我们在数据集上评估了所提出的模型，这些数据集是由计算机科学四个研究领域（即 NLP、CV、数据挖掘和人工智能）已发表的论文构建的。实验结果表明，我们的模型在所有四个领域都表现良好，并且具有良好的跨领域学习和识别能力。我们还进行了实验来评估模型中不同构建模块的有效性，这表明不同构建模块共同促进整体良好的实体识别性能的重要性。我们模型上的数据增强实验表明，数据增强对模型训练有积极贡献，使我们的模型在处理只有少量训练样本的场景时更加稳健。我们最终将我们的模型应用于 2009-2019 年发表的 PAKDD 论文，以从较长时间跨度发表的科学论文中挖掘富有洞察力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MDER的实体识别模型，通过结合CNN、Bi-LSTM与自注意力机制，从科学论文中有效提取方法和数据集实体。
AI.motivation: 传统文献分析过度依赖元数据，忽视了论文主体内容中方法和数据集实体的关键信息，而这些信息对领域分析和推荐系统具有重要价值。
AI.method: 采用规则嵌入与并行CNN-Bi-LSTM结构结合自注意力机制，构建多模块协同的实体识别模型，并通过数据增强提升小样本场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 模型在NLP、CV、数据挖掘和AI四个领域数据集上表现优异，具备跨领域学习能力；模块实验验证了各组件的贡献度，数据增强显著提升模型性能；应用于PAKDD十年论文挖掘获得有效洞察。
AI.conclusion: MDER模型通过多模块协同与数据增强策略，在科学文献方法与数据集实体识别任务中展现出良好的性能与泛化能力，为跨领域知识挖掘提供有效工具。

search_text: Method and Dataset Entity Mining in Scientific Literature: A CNN + Bi-LSTM Model with Self-attention 科学文献中的方法和数据集实体挖掘：具有自注意力的CNN + Bi-LSTM模型 Literature analysis facilitates researchers to acquire a good understanding of the development of science and technology. The traditional literature analysis focuses largely on the literature metadata such as topics, authors, abstracts, keywords, references, etc., and little attention was paid to the main content of papers. In many scientific domains such as science, computing, engineering, etc., the methods and datasets involved in the scientific papers published in those domains carry important information and are quite useful for domain analysis as well as algorithm and dataset recommendation. In this paper, we propose a novel entity recognition model, called MDER, which is able to effectively extract the method and dataset entities from the main textual content of scientific papers. The model utilizes rule embedding and adopts a parallel structure of CNN and Bi-LSTM with the self-attention mechanism. We evaluate the proposed model on datasets which are constructed from the published papers of four research areas in computer science, i.e., NLP, CV, Data Mining and AI. The experimental results demonstrate that our model performs well in all the four areas and it features a good learning capacity for cross-area learning and recognition. We also conduct experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of different building modules within our model which indicate that the importance of different building modules in collectively contributing to the good entity recognition performance as a whole. The data augmentation experiments on our model demonstrated that data augmentation positively contributes to model training, making our model much more robust in dealing with the scenarios where only small number of training samples are available. We finally apply our model on PAKDD papers published from 2009-2019 to mine insightful results from scientific papers published in a longer time span. 文献分析有助于研究者更好地了解科学技术的发展。传统的文献分析主要关注主题、作者、摘要、关键词、参考文献等文献元数据，而很少关注论文的主要内容。在科学、计算、工程等许多科学领域中，这些领域发表的科学论文所涉及的方法和数据集携带着重要的信息，对于领域分析以及算法和数据集推荐非常有用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的实体识别模型，称为MDER，它能够有效地从科学论文的主要文本内容中提取方法和数据集实体。该模型利用规则嵌入，采用CNN和Bi-LSTM的并行结构，并具有自注意力机制。我们在数据集上评估了所提出的模型，这些数据集是由计算机科学四个研究领域（即 NLP、CV、数据挖掘和人工智能）已发表的论文构建的。实验结果表明，我们的模型在所有四个领域都表现良好，并且具有良好的跨领域学习和识别能力。我们还进行了实验来评估模型中不同构建模块的有效性，这表明不同构建模块共同促进整体良好的实体识别性能的重要性。我们模型上的数据增强实验表明，数据增强对模型训练有积极贡献，使我们的模型在处理只有少量训练样本的场景时更加稳健。我们最终将我们的模型应用于 2009-2019 年发表的 PAKDD 论文，以从较长时间跨度发表的科学论文中挖掘富有洞察力的结果。 本文提出一种名为MDER的实体识别模型，通过结合CNN、Bi-LSTM与自注意力机制，从科学论文中有效提取方法和数据集实体。 Linlin Hou,Ji Zhang,Ou Wu,Ting Yu,Zhen Wang,Zhao Li,Jianliang Gao,Yingchun Ye,Rujing Yao cs.AI

title: Modeling and Simulation of a Point to Point Spherical Articulated Manipulator using Optimal Control
title_zh: 使用最优控制对点对点球形关节机械臂进行建模和仿真
abstract: This paper aims to design an optimal stability controller for a point to point trajectory tracking 3 degree of freedom articulated manipulator. The DH convention is used to obtain the forward and inverse kinematics of the manipulator. The manipulator dynamics are formulated using the Lagrange Euler method to obtain a nonlinear system. The complicated nonlinear equations obtained are then linearized in order to implement the optimal LQR. The simulations are performed in MATLAB and Simulink and the optimal controllers performance is tested for various conditions and the results are presented. The results obtained prove the superiority of LQR over conventional PID control.
summary: This paper aims to design an optimal stability controller for a point to point trajectory tracking 3 degree of freedom articulated manipulator. The DH convention is used to obtain the forward and inverse kinematics of the manipulator. The manipulator dynamics are formulated using the Lagrange Euler method to obtain a nonlinear system. The complicated nonlinear equations obtained are then linearized in order to implement the optimal LQR. The simulations are performed in MATLAB and Simulink and the optimal controllers performance is tested for various conditions and the results are presented. The results obtained prove the superiority of LQR over conventional PID control.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在设计一种点对点轨迹跟踪三自由度关节机械臂的最优稳定性控制器。 DH约定用于获得机械臂的正向和反向运动学。使用拉格朗日欧拉方法制定机械臂动力学以获得非线性系统。然后将获得的复杂非线性方程线性化以实现最佳 LQR。在 MATLAB 和 Simulink 中进行仿真，并在各种条件下测试最佳控制器性能并给出结果。所得结果证明了LQR相对于传统PID控制的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种用于点对点轨迹跟踪的三自由度关节机械臂的最优稳定性控制器，并通过仿真验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统PID控制在处理非线性系统时存在局限性，而最优控制方法如LQR能够提供更优的动态性能和稳定性。
AI.method: 采用DH惯例建立运动学模型，利用拉格朗日-欧拉法推导动力学方程并线性化，通过MATLAB/Simulink实现LQR与PID控制的仿真对比。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，LQR控制器在多种工况下均优于传统PID控制，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: LQR控制在机械臂轨迹跟踪任务中表现出更优的控制效果，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Alireza M. Javid,Sandipan Das,Mikael Skoglund,Saikat Chatterjee
title: A ReLU Dense Layer to Improve the Performance of Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于提高神经网络性能的 ReLU 密集层
abstract: We propose ReDense as a simple and low complexity way to improve the performance of trained neural networks. We use a combination of random weights and rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation function to add a ReLU dense (ReDense) layer to the trained neural network such that it can achieve a lower training loss. The lossless flow property (LFP) of ReLU is the key to achieve the lower training loss while keeping the generalization error small. ReDense does not suffer from vanishing gradient problem in the training due to having a shallow structure. We experimentally show that ReDense can improve the training and testing performance of various neural network architectures with different optimization loss and activation functions. Finally, we test ReDense on some of the state-of-the-art architectures and show the performance improvement on benchmark datasets.
summary: We propose ReDense as a simple and low complexity way to improve the performance of trained neural networks. We use a combination of random weights and rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation function to add a ReLU dense (ReDense) layer to the trained neural network such that it can achieve a lower training loss. The lossless flow property (LFP) of ReLU is the key to achieve the lower training loss while keeping the generalization error small. ReDense does not suffer from vanishing gradient problem in the training due to having a shallow structure. We experimentally show that ReDense can improve the training and testing performance of various neural network architectures with different optimization loss and activation functions. Finally, we test ReDense on some of the state-of-the-art architectures and show the performance improvement on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 ReDense 作为一种简单且低复杂性的方法来提高经过训练的神经网络的性能。我们使用随机权重和修正线性单元（ReLU）激活函数的组合，在训练的神经网络中添加一个ReLU密集（ReDense）层，使其能够实现较低的训练损失。 ReLU 的无损流特性（LFP）是实现较低训练损失同时保持较小泛化误差的关键。由于结构较浅，ReDense 在训练中不会出现梯度消失问题。我们通过实验证明，ReDense 可以提高具有不同优化损失和激活函数的各种神经网络架构的训练和测试性能。最后，我们在一些最先进的架构上测试 ReDense，并展示基准数据集上的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ReDense的ReLU密集层，通过结合随机权重和ReLU激活函数，以提升神经网络的训练和测试性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在训练过程中可能存在训练损失较高或泛化误差较大的问题，同时深层结构易受梯度消失影响，需一种简单有效的方法改进性能。
AI.method: 设计ReDense层，利用ReLU的无损流特性（LFP）和浅层结构避免梯度消失，通过随机权重与ReLU结合，将其添加至预训练网络中以降低损失。
AI.result: 实验表明ReDense能提升多种网络架构在不同优化目标和激活函数下的性能，并在基准数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ReDense通过简单结构有效降低训练损失并保持泛化能力，适用于多种神经网络架构和任务。

motivation: 现有神经网络在训练过程中可能存在训练损失较高或泛化误差较大的问题，同时深层结构易受梯度消失影响，需一种简单有效的方法改进性能。
method: 设计ReDense层，利用ReLU的无损流特性（LFP）和浅层结构避免梯度消失，通过随机权重与ReLU结合，将其添加至预训练网络中以降低损失。
result: 实验表明ReDense能提升多种网络架构在不同优化目标和激活函数下的性能，并在基准数据集上验证了其有效性。
conclusion: ReDense通过简单结构有效降低训练损失并保持泛化能力，适用于多种神经网络架构和任务。
search_text: A ReLU Dense Layer to Improve the Performance of Neural Networks 用于提高神经网络性能的 ReLU 密集层 We propose ReDense as a simple and low complexity way to improve the performance of trained neural networks. We use a combination of random weights and rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation function to add a ReLU dense (ReDense) layer to the trained neural network such that it can achieve a lower training loss. The lossless flow property (LFP) of ReLU is the key to achieve the lower training loss while keeping the generalization error small. ReDense does not suffer from vanishing gradient problem in the training due to having a shallow structure. We experimentally show that ReDense can improve the training and testing performance of various neural network architectures with different optimization loss and activation functions. Finally, we test ReDense on some of the state-of-the-art architectures and show the performance improvement on benchmark datasets. 我们提出 ReDense 作为一种简单且低复杂性的方法来提高经过训练的神经网络的性能。我们使用随机权重和修正线性单元（ReLU）激活函数的组合，在训练的神经网络中添加一个ReLU密集（ReDense）层，使其能够实现较低的训练损失。 ReLU 的无损流特性（LFP）是实现较低训练损失同时保持较小泛化误差的关键。由于结构较浅，ReDense 在训练中不会出现梯度消失问题。我们通过实验证明，ReDense 可以提高具有不同优化损失和激活函数的各种神经网络架构的训练和测试性能。最后，我们在一些最先进的架构上测试 ReDense，并展示基准数据集上的性能改进。 本文提出一种名为ReDense的ReLU密集层，通过结合随机权重和ReLU激活函数，以提升神经网络的训练和测试性能。 Alireza M. Javid,Sandipan Das,Mikael Skoglund,Saikat Chatterjee cs.LG,cs.CV

title: POMDP Manipulation Planning under Object Composition Uncertainty
title_zh: 对象组合不确定性下的POMDP操纵规划
abstract: Manipulating unknown objects in a cluttered environment is difficult because segmentation of the scene into objects, that is, object composition is uncertain. Due to this uncertainty, earlier work has concentrated on either identifying the "best" object composition and deciding on manipulation actions accordingly, or, tried to greedily gather information about the "best" object composition. Contrary to earlier work, we 1) utilize different possible object compositions in planning, 2) take advantage of object composition information provided by robot actions, 3) take into account the effect of different competing object hypotheses on the actual task to be performed. We cast the manipulation planning problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) which plans over possible hypotheses of object compositions. The POMDP model chooses the action that maximizes the long-term expected task specific utility, and while doing so, considers the value of informative actions and the effect of different object hypotheses on the completion of the task. In simulations and in experiments with an RGB-D sensor, a Kinova Jaco and a Franka Emika Panda robot arm, a probabilistic approach outperforms an approach that only considers the most likely object composition and long term planning outperforms greedy decision making.
summary: Manipulating unknown objects in a cluttered environment is difficult because segmentation of the scene into objects, that is, object composition is uncertain. Due to this uncertainty, earlier work has concentrated on either identifying the "best" object composition and deciding on manipulation actions accordingly, or, tried to greedily gather information about the "best" object composition. Contrary to earlier work, we 1) utilize different possible object compositions in planning, 2) take advantage of object composition information provided by robot actions, 3) take into account the effect of different competing object hypotheses on the actual task to be performed. We cast the manipulation planning problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) which plans over possible hypotheses of object compositions. The POMDP model chooses the action that maximizes the long-term expected task specific utility, and while doing so, considers the value of informative actions and the effect of different object hypotheses on the completion of the task. In simulations and in experiments with an RGB-D sensor, a Kinova Jaco and a Franka Emika Panda robot arm, a probabilistic approach outperforms an approach that only considers the most likely object composition and long term planning outperforms greedy decision making.
abstract_zh: 在杂乱的环境中操作未知对象是很困难的，因为将场景分割成对象，即对象组合是不确定的。由于这种不确定性，早期的工作集中在识别“最佳”对象组合并相应地决定操纵操作，或者尝试贪婪地收集有关“最佳”对象组合的信息。与早期的工作相反，我们 1）在规划中利用不同的可能的对象组合，2）利用机器人动作提供的对象组合信息，3）考虑不同竞争对象假设对要执行的实际任务的影响。我们将操作规划问题视为部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），该过程对对象组合的可能假设进行规划。 POMDP模型选择使长期预期任务特定效用最大化的动作，同时考虑信息性动作的价值以及不同对象假设对任务完成的影响。在使用 RGB-D 传感器、Kinova Jaco 和 Franka Emika Panda 机器人手臂进行的模拟和实验中，概率方法优于仅考虑最可能的对象组成的方法，并且长期规划优于贪婪决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的机械臂操作规划方法，用于解决在物体组成不确定的杂乱环境中操作未知物体的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法要么选择最可能的物体组成进行操作，要么通过贪婪策略收集信息，但无法有效处理物体组成不确定性对任务执行的影响。
AI.method: 将操作规划建模为POMDP，通过考虑多种可能的物体组成假设，结合机器人动作提供的信息，并量化不同假设对任务完成的影响，实现长期效用最大化规划。
AI.result: 仿真和实验证明，该概率方法优于仅考虑最可能物体组成的方法，且长期规划策略优于贪心决策。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合多假设信息并考虑长期任务效用，该方法在物体组成不确定场景下显著提升了机械臂操作的鲁棒性和任务成功率。

title: A Computer Science-Oriented Approach to Introduce Quantum Computing to a New Audience
title_zh: 以计算机科学为导向的方法向新受众介绍量子计算
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Education
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Education
abstract: Contribution: In this study, an alternative educational approach for introducing quantum computing to a wider audience is highlighted. The proposed methodology considers quantum computing as a generalized probability theory rather than a field emanating from physics and utilizes quantum programming as an educational tool to reinforce the learning process. Background: Quantum computing is a topic mainly rooted in physics, and it has been gaining rapid popularity in recent years. A need for extending the educational reach to groups outside of physics has also been becoming a necessity. Intended outcomes: This study aims to inform academics and organizations interested in introducing quantum computing to a diverse group of participants on an educational approach. It is intended that the proposed methodology would facilitate people from diverse backgrounds to enter the field Application design: The introductory quantum physics content is bypassed and the quantum computing concepts are introduced through linear algebra instead. Quantum programming tasks are prepared in line with the content. Pre/post-test design method and Likert scale satisfaction surveys are utilized to measure knowledge acquisition and to evaluate the perception of the learning process by the participants. Findings: Conducted pre/post-test design survey shows that there is a statistically significant increase in the basic knowledge levels of the participants on quantum computing concepts. Furthermore, no significant difference in the gain scores is observed between the participants from different STEM-related educational backgrounds. The majority of the participants were satisfied and provided positive feedback.

abstract_zh: 贡献：在这项研究中，强调了向更广泛的受众介绍量子计算的另一种教育方法。所提出的方法将量子计算视为广义概率论，而不是源自物理学的领域，并利用量子编程作为强化学习过程的教育工具。背景：量子计算是一个主要源于物理学的话题，近年来迅速普及。将教育范围扩大到物理学以外的群体的需要也已成为必要。预期成果：本研究旨在向有兴趣通过教育方法向不同参与者群体介绍量子计算的学者和组织提供信息。所提出的方法旨在促进来自不同背景的人们进入该领域应用设计：绕过介绍性量子物理内容，而是通过线性代数引入量子计算概念。根据内容准备量子编程任务。利用前/后测试设计方法和李克特量表满意度调查来衡量知识获取并评估参与者对学习过程的感知。结果：进行的测试前/测试后设计调查显示，参与者对量子计算概念的基础知识水平在统计上显着提高。此外，来自不同 STEM 相关教育背景的参与者之间的增益分数没有显着差异。大多数参与者感到满意并提供了积极的反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向计算机科学的量子计算教学方法，以吸引更广泛的受众。
AI.motivation: 量子计算主要源于物理学，但随着其受欢迎程度的上升，需要一种更广泛的教育方法，以吸引非物理背景的学习者。
AI.method: 该研究跳过量子物理的基础内容，通过线性代数介绍量子计算概念，并结合量子编程任务，使用前后测试和满意度调查来评估学习效果。
AI.result: 结果显示，参与者在量子计算基础知识上的掌握有显著提升，且不同STEM背景的学习者之间没有显著差异，大多数参与者表示满意并给予积极反馈。
AI.conclusion: 这种基于计算机科学的教学方法能够有效帮助不同背景的学习者掌握量子计算概念，具有广泛的应用前景。

The majority of the participants were satisfied and provided positive feedback. 贡献：在这项研究中，强调了向更广泛的受众介绍量子计算的另一种教育方法。所提出的方法将量子计算视为广义概率论，而不是源自物理学的领域，并利用量子编程作为强化学习过程的教育工具。背景：量子计算是一个主要源于物理学的话题，近年来迅速普及。将教育范围扩大到物理学以外的群体的需要也已成为必要。预期成果：本研究旨在向有兴趣通过教育方法向不同参与者群体介绍量子计算的学者和组织提供信息。所提出的方法旨在促进来自不同背景的人们进入该领域应用设计：绕过介绍性量子物理内容，而是通过线性代数引入量子计算概念。根据内容准备量子编程任务。利用前/后测试设计方法和李克特量表满意度调查来衡量知识获取并评估参与者对学习过程的感知。结果：进行的测试前/测试后设计调查显示，参与者对量子计算概念的基础知识水平在统计上显着提高。此外，来自不同 STEM 相关教育背景的参与者之间的增益分数没有显着差异。大多数参与者感到满意并提供了积极的反馈。 本文提出了一种面向计算机科学的量子计算教学方法，以吸引更广泛的受众。 Özlem Salehi,Zeki Seskir,İlknur Tepe physics.ed-ph,cs.CY,cs.ET,quant-ph

authors_text: Hao Tang,Zhiao Huang,Jiayuan Gu,Bao-Liang Lu,Hao Su
title: Towards Scale-Invariant Graph-related Problem Solving by Iterative Homogeneous Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过迭代同构图神经网络解决尺度不变图相关问题
abstract: Current graph neural networks (GNNs) lack generalizability with respect to scales (graph sizes, graph diameters, edge weights, etc..) when solving many graph analysis problems. Taking the perspective of synthesizing graph theory programs, we propose several extensions to address the issue. First, inspired by the dependency of the iteration number of common graph theory algorithms on graph size, we learn to terminate the message passing process in GNNs adaptively according to the computation progress. Second, inspired by the fact that many graph theory algorithms are homogeneous with respect to graph weights, we introduce homogeneous transformation layers that are universal homogeneous function approximators, to convert ordinary GNNs to be homogeneous. Experimentally, we show that our GNN can be trained from small-scale graphs but generalize well to large-scale graphs for a number of basic graph theory problems. It also shows generalizability for applications of multi-body physical simulation and image-based navigation problems.
summary: Current graph neural networks (GNNs) lack generalizability with respect to scales (graph sizes, graph diameters, edge weights, etc..) when solving many graph analysis problems. Taking the perspective of synthesizing graph theory programs, we propose several extensions to address the issue. First, inspired by the dependency of the iteration number of common graph theory algorithms on graph size, we learn to terminate the message passing process in GNNs adaptively according to the computation progress. Second, inspired by the fact that many graph theory algorithms are homogeneous with respect to graph weights, we introduce homogeneous transformation layers that are universal homogeneous function approximators, to convert ordinary GNNs to be homogeneous. Experimentally, we show that our GNN can be trained from small-scale graphs but generalize well to large-scale graphs for a number of basic graph theory problems. It also shows generalizability for applications of multi-body physical simulation and image-based navigation problems.
abstract_zh: 当前的图神经网络（GNN）在解决许多图分析问题时缺乏尺度（图大小、图直径、边权重等）的通用性。从综合图论程序的角度来看，我们提出了几种扩展来解决这个问题。首先，受到常见图论算法迭代次数对图大小依赖性的启发，我们学习根据计算进度自适应地终止 GNN 中的消息传递过程。其次，受到许多图论算法在图权重方面是同构这一事实的启发，我们引入了同质变换层，它们是通用齐次函数逼近器，将普通 GNN 转换为齐次。实验表明，我们的 GNN 可以从小规模图进行训练，但对于许多基本图论问题可以很好地推广到大规模图。它还显示了多体物理模拟和基于图像的导航问题的应用的普适性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过迭代同质图神经网络解决图相关问题的尺度不变性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在处理不同规模图（如大小、直径、边权重）时泛化能力不足，需提升其跨尺度适应性。
AI.method: 提出两种改进：1) 根据计算进度自适应终止消息传递；2) 引入同质变换层使GNN具备权重同质性。
AI.result: 模型在小规模图训练后可泛化至大规模图，且适用于多体物理模拟和图像导航任务。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效增强GNN的尺度不变性，拓展了其在复杂问题中的应用潜力。

title: Contrastive Unsupervised Learning for Audio Fingerprinting
title_zh: 音频指纹的对比无监督学习
abstract: The rise of video-sharing platforms has attracted more and more people to shoot videos and upload them to the Internet. These videos mostly contain a carefully-edited background audio track, where serious speech change, pitch shifting and various types of audio effects may involve, and existing audio identification systems may fail to recognize the audio. To solve this problem, in this paper, we introduce the idea of contrastive learning to the task of audio fingerprinting (AFP). Contrastive learning is an unsupervised approach to learn representations that can effectively group similar samples and discriminate dissimilar ones. In our work, we consider an audio track and its differently distorted versions as similar while considering different audio tracks as dissimilar. Based on the momentum contrast (MoCo) framework, we devise a contrastive learning method for AFP, which can generate fingerprints that are both discriminative and robust. A set of experiments showed that our AFP method is effective for audio identification, with robustness to serious audio distortions, including the challenging speed change and pitch shifting.
summary: The rise of video-sharing platforms has attracted more and more people to shoot videos and upload them to the Internet. These videos mostly contain a carefully-edited background audio track, where serious speech change, pitch shifting and various types of audio effects may involve, and existing audio identification systems may fail to recognize the audio. To solve this problem, in this paper, we introduce the idea of contrastive learning to the task of audio fingerprinting (AFP). Contrastive learning is an unsupervised approach to learn representations that can effectively group similar samples and discriminate dissimilar ones. In our work, we consider an audio track and its differently distorted versions as similar while considering different audio tracks as dissimilar. Based on the momentum contrast (MoCo) framework, we devise a contrastive learning method for AFP, which can generate fingerprints that are both discriminative and robust. A set of experiments showed that our AFP method is effective for audio identification, with robustness to serious audio distortions, including the challenging speed change and pitch shifting.
abstract_zh: 视频分享平台的兴起吸引了越来越多的人拍摄视频并将其上传到互联网。这些视频大多包含经过精心编辑的背景音轨，其中可能涉及严重的语音变化、音调变化和各种类型的音频效果，现有的音频识别系统可能无法识别音频。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们将对比学习的思想引入到音频指纹（AFP）任务中。对比学习是一种无监督的学习表示方法，可以有效地将相似的样本分组并区分不同的样本。在我们的工作中，我们将音轨及其不同失真的版本视为相似，而将不同的音轨视为不相似。基于动量对比（MoCo）框架，我们设计了一种 AFP 对比学习方法，它可以生成具有辨别力和鲁棒性的指纹。一组实验表明，我们的 AFP 方法对于音频识别是有效的，并且对严重的音频失真具有鲁棒性，包括具有挑战性的速度变化和音调变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的无监督音频指纹方法，以应对视频平台中经过编辑的音频轨道带来的识别挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有音频识别系统难以处理包含语音变化、音高偏移和多种音频效果的编辑音频，导致识别失败。
AI.method: 基于动量对比（MoCo）框架，将同一音频的不同失真版本视为相似样本，不同音频视为不同样本，设计对比学习方法生成鲁棒指纹。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在严重音频失真（如速度变化和音高偏移）下仍具有较高的识别准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习有效提升了音频指纹的判别能力和抗干扰性能，为复杂场景下的音频识别提供了新思路。

title: Lyapunov-Based Reinforcement Learning State Estimator
title_zh: 基于李亚普诺夫的强化学习状态估计器
abstract: In this paper, we consider the state estimation problem for nonlinear stochastic discrete-time systems. We combine Lyapunov's method in control theory and deep reinforcement learning to design the state estimator. We theoretically prove the convergence of the bounded estimate error solely using the data simulated from the model. An actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm is proposed to learn the state estimator approximated by a deep neural network. The convergence of the algorithm is analysed. The proposed Lyapunov-based reinforcement learning state estimator is compared with a number of existing nonlinear filtering methods through Monte Carlo simulations, showing its advantage in terms of estimate convergence even under some system uncertainties such as covariance shift in system noise and randomly missing measurements. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first reinforcement learning based nonlinear state estimator with bounded estimate error performance guarantee.
summary: In this paper, we consider the state estimation problem for nonlinear stochastic discrete-time systems. We combine Lyapunov's method in control theory and deep reinforcement learning to design the state estimator. We theoretically prove the convergence of the bounded estimate error solely using the data simulated from the model. An actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm is proposed to learn the state estimator approximated by a deep neural network. The convergence of the algorithm is analysed. The proposed Lyapunov-based reinforcement learning state estimator is compared with a number of existing nonlinear filtering methods through Monte Carlo simulations, showing its advantage in terms of estimate convergence even under some system uncertainties such as covariance shift in system noise and randomly missing measurements. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first reinforcement learning based nonlinear state estimator with bounded estimate error performance guarantee.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑非线性随机离散时间系统的状态估计问题。我们结合控制理论中的李亚普诺夫方法和深度强化学习来设计状态估计器。我们仅使用模型模拟的数据从理论上证明了有界估计误差的收敛性。提出了一种演员批评家强化学习算法来学习由深度神经网络近似的状态估计器。分析了算法的收敛性。通过蒙特卡罗模拟将所提出的基于李雅普诺夫的强化学习状态估计器与许多现有的非线性滤波方法进行比较，显示出即使在系统噪声中的协方差漂移和随机丢失测量等系统不确定性下，其在估计收敛方面也具有优势。据我们所知，这是第一个基于强化学习的非线性状态估计器，具有有界估计误差性能保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Lyapunov方法与深度强化学习的非线性系统状态估计器，解决离散时间随机系统的估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性滤波方法在系统噪声协方差变化或存在随机缺失测量时，难以保证估计误差的收敛性与稳定性。
AI.method: 设计基于Lyapunov理论的Actor-Critic强化学习框架，利用深度神经网络近似状态估计器，并通过理论分析证明仅依赖模型数据即可实现有界估计误差收敛。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛仿真表明，该估计器在系统不确定性（如噪声协方差偏移、随机缺失测量）下较现有方法具有更优的估计收敛性能。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出具有理论保证的强化学习非线性状态估计器，其估计误差收敛性在系统不确定性下仍可保持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Lyapunov方法与深度强化学习的非线性系统状态估计器，解决离散时间随机系统的估计问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有非线性滤波方法在系统噪声协方差变化或存在随机缺失测量时，难以保证估计误差的收敛性与稳定性。

search_text: Lyapunov-Based Reinforcement Learning State Estimator 基于李亚普诺夫的强化学习状态估计器 In this paper, we consider the state estimation problem for nonlinear stochastic discrete-time systems. We combine Lyapunov's method in control theory and deep reinforcement learning to design the state estimator. We theoretically prove the convergence of the bounded estimate error solely using the data simulated from the model. An actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm is proposed to learn the state estimator approximated by a deep neural network. The convergence of the algorithm is analysed. The proposed Lyapunov-based reinforcement learning state estimator is compared with a number of existing nonlinear filtering methods through Monte Carlo simulations, showing its advantage in terms of estimate convergence even under some system uncertainties such as covariance shift in system noise and randomly missing measurements. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first reinforcement learning based nonlinear state estimator with bounded estimate error performance guarantee. 在本文中，我们考虑非线性随机离散时间系统的状态估计问题。我们结合控制理论中的李亚普诺夫方法和深度强化学习来设计状态估计器。我们仅使用模型模拟的数据从理论上证明了有界估计误差的收敛性。提出了一种演员批评家强化学习算法来学习由深度神经网络近似的状态估计器。分析了算法的收敛性。通过蒙特卡罗模拟将所提出的基于李雅普诺夫的强化学习状态估计器与许多现有的非线性滤波方法进行比较，显示出即使在系统噪声中的协方差漂移和随机丢失测量等系统不确定性下，其在估计收敛方面也具有优势。据我们所知，这是第一个基于强化学习的非线性状态估计器，具有有界估计误差性能保证。 本文提出一种结合Lyapunov方法与深度强化学习的非线性系统状态估计器，解决离散时间随机系统的估计问题。 Liang Hu,Chengwei Wu,Wei Pan cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Robust Disentanglement of a Few Factors at a Time
title_zh: 一次强力解开几个因素
comment: The first two authors contributed equally. Code is available at this url https://github.com/besterma/robust_disentanglement
comments: The first two authors contributed equally. Code is available at this url https://github.com/besterma/robust_disentanglement
abstract: Disentanglement is at the forefront of unsupervised learning, as disentangled representations of data improve generalization, interpretability, and performance in downstream tasks. Current unsupervised approaches remain inapplicable for real-world datasets since they are highly variable in their performance and fail to reach levels of disentanglement of (semi-)supervised approaches. We introduce population-based training (PBT) for improving consistency in training variational autoencoders (VAEs) and demonstrate the validity of this approach in a supervised setting (PBT-VAE). We then use Unsupervised Disentanglement Ranking (UDR) as an unsupervised heuristic to score models in our PBT-VAE training and show how models trained this way tend to consistently disentangle only a subset of the generative factors. Building on top of this observation we introduce the recursive rPU-VAE approach. We train the model until convergence, remove the learned factors from the dataset and reiterate. In doing so, we can label subsets of the dataset with the learned factors and consecutively use these labels to train one model that fully disentangles the whole dataset. With this approach, we show striking improvement in state-of-the-art unsupervised disentanglement performance and robustness across multiple datasets and metrics.
summary: Disentanglement is at the forefront of unsupervised learning, as disentangled representations of data improve generalization, interpretability, and performance in downstream tasks. Current unsupervised approaches remain inapplicable for real-world datasets since they are highly variable in their performance and fail to reach levels of disentanglement of (semi-)supervised approaches. We introduce population-based training (PBT) for improving consistency in training variational autoencoders (VAEs) and demonstrate the validity of this approach in a supervised setting (PBT-VAE). We then use Unsupervised Disentanglement Ranking (UDR) as an unsupervised heuristic to score models in our PBT-VAE training and show how models trained this way tend to consistently disentangle only a subset of the generative factors. Building on top of this observation we introduce the recursive rPU-VAE approach. We train the model until convergence, remove the learned factors from the dataset and reiterate. In doing so, we can label subsets of the dataset with the learned factors and consecutively use these labels to train one model that fully disentangles the whole dataset. With this approach, we show striking improvement in state-of-the-art unsupervised disentanglement performance and robustness across multiple datasets and metrics.
abstract_zh: 解缠结处于无监督学习的最前沿，因为数据的解缠结表示提高了下游任务的泛化性、可解释性和性能。当前的无监督方法仍然不适用于现实世界的数据集，因为它们的性能变化很大，并且无法达到（半）监督方法的解缠水平。我们引入基于群体的训练（PBT）来提高训练变分自动编码器（VAE）的一致性，并证明了这种方法在监督环境（PBT-VAE）中的有效性。然后，我们使用无监督解缠排序 (UDR) 作为无监督启发式方法对 PBT-VAE 训练中的模型进行评分，并展示以这种方式训练的模型如何倾向于始终解缠生成因子的子集。在此观察的基础上，我们引入了递归 rPU-VAE 方法。我们训练模型直到收敛，从数据集中删除学习的因素并重复。在此过程中，我们可以使用学习到的因素标记数据集的子集，并连续使用这些标签来训练一个完全解开整个数据集的模型。通过这种方法，我们在多个数据集和指标上展示了最先进的无监督解缠性能和鲁棒性的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过递归训练逐步分离数据生成因素的无监督解耦方法，以提高变分自编码器（VAE）的鲁棒性和性能。
AI.motivation: 当前无监督解耦方法在真实数据集上表现不稳定，难以达到半监督方法的解耦效果，需改进训练一致性与解耦能力。
AI.method: 引入基于种群的训练（PBT）优化VAE，并结合无监督解耦排序（UDR）评估模型；通过递归移除已学习因素并重新训练（rPU-VAE），逐步完成全数据集的解耦。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和指标上，该方法显著提升了无监督解耦性能与鲁棒性，实现了对数据生成因素的完整分离。
AI.conclusion: 递归式rPU-VAE方法通过分阶段解耦策略，有效解决了无监督学习中解耦不彻底与训练不稳定性问题。

title: A Novel Machine Learning Method for Preference Identification
title_zh: 一种用于偏好识别的新型机器学习方法
comment: 16 pages, 3 figure, 6 tables. Full version: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08P2RW9Q8
comments: 16 pages, 3 figure, 6 tables. Full version: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08P2RW9Q8
abstract: Human preference or taste within any domain is usually a difficult thing to identify or predict with high probability. In the domain of chess problem composition, the same is true. Traditional machine learning approaches tend to focus on the ability of computers to process massive amounts of data and continuously adjust 'weights' within an artificial neural network to better distinguish between say, two groups of objects. Contrasted with chess compositions, there is no clear distinction between what constitutes one and what does not; even less so between a good one and a poor one. We propose a computational method that is able to learn from existing databases of 'liked' and 'disliked' compositions such that a new and unseen collection can be sorted with increased probability of matching a solver's preferences. The method uses a simple 'change factor' relating to the Forsyth-Edwards Notation (FEN) of each composition's starting position, coupled with repeated statistical analysis of sample pairs from both databases. Tested using the author's own collections of computer-generated chess problems, the experimental results showed that the method was able to sort a new and unseen collection of compositions such that, on average, over 70% of the preferred compositions were in the top half of the collection. This saves significant time and energy on the part of solvers as they are likely to find more of what they like sooner. The method may even be applicable to other domains such as image processing because it does not rely on any chess-specific rules but rather just a sufficient and quantifiable 'change' in representation from one object to the next.
summary: Human preference or taste within any domain is usually a difficult thing to identify or predict with high probability. In the domain of chess problem composition, the same is true. Traditional machine learning approaches tend to focus on the ability of computers to process massive amounts of data and continuously adjust 'weights' within an artificial neural network to better distinguish between say, two groups of objects. Contrasted with chess compositions, there is no clear distinction between what constitutes one and what does not; even less so between a good one and a poor one. We propose a computational method that is able to learn from existing databases of 'liked' and 'disliked' compositions such that a new and unseen collection can be sorted with increased probability of matching a solver's preferences. The method uses a simple 'change factor' relating to the Forsyth-Edwards Notation (FEN) of each composition's starting position, coupled with repeated statistical analysis of sample pairs from both databases. Tested using the author's own collections of computer-generated chess problems, the experimental results showed that the method was able to sort a new and unseen collection of compositions such that, on average, over 70% of the preferred compositions were in the top half of the collection. This saves significant time and energy on the part of solvers as they are likely to find more of what they like sooner. The method may even be applicable to other domains such as image processing because it does not rely on any chess-specific rules but rather just a sufficient and quantifiable 'change' in representation from one object to the next.
abstract_zh: 在任何领域内，人类的偏好或品味通常都是很难识别或预测的。在国际象棋问题合成领域，也是如此。传统的机器学习方法倾向于关注计算机处理大量数据并在人工神经网络中不断调整“权重”的能力，以更好地区分两组对象。与国际象棋棋子相比，什么是“一”和什么不是“一”并没有明显的区别；好人与差人之间更是如此。我们提出了一种计算方法，能够从现有的“喜欢”和“不喜欢”的作品数据库中学习，从而可以对新的和未见过的集合进行排序，并提高匹配求解器偏好的概率。该方法使用与每个组合的起始位置的福赛斯-爱德华兹符号（FEN）相关的简单“变化因子”，并结合来自两个数据库的样本对的重复统计分析。使用作者自己的计算机生成的国际象棋问题集进行测试，实验结果表明，该方法能够对新的、未见过的构图集合进行排序，使得平均超过 70% 的首选构图位于该集合的上半部分。这可以为求解者节省大量时间和精力，因为他们可能会更快找到更多他们喜欢的东西。该方法甚至可以适用于其他领域，例如图像处理，因为它不依赖于任何国际象棋特定规则，而只是从一个对象到下一个对象的表示的充分且可量化的“变化”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型机器学习方法，用于识别人类在国际象棋问题创作领域的偏好，并通过量化分析实现对新作品的高效排序。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法难以准确区分国际象棋问题创作中'优质'与'劣质'作品，且缺乏明确的分类标准，导致人工筛选效率低下。
AI.method: 基于Forsyth-Edwards Notation(FEN)的'变化因子'计算，结合'喜欢'与'不喜欢'数据库的样本配对统计分析，建立偏好排序模型。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法可使新作品集合中70%以上用户偏好的作品进入排序前50%，显著提升筛选效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过量化表征变化特征实现偏好识别，无需依赖领域规则，具有跨领域应用潜力，如图像处理等场景。

search_text: A Novel Machine Learning Method for Preference Identification 一种用于偏好识别的新型机器学习方法 Human preference or taste within any domain is usually a difficult thing to identify or predict with high probability. In the domain of chess problem composition, the same is true. Traditional machine learning approaches tend to focus on the ability of computers to process massive amounts of data and continuously adjust 'weights' within an artificial neural network to better distinguish between say, two groups of objects. Contrasted with chess compositions, there is no clear distinction between what constitutes one and what does not; even less so between a good one and a poor one. We propose a computational method that is able to learn from existing databases of 'liked' and 'disliked' compositions such that a new and unseen collection can be sorted with increased probability of matching a solver's preferences. The method uses a simple 'change factor' relating to the Forsyth-Edwards Notation (FEN) of each composition's starting position, coupled with repeated statistical analysis of sample pairs from both databases. Tested using the author's own collections of computer-generated chess problems, the experimental results showed that the method was able to sort a new and unseen collection of compositions such that, on average, over 70% of the preferred compositions were in the top half of the collection. This saves significant time and energy on the part of solvers as they are likely to find more of what they like sooner. The method may even be applicable to other domains such as image processing because it does not rely on any chess-specific rules but rather just a sufficient and quantifiable 'change' in representation from one object to the next. 在任何领域内，人类的偏好或品味通常都是很难识别或预测的。在国际象棋问题合成领域，也是如此。传统的机器学习方法倾向于关注计算机处理大量数据并在人工神经网络中不断调整“权重”的能力，以更好地区分两组对象。与国际象棋棋子相比，什么是“一”和什么不是“一”并没有明显的区别；好人与差人之间更是如此。我们提出了一种计算方法，能够从现有的“喜欢”和“不喜欢”的作品数据库中学习，从而可以对新的和未见过的集合进行排序，并提高匹配求解器偏好的概率。该方法使用与每个组合的起始位置的福赛斯-爱德华兹符号（FEN）相关的简单“变化因子”，并结合来自两个数据库的样本对的重复统计分析。使用作者自己的计算机生成的国际象棋问题集进行测试，实验结果表明，该方法能够对新的、未见过的构图集合进行排序，使得平均超过 70% 的首选构图位于该集合的上半部分。这可以为求解者节省大量时间和精力，因为他们可能会更快找到更多他们喜欢的东西。该方法甚至可以适用于其他领域，例如图像处理，因为它不依赖于任何国际象棋特定规则，而只是从一个对象到下一个对象的表示的充分且可量化的“变化”。 本文提出一种新型机器学习方法，用于识别人类在国际象棋问题创作领域的偏好，并通过量化分析实现对新作品的高效排序。 Azlan Iqbal cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Alexandre Saint,Anis Kacem,Kseniya Cherenkova,Konstantinos Papadopoulos,Julian Chibane,Gerard Pons-Moll,Gleb Gusev,David Fofi,Djamila Aouada,Bjorn Ottersten
title: SHARP 2020: The 1st Shape Recovery from Partial Textured 3D Scans Challenge Results
title_zh: SHARP 2020：第一届部分纹理 3D 扫描形状恢复挑战结果
abstract: The SHApe Recovery from Partial textured 3D scans challenge, SHARP 2020, is the first edition of a challenge fostering and benchmarking methods for recovering complete textured 3D scans from raw incomplete data. SHARP 2020 is organised as a workshop in conjunction with ECCV 2020. There are two complementary challenges, the first one on 3D human scans, and the second one on generic objects. Challenge 1 is further split into two tracks, focusing, first, on large body and clothing regions, and, second, on fine body details. A novel evaluation metric is proposed to quantify jointly the shape reconstruction, the texture reconstruction and the amount of completed data. Additionally, two unique datasets of 3D scans are proposed, to provide raw ground-truth data for the benchmarks. The datasets are released to the scientific community. Moreover, an accompanying custom library of software routines is also released to the scientific community. It allows for processing 3D scans, generating partial data and performing the evaluation. Results of the competition, analysed in comparison to baselines, show the validity of the proposed evaluation metrics, and highlight the challenging aspects of the task and of the datasets. Details on the SHARP 2020 challenge can be found at https://cvi2.uni.lu/sharp2020/.
summary: The SHApe Recovery from Partial textured 3D scans challenge, SHARP 2020, is the first edition of a challenge fostering and benchmarking methods for recovering complete textured 3D scans from raw incomplete data. SHARP 2020 is organised as a workshop in conjunction with ECCV 2020. There are two complementary challenges, the first one on 3D human scans, and the second one on generic objects. Challenge 1 is further split into two tracks, focusing, first, on large body and clothing regions, and, second, on fine body details. A novel evaluation metric is proposed to quantify jointly the shape reconstruction, the texture reconstruction and the amount of completed data. Additionally, two unique datasets of 3D scans are proposed, to provide raw ground-truth data for the benchmarks. The datasets are released to the scientific community. Moreover, an accompanying custom library of software routines is also released to the scientific community. It allows for processing 3D scans, generating partial data and performing the evaluation. Results of the competition, analysed in comparison to baselines, show the validity of the proposed evaluation metrics, and highlight the challenging aspects of the task and of the datasets. Details on the SHARP 2020 challenge can be found at https://cvi2.uni.lu/sharp2020/.
abstract_zh: 部分纹理 3D 扫描的 SHApe 恢复挑战赛 SHARP 2020 是从原始不完整数据恢复完整纹理 3D 扫描的挑战培养和基准测试方法的第一版。 SHARP 2020 是与 ECCV 2020 联合举办的研讨会。有两个互补的挑战，第一个是关于 3D 人体扫描的挑战，第二个是关于通用物体的挑战。挑战 1 进一步分为两个轨道，首先关注大的身体和服装区域，其次关注精细的身体细节。提出了一种新的评估指标来联合量化形状重建、纹理重建和完成的数据量。此外，还提出了两个独特的 3D 扫描数据集，为基准测试提供原始地面实况数据。数据集发布给科学界。此外，还向科学界发布了附带的定制软件例程库。它允许处理 3D 扫描、生成部分数据并执行评估。与基线进行比较分析的竞赛结果显示了所提出的评估指标的有效性，并强调了任务和数据集的挑战性方面。有关 SHARP 2020 挑战赛的详细信息，请访问 https://cvi2.uni.lu/sharp2020/。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SHARP 2020挑战赛，旨在通过不完整3D扫描数据恢复完整纹理3D模型，包含人体扫描和通用物体两个赛道，并提出新的评估指标与数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法在处理不完整数据时存在局限，需建立标准化基准测试方法与数据集以推动技术发展。
AI.method: 提出结合形状、纹理及数据补全量的综合评估指标，构建包含人体与通用物体的两个3D扫描数据集，并开发配套软件工具库支持数据处理与评估。
AI.result: 挑战赛结果验证了评估指标的有效性，揭示了任务难点与数据集复杂性，为后续研究提供基准参考。
AI.conclusion: SHARP 2020通过公开数据集、工具库及竞赛形式，推动了不完整3D扫描的纹理重建技术发展，明确了当前研究的关键挑战。
