authors_text: Xuelian Cheng,Yiran Zhong,Mehrtash Harandi,Yuchao Dai,Xiaojun Chang,Tom Drummond,Hongdong Li,Zongyuan Ge
title: Hierarchical Neural Architecture Search for Deep Stereo Matching
title_zh: 用于深度立体匹配的分层神经架构搜索
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020; Xuelian Cheng and Yiran Zhong made equal contribution
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020; Xuelian Cheng and Yiran Zhong made equal contribution
abstract: To reduce the human efforts in neural network design, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has been applied with remarkable success to various high-level vision tasks such as classification and semantic segmentation. The underlying idea for the NAS algorithm is straightforward, namely, to enable the network the ability to choose among a set of operations (e.g., convolution with different filter sizes), one is able to find an optimal architecture that is better adapted to the problem at hand. However, so far the success of NAS has not been enjoyed by low-level geometric vision tasks such as stereo matching. This is partly due to the fact that state-of-the-art deep stereo matching networks, designed by humans, are already sheer in size. Directly applying the NAS to such massive structures is computationally prohibitive based on the currently available mainstream computing resources. In this paper, we propose the first end-to-end hierarchical NAS framework for deep stereo matching by incorporating task-specific human knowledge into the neural architecture search framework. Specifically, following the gold standard pipeline for deep stereo matching (i.e., feature extraction -- feature volume construction and dense matching), we optimize the architectures of the entire pipeline jointly. Extensive experiments show that our searched network outperforms all state-of-the-art deep stereo matching architectures and is ranked at the top 1 accuracy on KITTI stereo 2012, 2015 and Middlebury benchmarks, as well as the top 1 on SceneFlow dataset with a substantial improvement on the size of the network and the speed of inference. The code is available at https://github.com/XuelianCheng/LEAStereo.
summary: To reduce the human efforts in neural network design, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has been applied with remarkable success to various high-level vision tasks such as classification and semantic segmentation. The underlying idea for the NAS algorithm is straightforward, namely, to enable the network the ability to choose among a set of operations (e.g., convolution with different filter sizes), one is able to find an optimal architecture that is better adapted to the problem at hand. However, so far the success of NAS has not been enjoyed by low-level geometric vision tasks such as stereo matching. This is partly due to the fact that state-of-the-art deep stereo matching networks, designed by humans, are already sheer in size. Directly applying the NAS to such massive structures is computationally prohibitive based on the currently available mainstream computing resources. In this paper, we propose the first end-to-end hierarchical NAS framework for deep stereo matching by incorporating task-specific human knowledge into the neural architecture search framework. Specifically, following the gold standard pipeline for deep stereo matching (i.e., feature extraction -- feature volume construction and dense matching), we optimize the architectures of the entire pipeline jointly. Extensive experiments show that our searched network outperforms all state-of-the-art deep stereo matching architectures and is ranked at the top 1 accuracy on KITTI stereo 2012, 2015 and Middlebury benchmarks, as well as the top 1 on SceneFlow dataset with a substantial improvement on the size of the network and the speed of inference. The code is available at https://github.com/XuelianCheng/LEAStereo.
abstract_zh: 为了减少人类在神经网络设计方面的工作量，神经架构搜索（NAS）已成功应用于各种高级视觉任务，例如分类和语义分割。 NAS 算法的基本思想很简单，即使网络能够在一组操作（例如，具有不同滤波器大小的卷积）中进行选择，从而能够找到更适合当前问题的最佳架构。然而，到目前为止，NAS 的成功还没有被立体匹配等低级几何视觉任务所享受。部分原因是由人类设计的最先进的深度立体匹配网络的规模已经非常庞大。基于目前可用的主流计算资源，将NAS直接应用于如此庞大的结构在计算上是令人望而却步的。在本文中，我们通过将特定任务的人类知识纳入神经架构搜索框架，提出了第一个用于深度立体匹配的端到端分层 NAS 框架。具体来说，遵循深度立体匹配的黄金标准管道（即特征提取——特征量构建和密集匹配），我们联合优化整个管道的架构。大量实验表明，我们的搜索网络优于所有最先进的深度立体匹配架构，在 KITTI Stereo 2012、2015 和 Middlebury 基准测试中排名第一，在 SceneFlow 数据集上排名第一，网络规模和推理速度都有显着改善。代码可在 https://github.com/XuelianCheng/LEAstereo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于深度立体匹配的分层神经网络架构搜索方法，通过结合任务特定的人类知识优化整个处理流程。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络架构搜索（NAS）在高层视觉任务中取得成功，但因现有立体匹配网络规模庞大，直接应用NAS计算成本过高，导致其在低层几何视觉任务中进展有限。
AI.method: 设计了一个端到端的分层NAS框架，沿用立体匹配的标准流程（特征提取-特征体构建-密集匹配），联合优化整个流水线的架构，并融入领域知识指导搜索过程。
AI.result: 所提网络在KITTI 2012/2015、Middlebury和SceneFlow基准测试中均位列第一，在网络规模和推理速度上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过将领域知识与NAS结合，有效解决了立体匹配任务中网络规模与性能的平衡问题，为低层视觉任务的自动化架构设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Hierarchical Neural Architecture Search for Deep Stereo Matching 用于深度立体匹配的分层神经架构搜索 To reduce the human efforts in neural network design, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has been applied with remarkable success to various high-level vision tasks such as classification and semantic segmentation. The underlying idea for the NAS algorithm is straightforward, namely, to enable the network the ability to choose among a set of operations (e.g., convolution with different filter sizes), one is able to find an optimal architecture that is better adapted to the problem at hand. However, so far the success of NAS has not been enjoyed by low-level geometric vision tasks such as stereo matching. This is partly due to the fact that state-of-the-art deep stereo matching networks, designed by humans, are already sheer in size. Directly applying the NAS to such massive structures is computationally prohibitive based on the currently available mainstream computing resources. In this paper, we propose the first end-to-end hierarchical NAS framework for deep stereo matching by incorporating task-specific human knowledge into the neural architecture search framework. Specifically, following the gold standard pipeline for deep stereo matching (i.e., feature extraction -- feature volume construction and dense matching), we optimize the architectures of the entire pipeline jointly. Extensive experiments show that our searched network outperforms all state-of-the-art deep stereo matching architectures and is ranked at the top 1 accuracy on KITTI stereo 2012, 2015 and Middlebury benchmarks, as well as the top 1 on SceneFlow dataset with a substantial improvement on the size of the network and the speed of inference. The code is available at https://github.com/XuelianCheng/LEAStereo. 为了减少人类在神经网络设计方面的工作量，神经架构搜索（NAS）已成功应用于各种高级视觉任务，例如分类和语义分割。 NAS 算法的基本思想很简单，即使网络能够在一组操作（例如，具有不同滤波器大小的卷积）中进行选择，从而能够找到更适合当前问题的最佳架构。然而，到目前为止，NAS 的成功还没有被立体匹配等低级几何视觉任务所享受。部分原因是由人类设计的最先进的深度立体匹配网络的规模已经非常庞大。基于目前可用的主流计算资源，将NAS直接应用于如此庞大的结构在计算上是令人望而却步的。在本文中，我们通过将特定任务的人类知识纳入神经架构搜索框架，提出了第一个用于深度立体匹配的端到端分层 NAS 框架。具体来说，遵循深度立体匹配的黄金标准管道（即特征提取——特征量构建和密集匹配），我们联合优化整个管道的架构。大量实验表明，我们的搜索网络优于所有最先进的深度立体匹配架构，在 KITTI Stereo 2012、2015 和 Middlebury 基准测试中排名第一，在 SceneFlow 数据集上排名第一，网络规模和推理速度都有显着改善。代码可在 https://github.com/XuelianCheng/LEAstereo 获取。 本文提出了一种用于深度立体匹配的分层神经网络架构搜索方法，通过结合任务特定的人类知识优化整个处理流程。 Xuelian Cheng,Yiran Zhong,Mehrtash Harandi,Yuchao Dai,Xiaojun Chang,Tom Drummond,Hongdong Li,Zongyuan Ge cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiyuan Wu,Hong Qi,Yu Jiang,Minghao Zhao,Chupeng Cui,Zongmin Yang,Xinhui Xue
title: Activation Map Adaptation for Effective Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 激活图适应有效的知识蒸馏
comment: This is my first paper, which is not well written
comments: This is my first paper, which is not well written
abstract: Model compression becomes a recent trend due to the requirement of deploying neural networks on embedded and mobile devices. Hence, both accuracy and efficiency are of critical importance. To explore a balance between them, a knowledge distillation strategy is proposed for general visual representation learning. It utilizes our well-designed activation map adaptive module to replace some blocks of the teacher network, exploring the most appropriate supervisory features adaptively during the training process. Using the teacher's hidden layer output to prompt the student network to train so as to transfer effective semantic information.To verify the effectiveness of our strategy, this paper applied our method to cifar-10 dataset. Results demonstrate that the method can boost the accuracy of the student network by 0.6% with 6.5% loss reduction, and significantly improve its training speed.
summary: Model compression becomes a recent trend due to the requirement of deploying neural networks on embedded and mobile devices. Hence, both accuracy and efficiency are of critical importance. To explore a balance between them, a knowledge distillation strategy is proposed for general visual representation learning. It utilizes our well-designed activation map adaptive module to replace some blocks of the teacher network, exploring the most appropriate supervisory features adaptively during the training process. Using the teacher's hidden layer output to prompt the student network to train so as to transfer effective semantic information.To verify the effectiveness of our strategy, this paper applied our method to cifar-10 dataset. Results demonstrate that the method can boost the accuracy of the student network by 0.6% with 6.5% loss reduction, and significantly improve its training speed.
abstract_zh: 由于在嵌入式和移动设备上部署神经网络的要求，模型压缩成为最近的趋势。因此，准确性和效率都至关重要。为了探索它们之间的平衡，提出了一种用于通用视觉表示学习的知识蒸馏策略。它利用我们精心设计的激活图自适应模块来替换教师网络的一些块，在训练过程中自适应地探索最合适的监督特征。利用教师的隐藏层输出来提示学生网络进行训练，从而传递有效的语义信息。为了验证我们的策略的有效性，本文将我们的方法应用于cifar-10数据集。结果表明，该方法可以将学生网络的准确率提高0.6%，损失降低6.5%，并显着提高其训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于激活图自适应模块的知识蒸馏策略，通过优化教师网络与学生网络间的特征传递，提升模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 在嵌入式和移动设备部署神经网络时，需平衡模型精度与计算效率，传统知识蒸馏方法难以自适应选择最优监督特征。
AI.method: 设计激活图自适应模块替换教师网络部分模块，在训练过程中动态选择最优监督特征，并利用教师网络隐藏层输出指导学生网络训练。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，学生网络准确率提升0.6%，损失减少6.5%，且训练速度显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 激活图自适应策略有效提升了知识蒸馏效果，在保持模型轻量化的同时提高了学生网络性能。

authors_text: Tom Eelbode,Jeroen Bertels,Maxim Berman,Dirk Vandermeulen,Frederik Maes,Raf Bisschops,Matthew B. Blaschko
title: Optimization for Medical Image Segmentation: Theory and Practice when evaluating with Dice Score or Jaccard Index
title_zh: 医学图像分割的优化：使用 Dice Score 或 Jaccard Index 进行评估时的理论与实践
comment: 15 pages, 14 figures, accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (2020)
comments: 15 pages, 14 figures, accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (2020)
abstract: In many medical imaging and classical computer vision tasks, the Dice score and Jaccard index are used to evaluate the segmentation performance. Despite the existence and great empirical success of metric-sensitive losses, i.e. relaxations of these metrics such as soft Dice, soft Jaccard and Lovasz-Softmax, many researchers still use per-pixel losses, such as (weighted) cross-entropy to train CNNs for segmentation. Therefore, the target metric is in many cases not directly optimized. We investigate from a theoretical perspective, the relation within the group of metric-sensitive loss functions and question the existence of an optimal weighting scheme for weighted cross-entropy to optimize the Dice score and Jaccard index at test time. We find that the Dice score and Jaccard index approximate each other relatively and absolutely, but we find no such approximation for a weighted Hamming similarity. For the Tversky loss, the approximation gets monotonically worse when deviating from the trivial weight setting where soft Tversky equals soft Dice. We verify these results empirically in an extensive validation on six medical segmentation tasks and can confirm that metric-sensitive losses are superior to cross-entropy based loss functions in case of evaluation with Dice Score or Jaccard Index. This further holds in a multi-class setting, and across different object sizes and foreground/background ratios. These results encourage a wider adoption of metric-sensitive loss functions for medical segmentation tasks where the performance measure of interest is the Dice score or Jaccard index.
summary: In many medical imaging and classical computer vision tasks, the Dice score and Jaccard index are used to evaluate the segmentation performance. Despite the existence and great empirical success of metric-sensitive losses, i.e. relaxations of these metrics such as soft Dice, soft Jaccard and Lovasz-Softmax, many researchers still use per-pixel losses, such as (weighted) cross-entropy to train CNNs for segmentation. Therefore, the target metric is in many cases not directly optimized. We investigate from a theoretical perspective, the relation within the group of metric-sensitive loss functions and question the existence of an optimal weighting scheme for weighted cross-entropy to optimize the Dice score and Jaccard index at test time. We find that the Dice score and Jaccard index approximate each other relatively and absolutely, but we find no such approximation for a weighted Hamming similarity. For the Tversky loss, the approximation gets monotonically worse when deviating from the trivial weight setting where soft Tversky equals soft Dice. We verify these results empirically in an extensive validation on six medical segmentation tasks and can confirm that metric-sensitive losses are superior to cross-entropy based loss functions in case of evaluation with Dice Score or Jaccard Index. This further holds in a multi-class setting, and across different object sizes and foreground/background ratios. These results encourage a wider adoption of metric-sensitive loss functions for medical segmentation tasks where the performance measure of interest is the Dice score or Jaccard index.
abstract_zh: 在许多医学成像和经典计算机视觉任务中，Dice评分和Jaccard指数用于评估分割性能。尽管度量敏感损失（即软 Dice、软 Jaccard 和 Lovasz-Softmax 等这些度量的放宽）存在并取得了巨大的经验成功，但许多研究人员仍然使用每像素损失（例如（加权）交叉熵）来训练 CNN 进行分割。因此，目标指标在许多情况下并未直接优化。我们从理论角度研究了度量敏感损失函数组内的关系，并质疑加权交叉熵的最佳加权方案是否存在，以在测试时优化 Dice 分数和 Jaccard 指数。我们发现 Dice 分数和 Jaccard 指数相对且绝对地彼此近似，但我们没有发现加权汉明相似度的这种近似。对于 Tversky 损失，当偏离软 Tversky 等于软 Dice 的微不足道的权重设置时，近似值会单调变差。我们通过对六个医学分割任务的广泛验证来验证这些结果，并且可以确认在使用 Dice Score 或 Jaccard Index 进行评估时，度量敏感损失优于基于交叉熵的损失函数。这进一步适用于多类设置以及不同的对象大小和前景/背景比率。这些结果鼓励在医疗分割任务中更广泛地采用度量敏感的损失函数，其中感兴趣的性能指标是 Dice 分数或 Jaccard 指数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在医学图像分割任务中，使用Dice分数或Jaccard指数作为评估指标时，度量敏感损失函数与交叉熵损失的优化关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在度量敏感损失（如软Dice、软Jaccard等），许多研究仍使用交叉熵损失训练分割网络，导致目标度量未被直接优化。作者旨在理论分析此类损失函数的关系，并验证其优化效果。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较度量敏感损失与加权交叉熵的关联性，并在六个医学分割任务中进行实验验证，评估不同损失函数在多类别、不同目标尺寸和前景/背景比例下的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，度量敏感损失在Dice分数和Jaccard指数评估下优于交叉熵损失；Tversky损失在偏离默认权重时逼近效果变差，且该结论在多类别场景中均成立。
AI.conclusion: 医学图像分割任务中，若以Dice分数或Jaccard指数为评估指标，应优先采用度量敏感损失函数以提升性能。

We verify these results empirically in an extensive validation on six medical segmentation tasks and can confirm that metric-sensitive losses are superior to cross-entropy based loss functions in case of evaluation with Dice Score or Jaccard Index. These results encourage a wider adoption of metric-sensitive loss functions for medical segmentation tasks where the performance measure of interest is the Dice score or Jaccard index. 在许多医学成像和经典计算机视觉任务中，Dice评分和Jaccard指数用于评估分割性能。尽管度量敏感损失（即软 Dice、软 Jaccard 和 Lovasz-Softmax 等这些度量的放宽）存在并取得了巨大的经验成功，但许多研究人员仍然使用每像素损失（例如（加权）交叉熵）来训练 CNN 进行分割。因此，目标指标在许多情况下并未直接优化。我们从理论角度研究了度量敏感损失函数组内的关系，并质疑加权交叉熵的最佳加权方案是否存在，以在测试时优化 Dice 分数和 Jaccard 指数。我们发现 Dice 分数和 Jaccard 指数相对且绝对地彼此近似，但我们没有发现加权汉明相似度的这种近似。对于 Tversky 损失，当偏离软 Tversky 等于软 Dice 的微不足道的权重设置时，近似值会单调变差。我们通过对六个医学分割任务的广泛验证来验证这些结果，并且可以确认在使用 Dice Score 或 Jaccard Index 进行评估时，度量敏感损失优于基于交叉熵的损失函数。这进一步适用于多类设置以及不同的对象大小和前景/背景比率。这些结果鼓励在医疗分割任务中更广泛地采用度量敏感的损失函数，其中感兴趣的性能指标是 Dice 分数或 Jaccard 指数。 本文研究了在医学图像分割任务中，使用Dice分数或Jaccard指数作为评估指标时，度量敏感损失函数与交叉熵损失的优化关系。 Tom Eelbode,Jeroen Bertels,Maxim Berman,Dirk Vandermeulen,Frederik Maes,Raf Bisschops,Matthew B. Blaschko eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: One-vs.-One Mitigation of Intersectional Bias: A General Method to Extend Fairness-Aware Binary Classification
title_zh: 交叉偏差的一对一缓解：扩展公平感知二元分类的通用方法
abstract: With the widespread adoption of machine learning in the real world, the impact of the discriminatory bias has attracted attention. In recent years, various methods to mitigate the bias have been proposed. However, most of them have not considered intersectional bias, which brings unfair situations where people belonging to specific subgroups of a protected group are treated worse when multiple sensitive attributes are taken into consideration. To mitigate this bias, in this paper, we propose a method called One-vs.-One Mitigation by applying a process of comparison between each pair of subgroups related to sensitive attributes to the fairness-aware machine learning for binary classification. We compare our method and the conventional fairness-aware binary classification methods in comprehensive settings using three approaches (pre-processing, in-processing, and post-processing), six metrics (the ratio and difference of demographic parity, equalized odds, and equal opportunity), and two real-world datasets (Adult and COMPAS). As a result, our method mitigates the intersectional bias much better than conventional methods in all the settings. With the result, we open up the potential of fairness-aware binary classification for solving more realistic problems occurring when there are multiple sensitive attributes.
summary: With the widespread adoption of machine learning in the real world, the impact of the discriminatory bias has attracted attention. In recent years, various methods to mitigate the bias have been proposed. However, most of them have not considered intersectional bias, which brings unfair situations where people belonging to specific subgroups of a protected group are treated worse when multiple sensitive attributes are taken into consideration. To mitigate this bias, in this paper, we propose a method called One-vs.-One Mitigation by applying a process of comparison between each pair of subgroups related to sensitive attributes to the fairness-aware machine learning for binary classification. We compare our method and the conventional fairness-aware binary classification methods in comprehensive settings using three approaches (pre-processing, in-processing, and post-processing), six metrics (the ratio and difference of demographic parity, equalized odds, and equal opportunity), and two real-world datasets (Adult and COMPAS). As a result, our method mitigates the intersectional bias much better than conventional methods in all the settings. With the result, we open up the potential of fairness-aware binary classification for solving more realistic problems occurring when there are multiple sensitive attributes.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习在现实世界中的广泛采用，歧视性偏见的影响引起了人们的关注。近年来，人们提出了各种减轻偏差的方法。然而，他们中的大多数都没有考虑交叉偏见，这会带来不公平的情况，即当考虑到多个敏感属性时，属于受保护群体的特定子群体的人会受到更糟糕的对待。为了减轻这种偏差，在本文中，我们提出了一种称为“一对一缓解”的方法，通过将与敏感属性相关的每对子组之间的比较过程应用于用于二元分类的公平感知机器学习。我们使用三种方法（预处理、处理中和后处理）、六个指标（人口均等的比率和差异、均等赔率和均等机会）和两个真实世界数据集（Adult 和 COMPAS），在综合设置中比较我们的方法和传统的公平感知二元分类方法。因此，我们的方法在所有设置中都比传统方法更好地减轻了交叉偏差。由此，我们开启了公平感知二元分类的潜力，可以解决存在多个敏感属性时出现的更现实的问题。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为One-vs.-One Mitigation的方法，用于缓解交叉偏差，扩展公平感知的二分类分类方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效处理多敏感属性下的交叉偏差，导致特定子群在多个敏感属性组合下遭受更严重的不公平对待。
AI.method: 通过比较每个敏感属性相关的子群对，应用到公平感知的二分类中，使用预处理、处理中和后处理三种方法进行比较。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在两种真实数据集和多种评估指标下，该方法比传统方法更有效缓解交叉偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了公平感知二分类在处理多敏感属性问题中的潜力，为实际应用提供了新思路。

title: VoteNet++: Registration Refinement for Multi-Atlas Segmentation
title_zh: VoteNet++：多图集分割的配准细化
abstract: Multi-atlas segmentation (MAS) is a popular image segmentation technique for medical images. In this work, we improve the performance of MAS by correcting registration errors before label fusion. Specifically, we use a volumetric displacement field to refine registrations based on image anatomical appearance and predicted labels. We show the influence of the initial spatial alignment as well as the beneficial effect of using label information for MAS performance. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed refinement approach improves MAS performance on a 3D magnetic resonance dataset of the knee.
summary: Multi-atlas segmentation (MAS) is a popular image segmentation technique for medical images. In this work, we improve the performance of MAS by correcting registration errors before label fusion. Specifically, we use a volumetric displacement field to refine registrations based on image anatomical appearance and predicted labels. We show the influence of the initial spatial alignment as well as the beneficial effect of using label information for MAS performance. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed refinement approach improves MAS performance on a 3D magnetic resonance dataset of the knee.
abstract_zh: 多图谱分割（MAS）是一种流行的医学图像图像分割技术。在这项工作中，我们通过在标签融合之前纠正配准错误来提高 MAS 的性能。具体来说，我们使用体积位移场根据图像解剖外观和预测标签来细化配准。我们展示了初始空间对齐的影响以及使用标签信息对 MAS 性能的有益影响。实验表明，所提出的细化方法提高了膝关节 3D 磁共振数据集上的 MAS 性能。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出VoteNet++方法，通过优化多图集分割中的配准过程来提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 多图集分割（MAS）的性能受初始配准误差影响较大，需通过改进配准精度来提升分割结果。
AI.method: 利用体积位移场结合图像解剖特征和预测标签信息，对初始配准结果进行细化优化。
AI.result: 在膝关节3D MRI数据集的实验中，该方法有效提升了多图集分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 配准优化对MAS性能有显著提升作用，结合标签信息的细化方法能有效改进分割结果。

title: High Acceleration Reinforcement Learning for Real-World Juggling with Binary Rewards
title_zh: 用于现实世界杂耍的二元奖励的高加速强化学习
comment: Published at Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2020
comments: Published at Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2020
abstract: Robots that can learn in the physical world will be important to en-able robots to escape their stiff and pre-programmed movements. For dynamic high-acceleration tasks, such as juggling, learning in the real-world is particularly challenging as one must push the limits of the robot and its actuation without harming the system, amplifying the necessity of sample efficiency and safety for robot learning algorithms. In contrast to prior work which mainly focuses on the learning algorithm, we propose a learning system, that directly incorporates these requirements in the design of the policy representation, initialization, and optimization. We demonstrate that this system enables the high-speed Barrett WAM manipulator to learn juggling two balls from 56 minutes of experience with a binary reward signal. The final policy juggles continuously for up to 33 minutes or about 4500 repeated catches. The videos documenting the learning process and the evaluation can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/jugglingbot
summary: Robots that can learn in the physical world will be important to en-able robots to escape their stiff and pre-programmed movements. For dynamic high-acceleration tasks, such as juggling, learning in the real-world is particularly challenging as one must push the limits of the robot and its actuation without harming the system, amplifying the necessity of sample efficiency and safety for robot learning algorithms. In contrast to prior work which mainly focuses on the learning algorithm, we propose a learning system, that directly incorporates these requirements in the design of the policy representation, initialization, and optimization. We demonstrate that this system enables the high-speed Barrett WAM manipulator to learn juggling two balls from 56 minutes of experience with a binary reward signal. The final policy juggles continuously for up to 33 minutes or about 4500 repeated catches. The videos documenting the learning process and the evaluation can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/jugglingbot
abstract_zh: 能够在物理世界中学习的机器人对于使机器人摆脱僵硬和预编程的运动非常重要。对于杂耍等动态高加速任务，现实世界中的学习尤其具有挑战性，因为必须在不损害系统的情况下突破机器人及其驱动的极限，从而增强了机器人学习算法的样本效率和安全性的必要性。与之前主要关注学习算法的工作相比，我们提出了一种学习系统，它将这些要求直接纳入策略表示、初始化和优化的设计中。我们证明，该系统使高速 Barrett WAM 机械手能够利用二进制奖励信号从 56 分钟的经验中学习杂耍两个球。最终的策略连续进行长达 33 分钟或约 4500 次重复捕获。记录学习过程和评估的视频可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/jugglingbot 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的强化学习系统，使机器人能在现实世界中使用二元奖励信号学习高速杂耍任务。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中高速动态任务（如杂耍）需要兼顾样本效率与安全性，传统算法难以满足这一需求。
AI.method: 设计融合策略表示、初始化和优化的综合学习系统，直接满足高加速任务对安全性和样本效率的要求。
AI.result: Barrett WAM机械臂通过56分钟训练实现连续33分钟杂耍（约4500次接球），验证了系统有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为现实世界高速机器人学习提供了新框架，展示了高效安全的强化学习在动态任务中的潜力。

search_text: High Acceleration Reinforcement Learning for Real-World Juggling with Binary Rewards 用于现实世界杂耍的二元奖励的高加速强化学习 Robots that can learn in the physical world will be important to en-able robots to escape their stiff and pre-programmed movements. For dynamic high-acceleration tasks, such as juggling, learning in the real-world is particularly challenging as one must push the limits of the robot and its actuation without harming the system, amplifying the necessity of sample efficiency and safety for robot learning algorithms. In contrast to prior work which mainly focuses on the learning algorithm, we propose a learning system, that directly incorporates these requirements in the design of the policy representation, initialization, and optimization. We demonstrate that this system enables the high-speed Barrett WAM manipulator to learn juggling two balls from 56 minutes of experience with a binary reward signal. The final policy juggles continuously for up to 33 minutes or about 4500 repeated catches. The videos documenting the learning process and the evaluation can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/jugglingbot 能够在物理世界中学习的机器人对于使机器人摆脱僵硬和预编程的运动非常重要。对于杂耍等动态高加速任务，现实世界中的学习尤其具有挑战性，因为必须在不损害系统的情况下突破机器人及其驱动的极限，从而增强了机器人学习算法的样本效率和安全性的必要性。与之前主要关注学习算法的工作相比，我们提出了一种学习系统，它将这些要求直接纳入策略表示、初始化和优化的设计中。我们证明，该系统使高速 Barrett WAM 机械手能够利用二进制奖励信号从 56 分钟的经验中学习杂耍两个球。最终的策略连续进行长达 33 分钟或约 4500 次重复捕获。记录学习过程和评估的视频可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/jugglingbot 找到 本文提出一种高效的强化学习系统，使机器人能在现实世界中使用二元奖励信号学习高速杂耍任务。 Kai Ploeger,Michael Lutter,Jan Peters cs.RO,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: Understanding understanding: a renormalization group inspired model of (artificial) intelligence
title_zh: 理解理解：受重整化群启发的（人工智能）智能模型
abstract: This paper is about the meaning of understanding in scientific and in artificial intelligent systems. We give a mathematical definition of the understanding, where, contrary to the common wisdom, we define the probability space on the input set, and we treat the transformation made by an intelligent actor not as a loss of information, but instead a reorganization of the information in the framework of a new coordinate system. We introduce, following the ideas of physical renormalization group, the notions of relevant and irrelevant parameters, and discuss, how the different AI tasks can be interpreted along these concepts, and how the process of learning can be described. We show, how scientific understanding fits into this framework, and demonstrate, what is the difference between a scientific task and pattern recognition. We also introduce a measure of relevance, which is useful for performing lossy compression.
summary: This paper is about the meaning of understanding in scientific and in artificial intelligent systems. We give a mathematical definition of the understanding, where, contrary to the common wisdom, we define the probability space on the input set, and we treat the transformation made by an intelligent actor not as a loss of information, but instead a reorganization of the information in the framework of a new coordinate system. We introduce, following the ideas of physical renormalization group, the notions of relevant and irrelevant parameters, and discuss, how the different AI tasks can be interpreted along these concepts, and how the process of learning can be described. We show, how scientific understanding fits into this framework, and demonstrate, what is the difference between a scientific task and pattern recognition. We also introduce a measure of relevance, which is useful for performing lossy compression.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论的是科学和人工智能系统中理解的含义。我们给出了理解的数学定义，与常识相反，我们定义了输入集上的概率空间，并且我们将智能参与者所做的转换视为信息的丢失，而不是在新坐标系框架中的信息重组。我们遵循物理重整化群的思想，引入相关和不相关参数的概念，并讨论如何根据这些概念解释不同的人工智能任务，以及如何描述学习过程。我们展示了科学理解如何融入这个框架，并展示了科学任务和模式识别之间的区别。我们还引入了相关性度量，这对于执行有损压缩非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于重整化群理论的数学模型，重新定义理解概念并解释AI任务与学习过程
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为智能系统处理信息会导致信息损失，本文旨在重新定义理解，将其视为信息重组，并建立统一框架解释AI任务与科学理解
AI.method: 采用物理重整化群理论，定义输入集的概率空间，将智能体转换视为信息重组，并引入相关参数区分不同任务
AI.result: 构建了统一框架解释AI任务与科学理解，区分两者差异，并提出相关性度量实现有效信息压缩
AI.conclusion: 理解本质是信息重组，科学任务与模式识别在相关参数上存在差异，相关性度量为AI学习提供新视角

authors_text: Chung-En Sun,Yi-Wei Chen,Hung-Shin Lee,Yen-Hsing Chen,Hsin-Min Wang
title: Melody Harmonization Using Orderless NADE, Chord Balancing, and Blocked Gibbs Sampling
title_zh: 使用无序 NADE、和弦平衡和阻塞吉布斯采样进行旋律和声
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2021, and Demo is available at: https://chord-generation.herokuapp.com/demo
comments: Accepted by ICASSP 2021, and Demo is available at: https://chord-generation.herokuapp.com/demo
abstract: Coherence and interestingness are two criteria for evaluating the performance of melody harmonization, which aims to generate a chord progression from a symbolic melody. In this study, we apply the concept of orderless NADE, which takes the melody and its partially masked chord sequence as the input of the BiLSTM-based networks to learn the masked ground truth, to the training process. In addition, the class weights are used to compensate for some reasonable chord labels that are rarely seen in the training set. Consistent with the stochasticity in training, blocked Gibbs sampling with proper numbers of masking/generating loops is used in the inference phase to progressively trade the coherence of the generated chord sequence off against its interestingness. The experiments were conducted on a dataset of 18,005 melody/chord pairs. Our proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art system MTHarmonizer in five of six different objective metrics based on chord/melody harmonicity and chord progression. The subjective test results with more than 100 participants also show the superiority of our model.
summary: Coherence and interestingness are two criteria for evaluating the performance of melody harmonization, which aims to generate a chord progression from a symbolic melody. In this study, we apply the concept of orderless NADE, which takes the melody and its partially masked chord sequence as the input of the BiLSTM-based networks to learn the masked ground truth, to the training process. In addition, the class weights are used to compensate for some reasonable chord labels that are rarely seen in the training set. Consistent with the stochasticity in training, blocked Gibbs sampling with proper numbers of masking/generating loops is used in the inference phase to progressively trade the coherence of the generated chord sequence off against its interestingness. The experiments were conducted on a dataset of 18,005 melody/chord pairs. Our proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art system MTHarmonizer in five of six different objective metrics based on chord/melody harmonicity and chord progression. The subjective test results with more than 100 participants also show the superiority of our model.
abstract_zh: 连贯性和趣味性是评估旋律和声性能的两个标准，其目的是从象征性旋律生成和弦进行。在本研究中，我们将无序 NADE 的概念应用于训练过程，它将旋律及其部分屏蔽的和弦序列作为基于 BiLSTM 的网络的输入，以学习屏蔽的基本事实。此外，类别权重还用于补偿训练集中很少见到的一些合理的和弦标签。与训练中的随机性一致，在推理阶段使用具有适当数量的掩蔽/生成循环的阻塞吉布斯采样，以逐步将生成的和弦序列的连贯性与其趣味性进行交换。实验是在 18,005 个旋律/和弦对的数据集上进行的。我们提出的模型在基于和弦/旋律和谐性和和弦进行的六个不同客观指标中的五个方面优于最先进的系统 MTHarmonizer。超过100名参与者的主观测试结果也显示了我们模型的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无序NADE、和弦平衡及阻塞吉布斯采样的旋律和声化方法，旨在生成既连贯又有趣的和弦进行。
AI.motivation: 现有旋律和声化方法在生成和弦进行时难以平衡连贯性与趣味性，需改进模型以兼顾两者。
AI.method: 采用基于BiLSTM的无序NADE网络学习部分遮蔽的和弦序列，利用类别权重补偿罕见和弦标签，并通过阻塞吉布斯采样在推理阶段动态权衡连贯性与趣味性。
AI.result: 在包含18,005个旋律/和弦对的数据集上，模型在六项客观指标中五项优于MTHarmonizer，且超过100名参与者的主观测试验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过有效结合无序NADE与阻塞吉布斯采样，成功实现了和弦进行的连贯性与趣味性平衡，优于现有最佳系统。

title: Does anatomical contextual information improve 3D U-Net based brain tumor segmentation?
title_zh: 解剖学背景信息是否可以改善基于 3D U-Net 的脑肿瘤分割？
abstract: Effective, robust, and automatic tools for brain tumor segmentation are needed for the extraction of information useful in treatment planning from magnetic resonance (MR) images. Context-aware artificial intelligence is an emerging concept for the development of deep learning applications for computer-aided medical image analysis. In this work, it is investigated whether the addition of contextual information from the brain anatomy in the form of white matter, gray matter, and cerebrospinal fluid masks and probability maps improves U-Net-based brain tumor segmentation. The BraTS2020 dataset was used to train and test two standard 3D U-Net models that, in addition to the conventional MR image modalities, used the anatomical contextual information as extra channels in the form of binary masks (CIM) or probability maps (CIP). A baseline model (BLM) that only used the conventional MR image modalities was also trained. The impact of adding contextual information was investigated in terms of overall segmentation accuracy, model training time, domain generalization, and compensation for fewer MR modalities available for each subject. Results show that there is no statistically significant difference when comparing Dice scores between the baseline model and the contextual information models, even when comparing performances for high- and low-grade tumors independently. Only in the case of compensation for fewer MR modalities available for each subject did the addition of anatomical contextual information significantly improve the segmentation of the whole tumor. Overall, there is no overall significant improvement in segmentation performance when using anatomical contextual information in the form of either binary masks or probability maps as extra channels.
summary: Effective, robust, and automatic tools for brain tumor segmentation are needed for the extraction of information useful in treatment planning from magnetic resonance (MR) images. Context-aware artificial intelligence is an emerging concept for the development of deep learning applications for computer-aided medical image analysis. A baseline model (BLM) that only used the conventional MR image modalities was also trained. The impact of adding contextual information was investigated in terms of overall segmentation accuracy, model training time, domain generalization, and compensation for fewer MR modalities available for each subject. Results show that there is no statistically significant difference when comparing Dice scores between the baseline model and the contextual information models, even when comparing performances for high- and low-grade tumors independently. Only in the case of compensation for fewer MR modalities available for each subject did the addition of anatomical contextual information significantly improve the segmentation of the whole tumor. Overall, there is no overall significant improvement in segmentation performance when using anatomical contextual information in the form of either binary masks or probability maps as extra channels.
abstract_zh: 需要有效、强大且自动的脑肿瘤分割工具来从磁共振 (MR) 图像中提取对治疗计划有用的信息。情境感知人工智能是用于计算机辅助医学图像分析的深度学习应用开发的新兴概念。在这项工作中，研究以白质、灰质和脑脊液掩模和概率图的形式添加来自大脑解剖结构的上下文信息是否可以改善基于 U-Net 的脑肿瘤分割。 BraTS2020 数据集用于训练和测试两个标准 3D U-Net 模型，除了传统的 MR 图像模态之外，这些模型还使用二进制掩模 (CIM) 或概率图 (CIP) 形式的解剖上下文信息作为额外通道。还训练了仅使用传统 MR 图像模式的基线模型 (BLM)。我们从整体分割准确性、模型训练时间、领域泛化以及对每个受试者可用的较少 MR 模式的补偿等方面研究了添加上下文信息的影响。结果表明，在比较基线模型和上下文信息模型之间的 Dice 评分时，即使独立比较高级别和低级别肿瘤的性能，也没有统计学上的显着差异。只有在补偿每个受试者可用的 MR 模式较少的情况下，添加解剖背景信息才能显着改善整个肿瘤的分割。总体而言，当使用二进制掩模或概率图形式的解剖上下文信息作为额外通道时，分割性能总体上没有显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了在3D U-Net脑肿瘤分割模型中加入解剖学上下文信息（如白质、灰质和脑脊液掩码）的效果。
AI.motivation: 需要更高效、自动化的脑肿瘤分割工具以辅助治疗规划，而上下文感知的AI可能提升医学影像分析的深度学习性能。
AI.method: 基于BraTS2020数据集，训练并测试了两种3D U-Net模型：一种使用传统MRI模态，另一种额外引入解剖学上下文信息（二值掩码或概率图）作为通道。
AI.result: 与基线模型相比，加入解剖学信息的模型在Dice分数上无显著差异，仅在补偿单个受试者MRI模态不足时表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 解剖学上下文信息作为额外通道未普遍提升分割性能，但在特定场景（如数据模态不足）下可能有效。

search_text: Does anatomical contextual information improve 3D U-Net based brain tumor segmentation? 解剖学背景信息是否可以改善基于 3D U-Net 的脑肿瘤分割？ Effective, robust, and automatic tools for brain tumor segmentation are needed for the extraction of information useful in treatment planning from magnetic resonance (MR) images. Context-aware artificial intelligence is an emerging concept for the development of deep learning applications for computer-aided medical image analysis. In this work, it is investigated whether the addition of contextual information from the brain anatomy in the form of white matter, gray matter, and cerebrospinal fluid masks and probability maps improves U-Net-based brain tumor segmentation. The BraTS2020 dataset was used to train and test two standard 3D U-Net models that, in addition to the conventional MR image modalities, used the anatomical contextual information as extra channels in the form of binary masks (CIM) or probability maps (CIP). A baseline model (BLM) that only used the conventional MR image modalities was also trained. The impact of adding contextual information was investigated in terms of overall segmentation accuracy, model training time, domain generalization, and compensation for fewer MR modalities available for each subject. Results show that there is no statistically significant difference when comparing Dice scores between the baseline model and the contextual information models, even when comparing performances for high- and low-grade tumors independently. Only in the case of compensation for fewer MR modalities available for each subject did the addition of anatomical contextual information significantly improve the segmentation of the whole tumor. Overall, there is no overall significant improvement in segmentation performance when using anatomical contextual information in the form of either binary masks or probability maps as extra channels. 需要有效、强大且自动的脑肿瘤分割工具来从磁共振 (MR) 图像中提取对治疗计划有用的信息。情境感知人工智能是用于计算机辅助医学图像分析的深度学习应用开发的新兴概念。在这项工作中，研究以白质、灰质和脑脊液掩模和概率图的形式添加来自大脑解剖结构的上下文信息是否可以改善基于 U-Net 的脑肿瘤分割。 BraTS2020 数据集用于训练和测试两个标准 3D U-Net 模型，除了传统的 MR 图像模态之外，这些模型还使用二进制掩模 (CIM) 或概率图 (CIP) 形式的解剖上下文信息作为额外通道。还训练了仅使用传统 MR 图像模式的基线模型 (BLM)。我们从整体分割准确性、模型训练时间、领域泛化以及对每个受试者可用的较少 MR 模式的补偿等方面研究了添加上下文信息的影响。结果表明，在比较基线模型和上下文信息模型之间的 Dice 评分时，即使独立比较高级别和低级别肿瘤的性能，也没有统计学上的显着差异。只有在补偿每个受试者可用的 MR 模式较少的情况下，添加解剖背景信息才能显着改善整个肿瘤的分割。总体而言，当使用二进制掩模或概率图形式的解剖上下文信息作为额外通道时，分割性能总体上没有显着改善。 本文评估了在3D U-Net脑肿瘤分割模型中加入解剖学上下文信息（如白质、灰质和脑脊液掩码）的效果。 Iulian Emil Tampu,Neda Haj-Hosseini,Anders Eklund eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Speaker Anonymization with Distribution-Preserving X-Vector Generation for the VoicePrivacy Challenge 2020
title_zh: 2020 年 VoicePrivacy 挑战赛中使用保留分布 X 向量生成的说话者匿名化
comment: 5 pages Replacement: A small processing bug led to slightly incorrect results. Conclusions remain the same
comments: 5 pages Replacement: A small processing bug led to slightly incorrect results. Conclusions remain the same
abstract: In this paper, we present a Distribution-Preserving Voice Anonymization technique, as our submission to the VoicePrivacy Challenge 2020. We observe that the challenge baseline system generates fake X-vectors which are very similar to each other, significantly more so than those extracted from organic speakers. This difference arises from averaging many X-vectors from a pool of speakers in the anonymization process, causing a loss of information. We propose a new method to generate fake X-vectors which overcomes these limitations by preserving the distributional properties of X-vectors and their intra-similarity. We use population data to learn the properties of the X-vector space, before fitting a generative model which we use to sample fake X-vectors. We show how this approach generates X-vectors that more closely follow the expected intra-similarity distribution of organic speaker X-vectors. Our method can be easily integrated with others as the anonymization component of the system and removes the need to distribute a pool of speakers to use during the anonymization. Our approach leads to an increase in EER of up to $19.4\%$ in males and $11.1\%$ in females in scenarios where enrollment and trial utterances are anonymized versus the baseline solution, demonstrating the diversity of our generated voices.
summary: In this paper, we present a Distribution-Preserving Voice Anonymization technique, as our submission to the VoicePrivacy Challenge 2020. We observe that the challenge baseline system generates fake X-vectors which are very similar to each other, significantly more so than those extracted from organic speakers. This difference arises from averaging many X-vectors from a pool of speakers in the anonymization process, causing a loss of information. We propose a new method to generate fake X-vectors which overcomes these limitations by preserving the distributional properties of X-vectors and their intra-similarity. We use population data to learn the properties of the X-vector space, before fitting a generative model which we use to sample fake X-vectors. We show how this approach generates X-vectors that more closely follow the expected intra-similarity distribution of organic speaker X-vectors. Our method can be easily integrated with others as the anonymization component of the system and removes the need to distribute a pool of speakers to use during the anonymization. Our approach leads to an increase in EER of up to $19.4\%$ in males and $11.1\%$ in females in scenarios where enrollment and trial utterances are anonymized versus the baseline solution, demonstrating the diversity of our generated voices.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种保留分布的语音匿名化技术，作为我们对 2020 年语音隐私挑战赛的提交。我们观察到挑战基线系统生成的假 X 向量彼此非常相似，明显比从有机说话者中提取的相似度高。这种差异是由于在匿名化过程中对来自发言者池的许多 X 向量进行平均而产生的，从而导致信息丢失。我们提出了一种生成假 X 向量的新方法，该方法通过保留 X 向量的分布特性及其内部相似性来克服这些限制。在拟合用于对假 X 向量进行采样的生成模型之前，我们使用总体数据来学习 X 向量空间的属性。我们展示了这种方法如何生成更紧密地遵循有机说话者 X 向量的预期内部相似度分布的 X 向量。我们的方法可以轻松地与其他方法集成，作为系统的匿名化组件，并且无需在匿名化过程中分配要使用的发言者池。与基线解决方案相比，在注册和试验话语都是匿名的情况下，我们的方法使男性的 EER 提高了 19.4\%$，女性的 EER 提高了 11.1\%$，这证明了我们生成的声音的多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布保持的语音匿名化技术，通过生成符合原始X向量分布的假X向量来提升语音隐私保护效果。
AI.motivation: 挑战赛基线系统生成的假X向量相似度过高，导致信息丢失。通过保留X向量分布特性可提升匿名化效果。
AI.method: 利用人口数据学习X向量空间特性，构建生成模型采样假X向量，保持其分布特性及类内相似性。
AI.result: 在匿名化场景下，男性EER提升19.4%，女性提升11.1%，验证了生成语音的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分布保持生成有效X向量，提升匿名化质量，且无需依赖说话人池即可集成到系统中。

title: Matthews Correlation Coefficient Loss for Deep Convolutional Networks: Application to Skin Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 深度卷积网络的马修斯相关系数损失：在皮肤病变分割中的应用
abstract: The segmentation of skin lesions is a crucial task in clinical decision support systems for the computer aided diagnosis of skin lesions. Although deep learning-based approaches have improved segmentation performance, these models are often susceptible to class imbalance in the data, particularly, the fraction of the image occupied by the background healthy skin. Despite variations of the popular Dice loss function being proposed to tackle the class imbalance problem, the Dice loss formulation does not penalize misclassifications of the background pixels. We propose a novel metric-based loss function using the Matthews correlation coefficient, a metric that has been shown to be efficient in scenarios with skewed class distributions, and use it to optimize deep segmentation models. Evaluations on three skin lesion image datasets: the ISBI ISIC 2017 Skin Lesion Segmentation Challenge dataset, the DermoFit Image Library, and the PH2 dataset, show that models trained using the proposed loss function outperform those trained using Dice loss by 11.25%, 4.87%, and 0.76% respectively in the mean Jaccard index. The code is available at https://github.com/kakumarabhishek/MCC-Loss.
summary: The segmentation of skin lesions is a crucial task in clinical decision support systems for the computer aided diagnosis of skin lesions. Although deep learning-based approaches have improved segmentation performance, these models are often susceptible to class imbalance in the data, particularly, the fraction of the image occupied by the background healthy skin. Despite variations of the popular Dice loss function being proposed to tackle the class imbalance problem, the Dice loss formulation does not penalize misclassifications of the background pixels. We propose a novel metric-based loss function using the Matthews correlation coefficient, a metric that has been shown to be efficient in scenarios with skewed class distributions, and use it to optimize deep segmentation models. Evaluations on three skin lesion image datasets: the ISBI ISIC 2017 Skin Lesion Segmentation Challenge dataset, the DermoFit Image Library, and the PH2 dataset, show that models trained using the proposed loss function outperform those trained using Dice loss by 11.25%, 4.87%, and 0.76% respectively in the mean Jaccard index. The code is available at https://github.com/kakumarabhishek/MCC-Loss.
abstract_zh: 皮肤病变的分割是计算机辅助皮肤病变诊断的临床决策支持系统中的一项关键任务。尽管基于深度学习的方法提高了分割性能，但这些模型通常容易受到数据中类别不平衡的影响，特别是背景健康皮肤占据的图像部分。尽管提出了流行的 Dice 损失函数的变体来解决类别不平衡问题，但 Dice 损失公式不会惩罚背景像素的错误分类。我们使用马修斯相关系数提出了一种基于度量的新颖损失函数，该度量已被证明在类分布偏斜的场景中非常有效，并用它来优化深度分割模型。对三个皮肤病变图像数据集（ISBI ISIC 2017 皮肤病变分割挑战数据集、DermoFit 图像库和 PH2 数据集）的评估表明，使用所提出的损失函数训练的模型在平均 Jaccard 指数方面分别优于使用 Dice 损失训练的模型 11.25%、4.87% 和 0.76%。代码可在 https://github.com/kakumarabhishek/MCC-Loss 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于马修斯相关系数（MCC）的损失函数，用于改进皮肤病变分割的深度卷积网络性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型（如Dice损失）在处理皮肤病变图像中背景像素占比高的类别不平衡问题时效果不佳，需设计更适应不平衡数据的损失函数。
AI.method: 设计以马修斯相关系数（MCC）为指标的新型损失函数，该指标在类别分布偏斜场景下表现优异，并用于优化深度分割模型。
AI.result: 在ISBI ISIC 2017、DermoFit和PH2三个数据集上，MCC损失函数分别使平均Jaccard指数提升11.25%、4.87%和0.76%。
AI.conclusion: MCC损失函数有效解决了皮肤病变分割中的类别不平衡问题，优于传统Dice损失，代码已开源。

ai_content.motivation: 现有分割模型（如Dice损失）在处理皮肤病变图像中背景像素占比高的类别不平衡问题时效果不佳，需设计更适应不平衡数据的损失函数。
ai_content.method: 设计以马修斯相关系数（MCC）为指标的新型损失函数，该指标在类别分布偏斜场景下表现优异，并用于优化深度分割模型。
ai_content.result: 在ISBI ISIC 2017、DermoFit和PH2三个数据集上，MCC损失函数分别使平均Jaccard指数提升11.25%、4.87%和0.76%。
ai_content.conclusion: MCC损失函数有效解决了皮肤病变分割中的类别不平衡问题，优于传统Dice损失，代码已开源。

search_text: Matthews Correlation Coefficient Loss for Deep Convolutional Networks: Application to Skin Lesion Segmentation 深度卷积网络的马修斯相关系数损失：在皮肤病变分割中的应用 The segmentation of skin lesions is a crucial task in clinical decision support systems for the computer aided diagnosis of skin lesions. Although deep learning-based approaches have improved segmentation performance, these models are often susceptible to class imbalance in the data, particularly, the fraction of the image occupied by the background healthy skin. Despite variations of the popular Dice loss function being proposed to tackle the class imbalance problem, the Dice loss formulation does not penalize misclassifications of the background pixels. We propose a novel metric-based loss function using the Matthews correlation coefficient, a metric that has been shown to be efficient in scenarios with skewed class distributions, and use it to optimize deep segmentation models. Evaluations on three skin lesion image datasets: the ISBI ISIC 2017 Skin Lesion Segmentation Challenge dataset, the DermoFit Image Library, and the PH2 dataset, show that models trained using the proposed loss function outperform those trained using Dice loss by 11.25%, 4.87%, and 0.76% respectively in the mean Jaccard index. The code is available at https://github.com/kakumarabhishek/MCC-Loss. 皮肤病变的分割是计算机辅助皮肤病变诊断的临床决策支持系统中的一项关键任务。尽管基于深度学习的方法提高了分割性能，但这些模型通常容易受到数据中类别不平衡的影响，特别是背景健康皮肤占据的图像部分。尽管提出了流行的 Dice 损失函数的变体来解决类别不平衡问题，但 Dice 损失公式不会惩罚背景像素的错误分类。我们使用马修斯相关系数提出了一种基于度量的新颖损失函数，该度量已被证明在类分布偏斜的场景中非常有效，并用它来优化深度分割模型。对三个皮肤病变图像数据集（ISBI ISIC 2017 皮肤病变分割挑战数据集、DermoFit 图像库和 PH2 数据集）的评估表明，使用所提出的损失函数训练的模型在平均 Jaccard 指数方面分别优于使用 Dice 损失训练的模型 11.25%、4.87% 和 0.76%。代码可在 https://github.com/kakumarabhishek/MCC-Loss 获取。 本文提出了一种基于马修斯相关系数（MCC）的损失函数，用于改进皮肤病变分割的深度卷积网络性能。 Kumar Abhishek,Ghassan Hamarneh eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Marco Rosano,Antonino Furnari,Luigi Gulino,Giovanni Maria Farinella
title: On Embodied Visual Navigation in Real Environments Through Habitat
title_zh: 通过栖息地在真实环境中进行具身视觉导航
comment: Published in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2020
comments: Published in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2020
abstract: Visual navigation models based on deep learning can learn effective policies when trained on large amounts of visual observations through reinforcement learning. Unfortunately, collecting the required experience in the real world requires the deployment of a robotic platform, which is expensive and time-consuming. To deal with this limitation, several simulation platforms have been proposed in order to train visual navigation policies on virtual environments efficiently. Despite the advantages they offer, simulators present a limited realism in terms of appearance and physical dynamics, leading to navigation policies that do not generalize in the real world. In this paper, we propose a tool based on the Habitat simulator which exploits real world images of the environment, together with sensor and actuator noise models, to produce more realistic navigation episodes. We perform a range of experiments to assess the ability of such policies to generalize using virtual and real-world images, as well as observations transformed with unsupervised domain adaptation approaches. We also assess the impact of sensor and actuation noise on the navigation performance and investigate whether it allows to learn more robust navigation policies. We show that our tool can effectively help to train and evaluate navigation policies on real-world observations without running navigation pisodes in the real world.
summary: Visual navigation models based on deep learning can learn effective policies when trained on large amounts of visual observations through reinforcement learning. Unfortunately, collecting the required experience in the real world requires the deployment of a robotic platform, which is expensive and time-consuming. To deal with this limitation, several simulation platforms have been proposed in order to train visual navigation policies on virtual environments efficiently. Despite the advantages they offer, simulators present a limited realism in terms of appearance and physical dynamics, leading to navigation policies that do not generalize in the real world. In this paper, we propose a tool based on the Habitat simulator which exploits real world images of the environment, together with sensor and actuator noise models, to produce more realistic navigation episodes. We perform a range of experiments to assess the ability of such policies to generalize using virtual and real-world images, as well as observations transformed with unsupervised domain adaptation approaches. We also assess the impact of sensor and actuation noise on the navigation performance and investigate whether it allows to learn more robust navigation policies. We show that our tool can effectively help to train and evaluate navigation policies on real-world observations without running navigation pisodes in the real world.
abstract_zh: 当通过强化学习对大量视觉观察进行训练时，基于深度学习的视觉导航模型可以学习有效的策略。不幸的是，在现实世界中收集所需的经验需要部署机器人平台，这是昂贵且耗时的。为了解决这一限制，人们提出了几种仿真平台，以便在虚拟环境中有效地训练视觉导航策略。尽管模拟器具有诸多优势，但其在外观和物理动力学方面的真实性有限，导致导航策略无法在现实世界中推广。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于栖息地模拟器的工具，该工具利用现实世界的环境图像以及传感器和执行器噪声模型来产生更真实的导航事件。我们进行了一系列实验，以评估此类策略使用虚拟和现实世界图像以及通过无监督域适应方法转换的观察结果进行泛化的能力。我们还评估了传感器和驱动噪声对导航性能的影响，并研究它是否允许学习更强大的导航策略。我们表明，我们的工具可以有效地帮助训练和评估现实世界观测的导航策略，而无需在现实世界中运行导航片段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Habitat模拟器的工具，通过结合真实环境图像与传感器噪声模型，提升视觉导航策略在真实世界中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟平台因缺乏真实感导致导航策略难以泛化至真实环境，而实际采集数据成本高昂且耗时。
AI.method: 利用真实环境图像与传感器/执行器噪声模型生成更逼真的模拟场景，并通过无监督域适应方法转换图像以评估策略泛化性，同时分析噪声对导航性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明该工具能有效训练并评估导航策略，无需真实世界数据即可提升策略鲁棒性，且噪声建模有助于增强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工具通过增强模拟环境真实性，为训练高效、稳健的视觉导航策略提供了可行方案，减少对实际部署的依赖。

title: A Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation Approach based on the Centroid Loss: Application to Quality Control and Inspection
title_zh: 基于质心损失的弱监督语义分割方法：在质量控制和检验中的应用
abstract: It is generally accepted that one of the critical parts of current vision algorithms based on deep learning and convolutional neural networks is the annotation of a sufficient number of images to achieve competitive performance. This is particularly difficult for semantic segmentation tasks since the annotation must be ideally generated at the pixel level. Weakly-supervised semantic segmentation aims at reducing this cost by employing simpler annotations that, hence, are easier, cheaper and quicker to produce. In this paper, we propose and assess a new weakly-supervised semantic segmentation approach making use of a novel loss function whose goal is to counteract the effects of weak annotations. To this end, this loss function comprises several terms based on partial cross-entropy losses, being one of them the Centroid Loss. This term induces a clustering of the image pixels in the object classes under consideration, whose aim is to improve the training of the segmentation network by guiding the optimization. The performance of the approach is evaluated against datasets from two different industry-related case studies: while one involves the detection of instances of a number of different object classes in the context of a quality control application, the other stems from the visual inspection domain and deals with the localization of images areas whose pixels correspond to scene surface points affected by a specific sort of defect. The detection results that are reported for both cases show that, despite the differences among them and the particular challenges, the use of weak annotations do not prevent from achieving a competitive performance level for both.
summary: It is generally accepted that one of the critical parts of current vision algorithms based on deep learning and convolutional neural networks is the annotation of a sufficient number of images to achieve competitive performance. This is particularly difficult for semantic segmentation tasks since the annotation must be ideally generated at the pixel level. Weakly-supervised semantic segmentation aims at reducing this cost by employing simpler annotations that, hence, are easier, cheaper and quicker to produce. In this paper, we propose and assess a new weakly-supervised semantic segmentation approach making use of a novel loss function whose goal is to counteract the effects of weak annotations. To this end, this loss function comprises several terms based on partial cross-entropy losses, being one of them the Centroid Loss. This term induces a clustering of the image pixels in the object classes under consideration, whose aim is to improve the training of the segmentation network by guiding the optimization. The performance of the approach is evaluated against datasets from two different industry-related case studies: while one involves the detection of instances of a number of different object classes in the context of a quality control application, the other stems from the visual inspection domain and deals with the localization of images areas whose pixels correspond to scene surface points affected by a specific sort of defect. The detection results that are reported for both cases show that, despite the differences among them and the particular challenges, the use of weak annotations do not prevent from achieving a competitive performance level for both.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，当前基于深度学习和卷积神经网络的视觉算法的关键部分之一是注释足够数量的图像以实现有竞争力的性能。这对于语义分割任务来说尤其困难，因为注释必须理想地在像素级别生成。弱监督语义分割旨在通过使用更简单的注释来降低成本，因此更容易、更便宜、更快速地生成。在本文中，我们提出并评估了一种新的弱监督语义分割方法，该方法利用一种新颖的损失函数，其目标是抵消弱注释的影响。为此，该损失函数包含几个基于部分交叉熵损失的项，其中之一是质心损失。该术语引起所考虑的对象类中的图像像素的聚类，其目的是通过指导优化来改进分割网络的训练。该方法的性能是根据两个不同行业相关案例研究的数据集进行评估的：一个涉及在质量控制应用程序的背景下检测多个不同对象类的实例，另一个源于视觉检查领域，处理图像区域的定位，这些图像区域的像素对应于受特定类型缺陷影响的场景表面点。两种情况报告的检测结果表明，尽管它们之间存在差异和特定的挑战，但使用弱注释并不妨碍两者实现有竞争力的性能水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于质心损失的弱监督语义分割方法，并应用于质量控制和检测领域。
AI.motivation: 语义分割任务需要大量像素级标注，成本高且困难，弱监督方法通过简化标注降低这一成本。
AI.method: 设计一种新型损失函数，包含部分交叉熵损失项，其中质心损失通过聚类像素优化分割网络训练。
AI.result: 在两个工业案例（质量控制和缺陷检测）中，弱标注下仍达到具有竞争力的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在弱标注条件下有效，适用于工业检测场景的语义分割任务。

conclusion: 所提方法在弱标注条件下有效，适用于工业检测场景的语义分割任务。
search_text: A Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation Approach based on the Centroid Loss: Application to Quality Control and Inspection 基于质心损失的弱监督语义分割方法：在质量控制和检验中的应用 It is generally accepted that one of the critical parts of current vision algorithms based on deep learning and convolutional neural networks is the annotation of a sufficient number of images to achieve competitive performance. This is particularly difficult for semantic segmentation tasks since the annotation must be ideally generated at the pixel level. Weakly-supervised semantic segmentation aims at reducing this cost by employing simpler annotations that, hence, are easier, cheaper and quicker to produce. In this paper, we propose and assess a new weakly-supervised semantic segmentation approach making use of a novel loss function whose goal is to counteract the effects of weak annotations. To this end, this loss function comprises several terms based on partial cross-entropy losses, being one of them the Centroid Loss. This term induces a clustering of the image pixels in the object classes under consideration, whose aim is to improve the training of the segmentation network by guiding the optimization. The performance of the approach is evaluated against datasets from two different industry-related case studies: while one involves the detection of instances of a number of different object classes in the context of a quality control application, the other stems from the visual inspection domain and deals with the localization of images areas whose pixels correspond to scene surface points affected by a specific sort of defect. The detection results that are reported for both cases show that, despite the differences among them and the particular challenges, the use of weak annotations do not prevent from achieving a competitive performance level for both. 人们普遍认为，当前基于深度学习和卷积神经网络的视觉算法的关键部分之一是注释足够数量的图像以实现有竞争力的性能。这对于语义分割任务来说尤其困难，因为注释必须理想地在像素级别生成。弱监督语义分割旨在通过使用更简单的注释来降低成本，因此更容易、更便宜、更快速地生成。在本文中，我们提出并评估了一种新的弱监督语义分割方法，该方法利用一种新颖的损失函数，其目标是抵消弱注释的影响。为此，该损失函数包含几个基于部分交叉熵损失的项，其中之一是质心损失。该术语引起所考虑的对象类中的图像像素的聚类，其目的是通过指导优化来改进分割网络的训练。该方法的性能是根据两个不同行业相关案例研究的数据集进行评估的：一个涉及在质量控制应用程序的背景下检测多个不同对象类的实例，另一个源于视觉检查领域，处理图像区域的定位，这些图像区域的像素对应于受特定类型缺陷影响的场景表面点。两种情况报告的检测结果表明，尽管它们之间存在差异和特定的挑战，但使用弱注释并不妨碍两者实现有竞争力的性能水平。 本文提出一种基于质心损失的弱监督语义分割方法，并应用于质量控制和检测领域。 Kai Yao,Alberto Ortiz,Francisco Bonnin-Pascual cs.CV

title: ChoiRbot: A ROS 2 Toolbox for Cooperative Robotics
title_zh: ChoiRbot：用于协作机器人的 ROS 2 工具箱
abstract: In this paper, we introduce ChoiRbot, a toolbox for distributed cooperative robotics based on the novel Robot Operating System (ROS) 2. ChoiRbot provides a fully-functional toolset to execute complex distributed multi-robot tasks, either in simulation or experimentally, with a particular focus on networks of heterogeneous robots without a central coordinator. Thanks to its modular structure, ChoiRbot allows for a highly straight implementation of optimization-based distributed control schemes, such as distributed optimal control, model predictive control, task assignment, in which local computation and communication with neighboring robots are alternated. To this end, the toolbox provides functionalities for the solution of distributed optimization problems. The package can be also used to implement distributed feedback laws that do not need optimization features but do require the exchange of information among robots. The potential of the toolbox is illustrated with simulations and experiments on distributed robotics scenarios with mobile ground robots. The ChoiRbot toolbox is available at https://github.com/OPT4SMART/choirbot.
summary: In this paper, we introduce ChoiRbot, a toolbox for distributed cooperative robotics based on the novel Robot Operating System (ROS) 2. ChoiRbot provides a fully-functional toolset to execute complex distributed multi-robot tasks, either in simulation or experimentally, with a particular focus on networks of heterogeneous robots without a central coordinator. Thanks to its modular structure, ChoiRbot allows for a highly straight implementation of optimization-based distributed control schemes, such as distributed optimal control, model predictive control, task assignment, in which local computation and communication with neighboring robots are alternated. To this end, the toolbox provides functionalities for the solution of distributed optimization problems. The package can be also used to implement distributed feedback laws that do not need optimization features but do require the exchange of information among robots. The potential of the toolbox is illustrated with simulations and experiments on distributed robotics scenarios with mobile ground robots. The ChoiRbot toolbox is available at https://github.com/OPT4SMART/choirbot.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 ChoiRbot，这是一个基于新型机器人操作系统 (ROS) 2 的分布式协作机器人工具箱。ChoiRbot 提供了一个功能齐全的工具集，可以在模拟或实验中执行复杂的分布式多机器人任务，特别关注没有中央协调器的异构机器人网络。由于其模块化结构，ChoiRbot 可以高度直接地实现基于优化的分布式控制方案，例如分布式最优控制、模型预测控制、任务分配，其中本地计算和与相邻机器人的通信是交替的。为此，该工具箱提供了解决分布式优化问题的功能。该软件包还可用于实现不需要优化功能但需要机器人之间交换信息的分布式反馈法则。通过对移动地面机器人的分布式机器人场景的模拟和实验说明了该工具箱的潜力。 ChoiRbot 工具箱可从 https://github.com/OPT4SMART/choirbot 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于ROS 2的分布式协作机器人工具箱ChoiRbot，支持仿真和实验环境下的异构机器人网络任务执行。
AI.motivation: 现有系统缺乏对分布式优化控制方案的有效支持，需要模块化工具实现异构机器人协作。
AI.method: 开发模块化ROS 2工具箱，集成分布式优化求解功能与机器人间信息交换机制，支持多种控制策略实现。
AI.result: 通过仿真与移动机器人实验验证了工具箱在分布式场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ChoiRbot为分布式协作机器人任务提供了可扩展的模块化解决方案，适用于多种控制策略实现。

title: Runtime analysis of the (mu+1)-EA on the Dynamic BinVal function
title_zh: Dynamic BinVal 函数上 (mu+1)-EA 的运行时分析
comment: Full journal version. Conference version has appeared at Evostar 2021, journal version submitted to Springer Nature Computer Science (SNCS)
comments: Full journal version. Conference version has appeared at Evostar 2021, journal version submitted to Springer Nature Computer Science (SNCS)
abstract: We study evolutionary algorithms in a dynamic setting, where for each generation a different fitness function is chosen, and selection is performed with respect to the current fitness function. Specifically, we consider Dynamic BinVal, in which the fitness functions for each generation is given by the linear function BinVal, but in each generation the order of bits is randomly permuted. For the (1+1)-EA it was known that there is an efficiency threshold $c_0$ for the mutation parameter, at which the runtime switches from quasilinear to exponential. A previous empirical evidence suggested that for larger population size $μ$, the threshold may increase. We prove that this is at least the case in an $\varepsilon$-neighborhood around the optimum: the threshold of the (μ+1)-EA becomes arbitrarily large if the $μ$ is chosen large enough. However, the most surprising result is obtained by a second order analysis for $μ=2$: the threshold INcreases with increasing proximity to the optimum. In particular, the hardest region for optimization is NOT around the optimum.
summary: We study evolutionary algorithms in a dynamic setting, where for each generation a different fitness function is chosen, and selection is performed with respect to the current fitness function. Specifically, we consider Dynamic BinVal, in which the fitness functions for each generation is given by the linear function BinVal, but in each generation the order of bits is randomly permuted. For the (1+1)-EA it was known that there is an efficiency threshold $c_0$ for the mutation parameter, at which the runtime switches from quasilinear to exponential. A previous empirical evidence suggested that for larger population size $μ$, the threshold may increase. We prove that this is at least the case in an $\varepsilon$-neighborhood around the optimum: the threshold of the (μ+1)-EA becomes arbitrarily large if the $μ$ is chosen large enough. However, the most surprising result is obtained by a second order analysis for $μ=2$: the threshold INcreases with increasing proximity to the optimum. In particular, the hardest region for optimization is NOT around the optimum.
abstract_zh: 我们在动态环境中研究进化算法，其中为每一代选择不同的适应度函数，并根据当前的适应度函数执行选择。具体来说，我们考虑动态 BinVal，其中每一代的适应度函数由线性函数 BinVal 给出，但在每一代中，位的顺序是随机排列的。对于 (1+1)-EA，已知突变参数存在一个效率阈值 $c_0$，在此阈值下运行时间从拟线性切换为指数。先前的经验证据表明，对于较大的人口规模 $μ$，阈值可能会增加。我们证明，至少在最优值附近的 $\varepsilon$ 邻域中是这样的：如果 $μ$ 选择得足够大，则 (μ+1)-EA 的阈值将变得任意大。然而，最令人惊讶的结果是通过 $μ=2$ 的二阶分析获得的：阈值 IN 随着越来越接近最优值而增加。特别是，最难优化的区域并不在最优区域附近。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了(mu+1)-EA进化算法在动态BinVal函数上的运行时表现，探讨了种群规模对效率阈值的影响。
AI.motivation: 动态优化问题中，适应度函数随时间变化，传统静态分析方法不足。需明确种群规模对算法效率阈值的影响，尤其在接近最优解区域的表现。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与数学证明，结合实验验证，研究不同种群规模(mu)下(mu+1)-EA在动态BinVal函数中的运行时行为及效率阈值变化。
AI.result: 证明当mu足够大时，效率阈值可任意增大；对于mu=2，阈值随接近最优解而增加，表明最困难的优化区域并非在最优解附近。
AI.conclusion: 种群规模显著影响动态环境下的效率阈值，且最优解附近的困难性可能被低估，为动态进化算法设计提供新视角。

authors_text: Tae-young Chung,Heansung Lee,Myeong Ah Cho,Suhwan Cho,Sangyoun Lee
title: Multi-object tracking with self-supervised associating network
title_zh: 具有自监督关联网络的多目标跟踪
abstract: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is the task that has a lot of potential for development, and there are still many problems to be solved. In the traditional tracking by detection paradigm, There has been a lot of work on feature based object re-identification methods. However, this method has a lack of training data problem. For labeling multi-object tracking dataset, every detection in a video sequence need its location and IDs. Since assigning consecutive IDs to each detection in every sequence is a very labor-intensive task, current multi-object tracking dataset is not sufficient enough to train re-identification network. So in this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised learning method using a lot of short videos which has no human labeling, and improve the tracking performance through the re-identification network trained in the self-supervised manner to solve the lack of training data problem. Despite the re-identification network is trained in a self-supervised manner, it achieves the state-of-the-art performance of MOTA 62.0\% and IDF1 62.6\% on the MOT17 test benchmark. Furthermore, the performance is improved as much as learned with a large amount of data, it shows the potential of self-supervised method.
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is the task that has a lot of potential for development, and there are still many problems to be solved. In the traditional tracking by detection paradigm, There has been a lot of work on feature based object re-identification methods. However, this method has a lack of training data problem. For labeling multi-object tracking dataset, every detection in a video sequence need its location and IDs. Since assigning consecutive IDs to each detection in every sequence is a very labor-intensive task, current multi-object tracking dataset is not sufficient enough to train re-identification network. So in this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised learning method using a lot of short videos which has no human labeling, and improve the tracking performance through the re-identification network trained in the self-supervised manner to solve the lack of training data problem. Despite the re-identification network is trained in a self-supervised manner, it achieves the state-of-the-art performance of MOTA 62.0\% and IDF1 62.6\% on the MOT17 test benchmark. Furthermore, the performance is improved as much as learned with a large amount of data, it shows the potential of self-supervised method.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪（MOT）是一项具有很大发展潜力的任务，但仍有许多问题需要解决。在传统的检测跟踪范式中，基于特征的对象重新识别方法已经进行了大量的工作。但该方法存在缺乏训练数据的问题。为了标记多目标跟踪数据集，视频序列中的每个检测都需要其位置和 ID。由于为每个序列中的每个检测分配连续的 ID 是一项非常耗费人力的任务，因此当前的多目标跟踪数据集不足以训练重新识别网络。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督学习方法，利用大量没有人工标签的短视频，并通过以自监督方式训练的重识别网络来提高跟踪性能，以解决训练数据缺乏的问题。尽管重识别网络是以自监督的方式进行训练的，但它在 MOT17 测试基准上实现了 MOTA 62.0\% 和 IDF1 62.6\% 的最先进性能。此外，通过大量数据学习，性能得到提高，这显示了自监督方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督关联网络的多目标跟踪方法，旨在解决传统方法因标注数据不足导致的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪依赖标注数据训练重识别网络，但人工标注视频中每个检测框的ID耗时且数据不足，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 利用大量无标注短视频通过自监督学习预训练重识别网络，无需人工标注即可学习目标特征表示，再结合跟踪算法提升整体性能。
AI.result: 在MOT17测试集上达到MOTA 62.0%和IDF1 62.6%的指标，性能接近使用大规模标注数据训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效缓解多目标跟踪任务中数据标注不足的问题，展现出无需人工标注的潜力。

search_text: Multi-object tracking with self-supervised associating network 具有自监督关联网络的多目标跟踪 Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is the task that has a lot of potential for development, and there are still many problems to be solved. In the traditional tracking by detection paradigm, There has been a lot of work on feature based object re-identification methods. However, this method has a lack of training data problem. For labeling multi-object tracking dataset, every detection in a video sequence need its location and IDs. Since assigning consecutive IDs to each detection in every sequence is a very labor-intensive task, current multi-object tracking dataset is not sufficient enough to train re-identification network. So in this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised learning method using a lot of short videos which has no human labeling, and improve the tracking performance through the re-identification network trained in the self-supervised manner to solve the lack of training data problem. Despite the re-identification network is trained in a self-supervised manner, it achieves the state-of-the-art performance of MOTA 62.0\% and IDF1 62.6\% on the MOT17 test benchmark. Furthermore, the performance is improved as much as learned with a large amount of data, it shows the potential of self-supervised method. 多目标跟踪（MOT）是一项具有很大发展潜力的任务，但仍有许多问题需要解决。在传统的检测跟踪范式中，基于特征的对象重新识别方法已经进行了大量的工作。但该方法存在缺乏训练数据的问题。为了标记多目标跟踪数据集，视频序列中的每个检测都需要其位置和 ID。由于为每个序列中的每个检测分配连续的 ID 是一项非常耗费人力的任务，因此当前的多目标跟踪数据集不足以训练重新识别网络。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督学习方法，利用大量没有人工标签的短视频，并通过以自监督方式训练的重识别网络来提高跟踪性能，以解决训练数据缺乏的问题。尽管重识别网络是以自监督的方式进行训练的，但它在 MOT17 测试基准上实现了 MOTA 62.0\% 和 IDF1 62.6\% 的最先进性能。此外，通过大量数据学习，性能得到提高，这显示了自监督方法的潜力。 本文提出了一种基于自监督关联网络的多目标跟踪方法，旨在解决传统方法因标注数据不足导致的性能瓶颈。 Tae-young Chung,Heansung Lee,Myeong Ah Cho,Suhwan Cho,Sangyoun Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Quentin Denoyelle,Thanh-an Pham,Pol del Aguila Pla,Daniel Sage,Michael Unser
title: Optimal-transport-based metric for SMLM
title_zh: SMLM 的基于最佳传输的度量
comment: Accepted to the 2021 IEEE 18th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2021) 5 pages, 4 figures
comments: Accepted to the 2021 IEEE 18th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2021) 5 pages, 4 figures
abstract: We propose the use of Flat Metric to assess the performance of reconstruction methods for single-molecule localization microscopy (SMLM) in scenarios where the ground-truth is available. Flat Metric is intimately related to the concept of optimal transport between measures of different mass, providing solid mathematical foundations for SMLM evaluation and integrating both localization and detection performance. In this paper, we provide the foundations of Flat Metric and validate this measure by applying it to controlled synthetic examples and to data from the SMLM 2016 Challenge.
summary: We propose the use of Flat Metric to assess the performance of reconstruction methods for single-molecule localization microscopy (SMLM) in scenarios where the ground-truth is available. Flat Metric is intimately related to the concept of optimal transport between measures of different mass, providing solid mathematical foundations for SMLM evaluation and integrating both localization and detection performance. In this paper, we provide the foundations of Flat Metric and validate this measure by applying it to controlled synthetic examples and to data from the SMLM 2016 Challenge.
abstract_zh: 我们建议使用 Flat Metric 来评估单分子定位显微镜（SMLM）重建方法在真实情况可用的情况下的性能。 Flat Metric 与不同质量测量之间的最佳传输概念密切相关，为 SMLM 评估以及集成定位和检测性能提供坚实的数学基础。在本文中，我们提供了 Flat Metric 的基础，并通过将其应用于受控合成示例和 SMLM 2016 挑战赛的数据来验证该度量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于最优传输的Flat Metric度量，用于评估单分子定位显微镜（SMLM）重建方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SMLM评估方法未能有效结合定位精度与检测性能，且缺乏数学理论支撑，需开发更可靠的评估指标。
AI.method: 构建Flat Metric数学框架，将其与不同质量度量间的最优传输理论结合，并通过合成数据与SMLM 2016挑战数据验证该度量。
AI.result: 实验表明Flat Metric能有效整合定位与检测性能，在合成案例和真实数据中均表现出可靠的评估能力。
AI.conclusion: Flat Metric为SMLM性能评估提供了理论严谨且实用的数学工具，可作为未来方法比较的标准度量。

authors_text: Wenbo Liu,Fei Yan,Kuan Tang,Jiyong Zhang,Tao Deng
title: Lane detection in complex scenes based on end-to-end neural network
title_zh: 基于端到端神经网络的复杂场景车道检测
abstract: The lane detection is a key problem to solve the division of derivable areas in unmanned driving, and the detection accuracy of lane lines plays an important role in the decision-making of vehicle driving. Scenes faced by vehicles in daily driving are relatively complex. Bright light, insufficient light, and crowded vehicles will bring varying degrees of difficulty to lane detection. So we combine the advantages of spatial convolution in spatial information processing and the efficiency of ERFNet in semantic segmentation, propose an end-to-end network to lane detection in a variety of complex scenes. And we design the information exchange block by combining spatial convolution and dilated convolution, which plays a great role in understanding detailed information. Finally, our network was tested on the CULane database and its F1-measure with IOU threshold of 0.5 can reach 71.9%.
summary: The lane detection is a key problem to solve the division of derivable areas in unmanned driving, and the detection accuracy of lane lines plays an important role in the decision-making of vehicle driving. Scenes faced by vehicles in daily driving are relatively complex. Bright light, insufficient light, and crowded vehicles will bring varying degrees of difficulty to lane detection. So we combine the advantages of spatial convolution in spatial information processing and the efficiency of ERFNet in semantic segmentation, propose an end-to-end network to lane detection in a variety of complex scenes. And we design the information exchange block by combining spatial convolution and dilated convolution, which plays a great role in understanding detailed information. Finally, our network was tested on the CULane database and its F1-measure with IOU threshold of 0.5 can reach 71.9%.
abstract_zh: 车道线检测是解决无人驾驶中可导区域划分的关键问题，车道线检测精度对车辆行驶决策起着重要作用。车辆在日常行驶中面临的场景相对复杂。光线明亮、光线不足、车辆拥挤等都会给车道检测带来不同程度的困难。因此，我们结合了空间卷积在空间信息处理方面的优势和ERFNet在语义分割方面的效率，提出了一种端到端网络来进行各种复杂场景中的车道检测。并且我们通过结合空间卷积和扩张卷积来设计信息交换块，这对于理解详细信息起到了很大的作用。最后，我们的网络在 CULane 数据库上进行了测试，其 IOU 阈值为 0.5 的 F1-measure 可以达到 71.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于端到端神经网络的复杂场景车道检测方法，旨在提升无人驾驶中车道线检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 车辆在日常行驶中面临复杂场景（如强光、弱光、车辆拥堵），传统方法难以有效检测车道线，需结合空间卷积与语义分割效率优势以提升精度。
AI.method: 融合空间卷积与ERFNet架构，设计信息交换模块结合空间卷积与空洞卷积，增强细节感知能力，构建端到端网络。
AI.result: 在CULane数据集上以IOU阈值0.5测试，F1-measure达到71.9%。
AI.conclusion: 所提网络通过优化信息交互机制，在复杂场景下实现了较高的车道检测性能，验证了方法的有效性。

title: TTS-by-TTS: TTS-driven Data Augmentation for Fast and High-Quality Speech Synthesis
title_zh: TTS-by-TTS：TTS 驱动的数据增强，用于快速、高质量的语音合成
abstract: In this paper, we propose a text-to-speech (TTS)-driven data augmentation method for improving the quality of a non-autoregressive (AR) TTS system. Recently proposed non-AR models, such as FastSpeech 2, have successfully achieved fast speech synthesis system. However, their quality is not satisfactory, especially when the amount of training data is insufficient. To address this problem, we propose an effective data augmentation method using a well-designed AR TTS system. In this method, large-scale synthetic corpora including text-waveform pairs with phoneme duration are generated by the AR TTS system and then used to train the target non-AR model. Perceptual listening test results showed that the proposed method significantly improved the quality of the non-AR TTS system. In particular, we augmented five hours of a training database to 179 hours of a synthetic one. Using these databases, our TTS system consisting of a FastSpeech 2 acoustic model with a Parallel WaveGAN vocoder achieved a mean opinion score of 3.74, which is 40% higher than that achieved by the conventional method.
summary: In this paper, we propose a text-to-speech (TTS)-driven data augmentation method for improving the quality of a non-autoregressive (AR) TTS system. Recently proposed non-AR models, such as FastSpeech 2, have successfully achieved fast speech synthesis system. However, their quality is not satisfactory, especially when the amount of training data is insufficient. To address this problem, we propose an effective data augmentation method using a well-designed AR TTS system. In this method, large-scale synthetic corpora including text-waveform pairs with phoneme duration are generated by the AR TTS system and then used to train the target non-AR model. Perceptual listening test results showed that the proposed method significantly improved the quality of the non-AR TTS system. In particular, we augmented five hours of a training database to 179 hours of a synthetic one. Using these databases, our TTS system consisting of a FastSpeech 2 acoustic model with a Parallel WaveGAN vocoder achieved a mean opinion score of 3.74, which is 40% higher than that achieved by the conventional method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种文本转语音 (TTS) 驱动的数据增强方法，用于提高非自回归 (AR) TTS 系统的质量。最近提出的非AR模型，例如FastSpeech 2，已经成功实现了快速语音合成系统。然而，它们的质量并不令人满意，特别是当训练数据量不足时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种使用精心设计的 AR TTS 系统的有效数据增强方法。在该方法中，AR TTS 系统生成包括具有音素持续时间的文本波形对的大规模合成语料库，然后用于训练目标非 AR 模型。感知听力测试结果表明，该方法显着提高了非AR TTS系统的质量。特别是，我们将 5 小时的训练数据库增加到 179 小时的合成数据库。使用这些数据库，我们的 TTS 系统由 FastSpeech 2 声学模型和 Parallel WaveGAN 声码器组成，平均意见得分为 3.74，比传统方法高出 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于TTS的非自回归语音合成数据增强方法，通过自回归TTS生成高质量合成数据提升非自回归模型性能。
AI.motivation: 非自回归TTS模型（如FastSpeech 2）虽具备快速合成优势，但受限于训练数据不足导致合成质量下降，亟需有效数据增强方案。
AI.method: 构建自回归TTS系统生成包含音素时长的文本-波形对合成数据（5小时→179小时），用于训练非自回归模型的声学模型与Parallel WaveGAN声码器。
AI.result: 感知测试显示合成质量提升40%，系统MOS达3.74，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: TTS驱动的数据增强策略可有效提升非自回归TTS系统质量，验证了合成数据在语音生成任务中的关键作用。
