search_text: TTS-by-TTS: TTS-driven Data Augmentation for Fast and High-Quality Speech Synthesis TTS-by-TTS：TTS 驱动的数据增强，用于快速、高质量的语音合成 In this paper, we propose a text-to-speech (TTS)-driven data augmentation method for improving the quality of a non-autoregressive (AR) TTS system. Recently proposed non-AR models, such as FastSpeech 2, have successfully achieved fast speech synthesis system. However, their quality is not satisfactory, especially when the amount of training data is insufficient. To address this problem, we propose an effective data augmentation method using a well-designed AR TTS system. In this method, large-scale synthetic corpora including text-waveform pairs with phoneme duration are generated by the AR TTS system and then used to train the target non-AR model. Perceptual listening test results showed that the proposed method significantly improved the quality of the non-AR TTS system. In particular, we augmented five hours of a training database to 179 hours of a synthetic one. Using these databases, our TTS system consisting of a FastSpeech 2 acoustic model with a Parallel WaveGAN vocoder achieved a mean opinion score of 3.74, which is 40% higher than that achieved by the conventional method. 在本文中，我们提出了一种文本转语音 (TTS) 驱动的数据增强方法，用于提高非自回归 (AR) TTS 系统的质量。最近提出的非AR模型，例如FastSpeech 2，已经成功实现了快速语音合成系统。然而，它们的质量并不令人满意，特别是当训练数据量不足时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种使用精心设计的 AR TTS 系统的有效数据增强方法。在该方法中，AR TTS 系统生成包括具有音素持续时间的文本波形对的大规模合成语料库，然后用于训练目标非 AR 模型。感知听力测试结果表明，该方法显着提高了非AR TTS系统的质量。特别是，我们将 5 小时的训练数据库增加到 179 小时的合成数据库。使用这些数据库，我们的 TTS 系统由 FastSpeech 2 声学模型和 Parallel WaveGAN 声码器组成，平均意见得分为 3.74，比传统方法高出 40%。 本文提出一种基于TTS的非自回归语音合成数据增强方法，通过自回归TTS生成高质量合成数据提升非自回归模型性能。 Min-Jae Hwang,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Eunwoo Song,Jae-Min Kim eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Aozhi Liu,Lipei Zhang,Yaqi Mei,Baoqiang Han,Zifeng Cai,Zhaohua Zhu,Jing Xiao
title: Residual Recurrent CRNN for End-to-End Optical Music Recognition on Monophonic Scores
title_zh: 用于单音乐谱端到端光学音乐识别的残差循环 CRNN
abstract: One of the challenges of the Optical Music Recognition task is to transcript the symbols of the camera-captured images into digital music notations. Previous end-to-end model which was developed as a Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network does not explore sufficient contextual information from full scales and there is still a large room for improvement. We propose an innovative framework that combines a block of Residual Recurrent Convolutional Neural Network with a recurrent Encoder-Decoder network to map a sequence of monophonic music symbols corresponding to the notations present in the image. The Residual Recurrent Convolutional block can improve the ability of the model to enrich the context information. The experiment results are benchmarked against a publicly available dataset called CAMERA-PRIMUS, which demonstrates that our approach surpass the state-of-the-art end-to-end method using Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network.
summary: One of the challenges of the Optical Music Recognition task is to transcript the symbols of the camera-captured images into digital music notations. Previous end-to-end model which was developed as a Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network does not explore sufficient contextual information from full scales and there is still a large room for improvement. We propose an innovative framework that combines a block of Residual Recurrent Convolutional Neural Network with a recurrent Encoder-Decoder network to map a sequence of monophonic music symbols corresponding to the notations present in the image. The Residual Recurrent Convolutional block can improve the ability of the model to enrich the context information. The experiment results are benchmarked against a publicly available dataset called CAMERA-PRIMUS, which demonstrates that our approach surpass the state-of-the-art end-to-end method using Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network.
abstract_zh: 光学音乐识别任务的挑战之一是将相机捕获的图像的符号转录为数字音乐符号。以前作为卷积循环神经网络开发的端到端模型没有从全尺度探索足够的上下文信息，仍然有很大的改进空间。我们提出了一种创新框架，它将残差循环卷积神经网络块与循环编码器-解码器网络相结合，以映射与图像中存在的符号相对应的单音音乐符号序列。残差循环卷积块可以提高模型丰富上下文信息的能力。实验结果以名为 CAMERA-PRIMUS 的公开数据集为基准，这表明我们的方法超越了使用卷积递归神经网络的最先进的端到端方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端的残差循环CRNN框架，用于单声道乐谱的光学音乐识别，将图像中的符号转录为数字乐谱。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端CRNN模型未能充分捕捉乐谱符号的全局上下文信息，导致识别性能存在提升空间。
AI.method: 融合残差循环卷积块与编码器-解码器结构，通过残差连接增强特征表达，利用循环网络建模序列依赖关系。
AI.result: 在CAMERA-PRIMUS数据集上超越了现有CRNN方法，在单声道乐谱识别任务中取得更优准确率。
AI.conclusion: 残差循环结构有效提升了上下文建模能力，编码器-解码器框架实现了更准确的符号序列映射，为光学音乐识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chongyi Li,Chunle Guo,Qiming Ai,Shangchen Zhou,Chen Change Loy
title: Flexible Piecewise Curves Estimation for Photo Enhancement
title_zh: 用于照片增强的灵活分段曲线估计
abstract: This paper presents a new method, called FlexiCurve, for photo enhancement. Unlike most existing methods that perform image-to-image mapping, which requires expensive pixel-wise reconstruction, FlexiCurve takes an input image and estimates global curves to adjust the image. The adjustment curves are specially designed for performing piecewise mapping, taking nonlinear adjustment and differentiability into account. To cope with challenging and diverse illumination properties in real-world images, FlexiCurve is formulated as a multi-task framework to produce diverse estimations and the associated confidence maps. These estimations are adaptively fused to improve local enhancements of different regions. Thanks to the image-to-curve formulation, for an image with a size of 512*512*3, FlexiCurve only needs a lightweight network (150K trainable parameters) and it has a fast inference speed (83FPS on a single NVIDIA 2080Ti GPU). The proposed method improves efficiency without compromising the enhancement quality and losing details in the original image. The method is also appealing as it is not limited to paired training data, thus it can flexibly learn rich enhancement styles from unpaired data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on photo enhancement quantitively and qualitatively.
summary: This paper presents a new method, called FlexiCurve, for photo enhancement. Unlike most existing methods that perform image-to-image mapping, which requires expensive pixel-wise reconstruction, FlexiCurve takes an input image and estimates global curves to adjust the image. The adjustment curves are specially designed for performing piecewise mapping, taking nonlinear adjustment and differentiability into account. To cope with challenging and diverse illumination properties in real-world images, FlexiCurve is formulated as a multi-task framework to produce diverse estimations and the associated confidence maps. These estimations are adaptively fused to improve local enhancements of different regions. Thanks to the image-to-curve formulation, for an image with a size of 512*512*3, FlexiCurve only needs a lightweight network (150K trainable parameters) and it has a fast inference speed (83FPS on a single NVIDIA 2080Ti GPU). The proposed method improves efficiency without compromising the enhancement quality and losing details in the original image. The method is also appealing as it is not limited to paired training data, thus it can flexibly learn rich enhancement styles from unpaired data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on photo enhancement quantitively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种称为 FlexiCurve 的新方法，用于照片增强。与大多数执行图像到图像映射的现有方法不同，FlexiCurve 需要昂贵的像素级重建，它采用输入图像并估计全局曲线来调整图像。调整曲线是专门为执行分段映射而设计的，考虑了非线性调整和可微性。为了应对现实世界图像中具有挑战性和多样化的照明属性，FlexiCurve 被制定为多任务框架，以生成不同的估计和相关的置信图。这些估计被自适应地融合以改善不同区域的局部增强。得益于图像到曲线的公式，对于尺寸为 512*512*3 的图像，FlexiCurve 仅需要一个轻量级网络（150K 可训练参数），并且具有快速的推理速度（在单个 NVIDIA 2080Ti GPU 上为 83FPS）。所提出的方法在不影响增强质量和丢失原始图像细节的情况下提高了效率。该方法也很有吸引力，因为它不限于配对训练数据，因此它可以灵活地从不配对数据中学习丰富的增强风格。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在定量和定性方面实现了最先进的照片增强性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FlexiCurve的新方法，通过估计全局分段曲线进行图像增强，替代传统的像素级重建方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强方法依赖耗时的像素级重建，且难以处理真实场景中复杂的光照变化。FlexiCurve旨在通过轻量级曲线估计提升效率并保持细节。
AI.method: FlexiCurve采用多任务框架估计非线性分段调整曲线，结合可微性设计，并通过置信度图自适应融合不同区域增强结果。网络参数量仅150K，推理速度达83FPS。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，FlexiCurve在定量和定性指标上均达到SOTA性能，且无需配对训练数据即可学习丰富的增强风格。
AI.conclusion: FlexiCurve通过图像到曲线的转换，实现了高效且高质量的图像增强，为真实场景下的光照适应性问题提供了灵活解决方案。

search_text: Flexible Piecewise Curves Estimation for Photo Enhancement 用于照片增强的灵活分段曲线估计 This paper presents a new method, called FlexiCurve, for photo enhancement. Unlike most existing methods that perform image-to-image mapping, which requires expensive pixel-wise reconstruction, FlexiCurve takes an input image and estimates global curves to adjust the image. The adjustment curves are specially designed for performing piecewise mapping, taking nonlinear adjustment and differentiability into account. To cope with challenging and diverse illumination properties in real-world images, FlexiCurve is formulated as a multi-task framework to produce diverse estimations and the associated confidence maps. These estimations are adaptively fused to improve local enhancements of different regions. Thanks to the image-to-curve formulation, for an image with a size of 512*512*3, FlexiCurve only needs a lightweight network (150K trainable parameters) and it has a fast inference speed (83FPS on a single NVIDIA 2080Ti GPU). The proposed method improves efficiency without compromising the enhancement quality and losing details in the original image. The method is also appealing as it is not limited to paired training data, thus it can flexibly learn rich enhancement styles from unpaired data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on photo enhancement quantitively and qualitatively. 本文提出了一种称为 FlexiCurve 的新方法，用于照片增强。与大多数执行图像到图像映射的现有方法不同，FlexiCurve 需要昂贵的像素级重建，它采用输入图像并估计全局曲线来调整图像。调整曲线是专门为执行分段映射而设计的，考虑了非线性调整和可微性。为了应对现实世界图像中具有挑战性和多样化的照明属性，FlexiCurve 被制定为多任务框架，以生成不同的估计和相关的置信图。这些估计被自适应地融合以改善不同区域的局部增强。得益于图像到曲线的公式，对于尺寸为 512*512*3 的图像，FlexiCurve 仅需要一个轻量级网络（150K 可训练参数），并且具有快速的推理速度（在单个 NVIDIA 2080Ti GPU 上为 83FPS）。所提出的方法在不影响增强质量和丢失原始图像细节的情况下提高了效率。该方法也很有吸引力，因为它不限于配对训练数据，因此它可以灵活地从不配对数据中学习丰富的增强风格。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在定量和定性方面实现了最先进的照片增强性能。 本文提出了一种名为FlexiCurve的新方法，通过估计全局分段曲线进行图像增强，替代传统的像素级重建方法。 Chongyi Li,Chunle Guo,Qiming Ai,Shangchen Zhou,Chen Change Loy cs.CV

title: Behavioral decision-making for urban autonomous driving in the presence of pedestrians using Deep Recurrent Q-Network
title_zh: 使用深度循环 Q 网络在有行人的情况下进行城市自动驾驶的行为决策
comment: ef:16th International Conference on Control, Automation, Robotics and Vision (ICARCV), Dec 2020, Shenzhen, China
comments: ef:16th International Conference on Control, Automation, Robotics and Vision (ICARCV), Dec 2020, Shenzhen, China
abstract: Decision making for autonomous driving in urban environments is challenging due to the complexity of the road structure and the uncertainty in the behavior of diverse road users. Traditional methods consist of manually designed rules as the driving policy, which require expert domain knowledge, are difficult to generalize and might give sub-optimal results as the environment gets complex. Whereas, using reinforcement learning, optimal driving policy could be learned and improved automatically through several interactions with the environment. However, current research in the field of reinforcement learning for autonomous driving is mainly focused on highway setup with little to no emphasis on urban environments. In this work, a deep reinforcement learning based decision-making approach for high-level driving behavior is proposed for urban environments in the presence of pedestrians. For this, the use of Deep Recurrent Q-Network (DRQN) is explored, a method combining state-of-the art Deep Q-Network (DQN) with a long term short term memory (LSTM) layer helping the agent gain a memory of the environment. A 3-D state representation is designed as the input combined with a well defined reward function to train the agent for learning an appropriate behavior policy in a real-world like urban simulator. The proposed method is evaluated for dense urban scenarios and compared with a rule-based approach and results show that the proposed DRQN based driving behavior decision maker outperforms the rule-based approach.
summary: Decision making for autonomous driving in urban environments is challenging due to the complexity of the road structure and the uncertainty in the behavior of diverse road users. Traditional methods consist of manually designed rules as the driving policy, which require expert domain knowledge, are difficult to generalize and might give sub-optimal results as the environment gets complex. Whereas, using reinforcement learning, optimal driving policy could be learned and improved automatically through several interactions with the environment. However, current research in the field of reinforcement learning for autonomous driving is mainly focused on highway setup with little to no emphasis on urban environments. In this work, a deep reinforcement learning based decision-making approach for high-level driving behavior is proposed for urban environments in the presence of pedestrians. For this, the use of Deep Recurrent Q-Network (DRQN) is explored, a method combining state-of-the art Deep Q-Network (DQN) with a long term short term memory (LSTM) layer helping the agent gain a memory of the environment. A 3-D state representation is designed as the input combined with a well defined reward function to train the agent for learning an appropriate behavior policy in a real-world like urban simulator. The proposed method is evaluated for dense urban scenarios and compared with a rule-based approach and results show that the proposed DRQN based driving behavior decision maker outperforms the rule-based approach.
abstract_zh: 由于道路结构的复杂性和不同道路使用者行为的不确定性，城市环境中自动驾驶的决策具有挑战性。传统方法由手动设计的规则作为驱动策略，需要专业领域知识，难以泛化，并且随着环境变得复杂，可能会给出次优结果。然而，使用强化学习，可以通过与环境的多次交互来自动学习和改进最佳驾驶策略。然而，目前自动驾驶强化学习领域的研究主要集中在高速公路设置上，很少甚至不重视城市环境。在这项工作中，针对有行人存在的城市环境，提出了一种基于深度强化学习的高级驾驶行为决策方法。为此，我们探索了深度循环 Q 网络 (DRQN) 的使用，这是一种将最先进的深度 Q 网络 (DQN) 与长期短期记忆 (LSTM) 层相结合的方法，帮助智能体获得环境记忆。 3D 状态表示被设计为与明确定义的奖励函数相结合的输入，以训练代理在城市模拟器等现实世界中学习适当的行为策略。所提出的方法针对密集的城市场景进行了评估，并与基于规则的方法进行了比较，结果表明所提出的基于 DRQN 的驾驶行为决策者优于基于规则的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度递归Q网络（DRQN）的城市自动驾驶决策方法，用于在行人存在的复杂城市环境中进行高阶驾驶行为决策。
AI.motivation: 传统基于规则的城市自动驾驶策略依赖专家知识且泛化能力差，而现有强化学习研究多集中于高速公路场景，缺乏对城市环境及行人交互的充分考虑。
AI.method: 结合深度Q网络（DQN）与长短期记忆（LSTM）层构建DRQN模型，设计三维状态表示与明确奖励函数，在仿真环境中训练自动驾驶决策策略。
AI.result: 在密集城市场景测试中，DRQN方法在决策性能上优于传统规则-based方法，验证了其在复杂环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DRQN通过引入时序记忆机制，能有效处理城市环境中行人行为的不确定性，为自动驾驶提供了更优的决策框架。

authors_text: D. Abruzzese,D. Carnevale,A. Monti,C. Possieri,S. Rossi,M. Sassano,P. P. Valentini
title: Exoway: an exoskeleton on actuated wheels
title_zh: Exoway：驱动轮上的外骨骼
abstract: In this short work we present a low cost exoskeleton with actuated wheels that allows movements as well as skating-like steps. The simple structure and the actuated wheels allows to minimize the use of motors for locomotion. The structure is stabilized by an active control system that balances the structure and permit to be maneuvered by the driver whose commands are acquired by a dedicated hardware interface.
summary: In this short work we present a low cost exoskeleton with actuated wheels that allows movements as well as skating-like steps. The simple structure and the actuated wheels allows to minimize the use of motors for locomotion. The structure is stabilized by an active control system that balances the structure and permit to be maneuvered by the driver whose commands are acquired by a dedicated hardware interface.
abstract_zh: 在这篇简短的作品中，我们展示了一种带有驱动轮的低成本外骨骼，可以进行运动以及类似滑冰的步骤。简单的结构和驱动轮可以最大限度地减少运动电机的使用。该结构由主动控制系统稳定，该系统平衡结构并允许驾驶员进行操纵，驾驶员的命令通过专用硬件接口获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低成本的外骨骼装置Exoway，通过驱动轮实现移动和滑冰步态，简化结构并减少电机使用。
AI.motivation: 传统外骨骼设备成本高且结构复杂，需开发更经济、结构简单的替代方案以实现稳定移动。
AI.method: 采用驱动轮作为主要运动单元，结合主动控制系统与专用硬件接口，通过简化机械结构降低电机依赖。
AI.result: 成功实现原型机，验证了驱动轮结构与主动控制系统的有效性，达到低成本移动目标。
AI.conclusion: Exoway展示了通过创新结构设计降低外骨骼成本的可行性，为个人移动辅助设备提供新思路。

title: Video-based Facial Expression Recognition using Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 使用图卷积网络进行基于视频的面部表情识别
abstract: Facial expression recognition (FER), aiming to classify the expression present in the facial image or video, has attracted a lot of research interests in the field of artificial intelligence and multimedia. In terms of video based FER task, it is sensible to capture the dynamic expression variation among the frames to recognize facial expression. However, existing methods directly utilize CNN-RNN or 3D CNN to extract the spatial-temporal features from different facial units, instead of concentrating on a certain region during expression variation capturing, which leads to limited performance in FER. In our paper, we introduce a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) layer into a common CNN-RNN based model for video-based FER. First, the GCN layer is utilized to learn more significant facial expression features which concentrate on certain regions after sharing information between extracted CNN features of nodes. Then, a LSTM layer is applied to learn long-term dependencies among the GCN learned features to model the variation. In addition, a weight assignment mechanism is also designed to weight the output of different nodes for final classification by characterizing the expression intensities in each frame. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time to use GCN in FER task. We evaluate our method on three widely-used datasets, CK+, Oulu-CASIA and MMI, and also one challenging wild dataset AFEW8.0, and the experimental results demonstrate that our method has superior performance to existing methods.

In terms of video based FER task, it is sensible to capture the dynamic expression variation among the frames to recognize facial expression. However, existing methods directly utilize CNN-RNN or 3D CNN to extract the spatial-temporal features from different facial units, instead of concentrating on a certain region during expression variation capturing, which leads to limited performance in FER. In our paper, we introduce a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) layer into a common CNN-RNN based model for video-based FER. First, the GCN layer is utilized to learn more significant facial expression features which concentrate on certain regions after sharing information between extracted CNN features of nodes. Then, a LSTM layer is applied to learn long-term dependencies among the GCN learned features to model the variation. In addition, a weight assignment mechanism is also designed to weight the output of different nodes for final classification by characterizing the expression intensities in each frame. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time to use GCN in FER task. We evaluate our method on three widely-used datasets, CK+, Oulu-CASIA and MMI, and also one challenging wild dataset AFEW8.0, and the experimental results demonstrate that our method has superior performance to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别（FER）旨在对面部图像或视频中存在的表情进行分类，吸引了人工智能和多媒体领域的大量研究兴趣。就基于视频的 FER 任务而言，捕捉帧之间的动态表情变化来识别面部表情是明智的。然而，现有方法直接利用 CNN-RNN 或 3D CNN 提取不同面部单元的时空特征，而不是在表情变化捕获时集中于某个区域，这导致 FER 的性能有限。在我们的论文中，我们将图卷积网络 (GCN) 层引入到基于 CNN-RNN 的通用模型中，用于基于视频的 FER。首先，在节点提取的 CNN 特征之间共享信息后，GCN 层用于学习更重要的面部表情特征，这些特征集中在某些区域。然后，应用 LSTM 层来学习 GCN 学习到的特征之间的长期依赖性，以对变化进行建模。此外，还设计了权重分配机制，通过表征每帧中的表达强度来对不同节点的输出进行加权以进行最终分类。据我们所知，这是第一次在 FER 任务中使用 GCN。我们在三个广泛使用的数据集 CK+、Oulu-CASIA 和 MMI 以及一个具有挑战性的野生数据集 AFEW8.0 上评估我们的方法，实验结果表明我们的方法比现有方法具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）和LSTM的视频面部表情识别方法，通过关注特定面部区域并建模时序变化提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频表情识别方法（如CNN-RNN/3D CNN）未聚焦特定面部区域，导致动态表情变化特征提取不足，影响识别效果。
AI.method: 将GCN层集成到CNN-RNN框架中，通过节点间信息共享提取关键区域特征，结合LSTM建模时序依赖，并设计权重分配机制加权节点输出。
AI.result: 在CK+、Oulu-CASIA、MMI和AFEW8.0四个数据集上均优于现有方法，尤其在复杂野外观测数据集表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 首次将GCN应用于表情识别任务，通过区域特征聚焦与时序建模有效提升了视频表情识别的准确率。

However, existing methods directly utilize CNN-RNN or 3D CNN to extract the spatial-temporal features from different facial units, instead of concentrating on a certain region during expression variation capturing, which leads to limited performance in FER. In our paper, we introduce a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) layer into a common CNN-RNN based model for video-based FER. First, the GCN layer is utilized to learn more significant facial expression features which concentrate on certain regions after sharing information between extracted CNN features of nodes. Then, a LSTM layer is applied to learn long-term dependencies among the GCN learned features to model the variation. In addition, a weight assignment mechanism is also designed to weight the output of different nodes for final classification by characterizing the expression intensities in each frame. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time to use GCN in FER task. We evaluate our method on three widely-used datasets, CK+, Oulu-CASIA and MMI, and also one challenging wild dataset AFEW8.0, and the experimental results demonstrate that our method has superior performance to existing methods. 面部表情识别（FER）旨在对面部图像或视频中存在的表情进行分类，吸引了人工智能和多媒体领域的大量研究兴趣。就基于视频的 FER 任务而言，捕捉帧之间的动态表情变化来识别面部表情是明智的。然而，现有方法直接利用 CNN-RNN 或 3D CNN 提取不同面部单元的时空特征，而不是在表情变化捕获时集中于某个区域，这导致 FER 的性能有限。在我们的论文中，我们将图卷积网络 (GCN) 层引入到基于 CNN-RNN 的通用模型中，用于基于视频的 FER。首先，在节点提取的 CNN 特征之间共享信息后，GCN 层用于学习更重要的面部表情特征，这些特征集中在某些区域。然后，应用 LSTM 层来学习 GCN 学习到的特征之间的长期依赖性，以对变化进行建模。此外，还设计了权重分配机制，通过表征每帧中的表达强度来对不同节点的输出进行加权以进行最终分类。据我们所知，这是第一次在 FER 任务中使用 GCN。我们在三个广泛使用的数据集 CK+、Oulu-CASIA 和 MMI 以及一个具有挑战性的野生数据集 AFEW8.0 上评估我们的方法，实验结果表明我们的方法比现有方法具有优越的性能。 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）和LSTM的视频面部表情识别方法，通过关注特定面部区域并建模时序变化提升识别性能。 Daizong Liu,Hongting Zhang,Pan Zhou cs.CV

title: The training accuracy of two-layer neural networks: its estimation and understanding using random datasets
title_zh: 两层神经网络的训练精度：使用随机数据集的估计和理解
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures. Accepted by IEEE AIPR 2023 (Oral)
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures. Accepted by IEEE AIPR 2023 (Oral)
abstract: Although the neural network (NN) technique plays an important role in machine learning, understanding the mechanism of NN models and the transparency of deep learning still require more basic research. In this study, we propose a novel theory based on space partitioning to estimate the approximate training accuracy for two-layer neural networks on random datasets without training. There appear to be no other studies that have proposed a method to estimate training accuracy without using input data and/or trained models. Our method estimates the training accuracy for two-layer fully-connected neural networks on two-class random datasets using only three arguments: the dimensionality of inputs (d), the number of inputs (N), and the number of neurons in the hidden layer (L). We have verified our method using real training accuracies in our experiments. The results indicate that the method will work for any dimension, and the proposed theory could extend also to estimate deeper NN models. The main purpose of this paper is to understand the mechanism of NN models by the approach of estimating training accuracy but not to analyze their generalization nor their performance in real-world applications. This study may provide a starting point for a new way for researchers to make progress on the difficult problem of understanding deep learning.
summary: Although the neural network (NN) technique plays an important role in machine learning, understanding the mechanism of NN models and the transparency of deep learning still require more basic research. In this study, we propose a novel theory based on space partitioning to estimate the approximate training accuracy for two-layer neural networks on random datasets without training. There appear to be no other studies that have proposed a method to estimate training accuracy without using input data and/or trained models. Our method estimates the training accuracy for two-layer fully-connected neural networks on two-class random datasets using only three arguments: the dimensionality of inputs (d), the number of inputs (N), and the number of neurons in the hidden layer (L). We have verified our method using real training accuracies in our experiments. The results indicate that the method will work for any dimension, and the proposed theory could extend also to estimate deeper NN models. The main purpose of this paper is to understand the mechanism of NN models by the approach of estimating training accuracy but not to analyze their generalization nor their performance in real-world applications. This study may provide a starting point for a new way for researchers to make progress on the difficult problem of understanding deep learning.
abstract_zh: 尽管神经网络（NN）技术在机器学习中发挥着重要作用，但理解神经网络模型的机制和深度学习的透明度仍然需要更多的基础研究。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于空间划分的新颖理论，用于估计未经训练的随机数据集上的两层神经网络的近似训练精度。似乎没有其他研究提出了一种在不使用输入数据和/或训练模型的情况下估计训练准确性的方法。我们的方法仅使用三个参数来估计两类随机数据集上的两层全连接神经网络的训练精度：输入的维数 (d)、输入的数量 (N) 和隐藏层中的神经元数量 (L)。我们在实验中使用真实的训练精度验证了我们的方法。结果表明该方法适用于任何维度，并且所提出的理论也可以扩展到估计更深的神经网络模型。本文的主要目的是通过估计训练精度的方法来理解神经网络模型的机制，而不是分析它们的泛化性或在实际应用中的性能。这项研究可能为研究人员在理解深度学习这一难题上取得进展提供新的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间划分理论的方法，无需训练即可估计两层神经网络在随机数据集上的训练准确率。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络在机器学习中广泛应用，但其机制理解和深度学习透明度仍需基础研究，现有研究缺乏无需输入数据或训练模型即可估计训练准确率的方法。
AI.method: 通过空间划分理论，仅利用输入维度(d)、样本数量(N)和隐藏层神经元数量(L)三个参数，提出无需训练的训练准确率估计方法，并通过实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法适用于任意维度，且理论可扩展至更深层网络；但研究重点在于理解网络机制，而非泛化能力或实际应用性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解深度学习机制提供了新思路，通过训练准确率估计方法为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: What is the best data augmentation for 3D brain tumor segmentation?
title_zh: 3D 脑肿瘤分割的最佳数据增强是什么？
abstract: Training segmentation networks requires large annotated datasets, which in medical imaging can be hard to obtain. Despite this fact, data augmentation has in our opinion not been fully explored for brain tumor segmentation. In this project we apply different types of data augmentation (flipping, rotation, scaling, brightness adjustment, elastic deformation) when training a standard 3D U-Net, and demonstrate that augmentation significantly improves the network's performance in many cases. Our conclusion is that brightness augmentation and elastic deformation work best, and that combinations of different augmentation techniques do not provide further improvement compared to only using one augmentation technique. Our code is available at https://github.com/mdciri/3D-augmentation-techniques.
summary: Training segmentation networks requires large annotated datasets, which in medical imaging can be hard to obtain. Despite this fact, data augmentation has in our opinion not been fully explored for brain tumor segmentation. In this project we apply different types of data augmentation (flipping, rotation, scaling, brightness adjustment, elastic deformation) when training a standard 3D U-Net, and demonstrate that augmentation significantly improves the network's performance in many cases. Our conclusion is that brightness augmentation and elastic deformation work best, and that combinations of different augmentation techniques do not provide further improvement compared to only using one augmentation technique. Our code is available at https://github.com/mdciri/3D-augmentation-techniques.
abstract_zh: 训练分割网络需要大量带注释的数据集，这在医学成像中很难获得。尽管如此，我们认为数据增强在脑肿瘤分割方面尚未得到充分探索。在这个项目中，我们在训练标准 3D U-Net 时应用了不同类型的数据增强（翻转、旋转、缩放、亮度调整、弹性变形），并证明增强在许多情况下可以显着提高网络的性能。我们的结论是，亮度增强和弹性变形效果最好，并且与仅使用一种增强技术相比，不同增强技术的组合并不能提供进一步的改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mdciri/3D-augmentation-techniques 获取。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了不同数据增强方法对3D脑肿瘤分割任务的影响，旨在找到最优的数据增强策略。
AI.motivation: 医学影像标注数据获取困难，而数据增强在脑肿瘤分割中的应用尚未充分探索，需验证其有效性并确定最佳方法。
AI.method: 在标准3D U-Net训练中应用多种数据增强技术（翻转、旋转、缩放、亮度调整、弹性变形），并比较不同方法及组合的效果。
AI.result: 数据增强显著提升模型性能，其中亮度增强和弹性变形效果最佳，多种增强方法组合未带来额外提升。
AI.conclusion: 亮度调整与弹性变形是3D脑肿瘤分割中最有效的数据增强方法，单一方法已足够，无需复杂组合。

search_text: What is the best data augmentation for 3D brain tumor segmentation? 3D 脑肿瘤分割的最佳数据增强是什么？ Training segmentation networks requires large annotated datasets, which in medical imaging can be hard to obtain. Despite this fact, data augmentation has in our opinion not been fully explored for brain tumor segmentation. In this project we apply different types of data augmentation (flipping, rotation, scaling, brightness adjustment, elastic deformation) when training a standard 3D U-Net, and demonstrate that augmentation significantly improves the network's performance in many cases. Our conclusion is that brightness augmentation and elastic deformation work best, and that combinations of different augmentation techniques do not provide further improvement compared to only using one augmentation technique. Our code is available at https://github.com/mdciri/3D-augmentation-techniques. 训练分割网络需要大量带注释的数据集，这在医学成像中很难获得。尽管如此，我们认为数据增强在脑肿瘤分割方面尚未得到充分探索。在这个项目中，我们在训练标准 3D U-Net 时应用了不同类型的数据增强（翻转、旋转、缩放、亮度调整、弹性变形），并证明增强在许多情况下可以显着提高网络的性能。我们的结论是，亮度增强和弹性变形效果最好，并且与仅使用一种增强技术相比，不同增强技术的组合并不能提供进一步的改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mdciri/3D-augmentation-techniques 获取。 本研究探讨了不同数据增强方法对3D脑肿瘤分割任务的影响，旨在找到最优的数据增强策略。 Marco Domenico Cirillo,David Abramian,Anders Eklund eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Integrating end-to-end neural and clustering-based diarization: Getting the best of both worlds
title_zh: 集成端到端神经和基于聚类的二值化：两全其美
abstract: Recent diarization technologies can be categorized into two approaches, i.e., clustering and end-to-end neural approaches, which have different pros and cons. The clustering-based approaches assign speaker labels to speech regions by clustering speaker embeddings such as x-vectors. While it can be seen as a current state-of-the-art approach that works for various challenging data with reasonable robustness and accuracy, it has a critical disadvantage that it cannot handle overlapped speech that is inevitable in natural conversational data. In contrast, the end-to-end neural diarization (EEND), which directly predicts diarization labels using a neural network, was devised to handle the overlapped speech. While the EEND, which can easily incorporate emerging deep-learning technologies, has started outperforming the x-vector clustering approach in some realistic database, it is difficult to make it work for `long' recordings (e.g., recordings longer than 10 minutes) because of, e.g., its huge memory consumption. Block-wise independent processing is also difficult because it poses an inter-block label permutation problem, i.e., an ambiguity of the speaker label assignments between blocks. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective hybrid diarization framework that works with overlapped speech and for long recordings containing an arbitrary number of speakers. It modifies the conventional EEND framework to simultaneously output global speaker embeddings so that speaker clustering can be performed across blocks to solve the permutation problem. With experiments based on simulated noisy reverberant 2-speaker meeting-like data, we show that the proposed framework works significantly better than the original EEND especially when the input data is long.
summary: Recent diarization technologies can be categorized into two approaches, i.e., clustering and end-to-end neural approaches, which have different pros and cons. The clustering-based approaches assign speaker labels to speech regions by clustering speaker embeddings such as x-vectors. While it can be seen as a current state-of-the-art approach that works for various challenging data with reasonable robustness and accuracy, it has a critical disadvantage that it cannot handle overlapped speech that is inevitable in natural conversational data. In contrast, the end-to-end neural diarization (EEND), which directly predicts diarization labels using a neural network, was devised to handle the overlapped speech. While the EEND, which can easily incorporate emerging deep-learning technologies, has started outperforming the x-vector clustering approach in some realistic database, it is difficult to make it work for `long' recordings (e.g., recordings longer than 10 minutes) because of, e.g., its huge memory consumption. Block-wise independent processing is also difficult because it poses an inter-block label permutation problem, i.e., an ambiguity of the speaker label assignments between blocks. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective hybrid diarization framework that works with overlapped speech and for long recordings containing an arbitrary number of speakers. It modifies the conventional EEND framework to simultaneously output global speaker embeddings so that speaker clustering can be performed across blocks to solve the permutation problem. With experiments based on simulated noisy reverberant 2-speaker meeting-like data, we show that the proposed framework works significantly better than the original EEND especially when the input data is long.
abstract_zh: 最近的二值化技术可以分为两种方法，即聚类和端到端神经方法，它们各有优缺点。基于聚类的方法通过对说话人嵌入（例如 x 向量）进行聚类来将说话人标签分配给语音区域。虽然它可以被视为当前最先进的方法，可以以合理的稳健性和准确性适用于各种具有挑战性的数据，但它有一个严重的缺点，即它无法处理自然会话数据中不可避免的重叠语音。相比之下，端到端神经二值化（EEND）是为了处理重叠语音而设计的，它使用神经网络直接预测二值化标签。虽然可以轻松整合新兴深度学习技术的 EEND 在某些实际数据库中的性能已开始优于 x 向量聚类方法，但由于其巨大的内存消耗等原因，很难使其适用于“长”记录（例如，超过 10 分钟的记录）。逐块独立处理也很困难，因为它提出了块间标签排列问题，即块之间说话者标签分配的模糊性。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的混合二值化框架，该框架适用于重叠语音和包含任意数量说话者的长录音。它修改了传统的EEND框架以同时输出全局说话人嵌入，以便可以跨块进行说话人聚类以解决排列问题。通过基于模拟噪声混响 2 发言者会议数据的实验，我们表明所提出的框架明显优于原始 EEND，尤其是当输入数据很长时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合端到端神经网络与聚类方法的混合说话人分割框架，以解决重叠语音和长时录音的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法（如x-vector）虽准确但无法处理重叠语音，而端到端神经分割（EEND）虽能处理重叠但难以应对长录音及块间标签排列问题，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 修改EEND框架使其输出全局说话人嵌入，通过跨块聚类解决块间标签排列问题，实现对长录音和重叠语音的有效分割。
AI.result: 在模拟噪声混响的双人会议数据上，新框架在长录音场景下显著优于原始EEND方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合框架有效结合了神经网络与聚类方法的优势，为处理复杂场景下的说话人分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Philipp Benz,Chaoning Zhang,Adil Karjauv,In So Kweon
title: Robustness May Be at Odds with Fairness: An Empirical Study on Class-wise Accuracy
title_zh: 鲁棒性可能与公平性相矛盾：对类别准确性的实证研究
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made significant advancement, however, they are widely known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial training is the most widely used technique for improving adversarial robustness to strong white-box attacks. Prior works have been evaluating and improving the model average robustness without class-wise evaluation. The average evaluation alone might provide a false sense of robustness. For example, the attacker can focus on attacking the vulnerable class, which can be dangerous, especially, when the vulnerable class is a critical one, such as "human" in autonomous driving. We propose an empirical study on the class-wise accuracy and robustness of adversarially trained models. We find that there exists inter-class discrepancy for accuracy and robustness even when the training dataset has an equal number of samples for each class. For example, in CIFAR10, "cat" is much more vulnerable than other classes. Moreover, this inter-class discrepancy also exists for normally trained models, while adversarial training tends to further increase the discrepancy. Our work aims to investigate the following questions: (a) is the phenomenon of inter-class discrepancy universal regardless of datasets, model architectures and optimization hyper-parameters? (b) If so, what can be possible explanations for the inter-class discrepancy? (c) Can the techniques proposed in the long tail classification be readily extended to adversarial training for addressing the inter-class discrepancy?
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made significant advancement, however, they are widely known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial training is the most widely used technique for improving adversarial robustness to strong white-box attacks. Prior works have been evaluating and improving the model average robustness without class-wise evaluation. The average evaluation alone might provide a false sense of robustness. For example, the attacker can focus on attacking the vulnerable class, which can be dangerous, especially, when the vulnerable class is a critical one, such as "human" in autonomous driving. We propose an empirical study on the class-wise accuracy and robustness of adversarially trained models. We find that there exists inter-class discrepancy for accuracy and robustness even when the training dataset has an equal number of samples for each class. For example, in CIFAR10, "cat" is much more vulnerable than other classes. Moreover, this inter-class discrepancy also exists for normally trained models, while adversarial training tends to further increase the discrepancy. Our work aims to investigate the following questions: (a) is the phenomenon of inter-class discrepancy universal regardless of datasets, model architectures and optimization hyper-parameters? (b) If so, what can be possible explanations for the inter-class discrepancy? (c) Can the techniques proposed in the long tail classification be readily extended to adversarial training for addressing the inter-class discrepancy?
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已经取得了显着的进步，但众所周知，它们容易受到对抗性攻击。对抗训练是提高对抗强白盒攻击鲁棒性的最广泛使用的技术。先前的工作一直在评估和提高模型的平均鲁棒性，而无需进行类别评估。仅平均评估可能会提供稳健性的错误感觉。例如，攻击者可以集中攻击弱势群体，这可能是危险的，特别是当弱势群体是关键群体时，例如自动驾驶中的“人类”。我们提出了一项关于对抗训练模型的类别准确性和鲁棒性的实证研究。我们发现，即使训练数据集每个类别的样本数量相同，类别间的准确性和鲁棒性也存在差异。例如，在 CIFAR10 中，“猫”比其他类别更容易受到攻击。此外，这种类间差异对于正常训练的模型也存在，而对抗性训练往往会进一步增加这种差异。我们的工作旨在研究以下问题：（a）无论数据集、模型架构和优化超参数如何，类间差异现象是否普遍存在？ (b) 如果是这样，对类间差异的可能解释是什么？ (c) 长尾分类中提出的技术是否可以轻松扩展到对抗性训练以解决类间差异？

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究分析对抗训练模型在类间准确率和鲁棒性上的差异，探讨其普遍性及可能的解释。
AI.motivation: 平均鲁棒性评估可能掩盖关键类别的脆弱性，例如自动驾驶中‘人类’类别被攻击的危险性，需关注类间差异以确保公平性。
AI.method: 在CIFAR10等数据集上对比正常训练与对抗训练模型的类间表现，分析不同数据集、模型结构和超参数下的差异，并借鉴长尾分类技术探索解决方案。
AI.result: 即使数据集类别均衡，对抗训练模型仍存在类间差异（如CIFAR10中‘猫’更脆弱），且对抗训练加剧此类差异，现象具有普遍性。
AI.conclusion: 类间差异普遍存在，对抗训练可能加剧不均衡，需结合长尾分类方法优化对抗训练以缓解该问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过实证研究分析对抗训练模型在类间准确率和鲁棒性上的差异，探讨其普遍性及可能的解释。

search_text: Robustness May Be at Odds with Fairness: An Empirical Study on Class-wise Accuracy 鲁棒性可能与公平性相矛盾：对类别准确性的实证研究 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made significant advancement, however, they are widely known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial training is the most widely used technique for improving adversarial robustness to strong white-box attacks. Prior works have been evaluating and improving the model average robustness without class-wise evaluation. The average evaluation alone might provide a false sense of robustness. For example, the attacker can focus on attacking the vulnerable class, which can be dangerous, especially, when the vulnerable class is a critical one, such as "human" in autonomous driving. We propose an empirical study on the class-wise accuracy and robustness of adversarially trained models. We find that there exists inter-class discrepancy for accuracy and robustness even when the training dataset has an equal number of samples for each class. For example, in CIFAR10, "cat" is much more vulnerable than other classes. Moreover, this inter-class discrepancy also exists for normally trained models, while adversarial training tends to further increase the discrepancy. Our work aims to investigate the following questions: (a) is the phenomenon of inter-class discrepancy universal regardless of datasets, model architectures and optimization hyper-parameters? (b) If so, what can be possible explanations for the inter-class discrepancy? (c) Can the techniques proposed in the long tail classification be readily extended to adversarial training for addressing the inter-class discrepancy? 卷积神经网络（CNN）已经取得了显着的进步，但众所周知，它们容易受到对抗性攻击。对抗训练是提高对抗强白盒攻击鲁棒性的最广泛使用的技术。先前的工作一直在评估和提高模型的平均鲁棒性，而无需进行类别评估。仅平均评估可能会提供稳健性的错误感觉。例如，攻击者可以集中攻击弱势群体，这可能是危险的，特别是当弱势群体是关键群体时，例如自动驾驶中的“人类”。我们提出了一项关于对抗训练模型的类别准确性和鲁棒性的实证研究。我们发现，即使训练数据集每个类别的样本数量相同，类别间的准确性和鲁棒性也存在差异。例如，在 CIFAR10 中，“猫”比其他类别更容易受到攻击。此外，这种类间差异对于正常训练的模型也存在，而对抗性训练往往会进一步增加这种差异。我们的工作旨在研究以下问题：（a）无论数据集、模型架构和优化超参数如何，类间差异现象是否普遍存在？ (b) 如果是这样，对类间差异的可能解释是什么？ (c) 长尾分类中提出的技术是否可以轻松扩展到对抗性训练以解决类间差异？ 本文通过实证研究分析对抗训练模型在类间准确率和鲁棒性上的差异，探讨其普遍性及可能的解释。 Philipp Benz,Chaoning Zhang,Adil Karjauv,In So Kweon cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Haibo Su,Peng Wang,Lingqiao Liu,Hui Li,Zhen Li,Yanning Zhang
title: Where to Look and How to Describe: Fashion Image Retrieval with an Attentional Heterogeneous Bilinear Network
title_zh: 在哪里看以及如何描述：使用注意异构双线性网络进行时尚图像检索
abstract: Fashion products typically feature in compositions of a variety of styles at different clothing parts. In order to distinguish images of different fashion products, we need to extract both appearance (i.e., "how to describe") and localization (i.e.,"where to look") information, and their interactions. To this end, we propose a biologically inspired framework for image-based fashion product retrieval, which mimics the hypothesized twostream visual processing system of human brain. The proposed attentional heterogeneous bilinear network (AHBN) consists of two branches: a deep CNN branch to extract fine-grained appearance attributes and a fully convolutional branch to extract landmark localization information. A joint channel-wise attention mechanism is further applied to the extracted heterogeneous features to focus on important channels, followed by a compact bilinear pooling layer to model the interaction of the two streams. Our proposed framework achieves satisfactory performance on three image-based fashion product retrieval benchmarks.
summary: Fashion products typically feature in compositions of a variety of styles at different clothing parts. In order to distinguish images of different fashion products, we need to extract both appearance (i.e., "how to describe") and localization (i.e.,"where to look") information, and their interactions. To this end, we propose a biologically inspired framework for image-based fashion product retrieval, which mimics the hypothesized twostream visual processing system of human brain. The proposed attentional heterogeneous bilinear network (AHBN) consists of two branches: a deep CNN branch to extract fine-grained appearance attributes and a fully convolutional branch to extract landmark localization information. A joint channel-wise attention mechanism is further applied to the extracted heterogeneous features to focus on important channels, followed by a compact bilinear pooling layer to model the interaction of the two streams. Our proposed framework achieves satisfactory performance on three image-based fashion product retrieval benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 时尚产品通常在不同的服装部位呈现出多种风格的组合。为了区分不同时尚产品的图像，我们需要提取外观（即“如何描述”）和本地化（即“在哪里看”）信息以及它们的交互。为此，我们提出了一种基于图像的时尚产品检索的受生物学启发的框架，该框架模仿了假设的人脑双流视觉处理系统。所提出的注意力异构双线性网络（AHBN）由两个分支组成：一个用于提取细粒度外观属性的深度 CNN 分支和一个用于提取地标定位信息的全卷积分支。联合通道注意机制进一步应用于提取的异构特征，以关注重要通道，然后是紧凑的双线性池层来建模两个流的交互。我们提出的框架在三个基于图像的时尚产品检索基准上取得了令人满意的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的异构双线性网络（AHBN），用于时尚产品图像检索任务，通过结合外观描述与定位信息提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 时尚产品图像包含多部位风格组合，需同时捕捉外观特征（如何描述）与关键部位定位（关注何处）信息及其交互关系，以提升检索准确性。
AI.method: 构建双分支网络：1) 深度CNN提取细粒度外观属性；2) 全卷积网络提取关键点定位信息。通过通道级注意力机制融合异构特征，并采用紧凑双线性池化层建模双流交互。
AI.result: 在三个时尚图像检索基准数据集上取得满意性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: AHBN通过模拟人脑双通道视觉机制，有效结合外观与定位信息，为时尚图像检索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Guibin Chen,Bosheng Wang,Xiaoliang Wang,Huanjun Deng,Bing Wang,Shuo Zhang
title: PSF-LO: Parameterized Semantic Features Based Lidar Odometry
title_zh: PSF-LO：基于参数化语义特征的激光雷达里程计
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2021
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2021
abstract: Lidar odometry (LO) is a key technology in numerous reliable and accurate localization and mapping systems of autonomous driving. The state-of-the-art LO methods generally leverage geometric information to perform point cloud registration. Furthermore, obtaining point cloud semantic information which can describe the environment more abundantly will help for the registration. We present a novel semantic lidar odometry method based on self-designed parameterized semantic features (PSFs) to achieve low-drift ego-motion estimation for autonomous vehicle in realtime. We first use a convolutional neural network-based algorithm to obtain point-wise semantics from the input laser point cloud, and then use semantic labels to separate the road, building, traffic sign and pole-like point cloud and fit them separately to obtain corresponding PSFs. A fast PSF-based matching enable us to refine geometric features (GeFs) registration, reducing the impact of blurred submap surface on the accuracy of GeFs matching. Besides, we design an efficient method to accurately recognize and remove the dynamic objects while retaining static ones in the semantic point cloud, which are beneficial to further improve the accuracy of LO. We evaluated our method, namely PSF-LO, on the public dataset KITTI Odometry Benchmark and ranked #1 among semantic lidar methods with an average translation error of 0.82% in the test dataset at the time of writing.
summary: Lidar odometry (LO) is a key technology in numerous reliable and accurate localization and mapping systems of autonomous driving. The state-of-the-art LO methods generally leverage geometric information to perform point cloud registration. Furthermore, obtaining point cloud semantic information which can describe the environment more abundantly will help for the registration. We present a novel semantic lidar odometry method based on self-designed parameterized semantic features (PSFs) to achieve low-drift ego-motion estimation for autonomous vehicle in realtime. We first use a convolutional neural network-based algorithm to obtain point-wise semantics from the input laser point cloud, and then use semantic labels to separate the road, building, traffic sign and pole-like point cloud and fit them separately to obtain corresponding PSFs. A fast PSF-based matching enable us to refine geometric features (GeFs) registration, reducing the impact of blurred submap surface on the accuracy of GeFs matching. Besides, we design an efficient method to accurately recognize and remove the dynamic objects while retaining static ones in the semantic point cloud, which are beneficial to further improve the accuracy of LO. We evaluated our method, namely PSF-LO, on the public dataset KITTI Odometry Benchmark and ranked #1 among semantic lidar methods with an average translation error of 0.82% in the test dataset at the time of writing.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达里程计（LO）是众多可靠、准确的自动驾驶定位和地图系统中的关键技术。最先进的 LO 方法通常利用几何信息来执行点云配准。此外，获得能够更丰富地描述环境的点云语义信息将有助于配准。我们提出了一种基于自行设计的参数化语义特征（PSF）的新型语义激光雷达里程计方法，以实现自动驾驶车辆实时低漂移自我运动估计。我们首先使用基于卷积神经网络的算法从输入激光点云中获取逐点语义，然后使用语义标签将道路、建筑物、交通标志和杆状点云分开并分别拟合以获得相应的PSF。基于 PSF 的快速匹配使我们能够细化几何特征 (GeF) 配准，减少模糊子图表面对 GeF 匹配精度的影响。此外，我们设计了一种有效的方法来准确识别和去除动态对象，同时保留语义点云中的静态对象，这有利于进一步提高LO的准确性。我们在公共数据集 KITTI Odometry Benchmark 上评估了我们的方法（即 PSF-LO），并在语义激光雷达方法中排名第一，在撰写本文时，测试数据集中的平均翻译误差为 0.82%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参数化语义特征（PSF）的激光雷达里程计方法PSF-LO，用于实现自动驾驶车辆的实时低漂移自运动估计。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达里程计方法主要依赖几何信息进行点云配准，但缺乏对环境语义信息的充分利用，而语义信息能更丰富地描述环境并提升配准精度。
AI.method: 首先通过卷积神经网络获取点云语义标签，分离道路、建筑、交通标志等静态点云并拟合生成对应PSF；结合语义特征与几何特征进行快速匹配，同时设计动态物体识别与剔除方法以提升配准精度。
AI.result: 在KITTI Odometry Benchmark数据集上，PSF-LO方法以0.82%的平均平移误差位列语义激光雷达方法首位。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合语义特征与几何特征并有效剔除动态物体，PSF-LO方法显著提升了激光雷达里程计的精度与鲁棒性，达到了当时最先进的性能水平。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过融合语义特征与几何特征并有效剔除动态物体，PSF-LO方法显著提升了激光雷达里程计的精度与鲁棒性，达到了当时最先进的性能水平。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参数化语义特征（PSF）的激光雷达里程计方法PSF-LO，用于实现自动驾驶车辆的实时低漂移自运动估计。
motivation: 现有激光雷达里程计方法主要依赖几何信息进行点云配准，但缺乏对环境语义信息的充分利用，而语义信息能更丰富地描述环境并提升配准精度。
method: 首先通过卷积神经网络获取点云语义标签，分离道路、建筑、交通标志等静态点云并拟合生成对应PSF；结合语义特征与几何特征进行快速匹配，同时设计动态物体识别与剔除方法以提升配准精度。
result: 在KITTI Odometry Benchmark数据集上，PSF-LO方法以0.82%的平均平移误差位列语义激光雷达方法首位。
conclusion: 通过融合语义特征与几何特征并有效剔除动态物体，PSF-LO方法显著提升了激光雷达里程计的精度与鲁棒性，达到了当时最先进的性能水平。
search_text: PSF-LO: Parameterized Semantic Features Based Lidar Odometry PSF-LO：基于参数化语义特征的激光雷达里程计 Lidar odometry (LO) is a key technology in numerous reliable and accurate localization and mapping systems of autonomous driving. The state-of-the-art LO methods generally leverage geometric information to perform point cloud registration. Furthermore, obtaining point cloud semantic information which can describe the environment more abundantly will help for the registration. We present a novel semantic lidar odometry method based on self-designed parameterized semantic features (PSFs) to achieve low-drift ego-motion estimation for autonomous vehicle in realtime. We first use a convolutional neural network-based algorithm to obtain point-wise semantics from the input laser point cloud, and then use semantic labels to separate the road, building, traffic sign and pole-like point cloud and fit them separately to obtain corresponding PSFs. A fast PSF-based matching enable us to refine geometric features (GeFs) registration, reducing the impact of blurred submap surface on the accuracy of GeFs matching. Besides, we design an efficient method to accurately recognize and remove the dynamic objects while retaining static ones in the semantic point cloud, which are beneficial to further improve the accuracy of LO. We evaluated our method, namely PSF-LO, on the public dataset KITTI Odometry Benchmark and ranked #1 among semantic lidar methods with an average translation error of 0.82% in the test dataset at the time of writing. 激光雷达里程计（LO）是众多可靠、准确的自动驾驶定位和地图系统中的关键技术。最先进的 LO 方法通常利用几何信息来执行点云配准。此外，获得能够更丰富地描述环境的点云语义信息将有助于配准。我们提出了一种基于自行设计的参数化语义特征（PSF）的新型语义激光雷达里程计方法，以实现自动驾驶车辆实时低漂移自我运动估计。我们首先使用基于卷积神经网络的算法从输入激光点云中获取逐点语义，然后使用语义标签将道路、建筑物、交通标志和杆状点云分开并分别拟合以获得相应的PSF。基于 PSF 的快速匹配使我们能够细化几何特征 (GeF) 配准，减少模糊子图表面对 GeF 匹配精度的影响。此外，我们设计了一种有效的方法来准确识别和去除动态对象，同时保留语义点云中的静态对象，这有利于进一步提高LO的准确性。我们在公共数据集 KITTI Odometry Benchmark 上评估了我们的方法（即 PSF-LO），并在语义激光雷达方法中排名第一，在撰写本文时，测试数据集中的平均翻译误差为 0.82%。 本文提出了一种基于参数化语义特征（PSF）的激光雷达里程计方法PSF-LO，用于实现自动驾驶车辆的实时低漂移自运动估计。 Guibin Chen,Bosheng Wang,Xiaoliang Wang,Huanjun Deng,Bing Wang,Shuo Zhang cs.CV

title: The Age-related Differences in Web Information Search Process
title_zh: 网络信息搜索过程中与年龄相关的差异
abstract: Older adults' need for quality health information has never been more critical as during the COVID-19 pandemic. Yet, they are susceptible to the wide-spread misinformation disseminated through search engines and social media. To build a search-related behavioral profile of older adults, this article surveys the empirical research on age-related differences in query formulation, search strategies, information evaluation, and susceptibility to misinformation effects. It also decomposes the mechanisms (i.e., cognitive changes, development goal shift) and moderators (i.e., search task and interface design) of such differences. To inform the design of information systems to improve older adults' information search experience, we discuss opportunities for future research.
summary: Older adults' need for quality health information has never been more critical as during the COVID-19 pandemic. Yet, they are susceptible to the wide-spread misinformation disseminated through search engines and social media. To build a search-related behavioral profile of older adults, this article surveys the empirical research on age-related differences in query formulation, search strategies, information evaluation, and susceptibility to misinformation effects. It also decomposes the mechanisms (i.e., cognitive changes, development goal shift) and moderators (i.e., search task and interface design) of such differences. To inform the design of information systems to improve older adults' information search experience, we discuss opportunities for future research.
abstract_zh: 在 COVID-19 大流行期间，老年人对优质健康信息的需求从未像现在这样迫切。然而，他们很容易受到通过搜索引擎和社交媒体传播的广泛传播的错误信息的影响。为了建立老年人与搜索相关的行为概况，本文调查了有关查询制定、搜索策略、信息评估和对错误信息影响的敏感性等方面与年龄相关的差异的实证研究。它还分解了这种差异的机制（即认知变化、发展目标转变）和调节因素（即搜索任务和界面设计）。为了为信息系统的设计提供信息以改善老年人的信息搜索体验，我们讨论了未来研究的机会。

AI.tldr: 分析老年人在网页信息搜索过程中的年龄差异及其影响机制，以优化信息系统的界面设计。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间老年人对健康信息需求增加，但易受错误信息影响，需研究其搜索行为差异以改进系统设计。
AI.method: 综述实证研究，分解认知变化等机制及搜索任务等调节因素，讨论未来研究方向。
AI.result: 发现老年人在查询构建、策略、信息评估及错误信息易感性方面存在显著差异，受认知变化和界面设计影响。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究以优化信息系统的界面设计，提升老年人信息搜索体验与准确性。

authors_text: Xiong Cai,Dongyang Dai,Zhiyong Wu,Xiang Li,Jingbei Li,Helen Meng
title: Emotion controllable speech synthesis using emotion-unlabeled dataset with the assistance of cross-domain speech emotion recognition
title_zh: 在跨域语音情感识别的帮助下，使用情感未标记数据集进行情感可控语音合成
abstract: Neural text-to-speech (TTS) approaches generally require a huge number of high quality speech data, which makes it difficult to obtain such a dataset with extra emotion labels. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for emotional TTS synthesis on a TTS dataset without emotion labels. Specifically, our proposed method consists of a cross-domain speech emotion recognition (SER) model and an emotional TTS model. Firstly, we train the cross-domain SER model on both SER and TTS datasets. Then, we use emotion labels on the TTS dataset predicted by the trained SER model to build an auxiliary SER task and jointly train it with the TTS model. Experimental results show that our proposed method can generate speech with the specified emotional expressiveness and nearly no hindering on the speech quality.
summary: Neural text-to-speech (TTS) approaches generally require a huge number of high quality speech data, which makes it difficult to obtain such a dataset with extra emotion labels. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for emotional TTS synthesis on a TTS dataset without emotion labels. Specifically, our proposed method consists of a cross-domain speech emotion recognition (SER) model and an emotional TTS model. Firstly, we train the cross-domain SER model on both SER and TTS datasets. Then, we use emotion labels on the TTS dataset predicted by the trained SER model to build an auxiliary SER task and jointly train it with the TTS model. Experimental results show that our proposed method can generate speech with the specified emotional expressiveness and nearly no hindering on the speech quality.
abstract_zh: 神经文本转语音（TTS）方法通常需要大量高质量的语音数据，这使得很难获得带有额外情感标签的数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种在没有情感标签的 TTS 数据集上进行情感 TTS 合成的新方法。具体来说，我们提出的方法由跨域语音情感识别（SER）模型和情感 TTS 模型组成。首先，我们在 SER 和 TTS 数据集上训练跨域 SER 模型。然后，我们使用经过训练的 SER 模型预测的 TTS 数据集上的情感标签来构建辅助 SER 任务，并将其与 TTS 模型联合训练。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以生成具有指定情感表达力的语音，并且几乎不影响语音质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需情感标签数据集的可控情感语音合成方法，通过跨领域语音情感识别模型辅助实现。
AI.motivation: 传统神经文本到语音合成需大量带情感标签的高质量数据，但此类数据获取困难，需探索无标签数据下的情感合成方案。
AI.method: 构建跨领域语音情感识别模型（SER）与情感TTS模型，利用SER模型预测的TTS数据情感标签作为辅助任务进行联合训练。
AI.result: 生成语音可实现指定情感表达，且语音质量未受明显影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了无情感标签数据下的情感语音合成问题，在保持语音质量的同时实现情感可控性。

authors_text: Sayed Amir Hoseini,Ayub Bokani,Jahan Hassan,Shavbo Salehi,Salil S. Kanhere
title: Energy and Service-priority aware Trajectory Design for UAV-BSs using Double Q-Learning
title_zh: 使用双 Q 学习的 UAV-BS 能量和服务优先感知轨迹设计
abstract: Next-generation mobile networks have proposed the integration of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) as aerial base stations (UAV-BS) to serve ground nodes. Despite having advantages of using UAV-BSs, their dependence on the on-board, limited-capacity battery hinders their service continuity. Shorter trajectories can save flying energy, however, UAV-BSs must also serve nodes based on their service priority since nodes' service requirements are not always the same. In this paper, we present an energy-efficient trajectory optimization for a UAV assisted IoT system in which the UAV-BS considers the IoT nodes' service priorities in making its movement decisions. We solve the trajectory optimization problem using Double Q-Learning algorithm. Simulation results reveal that the Q-Learning based optimized trajectory outperforms a benchmark algorithm, namely Greedily-served algorithm, in terms of reducing the average energy consumption of the UAV-BS as well as the service delay for high priority nodes.
summary: Next-generation mobile networks have proposed the integration of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) as aerial base stations (UAV-BS) to serve ground nodes. Despite having advantages of using UAV-BSs, their dependence on the on-board, limited-capacity battery hinders their service continuity. Shorter trajectories can save flying energy, however, UAV-BSs must also serve nodes based on their service priority since nodes' service requirements are not always the same. In this paper, we present an energy-efficient trajectory optimization for a UAV assisted IoT system in which the UAV-BS considers the IoT nodes' service priorities in making its movement decisions. We solve the trajectory optimization problem using Double Q-Learning algorithm. Simulation results reveal that the Q-Learning based optimized trajectory outperforms a benchmark algorithm, namely Greedily-served algorithm, in terms of reducing the average energy consumption of the UAV-BS as well as the service delay for high priority nodes.
abstract_zh: 下一代移动网络提出将无人机（UAV）集成为空中基站（UAV-BS）来服务地面节点。尽管使用无人机基站具有优势，但它们对机载有限容量电池的依赖阻碍了其服务连续性。较短的轨迹可以节省飞行能量，但是，无人机基站还必须根据其服务优先级为节点提供服务，因为节点的服务要求并不总是相同。在本文中，我们提出了一种无人机辅助物联网系统的节能轨迹优化，其中无人机基站在做出移动决策时考虑物联网节点的服务优先级。我们使用 Double Q-Learning 算法解决轨迹优化问题。仿真结果表明，基于 Q-Learning 的优化轨迹在降低 UAV-BS 的平均能耗以及高优先级节点的服务延迟方面优于基准算法（即贪婪服务算法）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双重Q学习的无人机基站轨迹设计方法，以平衡能耗与服务优先级。
AI.motivation: 无人机基站依赖有限电池容量，需在节能与满足不同节点服务优先级需求间取得平衡。
AI.method: 采用双重Q学习算法解决轨迹优化问题，综合考虑物联网节点的服务优先级进行路径决策。
AI.result: 仿真表明，该方法在降低无人机能耗和高优先级节点服务延迟方面优于贪心算法。
AI.conclusion: 双重Q学习框架能有效实现无人机轨迹的能耗优化与服务优先级保障的协同提升。

search_text: Energy and Service-priority aware Trajectory Design for UAV-BSs using Double Q-Learning 使用双 Q 学习的 UAV-BS 能量和服务优先感知轨迹设计 Next-generation mobile networks have proposed the integration of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) as aerial base stations (UAV-BS) to serve ground nodes. Despite having advantages of using UAV-BSs, their dependence on the on-board, limited-capacity battery hinders their service continuity. Shorter trajectories can save flying energy, however, UAV-BSs must also serve nodes based on their service priority since nodes' service requirements are not always the same. In this paper, we present an energy-efficient trajectory optimization for a UAV assisted IoT system in which the UAV-BS considers the IoT nodes' service priorities in making its movement decisions. We solve the trajectory optimization problem using Double Q-Learning algorithm. Simulation results reveal that the Q-Learning based optimized trajectory outperforms a benchmark algorithm, namely Greedily-served algorithm, in terms of reducing the average energy consumption of the UAV-BS as well as the service delay for high priority nodes. 下一代移动网络提出将无人机（UAV）集成为空中基站（UAV-BS）来服务地面节点。尽管使用无人机基站具有优势，但它们对机载有限容量电池的依赖阻碍了其服务连续性。较短的轨迹可以节省飞行能量，但是，无人机基站还必须根据其服务优先级为节点提供服务，因为节点的服务要求并不总是相同。在本文中，我们提出了一种无人机辅助物联网系统的节能轨迹优化，其中无人机基站在做出移动决策时考虑物联网节点的服务优先级。我们使用 Double Q-Learning 算法解决轨迹优化问题。仿真结果表明，基于 Q-Learning 的优化轨迹在降低 UAV-BS 的平均能耗以及高优先级节点的服务延迟方面优于基准算法（即贪婪服务算法）。 本文提出一种基于双重Q学习的无人机基站轨迹设计方法，以平衡能耗与服务优先级。 Sayed Amir Hoseini,Ayub Bokani,Jahan Hassan,Shavbo Salehi,Salil S. Kanhere cs.NI,cs.AI

title: Semi supervised segmentation and graph-based tracking of 3D nuclei in time-lapse microscopy
title_zh: 延时显微镜中 3D 细胞核的半监督分割和基于图形的跟踪
abstract: We propose a novel weakly supervised method to improve the boundary of the 3D segmented nuclei utilizing an over-segmented image. This is motivated by the observation that current state-of-the-art deep learning methods do not result in accurate boundaries when the training data is weakly annotated. Towards this, a 3D U-Net is trained to get the centroid of the nuclei and integrated with a simple linear iterative clustering (SLIC) supervoxel algorithm that provides better adherence to cluster boundaries. To track these segmented nuclei, our algorithm utilizes the relative nuclei location depicting the processes of nuclei division and apoptosis. The proposed algorithmic pipeline achieves better segmentation performance compared to the state-of-the-art method in Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) 2019 and comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods in IEEE ISBI CTC2020 while utilizing very few pixel-wise annotated data. Detailed experimental results are provided, and the source code is available on GitHub.
summary: We propose a novel weakly supervised method to improve the boundary of the 3D segmented nuclei utilizing an over-segmented image. This is motivated by the observation that current state-of-the-art deep learning methods do not result in accurate boundaries when the training data is weakly annotated. Towards this, a 3D U-Net is trained to get the centroid of the nuclei and integrated with a simple linear iterative clustering (SLIC) supervoxel algorithm that provides better adherence to cluster boundaries. To track these segmented nuclei, our algorithm utilizes the relative nuclei location depicting the processes of nuclei division and apoptosis. The proposed algorithmic pipeline achieves better segmentation performance compared to the state-of-the-art method in Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) 2019 and comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods in IEEE ISBI CTC2020 while utilizing very few pixel-wise annotated data. Detailed experimental results are provided, and the source code is available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督方法，利用过度分割图像来改善 3D 分割核的边界。这是由于观察到当训练数据弱注释时，当前最先进的深度学习方法不会产生准确的边界。为此，我们训练 3D U-Net 来获取细胞核的质心，并与简单的线性迭代聚类 (SLIC) 超体素算法集成，以更好地遵守聚类边界。为了跟踪这些分段的细胞核，我们的算法利用描述细胞核分裂和细胞凋亡过程的相对细胞核位置。与 Cell Tracking Challenge (CTC) 2019 中最先进的方法相比，所提出的算法管道实现了更好的分割性能，并且在利用很少的像素级注释数据的情况下，实现了与 IEEE ISBI CTC2020 中最先进的方法相当的性能。提供了详细的实验结果，源代码可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法，利用超分割图像改进3D细胞核分割边界，并结合图基追踪技术实现时序显微镜下细胞核的分割与追踪。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在弱标注数据下难以生成精确的细胞核边界，且缺乏对核分裂和凋亡过程的有效追踪。
AI.method: 采用3D U-Net获取细胞核质心，结合SLIC超体聚类算法优化边界；通过核相对位置信息实现基于图的追踪算法。
AI.result: 在CTC2019数据集上优于现有方法，在CTC2020数据集上表现相当，且仅需少量像素级标注数据，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合深度学习与聚类算法，在弱标注条件下实现了更精确的3D细胞核分割与动态追踪。

authors_text: Bin Su,Shaoguang Mao,Frank Soong,Yan Xia,Jonathan Tien,Zhiyong Wu
title: Improving pronunciation assessment via ordinal regression with anchored reference samples
title_zh: 通过锚定参考样本的序数回归改进发音评估
abstract: Sentence level pronunciation assessment is important for Computer Assisted Language Learning (CALL). Traditional speech pronunciation assessment, based on the Goodness of Pronunciation (GOP) algorithm, has some weakness in assessing a speech utterance: 1) Phoneme GOP scores cannot be easily translated into a sentence score with a simple average for effective assessment; 2) The rank ordering information has not been well exploited in GOP scoring for delivering a robust assessment and correlate well with a human rater's evaluations. In this paper, we propose two new statistical features, average GOP (aGOP) and confusion GOP (cGOP) and use them to train a binary classifier in Ordinal Regression with Anchored Reference Samples (ORARS). When the proposed approach is tested on Microsoft mTutor ESL Dataset, a relative improvement of Pearson correlation coefficient of 26.9% is obtained over the conventional GOP-based one. The performance is at a human-parity level or better than human raters.
summary: Sentence level pronunciation assessment is important for Computer Assisted Language Learning (CALL). Traditional speech pronunciation assessment, based on the Goodness of Pronunciation (GOP) algorithm, has some weakness in assessing a speech utterance: 1) Phoneme GOP scores cannot be easily translated into a sentence score with a simple average for effective assessment; 2) The rank ordering information has not been well exploited in GOP scoring for delivering a robust assessment and correlate well with a human rater's evaluations. In this paper, we propose two new statistical features, average GOP (aGOP) and confusion GOP (cGOP) and use them to train a binary classifier in Ordinal Regression with Anchored Reference Samples (ORARS). When the proposed approach is tested on Microsoft mTutor ESL Dataset, a relative improvement of Pearson correlation coefficient of 26.9% is obtained over the conventional GOP-based one. The performance is at a human-parity level or better than human raters.
abstract_zh: 句子级发音评估对于计算机辅助语言学习 (CALL) 非常重要。传统的基于GOP（Goodness of Pronunciation）算法的语音发音评估在评估语音表达方面存在一些弱点：1）音素GOP分数不能轻易转化为简单平均的句子分数来进行有效评估； 2) 排名排序信息在 GOP 评分中尚未得到充分利用，无法提供可靠的评估，也没有与人类评估者的评估良好相关。在本文中，我们提出了两个新的统计特征，即平均 GOP (aGOP) 和混淆 GOP (cGOP)，并使用它们来训练锚定参考样本序数回归 (ORARS) 中的二元分类器。当所提出的方法在 Microsoft mTutor ESL 数据集上进行测试时，与传统的基于 GOP 的方法相比，皮尔逊相关系数相对提高了 26.9%。其表现达到人类同等水平或优于人类评估者。

AI.tldr: 通过引入有序回归与锚定参考样本的方法，改进计算机辅助语言学习中的语音发音评估系统。
AI.motivation: 传统基于GOP算法的发音评估存在两大缺陷：音素得分难以直接平均为句子得分，且未充分利用排序信息导致评估结果与人类评分关联性不足。
AI.method: 提出平均GOP(aGOP)和混淆GOP(cGOP)两个新特征，结合有序回归与锚定参考样本(ORARS)框架训练二分类模型。
AI.result: 在Microsoft mTutor ESL数据集测试中，Pearson相关系数相对提升26.9%，达到或超越人类评分水平。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了传统GOP评估的局限性，在发音评估任务中实现了与人类评分相当的性能。

authors_text: Songyan Zhang,Zhicheng Wang,Qiang Wang,Jinshuo Zhang,Gang Wei,Xiaowen Chu
title: EDNet: Efficient Disparity Estimation with Cost Volume Combination and Attention-based Spatial Residual
title_zh: EDNet：利用成本量组合和基于注意力的空间残差进行高效视差估计
abstract: Existing state-of-the-art disparity estimation works mostly leverage the 4D concatenation volume and construct a very deep 3D convolution neural network (CNN) for disparity regression, which is inefficient due to the high memory consumption and slow inference speed. In this paper, we propose a network named EDNet for efficient disparity estimation. Firstly, we construct a combined volume which incorporates contextual information from the squeezed concatenation volume and feature similarity measurement from the correlation volume. The combined volume can be next aggregated by 2D convolutions which are faster and require less memory than 3D convolutions. Secondly, we propose an attention-based spatial residual module to generate attention-aware residual features. The attention mechanism is applied to provide intuitive spatial evidence about inaccurate regions with the help of error maps at multiple scales and thus improve the residual learning efficiency. Extensive experiments on the Scene Flow and KITTI datasets show that EDNet outperforms the previous 3D CNN based works and achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly faster speed and less memory consumption.
summary: Existing state-of-the-art disparity estimation works mostly leverage the 4D concatenation volume and construct a very deep 3D convolution neural network (CNN) for disparity regression, which is inefficient due to the high memory consumption and slow inference speed. In this paper, we propose a network named EDNet for efficient disparity estimation. Firstly, we construct a combined volume which incorporates contextual information from the squeezed concatenation volume and feature similarity measurement from the correlation volume. The combined volume can be next aggregated by 2D convolutions which are faster and require less memory than 3D convolutions. Secondly, we propose an attention-based spatial residual module to generate attention-aware residual features. The attention mechanism is applied to provide intuitive spatial evidence about inaccurate regions with the help of error maps at multiple scales and thus improve the residual learning efficiency. Extensive experiments on the Scene Flow and KITTI datasets show that EDNet outperforms the previous 3D CNN based works and achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly faster speed and less memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 现有最先进的视差估计工作大多利用 4D 连接量并构建非常深的 3D 卷积神经网络（CNN）进行视差回归，但由于内存消耗高和推理速度慢而效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 EDNet 的网络来进行有效的视差估计。首先，我们构建一个组合卷，其中包含来自压缩串联卷的上下文信息和来自相关卷的特征相似度测量。接下来可以通过 2D 卷积来聚合组合体积，2D 卷积比 3D 卷积更快且需要更少的内存。其次，我们提出了一种基于注意力的空间残差模块来生成注意力感知的残差特征。应用注意力机制借助多个尺度的误差图来提供有关不准确区域的直观空间证据，从而提高残差学习效率。对 Scene Flow 和 KITTI 数据集的大量实验表明，EDNet 优于之前基于 3D CNN 的工作，并以更快的速度和更少的内存消耗实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EDNet网络，通过结合成本体积与注意力机制实现高效视差估计。
AI.motivation: 现有视差估计方法依赖高内存消耗的3D卷积网络，导致推理速度慢且效率低下。
AI.method: 构建融合压缩拼接体积与相关体积的组合体积，采用2D卷积降低计算量；设计基于注意力的空间残差模块，利用多尺度误差图优化残差学习。
AI.result: 在Scene Flow和KITTI数据集上，EDNet相较3D CNN方法实现更快速度与更低内存占用，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: EDNet通过创新体积构建与注意力机制有效提升了视差估计的效率与精度。

search_text: EDNet: Efficient Disparity Estimation with Cost Volume Combination and Attention-based Spatial Residual EDNet：利用成本量组合和基于注意力的空间残差进行高效视差估计 Existing state-of-the-art disparity estimation works mostly leverage the 4D concatenation volume and construct a very deep 3D convolution neural network (CNN) for disparity regression, which is inefficient due to the high memory consumption and slow inference speed. In this paper, we propose a network named EDNet for efficient disparity estimation. Firstly, we construct a combined volume which incorporates contextual information from the squeezed concatenation volume and feature similarity measurement from the correlation volume. The combined volume can be next aggregated by 2D convolutions which are faster and require less memory than 3D convolutions. Secondly, we propose an attention-based spatial residual module to generate attention-aware residual features. The attention mechanism is applied to provide intuitive spatial evidence about inaccurate regions with the help of error maps at multiple scales and thus improve the residual learning efficiency. Extensive experiments on the Scene Flow and KITTI datasets show that EDNet outperforms the previous 3D CNN based works and achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly faster speed and less memory consumption. 现有最先进的视差估计工作大多利用 4D 连接量并构建非常深的 3D 卷积神经网络（CNN）进行视差回归，但由于内存消耗高和推理速度慢而效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 EDNet 的网络来进行有效的视差估计。首先，我们构建一个组合卷，其中包含来自压缩串联卷的上下文信息和来自相关卷的特征相似度测量。接下来可以通过 2D 卷积来聚合组合体积，2D 卷积比 3D 卷积更快且需要更少的内存。其次，我们提出了一种基于注意力的空间残差模块来生成注意力感知的残差特征。应用注意力机制借助多个尺度的误差图来提供有关不准确区域的直观空间证据，从而提高残差学习效率。对 Scene Flow 和 KITTI 数据集的大量实验表明，EDNet 优于之前基于 3D CNN 的工作，并以更快的速度和更少的内存消耗实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出EDNet网络，通过结合成本体积与注意力机制实现高效视差估计。 Songyan Zhang,Zhicheng Wang,Qiang Wang,Jinshuo Zhang,Gang Wei,Xiaowen Chu cs.CV

title: Robust Pre-Training by Adversarial Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对抗性对比学习进行稳健的预训练
abstract: Recent work has shown that, when integrated with adversarial training, self-supervised pre-training can lead to state-of-the-art robustness In this work, we improve robustness-aware self-supervised pre-training by learning representations that are consistent under both data augmentations and adversarial perturbations. Our approach leverages a recent contrastive learning framework, which learns representations by maximizing feature consistency under differently augmented views. This fits particularly well with the goal of adversarial robustness, as one cause of adversarial fragility is the lack of feature invariance, i.e., small input perturbations can result in undesirable large changes in features or even predicted labels. We explore various options to formulate the contrastive task, and demonstrate that by injecting adversarial perturbations, contrastive pre-training can lead to models that are both label-efficient and robust. We empirically evaluate the proposed Adversarial Contrastive Learning (ACL) and show it can consistently outperform existing methods. For example on the CIFAR-10 dataset, ACL outperforms the previous state-of-the-art unsupervised robust pre-training approach by 2.99% on robust accuracy and 2.14% on standard accuracy. We further demonstrate that ACL pre-training can improve semi-supervised adversarial training, even when only a few labeled examples are available. Our codes and pre-trained models have been released at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/Adversarial-Contrastive-Learning.
summary: Recent work has shown that, when integrated with adversarial training, self-supervised pre-training can lead to state-of-the-art robustness In this work, we improve robustness-aware self-supervised pre-training by learning representations that are consistent under both data augmentations and adversarial perturbations. Our approach leverages a recent contrastive learning framework, which learns representations by maximizing feature consistency under differently augmented views. This fits particularly well with the goal of adversarial robustness, as one cause of adversarial fragility is the lack of feature invariance, i.e., small input perturbations can result in undesirable large changes in features or even predicted labels. We explore various options to formulate the contrastive task, and demonstrate that by injecting adversarial perturbations, contrastive pre-training can lead to models that are both label-efficient and robust. We empirically evaluate the proposed Adversarial Contrastive Learning (ACL) and show it can consistently outperform existing methods. For example on the CIFAR-10 dataset, ACL outperforms the previous state-of-the-art unsupervised robust pre-training approach by 2.99% on robust accuracy and 2.14% on standard accuracy. We further demonstrate that ACL pre-training can improve semi-supervised adversarial training, even when only a few labeled examples are available. Our codes and pre-trained models have been released at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/Adversarial-Contrastive-Learning.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，当与对抗性训练相结合时，自监督预训练可以带来最先进的鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们通过学习在数据增强和对抗性扰动下一致的表示来改进鲁棒性感知的自监督预训练。我们的方法利用了最近的对比学习框架，该框架通过在不同增强视图下最大化特征一致性来学习表示。这特别符合对抗性鲁棒性的目标，因为对抗性脆弱性的原因之一是缺乏特征不变性，即小的输入扰动可能会导致特征甚至预测标签发生不期望的大变化。我们探索了制定对比任务的各种选项，并证明通过注入对抗性扰动，对比预训练可以产生标签高效且稳健的模型。我们根据经验评估了所提出的对抗性对比学习（ACL），并表明它可以始终优于现有方法。例如，在 CIFAR-10 数据集上，ACL 的鲁棒精度比之前最先进的无监督鲁棒预训练方法高出 2.99%，标准精度高出 2.14%。我们进一步证明，即使只有少数标记示例可用，ACL 预训练也可以改善半监督对抗训练。我们的代码和预训练模型已发布于：https://github.com/VITA-Group/Adversarial-Contrastive-Learning。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对抗对比学习（ACL）方法，通过结合对抗扰动和对比学习框架，提升自监督预训练模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在对抗扰动下表现脆弱，因特征不变性不足。对比学习可通过增强视图一致性提升鲁棒性，而对抗扰动可进一步强化这一特性。
AI.method: 基于对比学习框架，注入对抗扰动生成增强视图，最大化特征一致性，从而学习鲁棒表示。探索多种对比任务形式，提升标签效率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，ACL鲁棒准确率比之前最优方法高2.99%，标准准确率高2.14%。半监督训练中少量标签即可显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: ACL有效提升预训练鲁棒性，验证了对抗扰动与对比学习结合的潜力，开源代码和模型供研究使用。

authors_text: Hojjat Salehinejad,Edward Ho,Hui-Ming Lin,Priscila Crivellaro,Oleksandra Samorodova,Monica Tafur Arciniegas,Zamir Merali,Suradech Suthiphosuwan,Aditya Bharatha,Kristen Yeom,Muhammad Mamdani,Jefferson Wilson,Errol Colak
title: Deep Sequential Learning for Cervical Spine Fracture Detection on Computed Tomography Imaging
title_zh: 计算机断层扫描成像中颈椎骨折检测的深度序列学习
comment: This paper is accepted for presentation at the IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2021
comments: This paper is accepted for presentation at the IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2021
abstract: Fractures of the cervical spine are a medical emergency and may lead to permanent paralysis and even death. Accurate diagnosis in patients with suspected fractures by computed tomography (CT) is critical to patient management. In this paper, we propose a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) with a bidirectional long-short term memory (BLSTM) layer for the automated detection of cervical spine fractures in CT axial images. We used an annotated dataset of 3,666 CT scans (729 positive and 2,937 negative cases) to train and validate the model. The validation results show a classification accuracy of 70.92% and 79.18% on the balanced (104 positive and 104 negative cases) and imbalanced (104 positive and 419 negative cases) test datasets, respectively.
summary: Fractures of the cervical spine are a medical emergency and may lead to permanent paralysis and even death. Accurate diagnosis in patients with suspected fractures by computed tomography (CT) is critical to patient management. In this paper, we propose a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) with a bidirectional long-short term memory (BLSTM) layer for the automated detection of cervical spine fractures in CT axial images. We used an annotated dataset of 3,666 CT scans (729 positive and 2,937 negative cases) to train and validate the model. The validation results show a classification accuracy of 70.92% and 79.18% on the balanced (104 positive and 104 negative cases) and imbalanced (104 positive and 419 negative cases) test datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 颈椎骨折是一种医疗紧急情况，可能导致永久性瘫痪甚至死亡。通过计算机断层扫描 (CT) 对疑似骨折患者进行准确诊断对于患者管理至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有双向长期短期记忆（BLSTM）层的深度卷积神经网络（DCNN），用于自动检测 CT 轴向图像中的颈椎骨折。我们使用包含 3,666 个 CT 扫描（729 个阳性病例和 2,937 个阴性病例）的带注释数据集来训练和验证模型。验证结果显示，平衡（104 个正例和 104 个负例）和不平衡（104 个正例和 419 个负例）测试数据集的分类准确率分别为 70.92% 和 79.18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合双向长短期记忆网络（BLSTM）的深度卷积神经网络（DCNN），用于自动检测CT影像中的颈椎骨折。
AI.motivation: 颈椎骨折是医疗紧急情况，准确诊断对患者治疗至关重要，而传统方法依赖医生经验，存在主观性和效率问题。
AI.method: 构建包含BLSTM层的DCNN模型，使用3,666例CT扫描（729例阳性、2,937例阴性）进行训练和验证，测试集分为平衡与不平衡两种数据分布。
AI.result: 模型在平衡测试集（104正/104负）和不平衡测试集（104正/419负）上的分类准确率分别为70.92%和79.18%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在CT影像骨折检测中表现有效，尤其在不平衡数据集上具有较高准确率，为临床自动化诊断提供参考。
